This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.

# File Summary

## Purpose
This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.

## File Format
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files (if enabled)
5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
  a. A header with the file path (## File: path/to/file)
  b. The full contents of the file in a code block

## Usage Guidelines
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.

## Notes
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Files matching these patterns are excluded: **/.next/**, **/node_modules/**, **/.git/**, **/dist/**, **/*.png, **/*.jpg, **/*.ico, **/*.svg, **/.env*, **/repomix-output*, tmp/**, bin/**, **/*.exe, **/vendor/**
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

# Files

## File: backend/internal/domain/server.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"net/http"
 6: 	"time"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type Server struct {
10: 	httpServer *http.Server
11: }
12: 
13: func (s *Server) Run(port string, handler http.Handler) error {
14: 	s.httpServer = &http.Server{
15: 		Addr:           ":" + port,
16: 		Handler:        handler,
17: 		MaxHeaderBytes: 1 << 20,
18: 		ReadTimeout:    10 * time.Second,
19: 		WriteTimeout:   10 * time.Second,
20: 	}
21: 
22: 	return s.httpServer.ListenAndServe()
23: }
24: 
25: func (s *Server) Shutdown(ctx context.Context) error {
26: 	return s.httpServer.Shutdown(ctx)
27: }
````

````typescript
157:                     <TableCell>
158:                       <Checkbox 
159:                         onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
160:                           if (checked) setSelectedSurplus([...selectedSurplus, item.id])
161:                           else setSelectedSurplus(selectedSurplus.filter(id => id !== item.id))
162:                         }}
163:                       />
164:                     </TableCell>
165:                     <TableCell className="font-medium">{item.mnn}</TableCell>
166:                     <TableCell className="font-mono text-sm">{item.batch_serial}</TableCell>
167:                     <TableCell className="text-right">{item.expected}</TableCell>
168:                     <TableCell className="text-right">{item.actual}</TableCell>
169:                     <TableCell className="text-right font-bold text-success">+{item.diff}</TableCell>
170:                   </TableRow>
171:                 ))}
172:               </TableBody>
173:             </Table>
174:           </div>
175:         </TabsContent>
176: 
177:         <TabsContent value="deficit" className="space-y-4">
178:           <div className="border border-border bg-card">
179:             <Table>
180:               <TableHeader>
181:                 <TableRow className="bg-muted/50">
182:                   <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
183:                   <TableHead>МНН / Наименование</TableHead>
184:                   <TableHead>Серия</TableHead>
185:                   <TableHead className="text-right">Система</TableHead>
186:                   <TableHead className="text-right">Факт</TableHead>
187:                   <TableHead className="text-right">Разница</TableHead>
188:                 </TableRow>
189:               </TableHeader>
190:               <TableBody>
191:                 {mockResults.deficit.map((item) => (
192:                   <TableRow key={item.id}>
193:                     <TableCell>
194:                       <Checkbox 
195:                         onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
196:                           if (checked) setSelectedDeficit([...selectedDeficit, item.id])
197:                           else setSelectedDeficit(selectedDeficit.filter(id => id !== item.id))
198:                         }}
199:                       />
200:                     </TableCell>
201:                     <TableCell className="font-medium">{item.mnn}</TableCell>
202:                     <TableCell className="font-mono text-sm">{item.batch_serial}</TableCell>
203:                     <TableCell className="text-right">{item.expected}</TableCell>
204:                     <TableCell className="text-right">{item.actual}</TableCell>
205:                     <TableCell className="text-right font-bold text-destructive">{item.diff}</TableCell>
206:                   </TableRow>
207:                 ))}
208:               </TableBody>
209:             </Table>
210:           </div>
211:         </TabsContent>
212: 
213:         <TabsContent value="ok">
214:           <div className="border border-border bg-card opacity-60">
215:             <Table>
216:               <TableHeader>
217:                 <TableRow className="bg-muted/50">
218:                   <TableHead>МНН / Наименование</TableHead>
219:                   <TableHead>Серия</TableHead>
220:                   <TableHead className="text-right">Система</TableHead>
221:                   <TableHead className="text-right">Факт</TableHead>
222:                 </TableRow>
223:               </TableHeader>
224:               <TableBody>
225:                 {mockResults.ok.map((item) => (
226:                   <TableRow key={item.id}>
227:                     <TableCell className="font-medium">{item.mnn}</TableCell>
228:                     <TableCell className="font-mono text-sm">{item.batch_serial}</TableCell>
229:                     <TableCell className="text-right">{item.expected}</TableCell>
230:                     <TableCell className="text-right">{item.actual}</TableCell>
231:                   </TableRow>
232:                 ))}
233:               </TableBody>
234:             </Table>
235:           </div>
236:         </TabsContent>
237:       </Tabs>
238: 
239:       {/* Admin Netting Block */}
240:       <div className="bg-muted border border-border p-6 space-y-4">
241:         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
242:           <ShieldAlert className="h-6 w-6 text-primary" />
243:           <h3 className="text-lg font-bold">Панель администратора: Акт зачёта (Пересортица)</h3>
244:         </div>
245:         <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl">
246:           Вы можете компенсировать недостачи одного товара излишками другого товара с аналогичными характеристиками и ценой. 
247:           Выберите позиции в таблицах выше для формирования акта.
248:         </p>
249:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-card p-4 border border-border">
250:           <div>
251:             <span className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase text-muted-foreground block mb-1">Выбрано позиций</span>
252:             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
253:               <span className="text-success font-bold">+{selectedSurplus.length} излишка</span>
254:               <span className="text-muted-foreground">|</span>
255:               <span className="text-destructive font-bold">-{selectedDeficit.length} недостачи</span>
256:             </div>
257:           </div>
258:           <Button 
259:             variant="primary" 
260:             disabled={selectedSurplus.length === 0 || selectedDeficit.length === 0}
261:             onClick={() => setNettingDialogOpen(true)}
262:           >
263:             Сформировать акт зачёта
264:           </Button>
265:         </div>
266:       </div>
267: 
268:       <NettingActDialog 
269:         open={nettingDialogOpen}
270:         onOpenChange={setNettingDialogOpen}
271:         onConfirm={handleNetting}
272:         surplusItems={mockResults.surplus.filter(i => selectedSurplus.includes(i.id))}
273:         deficitItems={mockResults.deficit.filter(i => selectedDeficit.includes(i.id))}
274:       />
275:     </div>
276:   )
277: }
````

````typescript
  1: "use client"
  2: 
  3: import { useState } from "react"
  4: import { useParams, useRouter } from "next/navigation"
  5: import { Search, AlertTriangle, ArrowLeft, Loader2, Save } from "lucide-react"
  6: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"

  8: import {
  9:   Table,
 10:   TableBody,
 11:   TableCell,

 13:   TableHeader,
 14:   TableRow,
 15: } from "@/components/ui/table"
 16: import { Progress } from "@/components/ui/progress"
 17: import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert"
 18: import { InventoryItemRow } from "@/components/inventory/inventory-item-row"
 19: import { CompleteDialog } from "@/components/inventory/complete-dialog"
 20: import Link from "next/link"
 21: 
 22: const mockItems = [
 23:   {
 24:     id: "item-1",
 25:     mnn: "Амоксициллин",
 26:     dosage_form: "Капсулы 500 мг",
 27:     batch_serial: "A2025B-44",
 28:     expiry_date: "12.2027",
 29:     actual_qty: 120,
 30:   },
 31:   {
 32:     id: "item-2",
 33:     mnn: "Парацетамол",
 34:     dosage_form: "Таблетки 500 мг",
 35:     batch_serial: "P-77890",
 36:     expiry_date: "05.2026",
 37:     actual_qty: null,
 38:   },
 39:   {
 40:     id: "item-3",
 41:     mnn: "Ибупрофен",
 42:     dosage_form: "Таб. п.о. 400 мг",
 43:     batch_serial: "IBU-2024-C",
 44:     expiry_date: "08.2028",
 45:     actual_qty: 450,
 46:   },
 47:   {
 48:     id: "item-4",
 49:     mnn: "Цефтриаксон",
 50:     dosage_form: "Пор. д/р ин. 1г",
 51:     batch_serial: "CEF-X1",
 52:     expiry_date: "11.2025",
 53:     actual_qty: null,
 54:   },
 55:   {
 56:     id: "item-5",
 57:     mnn: "Омепразол",
 58:     dosage_form: "Капс. киш/раств 20мг",
 59:     batch_serial: "OME-992",
 60:     expiry_date: "03.2027",
 61:     actual_qty: null,
 62:   },
 63: ]
 64: 
 65: export default function InventoryActiveSessionPage() {
 66:   const { id } = useParams()
 67:   const router = useRouter()
 68:   const [completeDialogOpen, setCompleteDialogOpen] = useState(false)
 69:   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
 70: 
 71:   const checkedCount = mockItems.filter(item => item.actual_qty !== null).length
 72:   const totalCount = mockItems.length
 73:   const progressPercent = (checkedCount / totalCount) * 100
 74:   const uncheckedCount = totalCount - checkedCount
 75: 
 76:   const handleComplete = () => {
 77:     // Simulating completion
 78:     router.push(`/inventory/${id}/results`)
 79:   }
 80: 
 81:   const filteredItems = mockItems.filter(item => 
 82:     item.mnn.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
 83:     item.batch_serial.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
 84:   )
 85: 
 86:   return (
 87:     <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">
 88:       {/* Top Session Info & Search */}
 89:       <div className="bg-card border border-border p-6 space-y-6 shadow-sm">
 90:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 91:           <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 92:             <Link href="/inventory" className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors">
 93:               <ArrowLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
 94:             </Link>
 95:             <div>
 96:               <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
 97:                 Инвентаризация <span className="text-primary">{id}</span>
 98:               </h1>
 99:               <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Зона: Общий склад</p>
100:             </div>
101:           </div>
102:           <div className="text-right min-w-[200px]">
103:             <div className="text-sm font-medium mb-2 flex justify-between">
104:               <span>Прогресс</span>
105:               <span className="text-primary">{checkedCount} из {totalCount}</span>
106:             </div>
107:             <Progress value={progressPercent} className="h-2 bg-muted transition-all" />
108:           </div>
109:         </div>
110:         
111:         <div className="relative">
112:           <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
113:           <Input 
114:             placeholder="Поиск по МНН, серии или DataMatrix..." 
115:             className="pl-10 h-12 border-border bg-background text-base"
116:             value={searchQuery}
117:             onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
118:           />
119:         </div>
120:       </div>
121: 
122:       {/* Table Content */}
123:       <div className="border border-border bg-card overflow-hidden">
124:           <Table>
125:             <TableHeader>
126:               <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent bg-muted/50">
127:                 <TableHead>Наименование (МНН)</TableHead>
128:                 <TableHead>Форма выпуска</TableHead>
129:                 <TableHead>Серия</TableHead>
130:                 <TableHead>Годен до</TableHead>
131:                 <TableHead className="w-[180px]">Факт. кол-во</TableHead>
132:               </TableRow>
133:             </TableHeader>
134:             <TableBody>
135:               {filteredItems.map((item) => (
136:                 <InventoryItemRow key={item.id} item={item} />
137:               ))}
138:               {filteredItems.length === 0 && (
139:                 <TableRow>
140:                   <TableCell colSpan={5} className="h-32 text-center text-muted-foreground">
141:                     По вашему запросу ничего не найдено
142:                   </TableCell>
143:                 </TableRow>
144:               )}
145:             </TableBody>
146:           </Table>
147:         </div>
148: 
149:       {/* Action Bar - Sticky above global footer */}
150:       <div className="sticky bottom-0 mt-auto bg-card border border-border p-4 shadow-lg z-20 flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
151:         <Alert 
152:           variant="warning" 
153:           className="border-warning/50 bg-warning-subtle py-3 px-4 max-w-lg flex items-start gap-3 [&>svg]:static [&>svg]:top-0 [&>svg]:left-0"
154:         >
155:           <AlertTriangle className="h-5 w-5 text-warning shrink-0" />
156:           <AlertDescription className="text-xs font-semibold text-warning-foreground leading-snug">
157:             {uncheckedCount > 0 
158:               ? `${uncheckedCount} позиций не проверено. Завершение закроет их с нулевым остатком.` 
159:               : "Все позиции проверены. Можно завершать инвентаризацию."}
160:           </AlertDescription>
161:         </Alert>
162:         
163:         <Button 
164:           variant="primary" 
165:           size="lg" 
166:           className="px-8 shadow-sm"
167:           onClick={() => setCompleteDialogOpen(true)}
168:         >
169:           Завершить инвентаризацию
170:         </Button>
171:       </div>
172: 
173:       <CompleteDialog 
174:         open={completeDialogOpen}
175:         onOpenChange={setCompleteDialogOpen}
176:         onConfirm={handleComplete}
177:         uncheckedCount={uncheckedCount}
178:       />
179:     </div>
180:   )
181: }
````

````typescript
 71:   },

 73: 
 74: export default function InventoryListPage() {
 75:   return (
 76:     <div className="container mx-auto py-8 space-y-8">
 77:       <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
 78:         <div>
 79:           <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">Инвентаризация</h1>
 80:           <p className="text-muted-foreground">Управление сессиями проверки складских остатков.</p>
 81:         </div>
 82:         <Button className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90">
 83:           <Plus className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /> Начать сессию
 84:         </Button>
 85:       </div>
 86: 
 87:       <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-3">
 88:         <Card>
 89:           <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2">
 90:             <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Активных сессий</CardTitle>
 91:             <Play className="h-4 w-4 text-blue" />
 92:           </CardHeader>
 93:           <CardContent>
 94:             <div className="text-2xl font-bold">1</div>
 95:             <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Ожидают завершения</p>
 96:           </CardContent>
 97:         </Card>
 98:         <Card>
 99:           <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2">
100:             <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Завершено (мес.)</CardTitle>
101:             <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-success" />
102:           </CardHeader>
103:           <CardContent>
104:             <div className="text-2xl font-bold">14</div>
105:             <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">+2 по сравнению с прошлым мес.</p>
106:           </CardContent>
107:         </Card>
108:         <Card>
109:           <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2">
110:             <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Выявлено расхождений</CardTitle>
111:             <FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-destructive" />
112:           </CardHeader>
113:           <CardContent>
114:             <div className="text-2xl font-bold">3%</div>
115:             <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">Средний показатель потерь</p>
116:           </CardContent>
117:         </Card>
118:       </div>
119: 
120:       <div className="space-y-4">
121:         <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 justify-between">
122:           <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
123:             <Search className="absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
124:             <Input
125:               type="search"
126:               placeholder="Поиск по ID или зоне..."
127:               className="pl-8"
128:             />
129:           </div>
130:           <Select defaultValue="all">
131:             <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
132:               <SelectValue placeholder="Статус" />
133:             </SelectTrigger>
134:             <SelectContent>
135:               <SelectItem value="all">Все статусы</SelectItem>
136:               <SelectItem value="in_progress">В процессе</SelectItem>
137:               <SelectItem value="completed">Завершенные</SelectItem>
138:               <SelectItem value="cancelled">Отмененные</SelectItem>
139:             </SelectContent>
140:           </Select>
141:         </div>
142: 
143:         <div className="border border-border">
144:           <Table>
145:             <TableHeader>
146:               <TableRow className="bg-muted hover:bg-muted">
147:                 <TableHead className="w-[100px]">ID</TableHead>
148:                 <TableHead>Зона склада</TableHead>
149:                 <TableHead>Статус</TableHead>
150:                 <TableHead>Начата</TableHead>
151:                 <TableHead className="text-right">Позиций</TableHead>
152:                 <TableHead className="text-right">Действие</TableHead>
153:               </TableRow>
154:             </TableHeader>
155:             <TableBody>
156:               {mockSessions.map((session) => (
157:                 <TableRow key={session.id}>
158:                   <TableCell className="font-mono font-bold text-primary">{session.id}</TableCell>
159:                   <TableCell>
160:                     <div>
161:                       <div className="font-medium">{session.zone}</div>
162:                       <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{session.startedBy}</div>
163:                     </div>
164:                   </TableCell>
165:                   <TableCell>
166:                     <SessionStatusBadge status={session.status} />
167:                   </TableCell>
168:                   <TableCell>
169:                     <div className="text-sm">
170:                       {session.startedAt}
171:                       {session.completedAt && (
172:                         <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Завершено: {session.completedAt}</div>
173:                       )}
174:                     </div>
175:                   </TableCell>
176:                   <TableCell className="text-right">
177:                     <div className="text-sm font-medium">
178:                       {session.checkedCount} / {session.itemsCount}
179:                     </div>
180:                     <div className="w-full bg-muted h-1 mt-1">
181:                       <div 
182:                         className="bg-primary h-1 transition-all" 
183:                         style={{ width: `${(session.checkedCount / session.itemsCount) * 100}%` }} 
184:                       />
185:                     </div>
186:                   </TableCell>
187:                   <TableCell className="text-right">
188:                     {session.status === "in_progress" ? (
189:                       <Link href={`/inventory/${session.id}`}>
190:                         <Button size="sm" variant="primary" className="h-8">
191:                           Продолжить <ChevronRight className="ml-1 h-3 w-3" />
192:                         </Button>
193:                       </Link>
194:                     ) : (
195:                       <Link href={`/inventory/${session.id}/results`}>
196:                         <Button size="sm" variant="outline" className="h-8">
197:                           Результаты
198:                         </Button>
199:                       </Link>
200:                     )}
201:                   </TableCell>
202:                 </TableRow>
203:               ))}
204:             </TableBody>
205:           </Table>
206:         </div>
207:       </div>
208:     </div>
209:   )
210: }
````

````typescript
 56:   items: [

 59:       name: "Амоксициллин 500мг",
 60:       sku: "AM500",
 61:       requested: 20,
 62:       recommendations: [
 63:         {
 64:           batch: "A2025B",
 65:           expiry: "15.06.2026",
 66:           remaining: "80 дней",
 67:           percent: 27,
 68:           isMosBlocked: true,
 69:           qty: 15
 70:         },
 71:         {
 72:           batch: "C2025X",
 73:           expiry: "15.01.2027",
 74:           remaining: "294 дня",
 75:           percent: 81,
 76:           isMosBlocked: false,
 77:           qty: 100
 78:         }
 79:       ]
 80:     },
 81:     {
 82:         id: "i2",
 83:         name: "Ибупрофен 200мг",
 84:         sku: "IB200",
 85:         requested: 50,
 86:         recommendations: [
 87:           {
 88:             batch: "IB-MOCK-1",
 89:             expiry: "20.12.2027",
 90:             remaining: "630 дней",
 91:             percent: 92,
 92:             isMosBlocked: false,
 93:             qty: 200
 94:           }
 95:         ]
 96:       }
 97:   ]
 98: };
 99: 
100: export default function AssemblePage() {
101:   const router = useRouter();
102:   const [assembledItems, setAssembledItems] = useState<Record<string, number>>({});
103:   const [isShipped, setIsShipped] = useState(false);
104:   const [showDialog, setShowDialog] = useState(false);
105:   const [kizDialog, setKizDialog] = useState<{ open: boolean; itemId: string; batchQty: number; batchLabel: string }>({
106:     open: false, itemId: "", batchQty: 0, batchLabel: "",
107:   });
108:   const [kizInput, setKizInput] = useState("");
109:   const [kizError, setKizError] = useState("");
110: 
111:   const handleKizConfirm = () => {
112:     if (kizInput.trim().length < 25) {
113:       setKizError("КИЗ слишком короткий — минимум 25 символов");
114:       return;
115:     }
116:     handleAssemble(kizDialog.itemId, kizDialog.batchQty);
117:     setKizInput("");
118:     setKizError("");
119:     setKizDialog({ open: false, itemId: "", batchQty: 0, batchLabel: "" });
120:   };
121:   const totalItems = MOCK_ORDER_DETAIL.items.length;
122:   const assembledCount = Object.keys(assembledItems).length;
123:   const progress = (assembledCount / totalItems) * 100;
124: 
125:   const handleAssemble = (itemId: string, qty: number) => {
126:     setAssembledItems(prev => ({ ...prev, [itemId]: qty }));
127:   };
128: 
129:   const handleShip = () => {
130:     setIsShipped(true);
131:   };
132: 
133:   return (
134:     <div className="container mx-auto py-8 px-4 max-w-4xl space-y-8">
135:       {/* Header */}
136:       <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
137:         <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={() => router.back()}>
138:           <ArrowLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
139:         </Button>
140:         <div className="flex-1">
141:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
142:             <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Сборка заказа #{MOCK_ORDER_DETAIL.id}</h1>
143:             <Badge variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-1.5 font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-[11px] px-2.5 py-1">
144:               <AlertCircle className="h-3 w-3 shrink-0" />
145:               CITO
146:             </Badge>
147:           </div>
148:           <p className="text-muted-foreground">{MOCK_ORDER_DETAIL.pharmacy} • {MOCK_ORDER_DETAIL.address}</p>
149:         </div>
150:       </div>
151: 
152:       {/* Progress Section */}
153:       <Card className="border-border shadow-md bg-card">
154:         <CardContent className="pt-6">
155:           <div className="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
156:             <span className="text-sm font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
157:               <PackageCheck className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
158:               Прогресс сборки
159:             </span>
160:             <span className="text-sm font-bold text-primary">{assembledCount} из {totalItems} позиций</span>
161:           </div>
162:           <Progress value={progress} className="h-3 bg-muted" />
163:         </CardContent>
164:       </Card>
165: 
166:       {/* KIZ Scan Dialog */}
167:       <Dialog open={kizDialog.open} onOpenChange={(open) => !open && setKizDialog({ open: false, itemId: "", batchQty: 0, batchLabel: "" })}>
168:         <DialogContent className="bg-card border-border max-w-md">
169:           <DialogHeader>
170:             <DialogTitle className="text-lg font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
171:               <Scan className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
172:               Верификация КИЗ
173:             </DialogTitle>
174:             <DialogDescription className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
175:               Серия: <span className="font-bold text-foreground">{kizDialog.batchLabel}</span>
176:               <br />
177:               Отсканируйте DataMatrix-код с упаковки или введите KIZ вручную.
178:             </DialogDescription>
179:           </DialogHeader>
180: 
181:           <div className="space-y-4 py-2">
182:             <div className="space-y-2">
183:               <label className="text-sm font-medium">КИЗ / DataMatrix</label>
184:               <Input
185:                 placeholder="010460XXXXXXXXXX21XXXXXX..."
186:                 value={kizInput}
187:                 onChange={(e) => { setKizInput(e.target.value); setKizError(""); }}
188:                 className={cn("font-mono text-sm", kizError && "border-destructive")}
189:                 autoFocus
190:               />
191:               {kizError && <p className="text-xs text-destructive">{kizError}</p>}
192:             </div>
193: 
194:             <div className="bg-muted px-3 py-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground space-y-1">
195:               <p className="font-semibold text-foreground">Формат кода МДЛП:</p>
196:               <p><code>01[GTIN14]21[SERIAL]...</code></p>
197:               <p>Минимальная длина — 25 символов</p>
198:             </div>
199:           </div>
200: 
201:           <DialogFooter>
202:             <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setKizDialog({ open: false, itemId: "", batchQty: 0, batchLabel: "" })}>
203:               Отмена
204:             </Button>
205:             <Button onClick={handleKizConfirm} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground">
206:               Подтвердить
207:             </Button>
208:           </DialogFooter>
209:         </DialogContent>
210:       </Dialog>
211: 
212:       {/* Items Section */}
213:       <div className="space-y-6">
214:         {MOCK_ORDER_DETAIL.items.map((item) => {
215:           const isDone = assembledItems[item.id] !== undefined;
216: 
217:           return (
218:             <div key={item.id} className="space-y-3">
219:               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
220:                 <div>
221:                   <h3 className="text-lg font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
222:                     {item.name}
223:                     <span className="text-xs font-normal text-muted-foreground bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 uppercase tracking-wider">СКУ: {item.sku}</span>
224:                   </h3>
225:                   <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
226:                     Запрошено: <span className="font-bold text-foreground">{item.requested} шт.</span>
227:                   </p>
228:                 </div>
229:                 {isDone && (
230:                   <Badge className="bg-success text-white border-none flex items-center gap-1">
231:                     <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
232:                     Собрано
233:                   </Badge>
234:                 )}
235:               </div>
236: 
237:               {/* Recommendations Table */}
238:               <div className="border border-border overflow-hidden">
239:                 <table className="w-full text-sm">
240:                   <thead>
241:                     <tr className="bg-muted border-b border-border">
242:                       <th className="text-left px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Серия</th>
243:                       <th className="text-left px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Годен до</th>
244:                       <th className="text-left px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground w-[180px]">Остаток срока</th>
245:                       <th className="text-left px-4 py-2.5 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Доступно</th>
246:                       <th className="px-4 py-2.5 w-[160px]"></th>
247:                     </tr>
248:                   </thead>
249:                   <tbody>
250:                     {item.recommendations.map((rec, idx) => (
251:                       <tr
252:                         key={idx}
253:                         className={cn(
254:                           "border-b border-border last:border-0 transition-colors",
255:                           rec.isMosBlocked
256:                             ? "bg-destructive/5"
257:                             : assembledItems[item.id] === rec.qty
258:                             ? "bg-success/5"
259:                             : "bg-card hover:bg-muted/50"
260:                         )}
261:                       >
262:                         {/* Серия */}
263:                         <td className="px-4 py-3">
264:                           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
265:                             <span className="font-mono font-bold">{rec.batch}</span>
266:                             <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] py-0 h-4">ФЕФО #{idx + 1}</Badge>
267:                           </div>
268:                         </td>
269: 
270:                         {/* Годен до */}
271:                         <td className="px-4 py-3 text-muted-foreground">{rec.expiry}</td>
272: 
273:                         {/* Остаток срока */}
274:                         <td className="px-4 py-3">
275:                           <div className="space-y-1">
276:                             <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
277:                               <span className="text-muted-foreground">{rec.remaining}</span>
278:                               <span className={cn("font-bold", rec.isMosBlocked ? "text-destructive" : "text-success")}>
279:                                 {rec.percent}%
280:                               </span>
281:                             </div>
282:                             <Progress
283:                               value={rec.percent}
284:                               className={cn("h-1.5", rec.isMosBlocked ? "bg-destructive/20" : "bg-muted")}
285:                             />
286:                           </div>
287:                           {rec.isMosBlocked && (
288:                             <p className="text-[10px] text-destructive font-bold mt-1">MOS BLOCK — минимум не выдержан</p>
289:                           )}
290:                         </td>
291: 
292:                         {/* Доступно */}
293:                         <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{rec.qty} шт.</td>
294: 
295:                         {/* Действие */}
296:                         <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
297:                           {rec.isMosBlocked ? (
298:                             <Tooltip>
299:                               <TooltipTrigger asChild>
300:                                 <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-destructive font-bold cursor-not-allowed">
301:                                   <ShieldAlert className="h-4 w-4" />
302:                                   Заблокировано
303:                                 </span>
304:                               </TooltipTrigger>
305:                               <TooltipContent>Серия заблокирована правилом МОС. Остаток срока ниже допустимого минимума (60%).</TooltipContent>
306:                             </Tooltip>
307:                           ) : assembledItems[item.id] === rec.qty ? (
308:                             <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-success font-bold">
309:                               <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4" />
310:                               Выбрано
311:                             </span>
312:                           ) : (
313:                             <Button
314:                               size="sm"
315:                               variant="default"
316:                               disabled={isShipped}
317:                               onClick={() => setKizDialog({ open: true, itemId: item.id, batchQty: rec.qty, batchLabel: rec.batch })}
318:                               className="text-xs"
319:                             >
320:                               <Scan className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" />
321:                               Подтвердить
322:                             </Button>
323:                           )}
324:                         </td>
325:                       </tr>
326:                     ))}
327:                   </tbody>
328:                 </table>
329:               </div>
330:             </div>
331:           );
332:         })}
333:       </div>
334: 
335:       {/* Action Bar */}
336:       <div className="border-t border-border pt-6 mt-4">
337:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
338:             <div className="hidden md:block">
339:                 <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest font-bold">Текущая операция</p>
340:                 <p className="text-sm font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
341:                     <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-warning" />
342:                     Комплектование заказа
343:                 </p>
344:             </div>
345: 
346:             {isShipped ? (
347:                 <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2">
348:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-success font-bold text-sm">
349:                         <CheckCircle2 className="h-5 w-5" />
350:                         Заказ успешно отгружен
351:                     </div>
352:                     <div className="flex gap-2">
353:                         <Button size="sm" variant="outline" className="flex gap-2">
354:                             <Download className="h-4 w-4" />
355:                             ТТН.pdf
356:                         </Button>
357:                         <Button size="sm" variant="outline" className="flex gap-2">
358:                             <FileText className="h-4 w-4" />
359:                             Паспорт.pdf
360:                         </Button>
361:                     </div>
362:                 </div>
363:             ) : (
364:                 <div className="flex gap-3 w-full md:w-auto">
365:                     <Button variant="secondary" className="flex-1 md:flex-none">Сохранить черновик</Button>
366:                     <AlertDialog open={showDialog} onOpenChange={setShowDialog}>
367:                         <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
368:                             <Button 
369:                                 disabled={assembledCount < totalItems} 
370:                                 className="flex-1 md:flex-none bg-primary text-primary-foreground flex gap-2 items-center"
371:                             >
372:                                 <Truck className="h-4 w-4" />
373:                                 Подтвердить отгрузку
374:                             </Button>
375:                         </AlertDialogTrigger>
376:                         <AlertDialogContent className="bg-card border-border">
377:                             <AlertDialogHeader>
378:                                 <AlertDialogTitle className="text-xl font-bold">Подтверждение отгрузки</AlertDialogTitle>
379:                                 <AlertDialogDescription>
380:                                     Заказ #{MOCK_ORDER_DETAIL.id} будет переведён в статус <span className="font-bold text-foreground">"Отгружен"</span>. 
381:                                     Все выбранные серии будут списаны со склада. Это действие нельзя отменить.
382:                                 </AlertDialogDescription>
383:                             </AlertDialogHeader>
384:                             <AlertDialogFooter>
385:                                 <AlertDialogCancel>Отмена</AlertDialogCancel>
386:                                 <AlertDialogAction onClick={handleShip} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground">
387:                                     Отгрузить заказ
388:                                 </AlertDialogAction>
389:                             </AlertDialogFooter>
390:                         </AlertDialogContent>
391:                     </AlertDialog>
392:                 </div>
393:             )}
394:         </div>
395:       </div>
396:     </div>
397:   );
398: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/orders/page.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import React, { useState } from "react";
  4: import Link from "next/link";
  5: import {
  6:   Table,
  7:   TableBody,
  8:   TableCell,
  9:   TableHead,
 10:   TableHeader,
 11:   TableRow,
 12: } from "@/components/ui/table";
 13: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
 14: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 15: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
 16: import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
 17: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 18: import { Package, Search, AlertCircle, Clock, CheckCircle2, Truck } from "lucide-react";
 19: 
 20: const MOCK_ORDERS = [
 21:   { id: "101", pharmacy: "Аптека №3", date: "27.03.2026", type: "cito", status: "new" },
 22:   { id: "100", pharmacy: "Аптека №7", date: "27.03.2026", type: "regular", status: "assembling" },
 23:   { id: "099", pharmacy: "Аптека №12", date: "26.03.2026", type: "regular", status: "ready" },
 24:   { id: "098", pharmacy: "Аптека №1", date: "25.03.2026", type: "regular", status: "shipped" },
 25:   { id: "097", pharmacy: "Аптека №5", date: "24.03.2026", type: "cito", status: "assembling" },
 26: ];
 27: 
 28: const statusConfig = {
 29:   new: { label: "Новый", variant: "warning", icon: Clock },
 30:   assembling: { label: "Сборка", variant: "blue", icon: Package },
 31:   ready: { label: "Готов", variant: "success", icon: CheckCircle2 },
 32:   shipped: { label: "Отгружен", variant: "secondary", icon: Truck },
 33: };
 34: 
 35: export default function OrdersPage() {
 36:   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("all");
 37: 
 38:   const filteredOrders = activeTab === "all" 
 39:     ? MOCK_ORDERS 
 40:     : MOCK_ORDERS.filter(o => o.status === activeTab);
 41: 
 42:   return (
 43:     <div className="container mx-auto py-8 px-4 space-y-6">
 44:       <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
 45:         <div>
 46:           <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground">Заказы на сборку</h1>
 47:           <p className="text-muted-foreground mt-1">Управление очередью заказов и контроль FEFO</p>
 48:         </div>
 49:         <div className="flex gap-2">
 50:             <Button variant="outline" size="icon">
 51:                 <Search className="h-4 w-4" />
 52:             </Button>
 53:             <Button className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground">
 54:                 Создать заказ
 55:             </Button>
 56:         </div>
 57:       </div>
 58: 
 59:       <Card className="border-border shadow-sm">
 60:         <CardHeader className="pb-3 px-6 pt-6">
 61:           <Tabs defaultValue="all" onValueChange={setActiveTab} className="w-full">
 62:             <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-5 h-12 bg-muted p-1">
 63:               <TabsTrigger value="all" className="data-[state=active]:bg-card">Все</TabsTrigger>
 64:               <TabsTrigger value="new" className="data-[state=active]:bg-card">Новые</TabsTrigger>
 65:               <TabsTrigger value="assembling" className="data-[state=active]:bg-card">Сборка</TabsTrigger>
 66:               <TabsTrigger value="ready" className="data-[state=active]:bg-card">К отгрузке</TabsTrigger>
 67:               <TabsTrigger value="shipped" className="data-[state=active]:bg-card">Отгруженные</TabsTrigger>
 68:             </TabsList>
 69:           </Tabs>
 70:         </CardHeader>
 71:         <CardContent className="p-0">
 72:           <Table>
 73:             <TableHeader className="bg-muted/50">
 74:               <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent">
 75:                 <TableHead className="w-[100px] px-6">ID</TableHead>
 76:                 <TableHead className="px-6">Аптека</TableHead>
 77:                 <TableHead className="px-6">Дата заказа</TableHead>
 78:                 <TableHead className="px-6">Тип</TableHead>
 79:                 <TableHead className="px-6">Статус</TableHead>
 80:                 <TableHead className="text-right px-6">Действие</TableHead>
 81:               </TableRow>
 82:             </TableHeader>
 83:             <TableBody>
 84:               {filteredOrders.map((order) => {
 85:                 const status = statusConfig[order.status as keyof typeof statusConfig];
 86:                 const StatusIcon = status.icon;
 87:                 
 88:                 return (
 89:                   <TableRow 
 90:                     key={order.id}
 91:                     className={cn(
 92:                       "transition-colors",
 93:                       order.type === "cito" && "bg-destructive/5 hover:bg-destructive/10"
 94:                     )}
 95:                   >
 96:                     <TableCell className="font-medium px-6">#{order.id}</TableCell>
 97:                     <TableCell className="px-6 font-semibold">{order.pharmacy}</TableCell>
 98:                     <TableCell className="px-6">{order.date}</TableCell>
 99:                     <TableCell className="px-6">
100:                       {order.type === "cito" ? (
101:                         <Badge variant="destructive" className="flex items-center gap-1.5 w-fit font-bold tracking-widest uppercase text-[11px] px-2.5 py-1">
102:                           <AlertCircle className="h-3 w-3 shrink-0" />
103:                           CITO
104:                         </Badge>
105:                       ) : (
106:                         <Badge variant="outline" className="text-muted-foreground w-fit uppercase tracking-wider text-[11px]">
107:                           Обычный
108:                         </Badge>
109:                       )}
110:                     </TableCell>
111:                     <TableCell className="px-6">
112:                       <Badge 
113:                         variant={status.variant as any} 
114:                         className={cn(
115:                             "flex items-center gap-1.5 w-fit border-none",
116:                             order.status === 'assembling' && "bg-blue text-white",
117:                             order.status === 'new' && "bg-warning-subtle text-warning-foreground",
118:                             order.status === 'ready' && "bg-success text-white",
119:                             order.status === 'shipped' && "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
120:                         )}
121:                       >
122:                         <StatusIcon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
123:                         {status.label}
124:                       </Badge>
125:                     </TableCell>
126:                     <TableCell className="text-right px-6">
127:                       <Button asChild size="sm" variant={order.status === 'shipped' ? "ghost" : "default"}>
128:                         <Link href={`/orders/${order.id}/assemble`}>
129:                           {order.status === 'shipped' ? "Просмотр" : "К сборке"}
130:                         </Link>
131:                       </Button>
132:                     </TableCell>
133:                   </TableRow>
134:                 );
135:               })}
136:             </TableBody>
137:           </Table>
138:           {filteredOrders.length === 0 && (
139:             <div className="py-20 text-center text-muted-foreground">
140:               Нет заказов в этой категории
141:             </div>
142:           )}
143:         </CardContent>
144:       </Card>
145:     </div>
146:   );
147: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/products/[id]/edit/page.tsx
````typescript
 1: import { ProductForm } from "@/components/products/product-form";
 2: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 3: import { MOCK_PRODUCTS } from "@/lib/mocks/products";
 4: import { ArrowLeft } from "lucide-react";
 5: import Link from "next/link";
 6: import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
 7: 
 8: export default async function ProductEditPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
 9:   const { id } = await params;
10:   const product = MOCK_PRODUCTS.find((p) => p.id === id);
11: 
12:   if (!product) {
13:     notFound();
14:   }
15: 
16:   return (
17:     <div className="space-y-6 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500">
18:       <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
19:         <Button asChild variant="ghost" size="sm" className="rounded-none text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground p-0 h-auto">
20:           <Link href={`/products/${id}`} className="flex items-center gap-1 uppercase text-xs font-bold">
21:             <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Отмена
22:           </Link>
23:         </Button>
24:       </div>
25: 
26:       <ProductForm initialData={product} mode="edit" />
27:     </div>
28:   );
29: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/products/[id]/page.tsx
````typescript
 1: import { ProductCardHeader } from "@/components/products/product-card-header";
 2: import { ProductTabs } from "@/components/products/product-tabs";
 3: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 4: import { MOCK_PRODUCTS } from "@/lib/mocks/products";
 5: import { ArrowLeft } from "lucide-react";
 6: import Link from "next/link";
 7: import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
 8: 
 9: export default async function ProductViewPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
10:   const { id } = await params;
11:   const product = MOCK_PRODUCTS.find((p) => p.id === id);
12: 
13:   if (!product) {
14:     notFound();
15:   }
16: 
17:   return (
18:     <div className="space-y-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500">
19:       <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
20:         <Button asChild variant="ghost" size="sm" className="rounded-none text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground p-0 h-auto">
21:           <Link href="/products" className="flex items-center gap-1 uppercase text-xs font-bold">
22:             <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Назад к списку
23:           </Link>
24:         </Button>
25:       </div>
26: 
27:       <div className="space-y-8">
28:         <ProductCardHeader product={product} />
29:         <ProductTabs product={product} />
30:       </div>
31:     </div>
32:   );
33: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/products/page.tsx
````typescript
 1: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
 2: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";

 4: import {
 5:   Table,
 6:   TableBody,
 7:   TableCell,
 8:   TableHead,
 9:   TableHeader,
10:   TableRow,
11: } from "@/components/ui/table";
12: import { MOCK_PRODUCTS } from "@/lib/mocks/products";
13: import { Plus, Search, Filter } from "lucide-react";
14: import Link from "next/link";
15: 
16: export default function ProductsPage() {
17:   return (
18:     <div className="space-y-6">
19:       <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
20:         <div>
21:           <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase">Справочник ГЛС</h1>
22:           <p className="text-muted-foreground">Управление номенклатурой готовых лекарственных средств</p>
23:         </div>
24:         <Button asChild className="rounded-none uppercase font-bold">
25:           <Link href="/products/new">
26:             <Plus className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /> Новый препарат
27:           </Link>
28:         </Button>
29:       </div>
30: 
31:       <div className="flex gap-4">
32:         <div className="relative flex-1">
33:           <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 h-4 w-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-muted-foreground" />
34:           <Input 
35:             placeholder="Поиск по названию, МНН, SKU или штрихкоду..." 
36:             className="pl-10 rounded-none border-border"
37:           />
38:         </div>
39:         <Button variant="outline" className="rounded-none">
40:           <Filter className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /> Фильтры
41:         </Button>
42:       </div>
43: 
44:       <div className="border border-border bg-card">
45:         <Table>
46:           <TableHeader>
47:             <TableRow className="bg-muted hover:bg-muted font-bold text-xs uppercase">
48:               <TableHead>Название / МНН</TableHead>
49:               <TableHead>SKU</TableHead>
50:               <TableHead>РУ-номер</TableHead>
51:               <TableHead>Флаги</TableHead>
52:               <TableHead className="text-right">Действия</TableHead>
53:             </TableRow>
54:           </TableHeader>
55:           <TableBody>
56:             {MOCK_PRODUCTS.map((product) => (
57:               <TableRow key={product.id}>
58:                 <TableCell>
59:                   <div className="flex flex-col">
60:                     <span className="font-bold text-sm">{product.trade_name}</span>
61:                     <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{product.mnn}</span>
62:                   </div>
63:                 </TableCell>
64:                 <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs">{product.sku}</TableCell>
65:                 <TableCell className="text-xs">{product.ru_number}</TableCell>
66:                 <TableCell>
67:                   <div className="flex gap-1">
68:                     {product.is_jnvlp && <Badge variant="outline" className="h-4 px-1 text-[10px] border-primary text-primary">ЖНВЛП</Badge>}
69:                     {product.cold_chain && <Badge className="h-4 px-1 text-[10px] bg-blue text-blue-foreground">❄️</Badge>}
70:                     {product.is_ns_pv && <Badge variant="destructive" className="h-4 px-1 text-[10px]">НС-ПВ</Badge>}
71:                   </div>
72:                 </TableCell>
73:                 <TableCell className="text-right">
74:                   <Button asChild variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 text-xs font-bold uppercase text-primary">
75:                     <Link href={`/products/${product.id}`}>Открыть</Link>
76:                   </Button>
77:                 </TableCell>
78:               </TableRow>
79:             ))}
80:           </TableBody>
81:         </Table>
82:       </div>
83:     </div>
84:   );
85: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/receiving/new/page.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client";
 2: 
 3: import { useState } from "react";
 4: import { ChevronLeft } from "lucide-react";
 5: import Link from "next/link";
 6: import { ReceivingStepper } from "@/components/receiving/receiving-stepper";
 7: import { Step1Document } from "@/components/receiving/step1-document";
 8: import { Step2Finance } from "@/components/receiving/step2-finance";
 9: import { Step3Items } from "@/components/receiving/step3-items";
10: import { Step4Confirm } from "@/components/receiving/step4-confirm";
11: import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card";
12: 
13: const STEPS = [
14:   { id: 1, title: "Реквизиты" },
15:   { id: 2, title: "Финансы" },
16:   { id: 3, title: "Позиции товаров" },
17:   { id: 4, title: "Подтверждение" },
18: ];
19: 
20: export default function NewReceivingPage() {
21:   const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(1);
22: 
23:   const handleNext = () => setCurrentStep((prev) => Math.min(prev + 1, 4));
24:   const handleBack = () => setCurrentStep((prev) => Math.max(prev - 1, 1));
25:   const handleCancel = () => {
26:     // In a real app, this would redirect or show a confirmation
27:     console.log("Cancelled");
28:   };
29: 
30:   return (
31:     <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1200px] space-y-6">
32:       {/* Header */}
33:       <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
34:         <Link
35:           href="/receiving"
36:           className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors w-fit"
37:         >
38:           <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
39:           Назад к списку приёмок
40:         </Link>
41:         <div className="flex flex-col">
42:           <h1 className="text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground">
43:             Приёмка товаров
44:           </h1>
45:           <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
46:             Создание новой приходной накладной и размещение в карантин
47:           </p>
48:         </div>
49:       </div>
50: 
51:       <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8 mt-4">
52:         {/* Sidebar Stepper */}
53:         <aside className="w-full lg:w-64 shrink-0">
54:           <div className="sticky top-24">
55:             <ReceivingStepper currentStep={currentStep} steps={STEPS} />
56:           </div>
57:         </aside>
58: 
59:         {/* Main Content Card */}
60:         <Card className="flex-1 border-border border-t-4 border-t-primary bg-card p-6 md:p-8 shadow-none">
61:           <div className="w-full max-w-4xl">
62:             {currentStep === 1 && (
63:               <Step1Document onNext={handleNext} onCancel={handleCancel} />
64:             )}
65:             {currentStep === 2 && (
66:               <Step2Finance onNext={handleNext} onBack={handleBack} />
67:             )}
68:             {currentStep === 3 && (
69:               <Step3Items onNext={handleNext} onBack={handleBack} />
70:             )}
71:             {currentStep === 4 && (
72:               <Step4Confirm onBack={handleBack} onSave={() => console.log("Saving...")} />
73:             )}
74:           </div>
75:         </Card>
76:       </div>
77:     </div>
78:   );
79: }
````
