````typescript
 42:   SelectValue,
 43: } from "@/components/ui/select";
 44: import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
 45: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 46: 
 47: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 48: // Types
 49: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 50: 
 51: type ZoneType = "general" | "cold_chain" | "flammable" | "safe_strong";
 52: 
 53: interface Zone {
 54:   id: string;
 55:   name: string;
 56:   type: ZoneType;
 57:   description: string;
 58:   address: string;
 59:   tempMin: number;
 60:   tempMax: number;
 61:   humidityMax: number;
 62:   itemCount: number;
 63:   hasJnvlp?: boolean;
 64:   restricted?: boolean;
 65: }
 66: 
 67: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 68: // Static data (mock)
 69: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 70: 
 71: const ZONES: Zone[] = [
 72:   {
 73:     id: "1",
 74:     name: "Общая зона",
 75:     type: "general",
 76:     description: "Стеллажи A-D для препаратов общего хранения",
 77:     address: "Стеллажи A-D • Ряды 1-20",
 78:     tempMin: 2,
 79:     tempMax: 25,
 80:     humidityMax: 70,
 81:     itemCount: 142,
 82:   },
 83:   {
 84:     id: "2",
 85:     name: "Холодовая цепь",
 86:     type: "cold_chain",
 87:     description: "Рефрижераторная секция для термолабильных препаратов",
 88:     address: "Секция E • Стеллажи 1-4",
 89:     tempMin: 2,
 90:     tempMax: 8,
 91:     humidityMax: 60,
 92:     itemCount: 38,
 93:     hasJnvlp: true,
 94:   },
 95:   {
 96:     id: "3",
 97:     name: "Легковоспламеняемые",
 98:     type: "flammable",
 99:     description: "Изолированная зона для огнеопасных веществ",
100:     address: "Изолированная секция F",
101:     tempMin: 15,
102:     tempMax: 25,
103:     humidityMax: 50,
104:     itemCount: 8,
105:   },
106:   {
107:     id: "4",
108:     name: "НС / ПВ зона",
109:     type: "safe_strong",
110:     description: "Сейф-комната для наркотических и психотропных веществ",
111:     address: "Секция G • Сейф-комната",
112:     tempMin: 15,
113:     tempMax: 25,
114:     humidityMax: 60,
115:     itemCount: 12,
116:     restricted: true,
117:   },
118: ];
119: 
120: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
121: // Zone type config
122: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
123: 
124: const ZONE_CONFIG: Record<
125:   ZoneType,
126:   {
127:     label: string;
128:     icon: React.ReactNode;
129:     accentColor: string;
130:     badgeClass: string;
131:   }
132: > = {
133:   general: {
134:     label: "Общая",
135:     icon: <Package className="h-5 w-5" />,
136:     accentColor: "bg-muted-foreground/30",
137:     badgeClass: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground border-border",
138:   },
139:   cold_chain: {
140:     label: "Холодовая цепь",
141:     icon: <Snowflake className="h-5 w-5 text-secondary" />,
142:     accentColor: "bg-secondary",
143:     badgeClass: "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground border-secondary",
144:   },
145:   flammable: {
146:     label: "Огнеопасная",
147:     icon: <Flame className="h-5 w-5 text-warning" />,
148:     accentColor: "bg-warning",
149:     badgeClass: "bg-warning text-warning-foreground border-warning",
150:   },
151:   safe_strong: {
152:     label: "НС / ПВ",
153:     icon: <Lock className="h-5 w-5 text-destructive" />,
154:     accentColor: "bg-destructive",
155:     badgeClass: "bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground border-destructive",
156:   },
157: };
158: 
159: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
160: // Zone Card
161: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
162: 
163: function ZoneCard({
164:   zone,
165:   onEdit,
166: }: {
167:   zone: Zone;
168:   onEdit: (z: Zone) => void;
169: }) {
170:   const cfg = ZONE_CONFIG[zone.type];
171: 
172:   return (
173:     <Card className="relative overflow-hidden border-border bg-card flex flex-col">
174:       {/* Left accent strip */}
175:       <div className={cn("absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[3px]", cfg.accentColor)} />
176: 
177:       <CardHeader className="pl-5 pb-2 pt-4 pr-4">
178:         <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
179:           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
180:             {cfg.icon}
181:             <span className="font-semibold text-sm text-foreground leading-tight">
182:               {zone.name}
183:             </span>
184:           </div>
185:           <Badge
186:             variant="outline"
187:             className={cn("text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide shrink-0", cfg.badgeClass)}
188:           >
189:             {zone.type}
190:           </Badge>
191:         </div>
192:       </CardHeader>
193: 
194:       <CardContent className="pl-5 pr-4 pb-3 flex-1 space-y-3">
195:         {/* Address */}
196:         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
197:           <MapPin className="h-3 w-3 shrink-0" />
198:           <span>{zone.address}</span>
199:         </div>
200: 
201:         {/* Conditions */}
202:         <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
203:           <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-foreground">
204:             <Thermometer className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
205:             <span className="font-medium">
206:               {zone.tempMin}°C — {zone.tempMax}°C
207:             </span>
208:           </div>
209:           <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-foreground">
210:             <Droplets className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
211:             <span className="font-medium">≤{zone.humidityMax}%</span>
212:           </div>
213:         </div>
214: 
215:         {/* Special chips */}
216:         {zone.hasJnvlp && (
217:           <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide border-secondary text-secondary">
218:             ЖНВЛП
219:           </Badge>
220:         )}
221:         {zone.type === "flammable" && (
222:           <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-none bg-warning-subtle text-warning-foreground px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-medium w-fit">
223:             ⚠ Особые условия хранения
224:           </div>
225:         )}
226:         {zone.restricted && (
227:           <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-none bg-destructive/10 text-destructive px-2 py-1 text-[11px] font-medium w-fit">
228:             🔒 Доступ ограничен — только уполномоченные сотрудники
229:           </div>
230:         )}
231:       </CardContent>
232: 
233:       <Separator className="mx-4" />
234: 
235:       <CardFooter className="pl-5 pr-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
236:         <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
237:           <Package className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
238:           <span>
239:             {zone.restricted ? (
240:               <span className="text-destructive font-medium">{zone.itemCount} позиций (скрыто)</span>
241:             ) : (
242:               <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{zone.itemCount} позиций</span>
243:             )}
244:           </span>
245:         </div>
246:         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
247:           {!zone.restricted && (
248:             <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 px-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground">
249:               <Eye className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" />
250:               Просмотр
251:             </Button>
252:           )}
253:           {/* Admin only — always shown in prototype */}
254:           <Button
255:             variant="ghost"
256:             size="icon"
257:             className="h-7 w-7 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
258:             onClick={() => onEdit(zone)}
259:           >
260:             <Pencil className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
261:           </Button>
262:         </div>
263:       </CardFooter>
264:     </Card>
265:   );
266: }
267: 
268: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
269: // Create / Edit Dialog (pure visual — no submit logic)
270: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
271: 
272: function ZoneDialog({
273:   open,
274:   onOpenChange,
275:   zone,
276: }: {
277:   open: boolean;
278:   onOpenChange: (v: boolean) => void;
279:   zone: Zone | null;
280: }) {
281:   const isEdit = zone !== null;
282: 
283:   return (
284:     <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
285:       <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[520px] rounded-none p-0 gap-0 border-border overflow-hidden">
286:         {/* Header */}
287:         <DialogHeader className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-border bg-card">
288:           <DialogTitle className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">
289:             {isEdit ? `Редактировать зону — ${zone.name}` : "Создать зону"}
290:           </DialogTitle>
291:           <DialogDescription className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
292:             {isEdit
293:               ? "Измените параметры зоны. Тип влияет на допустимые категории препаратов."
294:               : "Заполните параметры новой зоны хранения. Поля со * обязательны."}
295:           </DialogDescription>
296:         </DialogHeader>
297: 
298:         {/* Body */}
299:         <div className="px-6 py-5 space-y-5 bg-background max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto">
300: 
301:           {/* Название */}
302:           <div className="space-y-1.5">
303:             <Label className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-muted-foreground">
304:               Название зоны <span className="text-destructive">*</span>
305:             </Label>
306:             <Input
307:               placeholder="например: Холодовая цепь — Секция E"
308:               defaultValue={zone?.name ?? ""}
309:               className={cn(
310:                 "rounded-none border-border bg-muted text-sm h-9",
311:                 !isEdit && "border-destructive focus-visible:ring-destructive"
312:               )}
313:             />
314:             {!isEdit && (
315:               <p className="text-[11px] text-destructive">Поле обязательно для заполнения</p>
316:             )}
317:           </div>
318: 
319:           {/* Тип зоны */}
320:           <div className="space-y-1.5">
321:             <Label className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-muted-foreground">
322:               Тип зоны <span className="text-destructive">*</span>
323:             </Label>
324:             <Select defaultValue={zone?.type ?? ""}>
325:               <SelectTrigger className="rounded-none border-border bg-muted h-9 text-sm">
326:                 <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите тип зоны" />
327:               </SelectTrigger>
328:               <SelectContent className="rounded-none">
329:                 <SelectItem value="general" className="text-sm">
330:                   <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
331:                     <Package className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
332:                     Общая (general)
333:                   </span>
334:                 </SelectItem>
335:                 <SelectItem value="cold_chain" className="text-sm">
336:                   <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
337:                     <Snowflake className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-secondary" />
338:                     Холодовая цепь (cold_chain)
339:                   </span>
340:                 </SelectItem>
341:                 <SelectItem value="flammable" className="text-sm">
342:                   <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
343:                     <Flame className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-warning" />
344:                     Легковоспламеняемые (flammable)
345:                   </span>
346:                 </SelectItem>
347:                 <SelectItem value="safe_strong" className="text-sm">
348:                   <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
349:                     <Lock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-destructive" />
350:                     НС / ПВ (safe_strong)
351:                   </span>
352:                 </SelectItem>
353:               </SelectContent>
354:             </Select>
355:           </div>
356: 
357:           {/* Описание */}
358:           <div className="space-y-1.5">
359:             <Label className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-muted-foreground">
360:               Описание
361:             </Label>
362:             <Textarea
363:               placeholder="Необязательное описание зоны"
364:               defaultValue={zone?.description ?? ""}
365:               rows={3}
366:               className="rounded-none border-border bg-muted text-sm resize-none"
367:             />
368:           </div>
369: 
370:           {/* Адрес / расположение */}
371:           <div className="space-y-1.5">
372:             <Label className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-muted-foreground">
373:               Расположение
374:             </Label>
375:             <Input
376:               placeholder="например: Секция E • Стеллажи 1-4"
377:               defaultValue={zone?.address ?? ""}
378:               className="rounded-none border-border bg-muted text-sm h-9"
379:             />
380:             <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
381:               Секции, стеллажи, ряды — в свободной форме
382:             </p>
383:           </div>
384: 
385:           {/* Температура */}
386:           <div className="space-y-1.5">
387:             <Label className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-muted-foreground">
388:               Диапазон температуры (°C)
389:             </Label>
390:             <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
391:               <div className="space-y-1">
392:                 <Label className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">Минимум</Label>
393:                 <div className="relative">
394:                   <Input
395:                     type="number"
396:                     placeholder="0"
397:                     defaultValue={zone?.tempMin ?? ""}
398:                     className="rounded-none border-border bg-muted h-9 text-sm pr-8"
399:                   />
400:                   <span className="absolute right-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-xs text-muted-foreground pointer-events-none">°C</span>
401:                 </div>
402:               </div>
403:               <div className="space-y-1">
404:                 <Label className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">Максимум</Label>
405:                 <div className="relative">
406:                   <Input
407:                     type="number"
408:                     placeholder="25"
409:                     defaultValue={zone?.tempMax ?? ""}
410:                     className="rounded-none border-border bg-muted h-9 text-sm pr-8"
411:                   />
412:                   <span className="absolute right-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-xs text-muted-foreground pointer-events-none">°C</span>
413:                 </div>
414:               </div>
415:             </div>
416:           </div>
417: 
418:           {/* Влажность */}
419:           <div className="space-y-1.5">
420:             <Label className="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-muted-foreground">
421:               Макс. влажность (%)
422:             </Label>
423:             <div className="relative max-w-[50%]">
424:               <Input
425:                 type="number"
426:                 min={0}
427:                 max={100}
428:                 placeholder="60"
429:                 defaultValue={zone?.humidityMax ?? ""}
430:                 className="rounded-none border-border bg-muted h-9 text-sm pr-8"
431:               />
432:               <span className="absolute right-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-xs text-muted-foreground pointer-events-none">%</span>
433:             </div>
434:           </div>
435:         </div>
436: 
437:         {/* Footer */}
438:         <DialogFooter className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-border bg-card flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
439:           <Button
440:             variant="ghost"
441:             className="text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground rounded-none"
442:             onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}
443:           >
444:             Отмена
445:           </Button>
446:           <Button className="rounded-none text-sm px-6 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90">
447:             {isEdit ? "Сохранить изменения" : "Создать зону"}
448:           </Button>
449:         </DialogFooter>
450:       </DialogContent>
451:     </Dialog>
452:   );
453: }
454: 
455: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
456: // Page
457: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
458: 
459: export default function WarehouseZonesPage() {
460:   const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false);
461:   const [editZone, setEditZone] = useState<Zone | null>(null);
462: 
463:   function openCreate() {
464:     setEditZone(null);
465:     setDialogOpen(true);
466:   }
467: 
468:   function openEdit(zone: Zone) {
469:     setEditZone(zone);
470:     setDialogOpen(true);
471:   }
472: 
473:   return (
474:     <>
475:       <div className="space-y-6">
476:         {/* Breadcrumb */}
477:         <nav className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
478:           <span>Склад</span>
479:           <ChevronRight className="h-3 w-3" />
480:           <span className="text-foreground font-medium">Зоны хранения</span>
481:         </nav>
482: 
483:         {/* Page header */}
484:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
485:           <div>
486:             <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground tracking-tight">
487:               Складские зоны
488:             </h1>
489:             <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
490:               Справочник зон — тип, условия хранения, температурный режим
491:             </p>
492:           </div>
493:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
494:             <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs border-secondary text-secondary font-medium">
495:               {ZONES.length} зоны активны
496:             </Badge>
497:             {/* Admin-only button */}
498:             <Button
499:               size="sm"
500:               className="rounded-none text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4"
501:               onClick={openCreate}
502:             >
503:               <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1.5" />
504:               Добавить зону
505:             </Button>
506:           </div>
507:         </div>
508: 
509:         {/* Zone grid */}
510:         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
511:           {ZONES.map((zone) => (
512:             <ZoneCard key={zone.id} zone={zone} onEdit={openEdit} />
513:           ))}
514:         </div>
515:       </div>
516: 
517:       {/* Create / Edit Dialog */}
518:       <ZoneDialog
519:         open={dialogOpen}
520:         onOpenChange={setDialogOpen}
521:         zone={editZone}
522:       />
523:     </>
524:   );
525: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(auth)/components/approval-pending.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
 4: import { Clock } from "lucide-react"
 5: 
 6: export function ApprovalPending() {
 7:   return (
 8:     <div className="w-full max-w-[440px] space-y-4">
 9:       <Card className="rounded-none border-border shadow-2xl bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-md">
10:         <CardHeader className="text-center space-y-4">
11:           <div className="mx-auto bg-primary/10 p-3 rounded-none w-fit">
12:             <Clock className="h-10 w-10 text-primary" />
13:           </div>
14:           <div className="space-y-2">
15:             <CardTitle className="text-2xl font-bold">Ожидание подтверждения</CardTitle>
16:             <CardDescription className="text-base">
17:               Ваш аккаунт успешно создан, но требует активации администратором.
18:             </CardDescription>
19:           </div>
20:         </CardHeader>
21:         <CardContent className="text-center pb-8">
22:           <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
23:             Как только администратор подтвердит вашу личность и специальность, вы получите доступ ко всей системе.
24:           </p>
25:           <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-4">
26:             Обычно это занимает не более одного рабочего дня.
27:           </p>
28:         </CardContent>
29:       </Card>
30:     </div>
31:   )
32: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(auth)/components/auth-form.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client"
  2: 
  3: import * as React from "react"
  4: import { useForm } from "react-hook-form"
  5: import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod"
  6: import { z } from "zod"
  7: import { Loader2, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, UserPlus } from "lucide-react"
  8: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
  9: import {
 10:   Form,
 11:   FormControl,
 12:   FormField,
 13:   FormItem,
 14:   FormLabel,
 15:   FormMessage,
 16: } from "@/components/ui/form"
 17: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
 18: import {
 19:   InputOTP,
 20:   InputOTPGroup,
 21:   InputOTPSlot,
 22: } from "@/components/ui/input-otp"
 23: import { useAuth } from "@/hooks/use-auth"
 24: 
 25: // ─── Схемы ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 26: 
 27: const emailSchema = z.object({
 28:   email: z.string().email("Введите корректный адрес электронной почты"),
 29: })
 30: 
 31: const otpSchema = z.object({
 32:   code: z.string().length(6, "Код должен состоять из 6 цифр"),
 33: })
 34: 
 35: type EmailForm = z.infer<typeof emailSchema>
 36: type OtpForm = z.infer<typeof otpSchema>
 37: 
 38: // ─── Единый блок ошибки ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 39: 
 40: function ErrorBanner({ message }: { message: string }) {
 41:   return (
 42:     <p className="rounded-none border border-destructive/40 bg-destructive/5 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-destructive">
 43:       {message}
 44:     </p>
 45:   )
 46: }
 47: 
 48: // ─── Шаг 1: Идентификация ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 49: 
 50: function IdentificationStep() {
 51:   const { error, isLoading, onSubmitEmail } = useAuth()
 52: 
 53:   const form = useForm<EmailForm>({
 54:     resolver: zodResolver(emailSchema),
 55:     defaultValues: { email: "" },
 56:   })
 57: 
 58:   return (
 59:     <Form {...form}>
 60:       <form
 61:         onSubmit={form.handleSubmit((d) => onSubmitEmail(d.email))}
 62:         className="space-y-3"
 63:       >
 64:         <FormField
 65:           control={form.control}
 66:           name="email"
 67:           render={({ field }) => (
 68:             <FormItem className="space-y-1">
 69:               <FormLabel className="text-xs font-medium">
 70:                 Электронная почта
 71:               </FormLabel>
 72:               <FormControl>
 73:                 <Input
 74:                   type="email"
 75:                   placeholder="name@example.com"
 76:                   autoComplete="email"
 77:                   {...field}
 78:                 />
 79:               </FormControl>
 80:               <FormMessage className="text-xs" />
 81:             </FormItem>
 82:           )}
 83:         />
 84: 
 85:         {error && <ErrorBanner message={error} />}
 86: 
 87:         <Button type="submit" disabled={isLoading} className="w-full" size="lg">
 88:           {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /> : "Продолжить"}
 89:         </Button>
 90: 
 91:         <div className="relative flex items-center gap-2 py-1">
 92:           <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-border" />
 93:           <span className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">или</span>
 94:           <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-border" />
 95:         </div>
 96: 
 97:         <Button
 98:           type="button"
 99:           variant="outline"
100:           className="w-full"
101:           size="lg"
102:           onClick={() => {}}
103:         >
104:           <svg className="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden>
105:             <path d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92c-.26 1.37-1.04 2.53-2.21 3.31v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.28-4.74 3.28-8.09z" fill="#4285F4" />
106:             <path d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84C3.99 20.53 7.7 23 12 23z" fill="#34A853" />
107:             <path d="M5.84 14.09c-.22-.66-.35-1.36-.35-2.09s.13-1.43.35-2.09V7.07H2.18C1.43 8.55 1 10.22 1 12s.43 3.45 1.18 4.93l3.66-2.84z" fill="#FBBC05" />
108:             <path d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.66l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.07l3.66 2.84c.87-2.6 3.3-4.53 6.16-4.53z" fill="#EA4335" />
109:           </svg>
110:           Войти через Google
111:         </Button>
112:       </form>
113:     </Form>
114:   )
115: }
116: 
117: // ─── Шаг 2: Email не найден — предложение зарегистрироваться ─────────────────
118: 
119: function NotFoundStep() {
120:   const { email, error, isLoading, onConfirmRegister, onDeclineRegister } = useAuth()
121: 
122:   return (
123:     <div className="space-y-4">
124:       {/* Баннер-уведомление */}
125:       <div className="rounded-none border border-border bg-muted/40 p-4 space-y-1">
126:         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
127:           <UserPlus className="h-4 w-4 text-secondary shrink-0" />
128:           <p className="text-sm font-medium">Аккаунт не найден</p>
129:         </div>
130:         <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground pl-6">
131:           Email <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{email}</span> не зарегистрирован в системе.
132:           Хотите создать новый аккаунт?
133:         </p>
134:       </div>
135: 
136:       {/* Примечание */}
137:       <p className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
138:         После регистрации аккаунт будет ожидать подтверждения администратором. Код для входа будет отправлен на почту.
139:       </p>
140: 
141:       {error && <ErrorBanner message={error} />}
142: 
143:       {/* Кнопки */}
144:       <div className="flex gap-2">
145:         <Button
146:           type="button"
147:           variant="outline"
148:           className="flex-1"
149:           onClick={onDeclineRegister}
150:           disabled={isLoading}
151:         >
152:           Нет, изменить почту
153:         </Button>
154:         <Button
155:           type="button"
156:           className="flex-1"
157:           onClick={onConfirmRegister}
158:           disabled={isLoading}
159:         >
160:           {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /> : "Да, зарегистрироваться"}
161:         </Button>
162:       </div>
163:     </div>
164:   )
165: }
166: 
167: // ─── Шаг 3: Верификация OTP ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
168: 
169: function VerificationStep() {
170:   const { email, error, isLoading, timer, onVerifyCode, onResendCode, onBackToEmail } = useAuth()
171: 
172:   const form = useForm<OtpForm>({
173:     resolver: zodResolver(otpSchema),
174:     defaultValues: { code: "" },
175:   })
176: 
177:   return (
178:     <Form {...form}>
179:       <form
180:         onSubmit={form.handleSubmit((d) => onVerifyCode(d.code))}
181:         className="space-y-3"
182:       >
183:         <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
184:           Мы отправили код на{" "}
185:           <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{email}</span>
186:         </p>
187: 
188:         <FormField
189:           control={form.control}
190:           name="code"
191:           render={({ field }) => (
192:             <FormItem className="space-y-1">
193:               <FormLabel className="text-xs font-medium">Код из письма</FormLabel>
194:               <FormControl>
195:                 <InputOTP maxLength={6} {...field}>
196:                   <InputOTPGroup>
197:                     <InputOTPSlot index={0} />
198:                     <InputOTPSlot index={1} />
199:                     <InputOTPSlot index={2} />
200:                     <InputOTPSlot index={3} />
201:                     <InputOTPSlot index={4} />
202:                     <InputOTPSlot index={5} />
203:                   </InputOTPGroup>
204:                 </InputOTP>
205:               </FormControl>
206:               <FormMessage className="text-xs" />
207:             </FormItem>
208:           )}
209:         />
210: 
211:         {error && <ErrorBanner message={error} />}
212: 
213:         <Button type="submit" disabled={isLoading} className="w-full" size="lg">
214:           {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /> : "Подтвердить"}
215:         </Button>
216: 
217:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
218:           <Button
219:             type="button"
220:             variant="ghost"
221:             size="sm"
222:             onClick={onBackToEmail}
223:             className="h-7 gap-1 px-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground"
224:           >
225:             <ArrowLeft className="h-3 w-3" />
226:             Изменить почту
227:           </Button>
228: 
229:           {timer > 0 ? (
230:             <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Повторить через {timer}с</span>
231:           ) : (
232:             <Button
233:               type="button"
234:               variant="ghost"
235:               size="sm"
236:               onClick={onResendCode}
237:               disabled={isLoading}
238:               className="h-7 gap-1 px-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground"
239:             >
240:               <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3" />
241:               Отправить снова
242:             </Button>
243:           )}
244:         </div>
245:       </form>
246:     </Form>
247:   )
248: }
249: 
250: // ─── Главный компонент ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
251: 
252: export function AuthForm() {
253:   const { step } = useAuth()
254: 
255:   if (step === "NOT_FOUND") return <NotFoundStep />
256:   if (step === "VERIFICATION") return <VerificationStep />
257:   return <IdentificationStep />
258: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/claims/claim-form.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod";
  4: import { useForm } from "react-hook-form";
  5: import * as z from "zod";
  6: import { Camera, Search, X, Upload } from "lucide-react";
  7: import { useState } from "react";
  8: 
  9: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 10: import {
 11:   Form,
 12:   FormControl,
 13:   FormField,
 14:   FormItem,
 15:   FormLabel,
 16:   FormMessage,
 17: } from "@/components/ui/form";
 18: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
 19: import {
 20:   Select,
 21:   SelectContent,
 22:   SelectItem,
 23:   SelectTrigger,
 24:   SelectValue,
 25: } from "@/components/ui/select";
 26: import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
 27: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 28: 
 29: const claimFormSchema = z.object({
 30:   type: z.enum(["recall", "return_from_pharmacy", "return_to_supplier", "defect"]),
 31:   productId: z.string().min(1, "Выберите товар"),
 32:   batchId: z.string().min(1, "Выберите серию"),
 33:   source: z.string().optional(),
 34:   notes: z.string().min(10, "Опишите проблему подробнее"),
 35: });
 36: 
 37: const claimTypes = [
 38:   {
 39:     value: "recall",
 40:     label: "Отзыв (Росздравнадзор)",
 41:     color: "text-destructive",
 42:     dot: "bg-destructive",
 43:     desc: "Принудительный отзыв по предписанию",
 44:   },
 45:   {
 46:     value: "return_from_pharmacy",
 47:     label: "Возврат из аптеки",
 48:     color: "text-secondary",
 49:     dot: "bg-secondary",
 50:     desc: "Товар возвращён аптекой",
 51:   },
 52:   {
 53:     value: "return_to_supplier",
 54:     label: "Возврат поставщику",
 55:     color: "text-primary",
 56:     dot: "bg-primary",
 57:     desc: "Отправка брака обратно поставщику",
 58:   },
 59:   {
 60:     value: "defect",
 61:     label: "Дефект / Брак",
 62:     color: "text-warning",
 63:     dot: "bg-warning",
 64:     desc: "Нарушение целостности или маркировки",
 65:   },
 66: ] as const;
 67: 
 68: export function ClaimForm() {
 69:   const [photos, setPhotos] = useState<{ url: string; name: string }[]>([]);
 70:   const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState<string>("defect");
 71: 
 72:   const form = useForm<z.infer<typeof claimFormSchema>>({
 73:     resolver: zodResolver(claimFormSchema),
 74:     defaultValues: {
 75:       type: "defect",
 76:       source: "",
 77:       notes: "",
 78:     },
 79:   });
 80: 
 81:   function onSubmit(values: z.infer<typeof claimFormSchema>) {
 82:     console.log(values);
 83:     alert("Форма отправлена (Mock)");
 84:   }
 85: 
 86:   const addMockPhoto = () => {
 87:     if (photos.length >= 6) return;
 88:     const names = ["этикетка.jpg", "серийный_номер.jpg", "повреждение.jpg", "datamatrix.jpg", "упаковка.jpg", "вложение.jpg"];
 89:     setPhotos([...photos, {
 90:       url: `https://placehold.co/400x300/e2e8f0/64748b?text=${encodeURIComponent(`Фото ${photos.length + 1}`)}`,
 91:       name: names[photos.length] ?? `photo_${photos.length}.jpg`,
 92:     }]);
 93:   };
 94: 
 95:   const removePhoto = (index: number) => {
 96:     setPhotos(photos.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
 97:   };
 98: 
 99:   const currentType = claimTypes.find((t) => t.value === selectedType);
100: 
101:   return (
102:     <Form {...form}>
103:       <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-10">
104: 
105:         {/* ── 1. Тип претензии ────────────────────────────────── */}
106:         <section className="space-y-3">
107:           <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-muted-foreground">Тип претензии</p>
108:           <FormField
109:             control={form.control}
110:             name="type"
111:             render={({ field }) => (
112:               <FormItem>
113:                 <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-px bg-border">
114:                   {claimTypes.map((t) => {
115:                     const active = field.value === t.value;
116:                     return (
117:                       <button
118:                         key={t.value}
119:                         type="button"
120:                         onClick={() => {
121:                           field.onChange(t.value);
122:                           setSelectedType(t.value);
123:                         }}
124:                         className={cn(
125:                           "group relative flex flex-col gap-1.5 p-4 text-left bg-card transition-colors cursor-pointer",
126:                           active ? "bg-muted/60" : "hover:bg-muted/30"
127:                         )}
128:                       >
129:                         {/* active indicator */}
130:                         {active && (
131:                           <span className={cn("absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-0.5", t.dot)} />
132:                         )}
133:                         <span className={cn(
134:                           "text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest transition-colors",
135:                           active ? t.color : "text-foreground/50 group-hover:text-foreground/80"
136:                         )}>
137:                           {t.label}
138:                         </span>
139:                         <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground leading-snug">
140:                           {t.desc}
141:                         </span>
142:                       </button>
143:                     );
144:                   })}
145:                 </div>
146:                 <FormMessage className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold pt-1" />
147:               </FormItem>
148:             )}
149:           />
150:         </section>
151: 
152:         {/* ── 2. Товар и серия ─────────────────────────────────── */}
153:         <section className="space-y-3">
154:           <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-muted-foreground">Товар и серия</p>
155:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
156:             <FormField
157:               control={form.control}
158:               name="productId"
159:               render={({ field }) => (
160:                 <FormItem className="space-y-1.5">
161:                   <FormLabel className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-foreground/70">Препарат</FormLabel>
162:                   <FormControl>
163:                     <div className="relative">
164:                       <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
165:                       <Input
166:                         placeholder="МНН или SKU…"
167:                         className="rounded-none pl-9 h-11 bg-muted/40 border-0 border-b border-border focus-visible:border-primary focus-visible:ring-0 transition-colors"
168:                         onChange={field.onChange}
169:                       />
170:                     </div>
171:                   </FormControl>
172:                   <FormMessage className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold" />
173:                 </FormItem>
174:               )}
175:             />
176:             <FormField
177:               control={form.control}
178:               name="batchId"
179:               render={({ field }) => (
180:                 <FormItem className="space-y-1.5">
181:                   <FormLabel className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-foreground/70">Серия</FormLabel>
182:                   <Select onValueChange={field.onChange} defaultValue={field.value}>
183:                     <FormControl>
184:                       <SelectTrigger className="rounded-none h-11 bg-muted/40 border-0 border-b border-border focus:ring-0 focus:border-primary transition-colors">
185:                         <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите серию" />
186:                       </SelectTrigger>
187:                     </FormControl>
188:                     <SelectContent className="rounded-none">
189:                       <SelectItem value="RZ2024A">RZ2024A — до 12.2026</SelectItem>
190:                       <SelectItem value="PK2025C">PK2025C — до 06.2025</SelectItem>
191:                       <SelectItem value="BT12345">BT12345 — до 01.2027</SelectItem>
192:                     </SelectContent>
193:                   </Select>
194:                   <FormMessage className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold" />
195:                 </FormItem>
196:               )}
197:             />
198:           </div>
199:         </section>
200: 
201:         {/* ── 3. Источник и описание ───────────────────────────── */}
202:         <section className="space-y-3">
203:           <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-muted-foreground">Детали</p>
204:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
205:             <FormField
206:               control={form.control}
207:               name="source"
208:               render={({ field }) => (
209:                 <FormItem className="space-y-1.5">
210:                   <FormLabel className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-foreground/70">Источник / № предписания</FormLabel>
211:                   <FormControl>
212:                     <Input
213:                       placeholder="Аптека №3 или Письмо РЗН №…"
214:                       className="rounded-none h-11 bg-muted/40 border-0 border-b border-border focus-visible:border-primary focus-visible:ring-0 transition-colors"
215:                       {...field}
216:                     />
217:                   </FormControl>
218:                   <FormMessage className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold" />
219:                 </FormItem>
220:               )}
221:             />
222:             <FormField
223:               control={form.control}
224:               name="notes"
225:               render={({ field }) => (
226:                 <FormItem className="space-y-1.5 md:col-span-1">
227:                   <FormLabel className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-foreground/70">Описание проблемы</FormLabel>
228:                   <FormControl>
229:                     <Textarea
230:                       placeholder="Характер брака, причина возврата…"
231:                       className="rounded-none min-h-[80px] resize-none bg-muted/40 border-0 border-b border-border focus-visible:border-primary focus-visible:ring-0 transition-colors"
232:                       {...field}
233:                     />
234:                   </FormControl>
235:                   <FormMessage className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold" />
236:                 </FormItem>
237:               )}
238:             />
239:           </div>
240:         </section>
241: 
242:         {/* ── 4. Фото-фиксация ─────────────────────────────────── */}
243:         <section className="space-y-3">
244:           <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
245:             <p className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-muted-foreground">Фото-фиксация</p>
246:             <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-muted-foreground">{photos.length}/6</span>
247:           </div>
248: 
249:           {/* Main drop zone — wide rectangle */}
250:           {photos.length === 0 ? (
251:             <button
252:               type="button"
253:               onClick={addMockPhoto}
254:               className="group w-full h-40 border border-dashed border-border bg-muted/20 hover:bg-muted/40 hover:border-primary/40 transition-all flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 cursor-pointer"
255:             >
256:               <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center group-hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors">
257:                 <Upload className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground group-hover:text-primary transition-colors" />
258:               </div>
259:               <div className="text-center space-y-0.5">
260:                 <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground/70 group-hover:text-foreground transition-colors">Загрузить фото</p>
261:                 <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">JPG, PNG, HEIC — до 10 МБ каждый</p>
262:               </div>
263:             </button>
264:           ) : (
265:             <div className="space-y-2">
266:               {/* Uploaded photos — horizontal strip */}
267:               <div className="grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-6 gap-2">
268:                 {photos.map((photo, i) => (
269:                   <div key={i} className="group relative aspect-[4/3] bg-muted overflow-hidden">
270:                     <img
271:                       src={photo.url}
272:                       alt={photo.name}
273:                       className="w-full h-full object-cover transition-all duration-300 group-hover:brightness-75"
274:                     />
275:                     {/* Overlay */}
276:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
277:                       <button
278:                         type="button"
279:                         onClick={() => removePhoto(i)}
280:                         className="h-7 w-7 bg-card/90 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-destructive hover:text-destructive-foreground transition-colors"
281:                       >
282:                         <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
283:                       </button>
284:                     </div>
285:                     {/* Filename */}
286:                     <div className="absolute bottom-0 inset-x-0 bg-background/80 px-1.5 py-1 translate-y-full group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform">
287:                       <p className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground truncate">{photo.name}</p>
288:                     </div>
289:                   </div>
290:                 ))}
291: 
292:                 {/* Add more button */}
293:                 {photos.length < 6 && (
294:                   <button
295:                     type="button"
296:                     onClick={addMockPhoto}
297:                     className="aspect-[4/3] border border-dashed border-border bg-muted/20 hover:bg-muted/40 hover:border-primary/40 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 transition-all cursor-pointer group"
298:                   >
299:                     <Camera className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground group-hover:text-primary transition-colors" />
300:                     <span className="text-[9px] font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground group-hover:text-primary transition-colors">Добавить</span>
301:                   </button>
302:                 )}
303:               </div>
304: 
305:               <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
306:                 Рекомендуется: этикетка, DataMatrix, место повреждения, серийный номер
307:               </p>
308:             </div>
309:           )}
310:         </section>
311: 
312:         {/* ── Footer ──────────────────────────────────────────── */}
313:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-6 border-t border-border">
314:           <div className="space-y-0.5">
315:             {currentType && (
316:               <>
317:                 <p className={cn("text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-widest", currentType.color)}>
318:                   {currentType.label}
319:                 </p>
320:                 <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">{currentType.desc}</p>
321:               </>
322:             )}
323:           </div>
324:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
325:             <Button
326:               variant="ghost"
327:               type="button"
328:               className="rounded-none h-11 px-6 uppercase font-bold text-xs tracking-widest"
329:             >
330:               Отмена
331:             </Button>
332:             <Button
333:               type="submit"
334:               className="rounded-none h-11 px-10 bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 uppercase font-bold text-xs tracking-widest"
335:             >
336:               Зафиксировать
337:             </Button>
338:           </div>
339:         </div>
340:       </form>
341:     </Form>
342:   );
343: }
````

````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
  4: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  5: import {
  6:   Table,
  7:   TableBody,

 13: import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";

 18: 
 19: const mockClaims = [
 20:   {
 21:     id: "CLM-012",
 22:     product: "Аспирин 500мг",
 23:     sku: "ASP-500-T",
 24:     batch: "RZ2024A",
 25:     type: "recall",
 26:     status: "blocked",

 29:     createdBy: "Александр И.",
 30:   },
 31:   {
 32:     id: "CLM-011",
 33:     product: "Омепразол 20мг",
 34:     sku: "OME-20-C",
 35:     batch: "PK2025C",
 36:     type: "return_from_pharmacy",
 37:     status: "open",
 38:     source: "Аптека #7",
 39:     createdAt: new Date("2026-03-27T09:15:00"),
 40:     createdBy: "Мария С.",
 41:   },
 42:   {
 43:     id: "CLM-010",
 44:     product: "Парацетамол 500мг",
 45:     sku: "PAR-500-T",
 46:     batch: "BT12345",
 47:     type: "defect",
 48:     status: "open",
 49:     source: "Приемка",
 50:     createdAt: new Date("2026-03-26T14:30:00"),
 51:     createdBy: "Дмитрий К.",
 52:   },
 53:   {
 54:     id: "CLM-009",
 55:     product: "Ибупрофен 400мг",
 56:     sku: "IBU-400-T",
 57:     batch: "IB9988C",
 58:     type: "return_to_supplier",
 59:     status: "closed",
 60:     source: "Поставщик 'ФармПлюс'",
 61:     createdAt: new Date("2026-03-25T11:00:00"),
 62:     createdBy: "Ольга П.",
 63:   },
 64: ];
 65: 
 66: const typeLabels: Record<string, { label: string; variant: "destructive" | "secondary" | "warning" | "blue" }> = {
 67:   recall: { label: "ОТЗЫВ (РЗН)", variant: "destructive" },
 68:   return_from_pharmacy: { label: "Возврат (Аптека)", variant: "blue" },
 69:   return_to_supplier: { label: "Возврат (Поставщик)", variant: "secondary" },
 70:   defect: { label: "ДЕФЕКТ", variant: "warning" },
 71: };
 72: 
 73: const statusLabels: Record<string, { label: string; variant: "destructive" | "secondary" | "warning" | "success" }> = {
 74:   open: { label: "Открыто", variant: "warning" },
 75:   blocked: { label: "ЗАБЛОКИРОВАНО", variant: "destructive" },
 76:   closed: { label: "Закрыто", variant: "secondary" },
 77: };
 78: 
 79: export function ClaimsList() {
 80:   return (
 81:     <div className="space-y-6">
 82:       <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
 83:         <div>
 84:           <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase">Претензии и дефекты</h1>
 85:           <p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">Управление отзывами, возвратами и выявленным браком</p>
 86:         </div>
 87:         <Button asChild className="rounded-none bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90">
 88:           <Link href="/claims/new">
 89:             <Plus className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
 90:             Создать претензию
 91:           </Link>
 92:         </Button>
 93:       </div>
 94: 
 95:       <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-start md:items-center justify-between">
 96:         <Tabs defaultValue="all" className="w-full md:w-auto">
 97:           <TabsList className="rounded-none border-b h-auto p-0 bg-transparent gap-6">
 98:             <TabsTrigger value="all" className="rounded-none border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-primary data-[state=active]:bg-transparent px-2 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Все</TabsTrigger>
 99:             <TabsTrigger value="open" className="rounded-none border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-primary data-[state=active]:bg-transparent px-2 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Открытые</TabsTrigger>
100:             <TabsTrigger value="blocked" className="rounded-none border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-primary data-[state=active]:bg-transparent px-2 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Заблокированные</TabsTrigger>
101:             <TabsTrigger value="closed" className="rounded-none border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-primary data-[state=active]:bg-transparent px-2 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">Архив</TabsTrigger>
102:           </TabsList>
103:         </Tabs>
104:       </div>
105: 
106:       <div className="border border-border bg-card">
107:         <Table>
108:           <TableHeader className="bg-muted/50 rounded-none">
109:             <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent rounded-none">
110:               <TableHead className="w-[100px] text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-muted-foreground">ID</TableHead>
111:               <TableHead className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-muted-foreground">Товар / Серия</TableHead>
112:               <TableHead className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-muted-foreground text-center">Тип проблемы</TableHead>
113:               <TableHead className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-muted-foreground text-center">Статус</TableHead>
114:               <TableHead className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-muted-foreground">Источник / Кем создано</TableHead>
115:               <TableHead className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold text-muted-foreground text-right">Дата</TableHead>
116:               <TableHead className="w-[80px]"></TableHead>
117:             </TableRow>
118:           </TableHeader>
119:           <TableBody>
120:             {mockClaims.map((claim) => (
121:               <TableRow key={claim.id} className="group hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors">
122:                 <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs font-bold">
123:                   {claim.id}
124:                 </TableCell>
125:                 <TableCell>
126:                   <div className="flex flex-col">
127:                     <span className="font-bold text-sm tracking-tight">{claim.product}</span>
128:                     <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-muted-foreground">
129:                       Batch: <span className="text-foreground font-bold">{claim.batch}</span> | SKU: {claim.sku}
130:                     </span>
131:                   </div>
132:                 </TableCell>
133:                 <TableCell className="text-center">
134:                   <Badge 
135:                     variant={typeLabels[claim.type].variant === "blue" ? "outline" : typeLabels[claim.type].variant}
136:                     className={cn(
137:                       "rounded-none px-2 py-0 text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tighter",
138:                       typeLabels[claim.type].variant === "blue" && "border-blue text-blue bg-blue/5"
139:                     )}
140:                   >
141:                     {typeLabels[claim.type].label}
142:                   </Badge>
143:                 </TableCell>
144:                 <TableCell className="text-center">
145:                    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5">
146:                     {claim.status === "blocked" && <ShieldAlert className="h-3 w-3 text-destructive" />}
147:                     <span className={cn(
148:                       "text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tight",
149:                       claim.status === "blocked" ? "text-destructive" : 
150:                       claim.status === "open" ? "text-warning" : "text-muted-foreground"
151:                     )}>
152:                       {statusLabels[claim.status].label}
153:                     </span>
154:                   </div>
155:                 </TableCell>
156:                 <TableCell>
157:                    <div className="flex flex-col">
158:                     <span className="text-[11px] font-medium">{claim.source}</span>
159:                     <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">{claim.createdBy}</span>
160:                   </div>
161:                 </TableCell>
162:                 <TableCell className="text-right tabular-nums text-xs text-muted-foreground">
163:                   {format(claim.createdAt, "dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm")}
164:                 </TableCell>
165:                 <TableCell className="text-right">
166:                   <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" asChild className="h-8 w-8 rounded-none opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
167:                     <Link href={`/claims/${claim.id}`}>
168:                       <Eye className="h-4 w-4" />
169:                     </Link>
170:                   </Button>
171:                 </TableCell>
172:               </TableRow>
173:             ))}
174:           </TableBody>
175:         </Table>
176:       </div>
177:     </div>
178:   );
179: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/claims/stop-signal-alert.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client";
 2: 
 3: import { AlertOctagon, ExternalLink } from "lucide-react";
 4: import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert";
 5: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 6: import Link from "next/link";
 7: 
 8: interface StopSignalAlertProps {
 9:   batchNumber: string;
10:   productName: string;
11:   claimId?: string;
12: }
13: 
14: export function StopSignalAlert({ batchNumber, productName, claimId }: StopSignalAlertProps) {
15:   return (
16:     <Alert variant="destructive" className="rounded-none border-x-0 border-t-0 bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-4 duration-500">
17:       <AlertOctagon className="h-5 w-5" />
18:       <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between w-full gap-4">
19:         <div>
20:           <AlertTitle className="font-bold tracking-tight uppercase text-xs mb-1">
21:             🛑 STOP SIGNAL: Recalled Batch Detected
22:           </AlertTitle>
23:           <AlertDescription className="text-sm opacity-90">
24:             Batch <span className="font-mono font-bold">{batchNumber}</span> ({productName}) is listed in the 
25:             Roszdravnadzor recalled registry. Stock has been auto-blocked.
26:           </AlertDescription>
27:         </div>
28:         {claimId && (
29:           <Button 
30:             variant="outline" 
31:             size="sm" 
32:             asChild
33:             className="rounded-none border-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive-foreground hover:text-destructive transition-all shrink-0"
34:           >
35:             <Link href={`/claims/${claimId}`}>
36:               <ExternalLink className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
37:               View Claim
38:             </Link>
39:           </Button>
40:         )}
41:       </div>
42:     </Alert>
43:   );
44: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/inventory/complete-dialog.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import {
 4:   AlertDialog,
 5:   AlertDialogAction,
 6:   AlertDialogCancel,
 7:   AlertDialogContent,
 8:   AlertDialogDescription,
 9:   AlertDialogFooter,
10:   AlertDialogHeader,
11:   AlertDialogTitle,
12: } from "@/components/ui/alert-dialog"
13: 
14: interface CompleteDialogProps {
15:   open: boolean
16:   onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void
17:   onConfirm: () => void
18:   uncheckedCount: number
19: }
20: 
21: export function CompleteDialog({ open, onOpenChange, onConfirm, uncheckedCount }: CompleteDialogProps) {
22:   return (
23:     <AlertDialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
24:       <AlertDialogContent>
25:         <AlertDialogHeader>
26:           <AlertDialogTitle>Завершить инвентаризацию?</AlertDialogTitle>
27:           <AlertDialogDescription className="space-y-4">
28:             <p>
29:               Вы собираетесь завершить текущую сессию инвентаризации. 
30:               После завершения редактирование фактических количеств будет невозможно.
31:             </p>
32:             {uncheckedCount > 0 && (
33:               <div className="bg-warning-subtle p-3 border border-warning text-warning-foreground text-sm">
34:                 <span className="font-bold">Внимание:</span> {uncheckedCount} позиций ещё не отмечены. 
35:                 Для них будет автоматически проставлено фактическое количество <span className="font-bold">0</span>.
36:               </div>
37:             )}
38:           </AlertDialogDescription>
39:         </AlertDialogHeader>
40:         <AlertDialogFooter>
41:           <AlertDialogCancel>Отмена</AlertDialogCancel>
42:           <AlertDialogAction onClick={onConfirm} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90">
43:             Завершить
44:           </AlertDialogAction>
45:         </AlertDialogFooter>
46:       </AlertDialogContent>
47:     </AlertDialog>
48:   )
49: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/inventory/inventory-item-row.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import { useState } from "react"
 4: import { TableRow, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table"
 5: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
 6: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
 7: import { Check, Loader2 } from "lucide-react"
 8: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 9: 
10: interface InventoryItemRowProps {
11:   item: {
12:     id: string
13:     mnn: string
14:     dosage_form: string
15:     batch_serial: string
16:     expiry_date: string
17:     actual_qty: number | null
18:   }
19: }
20: 
21: export function InventoryItemRow({ item }: InventoryItemRowProps) {
22:   const [value, setValue] = useState(item.actual_qty?.toString() || "")
23:   const [isSaved, setIsSaved] = useState(!!item.actual_qty)
24:   const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
25: 
26:   const handleSave = () => {
27:     if (!value) return
28:     setIsSaving(true)
29:     // Simulating save
30:     setTimeout(() => {
31:       setIsSaving(false)
32:       setIsSaved(true)
33:     }, 400)
34:   }
35: 
36:   const hasChanged = value !== (item.actual_qty?.toString() || "")
37: 
38:   return (
39:     <TableRow className={cn(!isSaved && "border-l-4 border-l-warning")}>
40:       <TableCell className="font-medium">{item.mnn}</TableCell>
41:       <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground">{item.dosage_form}</TableCell>
42:       <TableCell className="font-mono text-sm">{item.batch_serial}</TableCell>
43:       <TableCell>{item.expiry_date}</TableCell>
44:       <TableCell>
45:         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
46:           <Input
47:             type="number"
48:             value={value}
49:             onChange={(e) => {
50:               setValue(e.target.value)
51:               setIsSaved(false)
52:             }}
53:             placeholder="0"
54:             className="w-24 text-right"
55:           />
56:           <Button
57:             size="icon"
58:             variant={isSaved ? "ghost" : "primary"}
59:             onClick={handleSave}
60:             disabled={isSaving || !value}
61:             className={cn("h-9 w-9", isSaved && "text-success hover:text-success")}
62:           >
63:             {isSaving ? (
64:               <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
65:             ) : isSaved ? (
66:               <Check className="h-5 w-5" />
67:             ) : (
68:               <Check className="h-5 w-5" />
69:             )}
70:           </Button>
71:         </div>
72:       </TableCell>
73:     </TableRow>
74:   )
75: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/inventory/netting-act-dialog.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client"
  2: 
  3: import {
  4:   Dialog,
  5:   DialogContent,
  6:   DialogDescription,
  7:   DialogFooter,
  8:   DialogHeader,
  9:   DialogTitle,
 10: } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
 11: import {
 12:   Select,
 13:   SelectContent,
 14:   SelectItem,
 15:   SelectTrigger,
 16:   SelectValue,
 17: } from "@/components/ui/select"
 18: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
 19: import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"
 20: import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
 21: import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area"
 22: 
 23: interface NettingActDialogProps {
 24:   open: boolean
 25:   onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void
 26:   onConfirm: () => void
 27:   surplusItems: any[]
 28:   deficitItems: any[]
 29: }
 30: 
 31: export function NettingActDialog({ open, onOpenChange, onConfirm, surplusItems, deficitItems }: NettingActDialogProps) {
 32:   return (
 33:     <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
 34:       <DialogContent className="max-w-3xl max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col">
 35:         <DialogHeader>
 36:           <DialogTitle>Акт зачёта излишков и недостач (Пересортица)</DialogTitle>
 37:           <DialogDescription>
 38:             Зачёт расхождений возможен только внутри одной ценовой группы.
 39:           </DialogDescription>
 40:         </DialogHeader>
 41: 
 42:         <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto space-y-6 py-4">
 43:           <div className="space-y-4">
 44:             <Label className="text-success font-bold">Излишки для зачёта (Surplus):</Label>
 45:             <div className="border border-border">
 46:               <Table>
 47:                 <TableHeader>
 48:                   <TableRow>
 49:                     <TableHead>МНН</TableHead>
 50:                     <TableHead>Серия</TableHead>
 51:                     <TableHead className="text-right">Кол-во</TableHead>
 52:                   </TableRow>
 53:                 </TableHeader>
 54:                 <TableBody>
 55:                   {surplusItems.map((item) => (
 56:                     <TableRow key={item.id}>
 57:                       <TableCell>{item.mnn}</TableCell>
 58:                       <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs">{item.batch_serial}</TableCell>
 59:                       <TableCell className="text-right text-success">+{item.diff}</TableCell>
 60:                     </TableRow>
 61:                   ))}
 62:                 </TableBody>
 63:               </Table>
 64:             </div>
 65:           </div>
 66: 
 67:           <div className="space-y-4">
 68:             <Label className="text-destructive font-bold">Недостачи для зачёта (Deficit):</Label>
 69:             <div className="border border-border">
 70:               <Table>
 71:                 <TableHeader>
 72:                   <TableRow>
 73:                     <TableHead>МНН</TableHead>
 74:                     <TableHead>Серия</TableHead>
 75:                     <TableHead className="text-right">Кол-во</TableHead>
 76:                   </TableRow>
 77:                 </TableHeader>
 78:                 <TableBody>
 79:                   {deficitItems.map((item) => (
 80:                     <TableRow key={item.id}>
 81:                       <TableCell>{item.mnn}</TableCell>
 82:                       <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs">{item.batch_serial}</TableCell>
 83:                       <TableCell className="text-right text-destructive">{item.diff}</TableCell>
 84:                     </TableRow>
 85:                   ))}
 86:                 </TableBody>
 87:               </Table>
 88:             </div>
 89:           </div>
 90: 
 91:           <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 items-end">
 92:             <div className="space-y-2">
 93:               <Label htmlFor="price-group">Ценовая группа</Label>
 94:               <Select defaultValue="group-1">
 95:                 <SelectTrigger id="price-group">
 96:                   <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите группу" />
 97:                 </SelectTrigger>
 98:                 <SelectContent>
 99:                   <SelectItem value="group-1">Группа А (до 100 руб.)</SelectItem>
100:                   <SelectItem value="group-2">Группа Б (100–500 руб.)</SelectItem>
101:                   <SelectItem value="group-3">Группа В (свыше 500 руб.)</SelectItem>
102:                 </SelectContent>
103:               </Select>
104:             </div>
105:             <div className="text-right">
106:               <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold">Итого зачёт:</p>
107:               <p className="text-2xl font-bold">-2 ед.</p>
108:             </div>
109:           </div>
110:         </div>
111: 
112:         <DialogFooter>
113:           <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
114:             Отмена
115:           </Button>
116:           <Button onClick={onConfirm} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90">
117:             Подписать и сохранить акт
118:           </Button>
119:         </DialogFooter>
120:       </DialogContent>
121:     </Dialog>
122:   )
123: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/inventory/session-status-badge.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
 4: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 5: 
 6: export type InventorySessionStatus = "draft" | "in_progress" | "completed" | "cancelled"
 7: 
 8: interface SessionStatusBadgeProps {
 9:   status: InventorySessionStatus
10:   className?: string
11: }
12: 
13: export function SessionStatusBadge({ status, className }: SessionStatusBadgeProps) {
14:   const configs: Record<InventorySessionStatus, { label: string; className: string }> = {
15:     draft: {
16:       label: "Черновик",
17:       className: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground border-border",
18:     },
19:     in_progress: {
20:       label: "В процессе",
21:       className: "bg-blue text-blue-foreground border-blue",
22:     },
23:     completed: {
24:       label: "Завершено",
25:       className: "bg-success text-success-foreground border-success",
26:     },
27:     cancelled: {
28:       label: "Отменено",
29:       className: "bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground border-destructive",
30:     },
31:   }
32: 
33:   const config = configs[status]
34: 
35:   return (
36:     <Badge variant="outline" className={cn("font-medium", config.className, className)}>
37:       {config.label}
38:     </Badge>
39:   )
40: }
````
