## File: frontend/src/components/products/product-batches-tab.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
  4: import {
  5:   Table,
  6:   TableBody,
  7:   TableCell,
  8:   TableHead,
  9:   TableHeader,
 10:   TableRow,
 11: } from "@/components/ui/table";
 12: import { format } from "date-fns";
 13: import { ru } from "date-fns/locale";
 14: import { Lock } from "lucide-react";
 15: 
 16: interface ProductBatchesTabProps {
 17:   product: any;
 18: }
 19: 
 20: export function ProductBatchesTab({ product }: ProductBatchesTabProps) {
 21:   // NS/PV Check (UI Mock)
 22:   if (product.is_ns_pv) {
 23:     return (
 24:       <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 py-12 text-center border border-border bg-muted/30">
 25:         <div className="bg-destructive/10 p-4 rounded-full text-destructive">
 26:           <Lock className="h-8 w-8" />
 27:         </div>
 28:         <div className="space-y-1">
 29:           <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-foreground uppercase tracking-tight">Доступ ограничен</h3>
 30:           <p className="text-muted-foreground max-w-sm">
 31:             Данные по остаткам НС-ПВ доступны только администраторам и сотрудникам с соответствующим допуском.
 32:           </p>
 33:         </div>
 34:       </div>
 35:     );
 36:   }
 37: 
 38:   return (
 39:     <div className="border border-border bg-card">
 40:       <Table>
 41:         <TableHeader>
 42:           <TableRow className="bg-muted hover:bg-muted font-bold text-xs uppercase">
 43:             <TableHead className="w-[150px]">Серия</TableHead>
 44:             <TableHead>Лот</TableHead>
 45:             <TableHead>Годен до</TableHead>
 46:             <TableHead className="text-right">Кол-во</TableHead>
 47:             <TableHead>Зона</TableHead>
 48:             <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Статус</TableHead>
 49:           </TableRow>
 50:         </TableHeader>
 51:         <TableBody>
 52:           {product.batches?.length > 0 ? (
 53:             product.batches.map((batch: any) => (
 54:               <TableRow key={batch.id} className="cursor-default">
 55:                 <TableCell className="font-bold font-mono">{batch.serial_number}</TableCell>
 56:                 <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground font-mono">{batch.lot}</TableCell>
 57:                 <TableCell>
 58:                   {format(new Date(batch.expiry_date), "dd.MM.yyyy", { locale: ru })}
 59:                 </TableCell>
 60:                 <TableCell className="text-right font-medium">
 61:                   {batch.quantity}
 62:                 </TableCell>
 63:                 <TableCell className="text-xs">{batch.zone_name}</TableCell>
 64:                 <TableCell>
 65:                   <StatusBadge status={batch.status} />
 66:                 </TableCell>
 67:               </TableRow>
 68:             ))
 69:           ) : (
 70:             <TableRow>
 71:               <TableCell colSpan={6} className="h-24 text-center text-muted-foreground">
 72:                 Нет доступных партий на остатках.
 73:               </TableCell>
 74:             </TableRow>
 75:           )}
 76:         </TableBody>
 77:       </Table>
 78:     </div>
 79:   );
 80: }
 81: 
 82: function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {
 83:   switch (status) {
 84:     case "available":
 85:       return (
 86:         <Badge className="bg-success-subtle text-success border-success/20 hover:bg-success-subtle shadow-none rounded-none w-full justify-center">
 87:           Доступно
 88:         </Badge>
 89:       );
 90:     case "quarantine":
 91:       return (
 92:         <Badge className="bg-warning-subtle text-warning-foreground border-warning/20 hover:bg-warning-subtle shadow-none rounded-none w-full justify-center">
 93:           Карантин
 94:         </Badge>
 95:       );
 96:     case "blocked":
 97:       return (
 98:         <Badge className="bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground border-destructive/20 hover:bg-destructive shadow-none rounded-none w-full justify-center">
 99:           Заблокир.
100:         </Badge>
101:       );
102:     default:
103:       return <Badge variant="secondary">{status}</Badge>;
104:   }
105: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/products/product-card-header.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
  4: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  5: import {
  6:   Tooltip,
  7:   TooltipContent,
  8:   TooltipProvider,
  9:   TooltipTrigger,
 10: } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
 11: import { Edit, Trash2, Snowflake, ShieldAlert, BadgeCheck, Activity } from "lucide-react";
 12: import Image from "next/image";
 13: 
 14: interface ProductCardHeaderProps {
 15:   product: any;
 16:   isAdmin?: boolean;
 17: }
 18: 
 19: export function ProductCardHeader({ product, isAdmin = true }: ProductCardHeaderProps) {
 20:   return (
 21:     <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 md:flex-row md:items-start">
 22:       {/* Photo Section */}
 23:       <div className="relative aspect-square w-full max-w-[200px] overflow-hidden border border-border bg-muted">
 24:         {product.photos?.[0] ? (
 25:           <Image
 26:             src={product.photos[0].url}
 27:             alt={product.trade_name}
 28:             fill
 29:             className="object-cover"
 30:           />
 31:         ) : (
 32:           <div className="flex h-full w-full items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground">
 33:             Нет фото
 34:           </div>
 35:         )}
 36:       </div>
 37: 
 38:       {/* Info Section */}
 39:       <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-2">
 40:         <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
 41:           <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
 42:             <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-foreground">
 43:               {product.trade_name}
 44:             </h1>
 45:             <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">
 46:               МНН: {product.mnn}
 47:             </p>
 48:           </div>
 49: 
 50:           {isAdmin && (
 51:             <div className="flex gap-2">
 52:               <Button variant="outline" size="sm">
 53:                 <Edit className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
 54:                 Редактировать
 55:               </Button>
 56:               <Button variant="destructive" size="sm">
 57:                 <Trash2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
 58:                 Удалить
 59:               </Button>
 60:             </div>
 61:           )}
 62:         </div>
 63: 
 64:         {/* Flags Area */}
 65:         <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
 66:           <TooltipProvider>
 67:             {product.is_jnvlp && (
 68:               <Tooltip>
 69:                 <TooltipTrigger asChild>
 70:                   <Badge variant="outline" className="h-6 border-primary text-primary">
 71:                     <BadgeCheck className="mr-1 h-3 w-3" />
 72:                     ЖНВЛП
 73:                   </Badge>
 74:                 </TooltipTrigger>
 75:                 <TooltipContent>Жизненно необходимые и важнейшие лекарственные препараты</TooltipContent>
 76:               </Tooltip>
 77:             )}
 78: 
 79:             {product.is_mdlp && (
 80:               <Tooltip>
 81:                 <TooltipTrigger asChild>
 82:                   <Badge variant="secondary" className="h-6">
 83:                     <Activity className="mr-1 h-3 w-3" />
 84:                     МДЛП
 85:                   </Badge>
 86:                 </TooltipTrigger>
 87:                 <TooltipContent>Система мониторинга движения лекарственных препаратов</TooltipContent>
 88:               </Tooltip>
 89:             )}
 90: 
 91:             {product.cold_chain && (
 92:               <Tooltip>
 93:                 <TooltipTrigger asChild>
 94:                   <Badge className="h-6 bg-blue text-blue-foreground hover:bg-blue/90">
 95:                     <Snowflake className="mr-1 h-3 w-3" />
 96:                     Холодовая цепь
 97:                   </Badge>
 98:                 </TooltipTrigger>
 99:                 <TooltipContent>Требуется соблюдение температурного режима (2-8°C)</TooltipContent>
100:               </Tooltip>
101:             )}
102: 
103:             {product.is_ns_pv && (
104:               <Tooltip>
105:                 <TooltipTrigger asChild>
106:                   <Badge variant="destructive" className="h-6">
107:                     <ShieldAlert className="mr-1 h-3 w-3" />
108:                     НС-ПВ
109:                   </Badge>
110:                 </TooltipTrigger>
111:                 <TooltipContent>Наркотические средства и психотропные вещества</TooltipContent>
112:               </Tooltip>
113:             )}
114:           </TooltipProvider>
115:         </div>
116: 
117:         {/* Secondary Info Grid */}
118:         <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 gap-x-8 gap-y-2 text-sm md:grid-cols-2">
119:           <div className="flex justify-between border-b border-border/50 py-1">
120:             <span className="text-muted-foreground">РУ-номер</span>
121:             <span className="font-medium">{product.ru_number}</span>
122:           </div>
123:           <div className="flex justify-between border-b border-border/50 py-1">
124:             <span className="text-muted-foreground">SKU (Артикул)</span>
125:             <span className="font-medium font-mono">{product.sku || "—"}</span>
126:           </div>
127:           <div className="flex justify-between border-b border-border/50 py-1">
128:             <span className="text-muted-foreground">АТХ-коды</span>
129:             <span className="font-medium">{product.atc_codes?.join(", ") || "—"}</span>
130:           </div>
131:         </div>
132:       </div>
133:     </div>
134:   );
135: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/products/product-form.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  4: import { Card, CardContent, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
  5: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  6: import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  7: import { MultiSelect } from "@/components/ui/multi-select";
  8: import {
  9:   Select,
 10:   SelectContent,
 11:   SelectItem,
 12:   SelectTrigger,
 13:   SelectValue,
 14: } from "@/components/ui/select";
 15: import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
 16: import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
 17: import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
 18: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 19: import { ImagePlus, X, Box, Droplets, Thermometer, Info } from "lucide-react";
 20: import { useState } from "react";
 21: 
 22: interface ProductFormProps {
 23:   initialData?: any;
 24:   mode: "create" | "edit";
 25: }
 26: 
 27: const ATC_OPTIONS = [
 28:   { label: "J01CA04 - Amoxicillin", value: "J01CA04" },
 29:   { label: "N02BE01 - Paracetamol", value: "N02BE01" },
 30:   { label: "A10BA02 - Metformin", value: "A10BA02" },
 31:   { label: "C09AA04 - Perindopril", value: "C09AA04" },
 32: ];
 33: 
 34: const DOSAGE_FORMS = [
 35:   "Капсулы",
 36:   "Таблетки",
 37:   "Раствор для инъекций",
 38:   "Мазь",
 39:   "Крем",
 40:   "Суспензия",
 41: ];
 42: 
 43: export function ProductForm({ initialData, mode }: ProductFormProps) {
 44:   const [isColdChain, setIsColdChain] = useState(initialData?.cold_chain || false);
 45:   const [photoPreview, setPhotoPreview] = useState<string | null>(
 46:     initialData?.photos?.[0]?.url || null
 47:   );
 48:   const [selectedAtc, setSelectedAtc] = useState<string[]>(initialData?.atc_codes || []);
 49: 
 50:   const handlePhotoChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 51:     const file = e.target.files?.[0];
 52:     if (file) {
 53:       const reader = new FileReader();
 54:       reader.onloadend = () => {
 55:         setPhotoPreview(reader.result as string);
 56:       };
 57:       reader.readAsDataURL(file);
 58:     }
 59:   };
 60: 
 61:   return (
 62:     <div className="space-y-6">
 63:       <Card className="rounded-none border-border shadow-none">
 64:         <CardHeader className="bg-muted/50">
 65:           <CardTitle className="text-xl uppercase tracking-tight">
 66:             {mode === "create" ? "Добавление нового препарата" : "Редактирование препарата"}
 67:           </CardTitle>
 68:         </CardHeader>
 69:         <CardContent className="space-y-8 pt-6">
 70:           {/* Section 1: Identification */}
 71:           <div className="space-y-4">
 72:             <h3 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase text-primary">
 73:               <Info className="h-4 w-4" /> Идентификация
 74:             </h3>
 75:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
 76:               <div className="space-y-2">
 77:                 <Label htmlFor="trade_name" className="text-xs uppercase">Торговое наименование *</Label>
 78:                 <Input id="trade_name" defaultValue={initialData?.trade_name} placeholder="Напр. Амоксициллин" className="rounded-none" />
 79:               </div>
 80:               <div className="space-y-2">
 81:                 <Label htmlFor="mnn" className="text-xs uppercase">МНН (Международное название) *</Label>
 82:                 <Input id="mnn" defaultValue={initialData?.mnn} placeholder="Напр. Amoxicillin" className="rounded-none" />
 83:               </div>
 84:               <div className="space-y-2">
 85:                 <Label htmlFor="ru_number" className="text-xs uppercase">РУ-номер *</Label>
 86:                 <Input id="ru_number" defaultValue={initialData?.ru_number} placeholder="ЛП-001234" className="rounded-none" />
 87:               </div>
 88:               <div className="space-y-2">
 89:                 <Label htmlFor="sku" className="text-xs uppercase">SKU (Артикул)</Label>
 90:                 <Input id="sku" defaultValue={initialData?.sku} placeholder="AMX-500-16" className="rounded-none" />
 91:               </div>
 92:               <div className="space-y-2">
 93:                 <Label htmlFor="barcode" className="text-xs uppercase">Штрихкод (EAN-13)</Label>
 94:                 <Input id="barcode" defaultValue={initialData?.barcode} className="rounded-none" />
 95:               </div>
 96:               <div className="space-y-2">
 97:                 <Label htmlFor="gtin" className="text-xs uppercase">GTIN (DataMatrix)</Label>
 98:                 <Input id="gtin" defaultValue={initialData?.datamatrix_gtin} className="rounded-none" />
 99:               </div>
100:             </div>
101:           </div>
102: 
103:           <Separator />
104: 
105:           {/* Section 2: Pharmaceutical Data */}
106:           <div className="space-y-4">
107:             <h3 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase text-primary">
108:               Фармацевтические данные
109:             </h3>
110:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
111:               <div className="space-y-2">
112:                 <Label htmlFor="atc" className="text-xs uppercase">АТХ-коды</Label>
113:                 <MultiSelect
114:                   options={ATC_OPTIONS}
115:                   selected={selectedAtc}
116:                   onChange={setSelectedAtc}
117:                   placeholder="Выберите коды"
118:                   className="rounded-none"
119:                 />
120:               </div>
121:               <div className="space-y-2">
122:                 <Label htmlFor="dosage_form" className="text-xs uppercase">Лекарственная форма</Label>
123:                 <Select defaultValue={initialData?.dosage_form}>
124:                   <SelectTrigger className="rounded-none">
125:                     <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите форму" />
126:                   </SelectTrigger>
127:                   <SelectContent>
128:                     {DOSAGE_FORMS.map(form => (
129:                       <SelectItem key={form} value={form}>{form}</SelectItem>
130:                     ))}
131:                   </SelectContent>
132:                 </Select>
133:               </div>
134:               <div className="space-y-2">
135:                 <Label htmlFor="dosage" className="text-xs uppercase">Дозировка</Label>
136:                 <Input id="dosage" defaultValue={initialData?.dosage} placeholder="Напр. 500 мг" className="rounded-none" />
137:               </div>
138:               <div className="space-y-2">
139:                 <Label htmlFor="mult" className="text-xs uppercase">Кратность упаковки</Label>
140:                 <Input id="mult" type="number" defaultValue={initialData?.package_multiplicity} className="rounded-none" />
141:               </div>
142:             </div>
143:           </div>
144: 
145:           <Separator />
146: 
147:           {/* Section 3: Flags */}
148:           <div className="space-y-4">
149:             <h3 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase text-primary">Маркировка и ограничения</h3>
150:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-4">
151:               <div className="flex items-center justify-between border border-border p-3 bg-muted/20">
152:                 <div className="space-y-1">
153:                   <Label htmlFor="jnvlp" className="font-bold text-xs uppercase">ЖНВЛП</Label>
154:                   <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Жизненно важный препарат</p>
155:                 </div>
156:                 <Switch id="jnvlp" defaultChecked={initialData?.is_jnvlp} />
157:               </div>
158:               <div className="flex items-center justify-between border border-border p-3 bg-muted/20">
159:                 <div className="space-y-1">
160:                   <Label htmlFor="mdlp" className="font-bold text-xs uppercase">МДЛП</Label>
161:                   <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Требуется маркировка Честный ЗНАК</p>
162:                 </div>
163:                 <Switch id="mdlp" defaultChecked={initialData?.is_mdlp} />
164:               </div>
165:               <div className="flex items-center justify-between border border-border p-3 bg-muted/20">
166:                 <div className="space-y-1">
167:                   <Label htmlFor="ns_pv" className="font-bold text-xs uppercase">НС-ПВ</Label>
168:                   <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Особый учет (Список II/III)</p>
169:                 </div>
170:                 <Switch id="ns_pv" defaultChecked={initialData?.is_ns_pv} />
171:               </div>
172:               <div className="flex items-center justify-between border border-border p-3 bg-muted/20">
173:                 <div className="space-y-1">
174:                   <Label htmlFor="cold_chain" className="font-bold text-xs uppercase">Холодовая цепь</Label>
175:                   <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Соблюдение 2-8°C</p>
176:                 </div>
177:                 <Switch 
178:                   id="cold_chain" 
179:                   checked={isColdChain}
180:                   onCheckedChange={setIsColdChain}
181:                 />
182:               </div>
183:             </div>
184:           </div>
185: 
186:           {/* Section 4: Storage conditions (Conditional) */}
187:           {isColdChain && (
188:             <div className="space-y-4 p-4 border border-blue bg-blue-subtle/30 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2">
189:               <h3 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase text-blue">
190:                 <Thermometer className="h-4 w-4" /> Условия хранения
191:               </h3>
192:               <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
193:                 <div className="space-y-2">
194:                   <Label className="text-xs uppercase">Температура от (°C)</Label>
195:                   <Input type="number" defaultValue={2} className="rounded-none border-blue/20" />
196:                 </div>
197:                 <div className="space-y-2">
198:                   <Label className="text-xs uppercase">Температура до (°C)</Label>
199:                   <Input type="number" defaultValue={8} className="rounded-none border-blue/20" />
200:                 </div>
201:                 <div className="space-y-2">
202:                   <Label className="text-xs uppercase text-primary">Макс. влажность (%)</Label>
203:                   <Input type="number" defaultValue={60} className="rounded-none border-blue/20" />
204:                 </div>
205:               </div>
206:             </div>
207:           )}
208: 
209:           <Separator />
210: 
211:           {/* Section 5: Logistics */}
212:           <div className="space-y-4">
213:             <h3 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase text-primary">
214:               <Box className="h-4 w-4" /> Логистические параметры
215:             </h3>
216:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
217:               <div className="space-y-2">
218:                 <Label className="text-xs uppercase">Вес (г)</Label>
219:                 <Input type="number" defaultValue={initialData?.weight_g} className="rounded-none" />
220:               </div>
221:               <div className="space-y-2">
222:                 <Label className="text-xs uppercase">Ширина (см)</Label>
223:                 <Input type="number" defaultValue={initialData?.width_cm} className="rounded-none" />
224:               </div>
225:               <div className="space-y-2">
226:                 <Label className="text-xs uppercase">Высота (см)</Label>
227:                 <Input type="number" defaultValue={initialData?.height_cm} className="rounded-none" />
228:               </div>
229:               <div className="space-y-2">
230:                 <Label className="text-xs uppercase">Глубина (см)</Label>
231:                 <Input type="number" defaultValue={initialData?.depth_cm} className="rounded-none" />
232:               </div>
233:             </div>
234:           </div>
235: 
236:           <Separator />
237: 
238:           {/* Section 6: Photo Upload */}
239:           <div className="space-y-4">
240:             <h3 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase text-primary">Фотография препарата</h3>
241:             <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6">
242:               <div className="flex-1">
243:                 <Label 
244:                   htmlFor="photo-upload" 
245:                   className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-40 border-2 border-dashed border-border bg-muted/30 hover:bg-muted/50 cursor-pointer transition-colors"
246:                 >
247:                   <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center pt-5 pb-6">
248:                     <ImagePlus className="w-10 h-10 mb-3 text-muted-foreground" />
249:                     <p className="mb-2 text-sm text-foreground uppercase font-bold">Загрузить фото</p>
250:                     <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">PNG, JPG, WEBP (Макс. 10МБ)</p>
251:                   </div>
252:                   <input id="photo-upload" type="file" className="hidden" accept="image/*" onChange={handlePhotoChange} />
253:                 </Label>
254:               </div>
255:               
256:               {photoPreview && (
257:                 <div className="relative w-40 h-40 border border-border group">
258:                   <img src={photoPreview} alt="Preview" className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
259:                   <button 
260:                     onClick={() => setPhotoPreview(null)}
261:                     className="absolute top-1 right-1 bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
262:                   >
263:                     <X className="h-4 w-4" />
264:                   </button>
265:                   <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-primary/80 text-[10px] text-primary-foreground text-center py-1 uppercase">
266:                     Предпросмотр
267:                   </div>
268:                 </div>
269:               )}
270:             </div>
271:           </div>
272:         </CardContent>
273:         <CardFooter className="flex justify-between bg-muted/30 pt-6">
274:           <Button variant="outline" className="rounded-none uppercase font-bold">Отмена</Button>
275:           <Button className="rounded-none uppercase font-bold px-8">
276:             {mode === "create" ? "Создать препарат" : "Сохранить изменения"}
277:           </Button>
278:         </CardFooter>
279:       </Card>
280:     </div>
281:   );
282: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/products/product-storage-tab.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client";
 2: 
 3: import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from "@/components/ui/alert";
 4: import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
 5: import { Snowflake, Thermometer, Droplets } from "lucide-react";
 6: 
 7: interface ProductStorageTabProps {
 8:   product: any;
 9: }
10: 
11: export function ProductStorageTab({ product }: ProductStorageTabProps) {
12:   return (
13:     <Card className="border-none shadow-none bg-transparent">
14:       <CardContent className="p-0 space-y-6">
15:         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
16:           <div className="flex items-start gap-4 p-4 border border-border bg-card">
17:             <div className="bg-primary/10 p-2 text-primary">
18:               <Thermometer className="h-6 w-6" />
19:             </div>
20:             <div>
21:               <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground uppercase font-semibold">Температурный режим</p>
22:               <p className="text-xl font-bold">
23:                 {product.temp_min !== null && product.temp_max !== null
24:                   ? `${product.temp_min} ... ${product.temp_max} °C`
25:                   : "Без ограничений"}
26:               </p>
27:             </div>
28:           </div>
29: 
30:           <div className="flex items-start gap-4 p-4 border border-border bg-card">
31:             <div className="bg-primary/10 p-2 text-primary">
32:               <Droplets className="h-6 w-6" />
33:             </div>
34:             <div>
35:               <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground uppercase font-semibold">Влажность (макс.)</p>
36:               <p className="text-xl font-bold">
37:                 {product.humidity_max !== null ? `${product.humidity_max} %` : "Без ограничений"}
38:               </p>
39:             </div>
40:           </div>
41:         </div>
42: 
43:         {product.cold_chain && (
44:           <Alert variant="warning" className="bg-warning-subtle border-warning/20">
45:             <Snowflake className="h-4 w-4 text-warning-foreground" />
46:             <AlertTitle className="text-warning-foreground font-bold uppercase">
47:               Холодовая цепь — Обязательно
48:             </AlertTitle>
49:             <AlertDescription className="text-warning-foreground opacity-90">
50:               Данный препарат требует непрерывного соблюдения температурного режима на всех этапах хранения и транспортировки. 
51:               Запрещено извлечение из холодильного оборудования более чем на 10 минут.
52:             </AlertDescription>
53:           </Alert>
54:         )}
55:       </CardContent>
56:     </Card>
57:   );
58: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/products/product-tabs.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client";
 2: 
 3: import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
 4: import { ProductBasicTab } from "./product-basic-tab";
 5: import { ProductStorageTab } from "./product-storage-tab";
 6: import { ProductBatchesTab } from "./product-batches-tab";
 7: 
 8: interface ProductTabsProps {
 9:   product: any;
10: }
11: 
12: export function ProductTabs({ product }: ProductTabsProps) {
13:   return (
14:     <Tabs defaultValue="basic" className="w-full">
15:       <TabsList className="grid w-full grid-cols-4">
16:         <TabsTrigger value="basic">Основное</TabsTrigger>
17:         <TabsTrigger value="storage">Условия хранения</TabsTrigger>
18:         <TabsTrigger value="stock">Партии</TabsTrigger>
19:         <TabsTrigger value="history">История</TabsTrigger>
20:       </TabsList>
21:       <div className="mt-6">
22:         <TabsContent value="basic">
23:           <ProductBasicTab product={product} />
24:         </TabsContent>
25:         <TabsContent value="storage">
26:           <ProductStorageTab product={product} />
27:         </TabsContent>
28:         <TabsContent value="stock">
29:           <ProductBatchesTab product={product} />
30:         </TabsContent>
31:         <TabsContent value="history">
32:           <div className="flex h-[200px] items-center justify-center border border-dashed border-border text-muted-foreground">
33:             История изменений временно недоступна (UI Stub)
34:           </div>
35:         </TabsContent>
36:       </div>
37:     </Tabs>
38:   );
39: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/receiving/quarantine-banner.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client";
 2: 
 3: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 4: import { AlertTriangle, Info, AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
 5: 
 6: interface QuarantineBannerProps {
 7:   variant?: "warning" | "info" | "error";
 8:   title: string;
 9:   description?: string;
10:   className?: string;
11: }
12: 
13: export function QuarantineBanner({
14:   variant = "warning",
15:   title,
16:   description,
17:   className,
18: }: QuarantineBannerProps) {
19:   const variants = {
20:     warning: {
21:       bg: "bg-warning-subtle",
22:       border: "border-warning",
23:       text: "text-warning-foreground",
24:       icon: <AlertTriangle className="h-5 w-5 text-warning" />,
25:     },
26:     info: {
27:       bg: "bg-blue-subtle",
28:       border: "border-blue",
29:       text: "text-foreground",
30:       icon: <Info className="h-5 w-5 text-blue" />,
31:     },
32:     error: {
33:       bg: "bg-destructive/10",
34:       border: "border-destructive",
35:       text: "text-destructive",
36:       icon: <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-destructive" />,
37:     },
38:   };
39: 
40:   const currentVariant = variants[variant];
41: 
42:   return (
43:     <div
44:       className={cn(
45:         "flex gap-4 border-l-4 p-4",
46:         currentVariant.bg,
47:         currentVariant.border,
48:         className
49:       )}
50:     >
51:       <div className="shrink-0">{currentVariant.icon}</div>
52:       <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
53:         <h4 className={cn("text-sm font-semibold", currentVariant.text)}>
54:           {title}
55:         </h4>
56:         {description && (
57:           <p className="text-sm text-foreground opacity-90">{description}</p>
58:         )}
59:       </div>
60:     </div>
61:   );
62: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/receiving/receiving-stepper.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client";
 2: 
 3: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 4: import { Check } from "lucide-react";
 5: 
 6: interface Step {
 7:   id: number;
 8:   title: string;
 9: }
10: 
11: interface ReceivingStepperProps {
12:   currentStep: number;
13:   steps: Step[];
14: }
15: 
16: export function ReceivingStepper({ currentStep, steps }: ReceivingStepperProps) {
17:   return (
18:     <div className="flex flex-col space-y-4">
19:       {steps.map((step) => {
20:         const isCompleted = currentStep > step.id;
21:         const isActive = currentStep === step.id;
22: 
23:         return (
24:           <div key={step.id} className="relative flex items-start gap-4">
25:             {/* Step circle */}
26:             <div
27:               className={cn(
28:                 "z-10 flex h-8 w-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center border text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
29:                 isCompleted
30:                   ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground"
31:                   : isActive
32:                   ? "border-primary bg-primary text-primary-foreground"
33:                   : "border-border bg-background text-muted-foreground"
34:               )}
35:             >
36:               {isCompleted ? <Check className="h-4 w-4" /> : step.id}
37:             </div>
38: 
39:             {/* Step title */}
40:             <div className="flex flex-col py-1">
41:               <span
42:                 className={cn(
43:                   "text-sm font-semibold transition-colors",
44:                   isActive ? "text-primary" : "text-muted-foreground"
45:                 )}
46:               >
47:                 {step.title}
48:               </span>
49:               {isActive && (
50:                 <div className="mt-1 h-0.5 w-8 bg-primary animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-left-2 duration-300" />
51:               )}
52:             </div>
53: 
54:             {/* Connector line */}
55:             {step.id !== steps.length && (
56:               <div
57:                 className={cn(
58:                   "absolute left-4 top-8 h-8 w-px -translate-x-1/2 bg-border",
59:                   isCompleted && "bg-primary"
60:                 )}
61:               />
62:             )}
63:           </div>
64:         );
65:       })}
66:     </div>
67:   );
68: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/receiving/step1-document.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  4: import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  5: import {
  6:   Select,
  7:   SelectContent,
  8:   SelectItem,
  9:   SelectTrigger,
 10:   SelectValue,
 11: } from "@/components/ui/select";
 12: import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
 13: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 14: 
 15: interface Step1DocumentProps {
 16:   onNext: () => void;
 17:   onCancel: () => void;
 18: }
 19: 
 20: export function Step1Document({ onNext, onCancel }: Step1DocumentProps) {
 21:   return (
 22:     <div className="space-y-6">
 23:       <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
 24:         <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">
 25:           Шаг 1 — Реквизиты накладной
 26:         </h3>
 27:       </div>
 28: 
 29:       <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-2">
 30:         <div className="space-y-2">
 31:           <Label htmlFor="supplier" className="text-foreground">
 32:             Поставщик <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 33:           </Label>
 34:           <Input
 35:             id="supplier"
 36:             placeholder="Поиск по названию / ИНН..."
 37:             className="h-10 border-input"
 38:           />
 39:           <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-widest">
 40:             Начните вводить название или ИНН
 41:           </p>
 42:         </div>
 43: 
 44:         <div className="space-y-2">
 45:           <Label htmlFor="invoice-number" className="text-foreground">
 46:             Номер инвойса <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 47:           </Label>
 48:           <Input
 49:             id="invoice-number"
 50:             placeholder="INV-2024-0001"
 51:             className="h-10 font-mono border-input"
 52:           />
 53:         </div>
 54: 
 55:         <div className="space-y-2">
 56:           <Label htmlFor="purchase-type" className="text-foreground">
 57:             Тип закупки <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 58:           </Label>
 59:           <Select defaultValue="direct">
 60:             <SelectTrigger id="purchase-type" className="h-10">
 61:               <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите тип" />
 62:             </SelectTrigger>
 63:             <SelectContent>
 64:               <SelectItem value="direct">Прямая закупка</SelectItem>
 65:               <SelectItem value="tender">Тендер</SelectItem>
 66:               <SelectItem value="state">Госзакупка</SelectItem>
 67:             </SelectContent>
 68:           </Select>
 69:         </div>
 70: 
 71:         <div className="space-y-2">
 72:           <Label htmlFor="country" className="text-foreground">
 73:             Страна происхождения <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 74:           </Label>
 75:           <Select defaultValue="russia">
 76:             <SelectTrigger id="country" className="h-10">
 77:               <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите страну" />
 78:             </SelectTrigger>
 79:             <SelectContent>
 80:               <SelectItem value="russia">Россия</SelectItem>
 81:               <SelectItem value="germany">Германия</SelectItem>
 82:               <SelectItem value="india">Индия</SelectItem>
 83:               <SelectItem value="china">Китай</SelectItem>
 84:             </SelectContent>
 85:           </Select>
 86:         </div>
 87: 
 88:         <div className="col-span-full space-y-2">
 89:           <Label htmlFor="manufacturer" className="text-foreground">
 90:             Производитель <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 91:           </Label>
 92:           <Input
 93:             id="manufacturer"
 94:             placeholder="Название производителя"
 95:             className="h-10 border-input"
 96:           />
 97:         </div>
 98: 
 99:         <div className="col-span-full space-y-2">
100:           <Label htmlFor="notes" className="text-foreground">
101:             Примечания
102:           </Label>
103:           <Textarea
104:             id="notes"
105:             placeholder="Дополнительные комментарии к накладной..."
106:             rows={3}
107:             className="resize-none border-input"
108:           />
109:         </div>
110:       </div>
111: 
112:       <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-border">
113:         <Button
114:           variant="outline"
115:           onClick={onCancel}
116:           className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5"
117:         >
118:           Отмена
119:         </Button>
120:         <Button onClick={onNext} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground">
121:           Далее →
122:         </Button>
123:       </div>
124:     </div>
125:   );
126: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/receiving/step2-finance.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { useState } from "react";
  4: import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  5: import {
  6:   Select,
  7:   SelectContent,
  8:   SelectItem,
  9:   SelectTrigger,
 10:   SelectValue,
 11: } from "@/components/ui/select";
 12: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
 13: import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
 14: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
 15: import { AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
 16: 
 17: interface Step2FinanceProps {
 18:   onNext: () => void;
 19:   onBack: () => void;
 20: }
 21: 
 22: export function Step2Finance({ onNext, onBack }: Step2FinanceProps) {
 23:   const [isJnvlp, setIsJnvlp] = useState(false);
 24: 
 25:   return (
 26:     <div className="space-y-6">
 27:       <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
 28:         <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">
 29:           Шаг 2 — Финансовые параметры
 30:         </h3>
 31:       </div>
 32: 
 33:       <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3">
 34:         {/* Ставка НДС — отключена если ЖНВЛП */}
 35:         <div className="space-y-2">
 36:           <Label
 37:             htmlFor="vat-rate"
 38:             className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground"
 39:           >
 40:             Ставка НДС <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 41:           </Label>
 42:           <Select defaultValue="10" disabled={isJnvlp}>
 43:             <SelectTrigger
 44:               id="vat-rate"
 45:               className="h-10 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
 46:             >
 47:               <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите ставку" />
 48:             </SelectTrigger>
 49:             <SelectContent>
 50:               <SelectItem value="0">0% — Без НДС</SelectItem>
 51:               <SelectItem value="10">10% — Льготная</SelectItem>
 52:               <SelectItem value="20">20% — Стандартная</SelectItem>
 53:             </SelectContent>
 54:           </Select>
 55:           {isJnvlp && (
 56:             <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
 57:               Для ЖНВЛП применяется ставка НДС 10% автоматически
 58:             </p>
 59:           )}
 60:         </div>
 61: 
 62:         {/* Валюта */}
 63:         <div className="space-y-2">
 64:           <Label
 65:             htmlFor="currency"
 66:             className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground"
 67:           >
 68:             Валюта <span className="text-primary">*</span>
 69:           </Label>
 70:           <Select defaultValue="rub">
 71:             <SelectTrigger id="currency" className="h-10">
 72:               <SelectValue placeholder="Выберите валюту" />
 73:             </SelectTrigger>
 74:             <SelectContent>
 75:               <SelectItem value="rub">RUB — Российский рубль</SelectItem>
 76:               <SelectItem value="usd">USD — Доллар США</SelectItem>
 77:               <SelectItem value="eur">EUR — Евро</SelectItem>
 78:             </SelectContent>
 79:           </Select>
 80:         </div>
 81: 
 82:         {/* ЖНВЛП — одинакового размера с другими */}
 83:         <div className="space-y-2">
 84:           <Label
 85:             htmlFor="jnvlp"
 86:             className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground"
 87:           >
 88:             ЖНВЛП
 89:           </Label>
 90:           <div className="flex h-10 items-center justify-between border border-input bg-background px-3">
 91:             <span className="text-sm text-foreground">Включить режим ЖНВЛП</span>
 92:             <Switch
 93:               id="jnvlp"
 94:               checked={isJnvlp}
 95:               onCheckedChange={setIsJnvlp}
 96:               className="data-[state=checked]:bg-primary"
 97:             />
 98:           </div>
 99:         </div>
100:       </div>
101: 
102:       {/* ЖНВЛП-блок: надбавка */}
103:       {isJnvlp && (
104:         <div className="border-l-4 border-warning bg-warning-subtle p-4 space-y-4 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2 duration-300">
105:           <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-warning-foreground font-semibold text-sm">
106:             <AlertCircle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
107:             <span>ЖНВЛП: Контроль предельной надбавки</span>
108:           </div>
109: 
110:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
111:             <div className="space-y-2">
112:               <Label
113:                 htmlFor="reg-price"
114:                 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground"
115:               >
116:                 Зарегистрированная цена (руб.) <span className="text-primary">*</span>
117:               </Label>
118:               <Input
119:                 id="reg-price"
120:                 type="number"
121:                 defaultValue="485.00"
122:                 className="h-10 border-input bg-background"
123:               />
124:             </div>
125:             <div className="space-y-2">
126:               <Label
127:                 htmlFor="markup"
128:                 className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground"
129:               >
130:                 Предельная надбавка (%) <span className="text-primary">*</span>
131:               </Label>
132:               <Input
133:                 id="markup"
134:                 type="number"
135:                 placeholder="15.5"
136:                 className="h-10 border-input bg-background"
137:               />
138:             </div>
139:           </div>
140:           <p className="text-xs text-warning-foreground">
141:             Оптовая надбавка ограничена решением Росздравнадзора. НДС 10% применяется автоматически.
142:           </p>
143:         </div>
144:       )}
145: 
146:       {/* Оптовая цена */}
147:       <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
148:         <div className="space-y-2">
149:           <Label
150:             htmlFor="wholesale-price"
151:             className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground"
152:           >
153:             Оптовая цена без НДС (руб.)
154:           </Label>
155:           <Input
156:             id="wholesale-price"
157:             type="number"
158:             placeholder="0.00"
159:             className="h-10 border-input"
160:           />
161:         </div>
162:       </div>
163: 
164:       <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-border">
165:         <Button
166:           variant="outline"
167:           onClick={onBack}
168:           className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5"
169:         >
170:           ← Назад
171:         </Button>
172:         <Button onClick={onNext} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground">
173:           Далее →
174:         </Button>
175:       </div>
176:     </div>
177:   );
178: }
````

````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { useState } from "react";
  4: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  5: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
  6: import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
  7: import {
  8:   Table,
  9:   TableBody,
 10:   TableCell,
 11:   TableHead,
 12:   TableHeader,
 13:   TableRow,
 14: } from "@/components/ui/table";
 15: import {
 16:   Select,
 17:   SelectContent,
 18:   SelectItem,
 19:   SelectTrigger,
 20:   SelectValue,
 21: } from "@/components/ui/select";
 22: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
 23: import { Plus, Trash2, CalendarIcon, AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
 24: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
 25: 
 26: interface Item {
 27:   id: string;
 28:   name: string;
 29:   serial: string;
 30:   mfgDate: string;
 31:   expiryDate: string;
 32:   quantity: number;
 33:   status: string;
 34:   isJnvlp: boolean;
 35:   isExpired?: boolean;
 36: }
 37: 
 38: interface Step3ItemsProps {
 39:   onNext: () => void;
 40:   onBack: () => void;
 41: }
 42: 
 43: export function Step3Items({ onNext, onBack }: Step3ItemsProps) {
 44:   const [items, setItems] = useState<Item[]>([
 45:     {
 46:       id: "1",
 47:       name: "Амоксициллин 500мг",
 48:       serial: "SER-2024-78432",
 49:       mfgDate: "15.03.2024",
 50:       expiryDate: "15.03.2026",
 51:       quantity: 120,
 52:       status: "quarantine",
 53:       isJnvlp: true,
 54:     },
 55:     {
 56:       id: "2",
 57:       name: "Ибупрофен 400мг",
 58:       serial: "SER-2024-65103",
 59:       mfgDate: "10.01.2024",
 60:       expiryDate: "10.01.2027",
 61:       quantity: 60,
 62:       status: "quarantine",
 63:       isJnvlp: false,
 64:     },
 65:     {
 66:       id: "3",
 67:       name: "Цефтриаксон 1г",
 68:       serial: "SER-2024-90210",
 69:       mfgDate: "01.06.2023",
 70:       expiryDate: "01.12.2024",
 71:       quantity: 24,
 72:       status: "quarantine",
 73:       isJnvlp: true,
 74:       isExpired: true,
 75:     },
 76:   ]);
 77: 
 78:   const handleAddItem = () => {
 79:     const fakeId = String(items.length + 1);
 80:     setItems((prev) => [
 81:       ...prev,
 82:       {
 83:         id: fakeId,
 84:         name: "Новый препарат",
 85:         serial: `SER-2024-${10000 + items.length}`,
 86:         mfgDate: "01.01.2024",
 87:         expiryDate: "01.01.2027",
 88:         quantity: 10,
 89:         status: "quarantine",
 90:         isJnvlp: false,
 91:       },
 92:     ]);
 93:   };
 94: 
 95:   return (
 96:     <div className="space-y-6">
 97:       <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 98:         <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">
 99:           Шаг 3 — Позиции накладной
100:         </h3>
101:         <Badge variant="secondary" className="bg-primary/10 text-primary border-none text-xs">
102:           {items.length} позиции добавлено
103:         </Badge>
104:       </div>
105: 
106:       {/* Add Item Form */}
107:       <div className="border border-border bg-muted/30 p-4 space-y-4">
108:         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3">
109:           <div className="space-y-2">
110:             <Label className="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-muted-foreground">
111:               Препарат (МНН / SKU) <span className="text-primary">*</span>
112:             </Label>
113:             <Input placeholder="Поиск препарата..." className="h-10 border-input bg-background" />
114:           </div>
115:           <div className="space-y-2">
116:             <Label className="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-muted-foreground">
117:               Серийный номер партии <span className="text-primary">*</span>
118:             </Label>
119:             <Input placeholder="SER-XXXX-XXXX" className="h-10 font-mono border-input bg-background" />
120:           </div>
121:           <div className="space-y-2">
122:             <Label className="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-muted-foreground">
123:               Количество <span className="text-primary">*</span>
124:             </Label>
125:             <Input type="number" placeholder="0" className="h-10 border-input bg-background" />
126:           </div>
127: 
128:           <div className="space-y-2">
129:             <Label className="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-muted-foreground">
130:               Дата производства <span className="text-primary">*</span>
131:             </Label>
132:             <div className="flex h-10 w-full items-center border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
133:               <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
134:               <span>ДД.ММ.ГГГГ</span>
135:             </div>
136:           </div>
137:           <div className="space-y-2">
138:             <Label className="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-muted-foreground">
139:               Дата истечения срока <span className="text-primary">*</span>
140:             </Label>
141:             <div className="flex h-10 w-full items-center border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
142:               <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
143:               <span>ДД.ММ.ГГГГ</span>
144:             </div>
145:           </div>
146:           <div className="space-y-2">
147:             <Label className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">
148:               Статус при приёмке
149:             </Label>
150:             <Select defaultValue="quarantine">
151:               <SelectTrigger className="h-10 bg-background">
152:                 <SelectValue />
153:               </SelectTrigger>
154:               <SelectContent>
155:                 <SelectItem value="quarantine">Карантин</SelectItem>
156:                 <SelectItem value="available">Доступен</SelectItem>
157:               </SelectContent>
158:             </Select>
159:           </div>
160:         </div>
161:         <div className="flex justify-end">
162:           <Button onClick={handleAddItem} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground gap-2">
163:             <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
164:             Добавить позицию
165:           </Button>
166:         </div>
167:       </div>
168: 
169:       {/* Items Table */}
170:       <div className="border border-border">
171:         <Table>
172:           <TableHeader>
173:             <TableRow className="bg-muted hover:bg-muted">
174:               <TableHead className="w-[50px]">#</TableHead>
175:               <TableHead>Препарат (МНН)</TableHead>
176:               <TableHead>Серийный №</TableHead>
177:               <TableHead>Дата пр-ва</TableHead>
178:               <TableHead>Срок годн.</TableHead>
179:               <TableHead className="text-right">Кол-во</TableHead>
180:               <TableHead>Статус</TableHead>
181:               <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
182:             </TableRow>
183:           </TableHeader>
184:           <TableBody>
185:             {items.map((item, index) => (
186:               <TableRow key={item.id} className="group">
187:                 <TableCell className="text-muted-foreground">{index + 1}</TableCell>
188:                 <TableCell>
189:                   <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
190:                     <span className="font-medium">{item.name}</span>
191:                     <div className="flex gap-1">
192:                       {item.isJnvlp && (
193:                         <Badge
194:                           variant="outline"
195:                           className="h-4 px-1 text-[9px] uppercase border-warning text-warning-foreground bg-warning-subtle"
196:                         >
197:                           ЖНВЛП
198:                         </Badge>
199:                       )}
200:                     </div>
201:                   </div>
202:                 </TableCell>
203:                 <TableCell className="font-mono text-sm">{item.serial}</TableCell>
204:                 <TableCell className="text-sm font-medium">{item.mfgDate}</TableCell>
205:                 <TableCell className={cn("text-sm font-medium", item.isExpired ? "text-destructive flex items-center gap-1" : "text-success")}>
206:                   {item.isExpired && <AlertCircle className="h-3 w-3" />}
207:                   {item.expiryDate}
208:                 </TableCell>
209:                 <TableCell className="text-right font-semibold">{item.quantity}</TableCell>
210:                 <TableCell>
211:                   <Badge
212:                     variant="outline"
213:                     className="border-warning text-warning-foreground bg-warning-subtle text-[10px]"
214:                   >
215:                     Карантин
216:                   </Badge>
217:                 </TableCell>
218:                 <TableCell>
219:                   <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive">
220:                     <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
221:                   </Button>
222:                 </TableCell>
223:               </TableRow>
224:             ))}
225:           </TableBody>
226:         </Table>
227:       </div>
228: 
229:       <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-border">
230:         <Button
231:           variant="outline"
232:           onClick={onBack}
233:           className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5"
234:         >
235:           ← Назад
236:         </Button>
237:         <Button onClick={onNext} className="bg-primary text-primary-foreground">
238:           Далее →
239:         </Button>
240:       </div>
241:     </div>
242:   );
243: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/receiving/step4-confirm.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client";
  2: 
  3: import { QuarantineBanner } from "./quarantine-banner";
  4: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  5: import {
  6:   Table,
  7:   TableBody,
  8:   TableCell,
  9:   TableHead,
 10:   TableHeader,
 11:   TableRow,
 12: } from "@/components/ui/table";

 25: 
 26: export function Step4Confirm({ onBack, onSave }: Step4ConfirmProps) {
 27:   return (
 28:     <div className="space-y-8">
 29:       <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">

 32:         </h3>

 35:       <QuarantineBanner
 36:         variant="warning"

 39:       />
 40: 
 41:       {/* Summary Review */}
 42:       <div className="space-y-6">
 43:         {/* Document Details Section */}
 44:         <section className="space-y-4">
 45:           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 46:             <div className="h-4 w-1 bg-primary" />
 47:             <h4 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-foreground">
 48:               Реквизиты документа
 49:             </h4>
 50:           </div>
 51:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-y-4 gap-x-8 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">

 53:             <SummaryItem label="ИНН поставщика" value="7701234567" isMono />
 54:             <SummaryItem label="Тип закупки" value="Прямая закупка" />
 55:             <SummaryItem label="Номер инвойса" value="INV-2024-0892" isMono />
 56:             <SummaryItem label="Страна происхождения" value="Германия" />
 57:             <SummaryItem label="Производитель" value="Bayer AG" />
 58:           </div>
 59:         </section>
 60: 
 61:         <Separator className="bg-border" />
 62: 
 63:         {/* Finance Section */}
 64:         <section className="space-y-4">
 65:           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 66:             <div className="h-4 w-1 bg-primary" />
 67:             <h4 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-foreground">
 68:               Финансовые параметры
 69:             </h4>
 70:           </div>
 71:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-y-4 gap-x-8 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
 72:             <SummaryItem label="Ставка НДС" value="10%" />
 73:             <SummaryItem label="Валюта" value="RUB — Российский рубль" />
 74:             <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
 75:               <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">
 76:                 ЖНВЛП
 77:               </span>
 78:               <Badge variant="outline" className="w-fit bg-warning-subtle border-warning text-warning-foreground text-[10px]">
 79:                 ✓ Да
 80:               </Badge>
 81:             </div>
 82:           </div>
 83:         </section>
 84: 
 85:         <Separator className="bg-border" />
 86: 
 87:         {/* Items Section */}
 88:         <section className="space-y-4">
 89:           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 90:             <div className="h-4 w-1 bg-primary" />
 91:             <h4 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-foreground">
 92:               Позиции накладной (3)
 93:             </h4>
 94:           </div>

106:               <TableBody>
107:                 <TableRow>
108:                   <TableCell className="text-sm font-medium">
109:                     Амоксициллин 500мг <span className="text-[10px] text-warning font-bold ml-1">ЖНВЛП</span>
110:                   </TableCell>
111:                   <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs">SER-2024-78432</TableCell>
112:                   <TableCell className="text-xs">15.03.2026</TableCell>
113:                   <TableCell className="text-right font-semibold">120 шт</TableCell>
114:                   <TableCell><Badge variant="outline" className="bg-warning-subtle border-warning text-[10px]">Карантин</Badge></TableCell>
115:                 </TableRow>
116:                 <TableRow>
117:                   <TableCell className="text-sm font-medium">Ибупрофен 400мг</TableCell>
118:                   <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs">SER-2024-65103</TableCell>
119:                   <TableCell className="text-xs">10.01.2027</TableCell>
120:                   <TableCell className="text-right font-semibold">60 шт</TableCell>
121:                   <TableCell><Badge variant="outline" className="bg-warning-subtle border-warning text-[10px]">Карантин</Badge></TableCell>
122:                 </TableRow>
123:                 <TableRow>
124:                   <TableCell className="text-sm font-medium">
125:                     Цефтриаксон 1г <span className="text-[10px] text-warning font-bold ml-1">ЖНВЛП</span>
126:                   </TableCell>
127:                   <TableCell className="font-mono text-xs">SER-2024-90210</TableCell>
128:                   <TableCell className="text-xs text-destructive flex items-center gap-1">
129:                     <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
130:                     01.12.2024
131:                   </TableCell>
132:                   <TableCell className="text-right font-semibold">24 шт</TableCell>
133:                   <TableCell><Badge variant="outline" className="bg-warning-subtle border-warning text-[10px]">Карантин</Badge></TableCell>
134:                 </TableRow>
135:               </TableBody>
136:             </Table>
137:           </div>
138:           <p className="text-xs text-destructive font-medium">
139:             ⚠️ 1 позиция с истёкшим сроком годности — требует проверки при приёмке.
140:           </p>
141:         </section>
142: 
143:         {/* QP Section */}
144:         <section className="mt-8 border border-dashed border-border bg-muted/20 p-6 space-y-6">
145:           <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
146:             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
147:               <Lock className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
148:               <h4 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-foreground">
149:                 Блок уполномоченного лица (QP / Администратор)
150:               </h4>
151:             </div>
152:             <Badge variant="outline" className="h-5 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wider bg-background">
153:               Role: Admin / QP
154:             </Badge>
155:           </div>
156: 
157:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 md:grid-cols-2">
158:             <div className="space-y-2">
159:               <Label className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">
160:                 Дата проверки
161:               </Label>
162:               <Input type="date" className="h-10 border-input bg-background" />
163:             </div>
164:             <div className="space-y-2">
165:               <Label className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">
166:                 Заключение
167:               </Label>
168:               <div className="flex gap-2">
169:                 <Button variant="outline" className="flex-1 gap-2 border-success text-success hover:bg-success/5 h-10">
170:                   <Check className="h-4 w-4" />
171:                   Соответствует
172:                 </Button>
173:                 <Button variant="outline" className="flex-1 gap-2 border-destructive text-destructive hover:bg-destructive/5 h-10">
174:                   <X className="h-4 w-4" />
175:                   Отклонить
176:                 </Button>
177:               </div>
178:             </div>
179:           </div>
180:           <div className="space-y-2">
181:             <Label className="text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">
182:               Примечания QP
183:             </Label>
184:             <Textarea rows={2} className="resize-none border-input bg-background" />
185:           </div>
186:           <Button className="w-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground gap-2 h-12 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
187:             <Lock className="h-4 w-4" />
188:             Подписать протокол и снять с карантина
189:           </Button>
190:         </section>
191:       </div>
192: 
193:       <div className="flex justify-end gap-3 pt-6 border-t border-border mt-8">
194:         <Button
195:           variant="outline"
196:           onClick={onBack}
197:           className="border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 h-11 px-8"
198:         >
199:           ← Назад
200:         </Button>
201:         <Button
202:           onClick={onSave}
203:           className="bg-warning hover:bg-warning/90 text-white h-11 px-8 gap-2 font-bold"
204:         >
205:           Сохранить и разместить в карантин
206:         </Button>
207:       </div>
208:     </div>
209:   );
210: }
211: 
212: function SummaryItem({ label, value, isMono }: { label: string; value: string; isMono?: boolean }) {
213:   return (
214:     <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
215:       <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground">
216:         {label}
217:       </span>
218:       <span className={cn("text-sm font-medium text-foreground", isMono && "font-mono")}>
219:         {value}
220:       </span>
221:     </div>
222:   );
223: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/ui/alert.tsx
````typescript
 1: import * as React from "react"
 2: import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
 3: 
 4: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 5: 
 6: const alertVariants = cva(
 7:   "relative w-full rounded-none border p-4 [&>svg~*:not(h5)]:pl-7 [&>svg+div]:translate-y-[-3px] [&>svg]:absolute [&>svg]:left-4 [&>svg]:top-4 [&>svg]:text-foreground",
 8:   {
 9:     variants: {
10:       variant: {
11:         default: "bg-background text-foreground",
12:         destructive:
13:           "border-destructive/50 text-destructive dark:border-destructive [&>svg]:text-destructive",
14:       },
15:     },
16:     defaultVariants: {
17:       variant: "default",
18:     },
19:   }
20: )
21: 
22: const Alert = React.forwardRef<
23:   HTMLDivElement,
24:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & VariantProps<typeof alertVariants>
25: >(({ className, variant, ...props }, ref) => (
26:   <div
27:     ref={ref}
28:     role="alert"
29:     className={cn(alertVariants({ variant }), className)}
30:     {...props}
31:   />
32: ))
33: Alert.displayName = "Alert"
34: 
35: const AlertTitle = React.forwardRef<
36:   HTMLParagraphElement,
37:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>
38: >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
39:   <h5
40:     ref={ref}
41:     className={cn("mb-1 font-medium leading-none tracking-tight", className)}
42:     {...props}
43:   />
44: ))
45: AlertTitle.displayName = "AlertTitle"
46: 
47: const AlertDescription = React.forwardRef<
48:   HTMLParagraphElement,
49:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
50: >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
51:   <div
52:     ref={ref}
53:     className={cn("text-sm [&_p]:leading-relaxed", className)}
54:     {...props}
55:   />
56: ))
57: AlertDescription.displayName = "AlertDescription"
58: 
59: export { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription }
````

````typescript
 23:   className,

 31:       {...props}

 33:       {children}

 35:     </ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger>
 36:   )
 37: }
 38: 
 39: function ComboboxClear({ className, ...props }: ComboboxPrimitive.Clear.Props) {
 40:   return (
 41:     <ComboboxPrimitive.Clear

 77:             disabled={disabled}
 78:           >
 79:             <ComboboxTrigger />
 80:           </InputGroupButton>

 83:       </InputGroupAddon>
 84:       {children}

224:       data-slot="combobox-chips"
225:       className={cn(
226:         "flex min-h-8 flex-wrap items-center gap-1 rounded-none border border-input bg-transparent bg-clip-padding px-2.5 py-1 text-xs transition-colors focus-within:border-ring focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-ring/50 has-aria-invalid:border-destructive has-aria-invalid:ring-1 has-aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 has-data-[slot=combobox-chip]:px-1 dark:bg-input/30 dark:has-aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 dark:has-aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40",
227:         className
228:       )}
229:       {...props}
230:     />
231:   )
232: }
233: 
234: function ComboboxChip({
235:   className,
236:   children,
237:   showRemove = true,
238:   ...props
239: }: ComboboxPrimitive.Chip.Props & {
240:   showRemove?: boolean
241: }) {
242:   return (
243:     <ComboboxPrimitive.Chip
244:       data-slot="combobox-chip"
245:       className={cn(
246:         "flex h-[calc(--spacing(5.25))] w-fit items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-none bg-muted px-1.5 text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap text-foreground has-disabled:pointer-events-none has-disabled:cursor-not-allowed has-disabled:opacity-50 has-data-[slot=combobox-chip-remove]:pr-0",
247:         className
248:       )}
249:       {...props}
250:     >
251:       {children}
252:       {showRemove && (
253:         <ComboboxPrimitive.ChipRemove
254:           render={<Button variant="ghost" size="icon-xs" />}
255:           className="-ml-1 opacity-50 hover:opacity-100"
256:           data-slot="combobox-chip-remove"
257:         >
258:           <XIcon className="pointer-events-none" />
259:         </ComboboxPrimitive.ChipRemove>
260:       )}
261:     </ComboboxPrimitive.Chip>
262:   )
263: }
264: 
265: function ComboboxChipsInput({
266:   className,
267:   ...props
268: }: ComboboxPrimitive.Input.Props) {
269:   return (
270:     <ComboboxPrimitive.Input
271:       data-slot="combobox-chip-input"
272:       className={cn("min-w-16 flex-1 outline-none", className)}
273:       {...props}
274:     />
275:   )
276: }
277: 
278: function useComboboxAnchor() {
279:   return React.useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
280: }
281: 
282: export {
283:   Combobox,
284:   ComboboxInput,
285:   ComboboxContent,
286:   ComboboxList,
287:   ComboboxItem,
288:   ComboboxGroup,
289:   ComboboxLabel,
290:   ComboboxCollection,
291:   ComboboxEmpty,
292:   ComboboxSeparator,
293:   ComboboxChips,
294:   ComboboxChip,
295:   ComboboxChipsInput,
296:   ComboboxTrigger,
297:   ComboboxValue,
298:   useComboboxAnchor,
299: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/ui/form.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client"
  2: 
  3: import * as React from "react"
  4: import * as LabelPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-label"
  5: import { Slot } from "radix-ui"
  6: import {
  7:   Controller,
  8:   ControllerProps,
  9:   FieldPath,
 10:   FieldValues,
 11:   FormProvider,
 12:   useFormContext,
 13: } from "react-hook-form"
 14: 
 15: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 16: import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"
 17: 
 18: const Form = FormProvider
 19: 
 20: type FormFieldContextValue<
 21:   TFieldValues extends FieldValues = FieldValues,
 22:   TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues> = FieldPath<TFieldValues>
 23: > = {
 24:   name: TName
 25: }
 26: 
 27: const FormFieldContext = React.createContext<FormFieldContextValue>(
 28:   {} as FormFieldContextValue
 29: )
 30: 
 31: const FormField = <
 32:   TFieldValues extends FieldValues = FieldValues,
 33:   TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues> = FieldPath<TFieldValues>
 34: >({
 35:   ...props
 36: }: ControllerProps<TFieldValues, TName>) => {
 37:   return (
 38:     <FormFieldContext.Provider value={{ name: props.name }}>
 39:       <Controller {...props} />
 40:     </FormFieldContext.Provider>
 41:   )
 42: }
 43: 
 44: const useFormField = () => {
 45:   const fieldContext = React.useContext(FormFieldContext)
 46:   const itemContext = React.useContext(FormItemContext)
 47:   const { getFieldState, formState } = useFormContext()
 48: 
 49:   const fieldState = getFieldState(fieldContext.name, formState)
 50: 
 51:   if (!fieldContext) {
 52:     throw new Error("useFormField should be used within <FormField>")
 53:   }
 54: 
 55:   const { id } = itemContext
 56: 
 57:   return {
 58:     id,
 59:     name: fieldContext.name,
 60:     formItemId: `${id}-form-item`,
 61:     formDescriptionId: `${id}-form-item-description`,
 62:     formMessageId: `${id}-form-item-message`,
 63:     ...fieldState,
 64:   }
 65: }
 66: 
 67: type FormItemContextValue = {
 68:   id: string
 69: }
 70: 
 71: const FormItemContext = React.createContext<FormItemContextValue>(
 72:   {} as FormItemContextValue
 73: )
 74: 
 75: const FormItem = React.forwardRef<
 76:   HTMLDivElement,
 77:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>
 78: >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
 79:   const id = React.useId()
 80: 
 81:   return (
 82:     <FormItemContext.Provider value={{ id }}>
 83:       <div ref={ref} className={cn("space-y-2", className)} {...props} />
 84:     </FormItemContext.Provider>
 85:   )
 86: })
 87: FormItem.displayName = "FormItem"
 88: 
 89: const FormLabel = React.forwardRef<
 90:   React.ElementRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>,
 91:   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>
 92: >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
 93:   const { error, formItemId } = useFormField()
 94: 
 95:   return (
 96:     <Label
 97:       ref={ref}
 98:       className={cn(error && "text-destructive", className)}
 99:       htmlFor={formItemId}
100:       {...props}
101:     />
102:   )
103: })
104: FormLabel.displayName = "FormLabel"
105: 
106: const FormControl = React.forwardRef<
107:   React.ElementRef<typeof Slot.Root>,
108:   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof Slot.Root>
109: >(({ ...props }, ref) => {
110:   const { error, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId } = useFormField()
111: 
112:   return (
113:     <Slot.Root
114:       ref={ref}
115:       id={formItemId}
116:       aria-describedby={
117:         !error
118:           ? `${formDescriptionId}`
119:           : `${formDescriptionId} ${formMessageId}`
120:       }
121:       aria-invalid={!!error}
122:       {...props}
123:     />
124:   )
125: })
126: FormControl.displayName = "FormControl"
127: 
128: const FormDescription = React.forwardRef<
129:   HTMLParagraphElement,
130:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
131: >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => {
132:   const { formDescriptionId } = useFormField()
133: 
134:   return (
135:     <p
136:       ref={ref}
137:       id={formDescriptionId}
138:       className={cn("text-xs text-muted-foreground", className)}
139:       {...props}
140:     />
141:   )
142: })
143: FormDescription.displayName = "FormDescription"
144: 
145: const FormMessage = React.forwardRef<
146:   HTMLParagraphElement,
147:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
148: >(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => {
149:   const { error, formMessageId } = useFormField()
150:   const body = error ? String(error?.message) : children
151: 
152:   if (!body) {
153:     return null
154:   }
155: 
156:   return (
157:     <p
158:       ref={ref}
159:       id={formMessageId}
160:       className={cn("text-[0.8rem] font-medium text-destructive", className)}
161:       {...props}
162:     >
163:       {body}
164:     </p>
165:   )
166: })
167: FormMessage.displayName = "FormMessage"
168: 
169: export {
170:   useFormField,
171:   Form,
172:   FormItem,
173:   FormLabel,
174:   FormControl,
175:   FormDescription,
176:   FormMessage,
177:   FormField,
178: }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/ui/input-otp.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import * as React from "react"
 4: import { OTPInput, OTPInputContext } from "input-otp"
 5: import { Dot } from "lucide-react"
 6: 
 7: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 8: 
 9: const InputOTP = React.forwardRef<
10:   React.ElementRef<typeof OTPInput>,
11:   React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof OTPInput>
12: >(({ className, containerClassName, ...props }, ref) => (
13:   <OTPInput
14:     ref={ref}
15:     containerClassName={cn(
16:       "flex items-center gap-2 has-disabled:opacity-50",
17:       containerClassName
18:     )}
19:     className={cn("disabled:cursor-not-allowed", className)}
20:     {...props}
21:   />
22: ))
23: InputOTP.displayName = "InputOTP"
24: 
25: const InputOTPGroup = React.forwardRef<
26:   React.ElementRef<"div">,
27:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>
28: >(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
29:   <div ref={ref} className={cn("flex items-center", className)} {...props} />
30: ))
31: InputOTPGroup.displayName = "InputOTPGroup"
32: 
33: const InputOTPSlot = React.forwardRef<
34:   React.ElementRef<"div">,
35:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & { index: number }
36: >(({ index, className, ...props }, ref) => {
37:   const inputOTPContext = React.useContext(OTPInputContext)
38:   const { char, hasFakeCaret, isActive } = inputOTPContext.slots[index]
39: 
40:   return (
41:     <div
42:       ref={ref}
43:       className={cn(
44:         "relative flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center border-y border-r border-input text-sm transition-all first:rounded-none first:border-l last:rounded-none",
45:         isActive && "z-10 ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-background",
46:         className
47:       )}
48:       {...props}
49:     >
50:       {char}
51:       {hasFakeCaret && (
52:         <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
53:           <div className="h-4 w-px animate-caret-blink bg-foreground duration-1000" />
54:         </div>
55:       )}
56:     </div>
57:   )
58: })
59: InputOTPSlot.displayName = "InputOTPSlot"
60: 
61: const InputOTPSeparator = React.forwardRef<
62:   React.ElementRef<"div">,
63:   React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>
64: >(({ ...props }, ref) => (
65:   <div ref={ref} role="separator" {...props}>
66:     <Dot />
67:   </div>
68: ))
69: InputOTPSeparator.displayName = "InputOTPSeparator"
70: 
71: export { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator }
````

## File: frontend/src/components/ui/tooltip.tsx
````typescript

10:   ...props

17:     />
18:   )

21: function Tooltip({
22:   ...props

26: 
27: function TooltipTrigger({

29: }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Trigger>) {

31: }
32:

38: }: React.ComponentProps<typeof TooltipPrimitive.Content>) {
````
