## File: backend/internal/domain/inbound.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: type InboundStatus string
 9: 
10: const (
11: 	InboundStatusDraft     InboundStatus = "draft"      // Plan created
12: 	InboundStatusReceived  InboundStatus = "received"   // Physical arrival, verification in progress
13: 	InboundStatusCompleted InboundStatus = "completed"  // Items put away, stock updated
14: 	InboundStatusCancelled InboundStatus = "cancelled"
15: )
16: 
17: // InboundReceiving — приходная накладная / поступление.
18: type InboundReceiving struct {
19: 	ID                string           `json:"id"`
20: 	InvoiceNumber     string           `json:"invoice_number"`
21: 	InvoiceDate       time.Time        `json:"invoice_date"`
22: 	SupplierID        string           `json:"supplier_id"`
23: 	Status            InboundStatus    `json:"status"`
24: 	TotalAmount       float64          `json:"total_amount"`
25: 	VATAmount         float64          `json:"vat_amount"`
26: 	Notes             string           `json:"notes"`
27: 	ReceivedBy        int              `json:"received_by"` // UserID
28: 	Items             []InboundItem    `json:"items,omitempty"`
29: 	CreatedAt         time.Time        `json:"created_at"`
30: 	UpdatedAt         time.Time        `json:"updated_at"`
31: }
32: 
33: // InboundItem — позиция в приходной накладной.
34: type InboundItem struct {
35: 	ID                string    `json:"id"`
36: 	InboundID         string    `json:"inbound_id"`
37: 	ProductID         string    `json:"product_id"`
38: 	BatchNumber       string    `json:"batch_number"`
39: 	ExpirationDate    time.Time `json:"expiration_date"`
40: 	Quantity          int       `json:"quantity"`
41: 	PriceNetto        float64   `json:"price_netto"`
42: 	VATRate           float64   `json:"vat_rate"`
43: 	PriceBrutto       float64   `json:"price_brutto"`
44: 	CertificateNumber string    `json:"cert_number"`
45: 	ZoneID            string    `json:"zone_id"` // Target zone for storage
46: }
47: 
48: // InboundRepository — интерфейс для работы с поступлениями.
49: type InboundRepository interface {
50: 	List(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]InboundReceiving, int, error)
51: 	GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*InboundReceiving, error)
52: 	Create(ctx context.Context, i *InboundReceiving) error
53: 	Update(ctx context.Context, i *InboundReceiving) error
54: 	Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error
55: 	
56: 	// Items
57: 	AddItems(ctx context.Context, inboundID string, items []InboundItem) error
58: 	UpdateItem(ctx context.Context, item *InboundItem) error
59: 	RemoveItem(ctx context.Context, id string) error
60: }
61: 
62: // InboundService — бизнес-логика поступлений.
63: type InboundService interface {
64: 	ListInbounds(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]InboundReceiving, int, error)
65: 	GetInbound(ctx context.Context, id string) (*InboundReceiving, error)
66: 	CreateInbound(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, i *InboundReceiving) (*InboundReceiving, error)
67: 	UpdateInbound(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, i *InboundReceiving) (*InboundReceiving, error)
68: 	UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, id string, status InboundStatus) error
69: 	DeleteInbound(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, id string) error
70: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/inventory.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: type InventoryStatus string
 9: 
10: const (
11: 	InventoryStatusDraft     InventoryStatus = "draft"
12: 	InventoryStatusActive    InventoryStatus = "active"
13: 	InventoryStatusCompleted InventoryStatus = "completed"
14: )
15: 
16: // InventorySession — сессия инвентаризации (проверка остатков).
17: type InventorySession struct {
18: 	ID          string          `json:"id"`
19: 	ZoneID      string          `json:"zone_id"` // Session usually limited to one zone
20: 	Status      InventoryStatus `json:"status"`
21: 	StartedBy   int             `json:"started_by"`
22: 	StartedAt   time.Time       `json:"started_at"`
23: 	CompletedAt *time.Time      `json:"completed_at,omitempty"`
24: 	Items       []InventoryItem `json:"items,omitempty"`
25: }
26: 
27: // InventoryItem — запись о пересчёте конкретного товара/партии.
28: type InventoryItem struct {
29: 	ID                 string    `json:"id"`
30: 	SessionID          string    `json:"session_id"`
31: 	ProductID          string    `json:"product_id"`
32: 	BatchNumber        string    `json:"batch_number"`
33: 	SystemQuantity     int       `json:"system_qty"` // Qty in DB before session
34: 	PhysicalQuantity   int       `json:"physical_qty"` // Qty counted by storekeeper
35: 	DiscrepancyReason  string    `json:"reason"`
36: }
37: 
38: // InventoryRepository — интерфейс для работы с инвентаризацией.
39: type InventoryRepository interface {
40: 	ListSessions(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]InventorySession, int, error)
41: 	GetSessionByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*InventorySession, error)
42: 	CreateSession(ctx context.Context, s *InventorySession) error
43: 	UpdateSession(ctx context.Context, s *InventorySession) error
44: 	
45: 	// Count items
46: 	AddCount(ctx context.Context, item *InventoryItem) error
47: }
48: 
49: // InventoryService — бизнес-логика инвентаризации.
50: type InventoryService interface {
51: 	ListSessions(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]InventorySession, int, error)
52: 	GetSession(ctx context.Context, id string) (*InventorySession, error)
53: 	StartSession(ctx context.Context, userID int, zoneID string) (*InventorySession, error)
54: 	FinishSession(ctx context.Context, id string) error
55: 	SubmitCount(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, items []InventoryItem) error
56: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/order.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: type OrderStatus string
 9: 
10: const (
11: 	OrderStatusNew        OrderStatus = "new"         // Order created
12: 	OrderStatusAssembling OrderStatus = "assembling"  // Storekeeper picking items
13: 	OrderStatusAssembled  OrderStatus = "assembled"   // Ready for shipment
14: 	OrderStatusShipped    OrderStatus = "shipped"     // Left warehouse
15: 	OrderStatusCancelled  OrderStatus = "cancelled"
16: )
17: 
18: // Order — заказ на отгрузку.
19: type Order struct {
20: 	ID             string      `json:"id"`
21: 	OrderNumber    string      `json:"order_number"`
22: 	CustomerName   string      `json:"customer_name"`
23: 	Status         OrderStatus `json:"status"`
24: 	Priority       int         `json:"priority"` // 1-normal, 2-high, 3-urgent
25: 	Items          []OrderItem `json:"items,omitempty"`
26: 	CreatedBy      int         `json:"created_by"`
27: 	CreatedAt      time.Time   `json:"created_at"`
28: 	UpdatedAt      time.Time   `json:"updated_at"`
29: }
30: 
31: // OrderItem — позиция в заказе.
32: type OrderItem struct {
33: 	ID        string `json:"id"`
34: 	OrderID   string `json:"order_id"`
35: 	ProductID string `json:"product_id"`
36: 	Quantity  int    `json:"quantity"`
37: 	PickedQty int    `json:"picked_qty"` // Only filled during assembly
38: }
39: 
40: // OrderRepository — интерфейс для работы с заказами.
41: type OrderRepository interface {
42: 	List(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]Order, int, error)
43: 	GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Order, error)
44: 	Create(ctx context.Context, o *Order) error
45: 	Update(ctx context.Context, o *Order) error
46: 	Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error
47: }
48: 
49: // OrderService — бизнес-логика заказов.
50: type OrderService interface {
51: 	ListOrders(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]Order, int, error)
52: 	GetOrder(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Order, error)
53: 	CreateOrder(ctx context.Context, o *Order) (*Order, error)
54: 	UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, id string, status OrderStatus) error
55: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/otp.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import "context"
 4: 
 5: // OTPCode represents a one-time password code from Valkey
 6: type OTPCode struct {
 7: 	UserID   int
 8: 	CodeHash string
 9: 	Attempts int
10: }
11: 
12: const (
13: 	OTPMaxAttempts = 5
14: 	OTPTTLSeconds  = 600 // 10 minutes
15: )
16: 
17: // OTPRepository represents Valkey storage for OTP
18: type OTPRepository interface {
19: 	Store(ctx context.Context, userID int, codeHash string) error
20: 	Get(ctx context.Context, userID int) (*OTPCode, error)
21: 	IncrAttempts(ctx context.Context, userID int) error
22: 	Delete(ctx context.Context, userID int) error
23: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/product.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: // Product — медицинский препарат / товар.
 9: type Product struct {
10: 	ID                string    `json:"id"`
11: 	SKU               string    `json:"sku"`               // уникальный складской код
12: 	Name              string    `json:"name"`              // торговое наименование
13: 	GenericName       string    `json:"generic_name"`      // МНН (международное непатентованное наименование)
14: 	ATCCode           string    `json:"atc_code"`          // код АТХ
15: 	DosageForm        string    `json:"dosage_form"`       // лекарственная форма (таблетки, капсулы и т.д.)
16: 	Strength          string    `json:"strength"`          // дозировка (например, "500 мг")
17: 	PackageSize       int       `json:"package_size"`      // кол-во в упаковке
18: 	IsJNVLP           bool      `json:"is_jnvlp"`          // входит ли в список ЖНВЛП (Жизненно Необходимые и Важнейшие Лекарственные Препараты)
19: 	ManufacturerID    *string   `json:"manufacturer_id"`   // ID производителя (опционально)
20: 	StorageConditions string    `json:"storage_conditions"` // условия хранения
21: 	PhotoURL          string    `json:"photo_url"`         // ссылка на фото (S3)
22: 	CreatedAt         time.Time `json:"created_at"`
23: 	UpdatedAt         time.Time `json:"updated_at"`
24: 	DeletedAt         *time.Time `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
25: }
26: 
27: // ProductFilter — фильтрация при поиске товаров.
28: type ProductFilter struct {
29: 	Query     string
30: 	IsJNVLP   *bool
31: 	ATCCode   string
32: 	Limit     int
33: 	Offset    int
34: }
35: 
36: // ProductRepository — интерфейс для работы с товарами.
37: type ProductRepository interface {
38: 	List(ctx context.Context, filter ProductFilter) ([]Product, int, error)
39: 	GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Product, error)
40: 	Create(ctx context.Context, p *Product) error
41: 	Update(ctx context.Context, p *Product) error
42: 	Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error
43: 	GetBySKU(ctx context.Context, sku string) (*Product, error)
44: }
45: 
46: // ProductService — бизнес-логика товаров.
47: type ProductService interface {
48: 	ListProducts(ctx context.Context, filter ProductFilter) ([]Product, int, error)
49: 	GetProduct(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Product, error)
50: 	CreateProduct(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, p *Product) (*Product, error)
51: 	UpdateProduct(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, p *Product) (*Product, error)
52: 	DeleteProduct(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, id string) error
53: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/recalled_batch.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: // RecalledBatch — сведения об изъятых из обращения сериях (из реестра).
 9: type RecalledBatch struct {
10: 	ID           string    `json:"id"`
11: 	SerialNumber string    `json:"serial_number"`
12: 	ProductName  string    `json:"product_name"`
13: 	RuNumber     string    `json:"ru_number"`
14: 	RecallReason string    `json:"recall_reason"`
15: 	IssuedAt     time.Time `json:"issued_at"`
16: 	SyncedAt     time.Time `json:"synced_at"`
17: }
18: 
19: // RecalledBatchRepository — интерфейс для работы с реестром изъятия.
20: type RecalledBatchRepository interface {
21: 	List(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]RecalledBatch, int, error)
22: 	GetBySerial(ctx context.Context, serial string) (*RecalledBatch, error)
23: 	Create(ctx context.Context, b *RecalledBatch) error
24: }
25: 
26: // RecalledBatchService — бизнес-логика реестра изъятия.
27: type RecalledBatchService interface {
28: 	ListRecalled(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]RecalledBatch, int, error)
29: 	CheckBatch(ctx context.Context, serial string) (bool, *RecalledBatch, error)
30: 	SyncRecalled(ctx context.Context, items []RecalledBatch) error
31: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/reference.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: )
 6: 
 7: // Country — справочник стран (ISO alpha-3).
 8: type Country struct {
 9: 	Code   string `json:"code"`    // e.g. "RUS"
10: 	NameRu string `json:"name_ru"` // e.g. "РФ"
11: }
12: 
13: // ATCCode — справочник кодов АТХ (Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical Classification).
14: type ATCCode struct {
15: 	Code   string `json:"code"`    // e.g. "J01CA04"
16: 	NameRu string `json:"name_ru"` // e.g. "Амоксициллин"
17: }
18: 
19: // ReferenceRepository — интерфейс для работы со справочниками.
20: type ReferenceRepository interface {
21: 	ListCountries(ctx context.Context) ([]Country, error)
22: 	ListATCCodes(ctx context.Context, query string, limit int) ([]ATCCode, error)
23: 	GetCountryByCode(ctx context.Context, code string) (*Country, error)
24: 	GetATCByCode(ctx context.Context, code string) (*ATCCode, error)
25: }
26: 
27: // ReferenceService — бизнес-логика справочников.
28: type ReferenceService interface {
29: 	GetCountries(ctx context.Context) ([]Country, error)
30: 	SearchATC(ctx context.Context, query string) ([]ATCCode, error)
31: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/session.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"

 6: 
 7: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
 8: )
 9: 
10: type RefreshToken struct {
11: 	ID        uuid.UUID
12: 	UserID    int
13: 	TokenHash string
14: 	ExpiresAt time.Time
15: 	UserAgent string
16: 	IPAddress string
17: 	Metadata  map[string]any
18: 	CreatedAt time.Time
19: 	RevokedAt *time.Time
20: }
21: 
22: type SessionRepository interface {
23: 	Create(ctx context.Context, rt *RefreshToken) (*RefreshToken, error)
24: 	FindByID(ctx context.Context, id uuid.UUID) (*RefreshToken, error)
25: 	FindByTokenHash(ctx context.Context, hash string) (*RefreshToken, error)
26: 	FindActiveByUserID(ctx context.Context, userID int) ([]*RefreshToken, error)
27: 	Revoke(ctx context.Context, id uuid.UUID) error
28: 	RevokeAllForUser(ctx context.Context, userID int) error
29: 	DeleteExpired(ctx context.Context) error // for a cleanup cron/job
30: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/supplier.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: // Supplier — поставщик продукции.
 9: type Supplier struct {
10: 	ID          string    `json:"id"`
11: 	Name        string    `json:"name"`        // наименование организации
12: 	INN         string    `json:"inn"`         // ИНН (уникальный)
13: 	KPP         string    `json:"kpp"`         // КПП
14: 	ContactName string    `json:"contact_name"` // ФИО контактного лица
15: 	Phone       string    `json:"phone"`       // телефон
16: 	Email       string    `json:"email"`       // email
17: 	Address     string    `json:"address"`     // юридический адрес
18: 	IsActive    bool      `json:"is_active"`
19: 	CreatedAt   time.Time `json:"created_at"`
20: 	UpdatedAt   time.Time `json:"updated_at"`
21: }
22: 
23: // SupplierRepository — интерфейс для работы с поставщиками.
24: type SupplierRepository interface {
25: 	List(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]Supplier, int, error)
26: 	GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Supplier, error)
27: 	GetByINN(ctx context.Context, inn string) (*Supplier, error)
28: 	Create(ctx context.Context, s *Supplier) error
29: 	Update(ctx context.Context, s *Supplier) error
30: 	Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error
31: }
32: 
33: // SupplierService — бизнес-логика поставщиков.
34: type SupplierService interface {
35: 	ListSuppliers(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]Supplier, int, error)
36: 	GetSupplier(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Supplier, error)
37: 	CreateSupplier(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, s *Supplier) (*Supplier, error)
38: 	UpdateSupplier(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, s *Supplier) (*Supplier, error)
39: 	DeleteSupplier(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, id string) error
40: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/zone.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: type ZoneType string
 9: 
10: const (
11: 	ZoneTypeAmbient      ZoneType = "ambient"      // 15-25°C
12: 	ZoneTypeCool         ZoneType = "cool"         // 8-15°C
13: 	ZoneTypeColdStorage  ZoneType = "cold"         // 2-8°C
14: 	ZoneTypeNarcotic     ZoneType = "narcotic"     // Locked storage
15: 	ZoneTypeQuarantine   ZoneType = "quarantine"   // Quality control
16: )
17: 
18: // Zone — складская зона.
19: type Zone struct {
20: 	ID          string    `json:"id"`
21: 	Name        string    `json:"name"`        // Код/название зоны
22: 	Type        ZoneType  `json:"type"`        // Тип (ambient, cold, etc.)
23: 	Description string    `json:"description"`
24: 	TemperatureMin float64 `json:"temp_min"`
25: 	TemperatureMax float64 `json:"temp_max"`
26: 	Capacity    int       `json:"capacity"`    // Вместимость (в условных ед./паллетах)
27: 	IsActive    bool      `json:"is_active"`
28: 	CreatedAt   time.Time `json:"created_at"`
29: 	UpdatedAt   time.Time `json:"updated_at"`
30: }
31: 
32: // ZoneRepository — интерфейс для работы с зонами.
33: type ZoneRepository interface {
34: 	List(ctx context.Context) ([]Zone, error)
35: 	GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Zone, error)
36: 	Create(ctx context.Context, z *Zone) error
37: 	Update(ctx context.Context, z *Zone) error
38: 	Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error
39: }
40: 
41: // ZoneService — бизнес-логика зон.
42: type ZoneService interface {
43: 	ListZones(ctx context.Context) ([]Zone, error)
44: 	GetZone(ctx context.Context, id string) (*Zone, error)
45: 	CreateZone(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, z *Zone) (*Zone, error)
46: 	UpdateZone(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, z *Zone) (*Zone, error)
47: 	DeleteZone(ctx context.Context, callerRole UserRole, id string) error
48: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/batch_dto.go
````go
 1: package dto
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type BatchResponse struct {
10: 	ID               string             `json:"id"`
11: 	ProductID        string             `json:"product_id"`
12: 	ZoneID           *string            `json:"zone_id,omitempty"`
13: 	SerialNumber     string             `json:"serial_number"`
14: 	ManufactureDate  time.Time          `json:"manufacture_date"`
15: 	ExpiryDate       time.Time          `json:"expiry_date"`
16: 	Quantity         int                `json:"quantity"`
17: 	Status           domain.BatchStatus `json:"status"`
18: 	UpdatedAt        time.Time          `json:"updated_at"`
19: }
20: 
21: func ToBatchResponse(b domain.Batch) BatchResponse {
22: 	return BatchResponse{
23: 		ID:               b.ID,
24: 		ProductID:        b.ProductID,
25: 		ZoneID:           b.ZoneID,
26: 		SerialNumber:     b.SerialNumber,
27: 		ManufactureDate:  b.ManufactureDate,
28: 		ExpiryDate:       b.ExpiryDate,
29: 		Quantity:         b.Quantity,
30: 		Status:           b.Status,
31: 		UpdatedAt:        b.UpdatedAt,
32: 	}
33: }
34: 
35: type BatchListResponse struct {
36: 	Total   int             `json:"total"`
37: 	Batches []BatchResponse `json:"batches"`
38: }
39: 
40: type UpdateBatchStatusRequest struct {
41: 	Status domain.BatchStatus `json:"status" validate:"required"`
42: }
43: 
44: type TransferBatchRequest struct {
45: 	TargetZoneID string `json:"target_zone_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
46: }
````

````go

18: 	UpdatedAt   time.Time          `json:"updated_at"`
19: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/inbound_dto.go
````go
  1: package dto
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"time"
  5: 
  6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  7: )
  8: 
  9: type InboundResponse struct {
 10: 	ID            string               `json:"id"`
 11: 	InvoiceNumber string               `json:"invoice_number"`
 12: 	InvoiceDate   time.Time            `json:"invoice_date"`
 13: 	SupplierID    string               `json:"supplier_id"`
 14: 	Status        domain.InboundStatus `json:"status"`
 15: 	TotalAmount   float64              `json:"total_amount"`
 16: 	VATAmount     float64              `json:"vat_amount"`
 17: 	Notes         string               `json:"notes"`
 18: 	ReceivedBy    int                  `json:"received_by"`
 19: 	Items         []InboundItemResponse `json:"items,omitempty"`
 20: 	CreatedAt     time.Time            `json:"created_at"`
 21: 	UpdatedAt     time.Time            `json:"updated_at"`
 22: }
 23: 
 24: type InboundItemResponse struct {
 25: 	ID                string    `json:"id"`
 26: 	ProductID         string    `json:"product_id"`
 27: 	BatchNumber       string    `json:"batch_number"`
 28: 	ExpirationDate    time.Time `json:"expiration_date"`
 29: 	Quantity          int       `json:"quantity"`
 30: 	PriceNetto        float64   `json:"price_netto"`
 31: 	VATRate           float64   `json:"vat_rate"`
 32: 	PriceBrutto       float64   `json:"price_brutto"`
 33: 	CertificateNumber string    `json:"cert_number"`
 34: 	ZoneID            string    `json:"zone_id"`
 35: }
 36: 
 37: func ToInboundResponse(i domain.InboundReceiving) InboundResponse {
 38: 	items := make([]InboundItemResponse, len(i.Items))
 39: 	for idx, item := range i.Items {
 40: 		items[idx] = InboundItemResponse{
 41: 			ID:                item.ID,
 42: 			ProductID:         item.ProductID,
 43: 			BatchNumber:       item.BatchNumber,
 44: 			ExpirationDate:    item.ExpirationDate,
 45: 			Quantity:          item.Quantity,
 46: 			PriceNetto:        item.PriceNetto,
 47: 			VATRate:           item.VATRate,
 48: 			PriceBrutto:       item.PriceBrutto,
 49: 			CertificateNumber: item.CertificateNumber,
 50: 			ZoneID:            item.ZoneID,
 51: 		}
 52: 	}
 53: 
 54: 	return InboundResponse{
 55: 		ID:            i.ID,
 56: 		InvoiceNumber: i.InvoiceNumber,
 57: 		InvoiceDate:   i.InvoiceDate,
 58: 		SupplierID:    i.SupplierID,
 59: 		Status:        i.Status,
 60: 		TotalAmount:   i.TotalAmount,
 61: 		VATAmount:     i.VATAmount,
 62: 		Notes:         i.Notes,
 63: 		ReceivedBy:    i.ReceivedBy,
 64: 		Items:         items,
 65: 		CreatedAt:     i.CreatedAt,
 66: 		UpdatedAt:     i.UpdatedAt,
 67: 	}
 68: }
 69: 
 70: type CreateInboundRequest struct {
 71: 	InvoiceNumber string               `json:"invoice_number" validate:"required"`
 72: 	InvoiceDate   time.Time            `json:"invoice_date" validate:"required"`
 73: 	SupplierID    string               `json:"supplier_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
 74: 	Notes         string               `json:"notes"`
 75: 	Items         []CreateInboundItem  `json:"items" validate:"required,dive"`
 76: }
 77: 
 78: type CreateInboundItem struct {
 79: 	ProductID         string    `json:"product_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
 80: 	BatchNumber       string    `json:"batch_number" validate:"required"`
 81: 	ExpirationDate    time.Time `json:"expiration_date" validate:"required"`
 82: 	Quantity          int       `json:"quantity" validate:"required,min=1"`
 83: 	PriceNetto        float64   `json:"price_netto" validate:"required"`
 84: 	VATRate           float64   `json:"vat_rate"`
 85: 	PriceBrutto       float64   `json:"price_brutto"`
 86: 	CertificateNumber string    `json:"cert_number"`
 87: 	ZoneID            string    `json:"zone_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
 88: }
 89: 
 90: func (r CreateInboundRequest) ToDomain() domain.InboundReceiving {
 91: 	items := make([]domain.InboundItem, len(r.Items))
 92: 	var total, vatTotal float64
 93: 	for i, item := range r.Items {
 94: 		items[i] = domain.InboundItem{
 95: 			ProductID:         item.ProductID,
 96: 			BatchNumber:       item.BatchNumber,
 97: 			ExpirationDate:    item.ExpirationDate,
 98: 			Quantity:          item.Quantity,
 99: 			PriceNetto:        item.PriceNetto,
100: 			VATRate:           item.VATRate,
101: 			PriceBrutto:       item.PriceBrutto,
102: 			CertificateNumber: item.CertificateNumber,
103: 			ZoneID:            item.ZoneID,
104: 		}
105: 		total += item.PriceBrutto * float64(item.Quantity)
106: 		vatTotal += (item.PriceBrutto - item.PriceNetto) * float64(item.Quantity)
107: 	}
108: 
109: 	return domain.InboundReceiving{
110: 		InvoiceNumber: r.InvoiceNumber,
111: 		InvoiceDate:   r.InvoiceDate,
112: 		SupplierID:    r.SupplierID,
113: 		Notes:         r.Notes,
114: 		Items:         items,
115: 		TotalAmount:   total,
116: 		VATAmount:     vatTotal,
117: 	}
118: }
119: 
120: type InboundListResponse struct {
121: 	Total    int               `json:"total"`
122: 	Inbounds []InboundResponse `json:"inbounds"`
123: }
124: 
125: type UpdateInboundStatusRequest struct {
126: 	Status domain.InboundStatus `json:"status" validate:"required,oneof=draft received completed cancelled"`
127: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/inventory_dto.go
````go
 1: package dto
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type InventorySessionResponse struct {
10: 	ID          string                 `json:"id"`
11: 	ZoneID      string                 `json:"zone_id"`
12: 	Status      domain.InventoryStatus `json:"status"`
13: 	StartedBy   int                    `json:"started_by"`
14: 	StartedAt   time.Time              `json:"started_at"`
15: 	CompletedAt *time.Time             `json:"completed_at,omitempty"`
16: 	Items       []InventoryItemResponse `json:"items,omitempty"`
17: }
18: 
19: type InventoryItemResponse struct {
20: 	ID                string `json:"id"`
21: 	ProductID         string `json:"product_id"`
22: 	BatchNumber       string `json:"batch_number"`
23: 	SystemQuantity    int    `json:"system_qty"`
24: 	PhysicalQuantity  int    `json:"physical_qty"`
25: 	DiscrepancyReason string `json:"reason"`
26: }
27: 
28: func ToInventorySessionResponse(s domain.InventorySession) InventorySessionResponse {
29: 	items := make([]InventoryItemResponse, len(s.Items))
30: 	for i, item := range s.Items {
31: 		items[i] = InventoryItemResponse{
32: 			ID:                item.ID,
33: 			ProductID:         item.ProductID,
34: 			BatchNumber:       item.BatchNumber,
35: 			SystemQuantity:    item.SystemQuantity,
36: 			PhysicalQuantity:  item.PhysicalQuantity,
37: 			DiscrepancyReason: item.DiscrepancyReason,
38: 		}
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	return InventorySessionResponse{
42: 		ID:          s.ID,
43: 		ZoneID:      s.ZoneID,
44: 		Status:      s.Status,
45: 		StartedBy:   s.StartedBy,
46: 		StartedAt:   s.StartedAt,
47: 		CompletedAt: s.CompletedAt,
48: 		Items:       items,
49: 	}
50: }
51: 
52: type StartInventoryRequest struct {
53: 	ZoneID string `json:"zone_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
54: }
55: 
56: type SubmitCountRequest struct {
57: 	Items []CountItem `json:"items" validate:"required,dive"`
58: }
59: 
60: type CountItem struct {
61: 	ProductID         string `json:"product_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
62: 	BatchNumber       string `json:"batch_number" validate:"required"`
63: 	SystemQuantity    int    `json:"system_qty"`
64: 	PhysicalQuantity  int    `json:"physical_qty"`
65: 	DiscrepancyReason string `json:"reason"`
66: }
67: 
68: func (r CountItem) ToDomain() domain.InventoryItem {
69: 	return domain.InventoryItem{
70: 		ProductID:        r.ProductID,
71: 		BatchNumber:      r.BatchNumber,
72: 		SystemQuantity:   r.SystemQuantity,
73: 		PhysicalQuantity: r.PhysicalQuantity,
74: 		DiscrepancyReason: r.DiscrepancyReason,
75: 	}
76: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/order_dto.go
````go
 1: package dto
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type OrderResponse struct {
10: 	ID           string             `json:"id"`
11: 	OrderNumber  string             `json:"order_number"`
12: 	CustomerName string             `json:"customer_name"`
13: 	Status       domain.OrderStatus `json:"status"`
14: 	Priority     int                `json:"priority"`
15: 	Items        []OrderItemResponse `json:"items,omitempty"`
16: 	CreatedBy    int                `json:"created_by"`
17: 	CreatedAt    time.Time          `json:"created_at"`
18: 	UpdatedAt    time.Time          `json:"updated_at"`
19: }
20: 
21: type OrderItemResponse struct {
22: 	ID        string `json:"id"`
23: 	ProductID string `json:"product_id"`
24: 	Quantity  int    `json:"quantity"`
25: 	PickedQty int    `json:"picked_qty"`
26: }
27: 
28: func ToOrderResponse(o domain.Order) OrderResponse {
29: 	items := make([]OrderItemResponse, len(o.Items))
30: 	for i, item := range o.Items {
31: 		items[i] = OrderItemResponse{
32: 			ID:        item.ID,
33: 			ProductID: item.ProductID,
34: 			Quantity:  item.Quantity,
35: 			PickedQty: item.PickedQty,
36: 		}
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	return OrderResponse{
40: 		ID:           o.ID,
41: 		OrderNumber:  o.OrderNumber,
42: 		CustomerName: o.CustomerName,
43: 		Status:       o.Status,
44: 		Priority:     o.Priority,
45: 		Items:        items,
46: 		CreatedBy:    o.CreatedBy,
47: 		CreatedAt:    o.CreatedAt,
48: 		UpdatedAt:    o.UpdatedAt,
49: 	}
50: }
51: 
52: type CreateOrderRequest struct {
53: 	CustomerName string           `json:"customer_name" validate:"required"`
54: 	Priority     int              `json:"priority" validate:"min=1,max=3"`
55: 	Items        []CreateOrderItem `json:"items" validate:"required,dive"`
56: }
57: 
58: type CreateOrderItem struct {
59: 	ProductID string `json:"product_id" validate:"required,uuid"`
60: 	Quantity  int    `json:"quantity" validate:"required,min=1"`
61: }
62: 
63: func (r CreateOrderRequest) ToDomain() domain.Order {
64: 	items := make([]domain.OrderItem, len(r.Items))
65: 	for i, item := range r.Items {
66: 		items[i] = domain.OrderItem{
67: 			ProductID: item.ProductID,
68: 			Quantity:  item.Quantity,
69: 		}
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	return domain.Order{
73: 		CustomerName: r.CustomerName,
74: 		Priority:     r.Priority,
75: 		Items:        items,
76: 	}
77: }
78: 
79: type OrderListResponse struct {
80: 	Total  int             `json:"total"`
81: 	Orders []OrderResponse `json:"orders"`
82: }
83: 
84: type UpdateOrderStatusRequest struct {
85: 	Status domain.OrderStatus `json:"status" validate:"required"`
86: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/product_dto.go
````go
  1: package dto
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"time"
  5: 
  6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  7: )
  8: 
  9: type ProductResponse struct {
 10: 	ID                string     `json:"id"`
 11: 	SKU               string     `json:"sku"`
 12: 	Name              string     `json:"name"`
 13: 	GenericName       string     `json:"generic_name"`
 14: 	ATCCode           string     `json:"atc_code"`
 15: 	DosageForm        string     `json:"dosage_form"`
 16: 	Strength          string     `json:"strength"`
 17: 	PackageSize       int        `json:"package_size"`
 18: 	IsJNVLP           bool       `json:"is_jnvlp"`
 19: 	ManufacturerID    *string    `json:"manufacturer_id,omitempty"`
 20: 	StorageConditions string     `json:"storage_conditions"`
 21: 	PhotoURL          string     `json:"photo_url"`
 22: 	CreatedAt         time.Time  `json:"created_at"`
 23: 	UpdatedAt         time.Time  `json:"updated_at"`
 24: 	DeletedAt         *time.Time `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
 25: }
 26: 
 27: func ToProductResponse(p domain.Product) ProductResponse {
 28: 	return ProductResponse{
 29: 		ID:                p.ID,
 30: 		SKU:               p.SKU,
 31: 		Name:              p.Name,
 32: 		GenericName:       p.GenericName,
 33: 		ATCCode:           p.ATCCode,
 34: 		DosageForm:        p.DosageForm,
 35: 		Strength:          p.Strength,
 36: 		PackageSize:       p.PackageSize,
 37: 		IsJNVLP:           p.IsJNVLP,
 38: 		ManufacturerID:    p.ManufacturerID,
 39: 		StorageConditions: p.StorageConditions,
 40: 		PhotoURL:          p.PhotoURL,
 41: 		CreatedAt:         p.CreatedAt,
 42: 		UpdatedAt:         p.UpdatedAt,
 43: 		DeletedAt:         p.DeletedAt,
 44: 	}
 45: }
 46: 
 47: type CreateProductRequest struct {
 48: 	SKU               string  `json:"sku" validate:"required"`
 49: 	Name              string  `json:"name" validate:"required"`
 50: 	GenericName       string  `json:"generic_name" validate:"required"`
 51: 	ATCCode           string  `json:"atc_code" validate:"required"`
 52: 	DosageForm        string  `json:"dosage_form" validate:"required"`
 53: 	Strength          string  `json:"strength" validate:"required"`
 54: 	PackageSize       int     `json:"package_size" validate:"required,min=1"`
 55: 	IsJNVLP           bool    `json:"is_jnvlp"`
 56: 	ManufacturerID    *string `json:"manufacturer_id" validate:"omitempty,uuid"`
 57: 	StorageConditions string  `json:"storage_conditions"`
 58: 	PhotoURL          string  `json:"photo_url"`
 59: }
 60: 
 61: func (r CreateProductRequest) ToDomain() domain.Product {
 62: 	return domain.Product{
 63: 		SKU:               r.SKU,
 64: 		Name:              r.Name,
 65: 		GenericName:       r.GenericName,
 66: 		ATCCode:           r.ATCCode,
 67: 		DosageForm:        r.DosageForm,
 68: 		Strength:          r.Strength,
 69: 		PackageSize:       r.PackageSize,
 70: 		IsJNVLP:           r.IsJNVLP,
 71: 		ManufacturerID:    r.ManufacturerID,
 72: 		StorageConditions: r.StorageConditions,
 73: 		PhotoURL:          r.PhotoURL,
 74: 	}
 75: }
 76: 
 77: type UpdateProductRequest struct {
 78: 	Name              *string `json:"name"`
 79: 	GenericName       *string `json:"generic_name"`
 80: 	ATCCode           *string `json:"atc_code"`
 81: 	DosageForm        *string `json:"dosage_form"`
 82: 	Strength          *string `json:"strength"`
 83: 	PackageSize       *int    `json:"package_size"`
 84: 	IsJNVLP           *bool   `json:"is_jnvlp"`
 85: 	ManufacturerID    *string `json:"manufacturer_id"`
 86: 	StorageConditions *string `json:"storage_conditions"`
 87: 	PhotoURL          *string `json:"photo_url"`
 88: }
 89: 
 90: func (r UpdateProductRequest) ApplyTo(p *domain.Product) {
 91: 	if r.Name != nil { p.Name = *r.Name }
 92: 	if r.GenericName != nil { p.GenericName = *r.GenericName }
 93: 	if r.ATCCode != nil { p.ATCCode = *r.ATCCode }
 94: 	if r.DosageForm != nil { p.DosageForm = *r.DosageForm }
 95: 	if r.Strength != nil { p.Strength = *r.Strength }
 96: 	if r.PackageSize != nil { p.PackageSize = *r.PackageSize }
 97: 	if r.IsJNVLP != nil { p.IsJNVLP = *r.IsJNVLP }
 98: 	if r.ManufacturerID != nil { p.ManufacturerID = r.ManufacturerID }
 99: 	if r.StorageConditions != nil { p.StorageConditions = *r.StorageConditions }
100: 	if r.PhotoURL != nil { p.PhotoURL = *r.PhotoURL }
101: }
102: 
103: type ProductListResponse struct {
104: 	Total    int               `json:"total"`
105: 	Products []ProductResponse `json:"products"`
106: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/supplier_dto.go
````go
 1: package dto
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type SupplierResponse struct {
10: 	ID          string    `json:"id"`
11: 	Name        string    `json:"name"`
12: 	INN         string    `json:"inn"`
13: 	KPP         string    `json:"kpp"`
14: 	ContactName string    `json:"contact_name"`
15: 	Phone       string    `json:"phone"`
16: 	Email       string    `json:"email"`
17: 	Address     string    `json:"address"`
18: 	IsActive    bool      `json:"is_active"`
19: 	CreatedAt   time.Time `json:"created_at"`
20: 	UpdatedAt   time.Time `json:"updated_at"`
21: }
22: 
23: func ToSupplierResponse(s domain.Supplier) SupplierResponse {
24: 	return SupplierResponse{
25: 		ID:          s.ID,
26: 		Name:        s.Name,
27: 		INN:         s.INN,
28: 		KPP:         s.KPP,
29: 		ContactName: s.ContactName,
30: 		Phone:       s.Phone,
31: 		Email:       s.Email,
32: 		Address:     s.Address,
33: 		IsActive:    s.IsActive,
34: 		CreatedAt:   s.CreatedAt,
35: 		UpdatedAt:   s.UpdatedAt,
36: 	}
37: }
38: 
39: type CreateSupplierRequest struct {
40: 	Name        string `json:"name" validate:"required"`
41: 	INN         string `json:"inn" validate:"required,len=10|len=12"`
42: 	KPP         string `json:"kpp" validate:"required"`
43: 	ContactName string `json:"contact_name"`
44: 	Phone       string `json:"phone"`
45: 	Email       string `json:"email" validate:"omitempty,email"`
46: 	Address     string `json:"address"`
47: }
48: 
49: func (r CreateSupplierRequest) ToDomain() domain.Supplier {
50: 	return domain.Supplier{
51: 		Name:        r.Name,
52: 		INN:         r.INN,
53: 		KPP:         r.KPP,
54: 		ContactName: r.ContactName,
55: 		Phone:       r.Phone,
56: 		Email:       r.Email,
57: 		Address:     r.Address,
58: 		IsActive:    true,
59: 	}
60: }
61: 
62: type UpdateSupplierRequest struct {
63: 	Name        *string `json:"name"`
64: 	KPP         *string `json:"kpp"`
65: 	ContactName *string `json:"contact_name"`
66: 	Phone       *string `json:"phone"`
67: 	Email       *string `json:"email"`
68: 	Address     *string `json:"address"`
69: 	IsActive    *bool   `json:"is_active"`
70: }
71: 
72: func (r UpdateSupplierRequest) ApplyTo(s *domain.Supplier) {
73: 	if r.Name != nil { s.Name = *r.Name }
74: 	if r.KPP != nil { s.KPP = *r.KPP }
75: 	if r.ContactName != nil { s.ContactName = *r.ContactName }
76: 	if r.Phone != nil { s.Phone = *r.Phone }
77: 	if r.Email != nil { s.Email = *r.Email }
78: 	if r.Address != nil { s.Address = *r.Address }
79: 	if r.IsActive != nil { s.IsActive = *r.IsActive }
80: }
81: 
82: type SupplierListResponse struct {
83: 	Total     int                `json:"total"`
84: 	Suppliers []SupplierResponse `json:"suppliers"`
85: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/dto/zone_dto.go
````go
 1: package dto
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type ZoneResponse struct {
10: 	ID             string          `json:"id"`
11: 	Name           string          `json:"name"`
12: 	Type           domain.ZoneType `json:"type"`
13: 	Description    string          `json:"description"`
14: 	TemperatureMin float64         `json:"temp_min"`
15: 	TemperatureMax float64         `json:"temp_max"`
16: 	Capacity       int             `json:"capacity"`
17: 	IsActive       bool            `json:"is_active"`
18: 	CreatedAt      time.Time       `json:"created_at"`
19: 	UpdatedAt      time.Time       `json:"updated_at"`
20: }
21: 
22: func ToZoneResponse(z domain.Zone) ZoneResponse {
23: 	return ZoneResponse{
24: 		ID:             z.ID,
25: 		Name:           z.Name,
26: 		Type:           z.Type,
27: 		Description:    z.Description,
28: 		TemperatureMin: z.TemperatureMin,
29: 		TemperatureMax: z.TemperatureMax,
30: 		Capacity:       z.Capacity,
31: 		IsActive:       z.IsActive,
32: 		CreatedAt:      z.CreatedAt,
33: 		UpdatedAt:      z.UpdatedAt,
34: 	}
35: }
36: 
37: type CreateZoneRequest struct {
38: 	Name           string          `json:"name" validate:"required"`
39: 	Type           domain.ZoneType `json:"type" validate:"required,oneof=ambient cool cold narcotic quarantine"`
40: 	Description    string          `json:"description"`
41: 	TemperatureMin float64         `json:"temp_min"`
42: 	TemperatureMax float64         `json:"temp_max"`
43: 	Capacity       int             `json:"capacity"`
44: }
45: 
46: func (r CreateZoneRequest) ToDomain() domain.Zone {
47: 	return domain.Zone{
48: 		Name:           r.Name,
49: 		Type:           r.Type,
50: 		Description:    r.Description,
51: 		TemperatureMin: r.TemperatureMin,
52: 		TemperatureMax: r.TemperatureMax,
53: 		Capacity:       r.Capacity,
54: 		IsActive:       true,
55: 	}
56: }
57: 
58: type UpdateZoneRequest struct {
59: 	Name           *string          `json:"name"`
60: 	Type           *domain.ZoneType `json:"type"`
61: 	Description    *string          `json:"description"`
62: 	TemperatureMin *float64         `json:"temp_min"`
63: 	TemperatureMax *float64         `json:"temp_max"`
64: 	Capacity       *int             `json:"capacity"`
65: 	IsActive       *bool            `json:"is_active"`
66: }
67: 
68: func (r UpdateZoneRequest) ApplyTo(z *domain.Zone) {
69: 	if r.Name != nil { z.Name = *r.Name }
70: 	if r.Type != nil { z.Type = *r.Type }
71: 	if r.Description != nil { z.Description = *r.Description }
72: 	if r.TemperatureMin != nil { z.TemperatureMin = *r.TemperatureMin }
73: 	if r.TemperatureMax != nil { z.TemperatureMax = *r.TemperatureMax }
74: 	if r.Capacity != nil { z.Capacity = *r.Capacity }
75: 	if r.IsActive != nil { z.IsActive = *r.IsActive }
76: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/middleware/auth_middleware_test.go
````go
  1: package middleware_test
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"net/http"
  5: 	"net/http/httptest"
  6: 	"testing"
  7: 	"time"
  8: 
  9: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/service"
 13: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
 14: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
 15: )
 16: 
 17: // newTestTokenSvc returns a real tokenService using a fixed test secret.
 18: func newTestTokenSvc() domain.TokenService {
 19: 	return service.NewTokenService("middleware-test-secret", 15*time.Minute, 15*24*time.Hour)
 20: }
 21: 
 22: // nextHandler records whether ServeHTTP was called.
 23: type nextHandler struct {
 24: 	called bool
 25: }
 26: 
 27: func (h *nextHandler) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 28: 	h.called = true
 29: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
 30: }
 31: 
 32: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 33: // AuthRequired
 34: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 35: 
 36: // Scenario: JWT Bearer token gate
 37: //
 38: //	Covers: valid token passes through; missing header → 401; wrong prefix → 401;
 39: //	        expired token → 401; garbage token → 401
 40: func TestAuthRequired(t *testing.T) {
 41: 	svc := newTestTokenSvc()
 42: 	user := &domain.User{ID: 42, Email: "test@example.com", Role: domain.RoleAdmin}
 43: 
 44: 	validToken, err := svc.GenerateAccessToken(user, uuid.New())
 45: 	require.NoError(t, err)
 46: 
 47: 	// Generate an already-expired token
 48: 	expiredSvc := service.NewTokenService("middleware-test-secret", -1*time.Second, 15*24*time.Hour)
 49: 	expiredToken, err := expiredSvc.GenerateAccessToken(user, uuid.New())
 50: 	require.NoError(t, err)
 51: 
 52: 	tests := []struct {
 53: 		name           string
 54: 		authHeader     string
 55: 		wantStatus     int
 56: 		wantNextCalled bool
 57: 	}{
 58: 		{
 59: 			name:           "valid Bearer token — next handler called with 200",
 60: 			authHeader:     "Bearer " + validToken,
 61: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusOK,
 62: 			wantNextCalled: true,
 63: 		},
 64: 		{
 65: 			name:           "missing Authorization header → 401",
 66: 			authHeader:     "",
 67: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusUnauthorized,
 68: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 69: 		},
 70: 		{
 71: 			name:           "wrong scheme (Token prefix) → 401",
 72: 			authHeader:     "Token " + validToken,
 73: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusUnauthorized,
 74: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 75: 		},
 76: 		{
 77: 			name:           "Bearer with no token value → 401",
 78: 			authHeader:     "Bearer",
 79: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusUnauthorized,
 80: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 81: 		},
 82: 		{
 83: 			name:           "expired JWT → 401",
 84: 			authHeader:     "Bearer " + expiredToken,
 85: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusUnauthorized,
 86: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 87: 		},
 88: 		{
 89: 			name:           "completely invalid JWT → 401",
 90: 			authHeader:     "Bearer not.a.valid.jwt",
 91: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusUnauthorized,
 92: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 93: 		},
 94: 	}
 95: 
 96: 	for _, tc := range tests {
 97: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
 98: 			next := &nextHandler{}
 99: 			handler := middleware.AuthRequired(svc)(next)
100: 
101: 			req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/protected", nil)
102: 			if tc.authHeader != "" {
103: 				req.Header.Set("Authorization", tc.authHeader)
104: 			}
105: 			rr := httptest.NewRecorder()
106: 			handler.ServeHTTP(rr, req)
107: 
108: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantStatus, rr.Code)
109: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantNextCalled, next.called)
110: 		})
111: 	}
112: }
113: 
114: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
115: // AuthRequired — context enrichment
116: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
117: 
118: // Scenario: Valid token enriches context with UserID, Role, Email
119: //
120: //	Given:  A valid JWT for user ID=42, role=admin, email=test@example.com
121: //	When:   AuthRequired processes the request
122: //	Then:   Context values for UserID, Role, Email match the claims
123: func TestAuthRequired_ContextEnrichment(t *testing.T) {
124: 	svc := newTestTokenSvc()
125: 	user := &domain.User{ID: 42, Email: "ctx@example.com", Role: domain.RoleAdmin}
126: 
127: 	token, err := svc.GenerateAccessToken(user, uuid.New())
128: 	require.NoError(t, err)
129: 
130: 	var capturedCtx struct {
131: 		userID interface{}
132: 		role   interface{}
133: 		email  interface{}
134: 	}
135: 
136: 	captureHandler := http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
137: 		capturedCtx.userID = r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID)
138: 		capturedCtx.role = r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole)
139: 		capturedCtx.email = r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxEmail)
140: 		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
141: 	})
142: 
143: 	handler := middleware.AuthRequired(svc)(captureHandler)
144: 	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/protected", nil)
145: 	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
146: 	rr := httptest.NewRecorder()
147: 	handler.ServeHTTP(rr, req)
148: 
149: 	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, rr.Code)
150: 	assert.Equal(t, 42, capturedCtx.userID)
151: 	assert.Equal(t, domain.RoleAdmin, capturedCtx.role)
152: 	assert.Equal(t, "ctx@example.com", capturedCtx.email)
153: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/middleware/ip.go
````go
 1: package middleware
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"net"
 5: 	"net/http"
 6: 
 7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/logger"
 8: )
 9: 
10: // InjectIPAddress is an HTTP middleware that extracts the real client IP
11: // from the request and stores it in the context via logger.WithIPAddress.
12: //
13: // Priority order:
14: //  1. X-Forwarded-For (first entry — set by reverse proxies/load balancers)
15: //  2. X-Real-IP (Nginx convention)
16: //  3. RemoteAddr (direct connection fallback)
17: func InjectIPAddress(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
18: 	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
19: 		ip := extractIP(r)
20: 		ctx := logger.WithIPAddress(r.Context(), ip)
21: 		next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
22: 	})
23: }
24: 
25: func extractIP(r *http.Request) string {
26: 	if xff := r.Header.Get("X-Forwarded-For"); xff != "" {
27: 		// X-Forwarded-For may contain a comma-separated list; take the first.
28: 		if idx := len(xff); idx > 0 {
29: 			for i, c := range xff {
30: 				if c == ',' {
31: 					idx = i
32: 					break
33: 				}
34: 			}
35: 			if ip := net.ParseIP(trimSpace(xff[:idx])); ip != nil {
36: 				return ip.String()
37: 			}
38: 		}
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	if xri := r.Header.Get("X-Real-IP"); xri != "" {
42: 		if ip := net.ParseIP(trimSpace(xri)); ip != nil {
43: 			return ip.String()
44: 		}
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	host, _, err := net.SplitHostPort(r.RemoteAddr)
48: 	if err != nil {
49: 		return r.RemoteAddr
50: 	}
51: 	return host
52: }
53: 
54: func trimSpace(s string) string {
55: 	start, end := 0, len(s)
56: 	for start < end && (s[start] == ' ' || s[start] == '\t') {
57: 		start++
58: 	}
59: 	for end > start && (s[end-1] == ' ' || s[end-1] == '\t') {
60: 		end--
61: 	}
62: 	return s[start:end]
63: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/middleware/rbac_middleware_test.go
````go
  1: package middleware_test
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"net/http/httptest"
  7: 	"testing"
  8: 
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 11: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // passThrough is an http.Handler that records if it was called.
 15: type passThrough struct {
 16: 	called bool
 17: }
 18: 
 19: func (h *passThrough) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 20: 	h.called = true
 21: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
 22: }
 23: 
 24: // ctxWithRole returns a request whose context contains the given role,
 25: // simulating what AuthRequired middleware injects.
 26: func ctxWithRole(r *http.Request, role domain.UserRole) *http.Request {
 27: 	ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), middleware.CtxRole, role)
 28: 	return r.WithContext(ctx)
 29: }
 30: 
 31: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 32: // RequireRole
 33: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 34: 
 35: // Scenario: RBAC enforcement (TC-03 from testing.md)
 36: //
 37: //	Covers: allowed role passes, disallowed role → 403, missing role in ctx → 401,
 38: //	        multi-role allow-list, all non-admin roles blocked from admin endpoint
 39: func TestRequireRole(t *testing.T) {
 40: 	tests := []struct {
 41: 		name           string
 42: 		ctxRole        *domain.UserRole // nil = no role in context at all
 43: 		allowedRoles   []domain.UserRole
 44: 		wantStatus     int
 45: 		wantNextCalled bool
 46: 	}{
 47: 		{
 48: 			name:           "admin role — allowed",
 49: 			ctxRole:        rolePtr(domain.RoleAdmin),
 50: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin},
 51: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusOK,
 52: 			wantNextCalled: true,
 53: 		},
 54: 		{
 55: 			name:           "storekeeper trying admin endpoint → 403",
 56: 			ctxRole:        rolePtr(domain.RoleStorekeeper),
 57: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin},
 58: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusForbidden,
 59: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 60: 		},
 61: 		{
 62: 			name:           "pharmacist trying admin endpoint → 403",
 63: 			ctxRole:        rolePtr(domain.RolePharmacist),
 64: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin},
 65: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusForbidden,
 66: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 67: 		},
 68: 		{
 69: 			name:           "no role in context (AuthRequired not applied) → 401",
 70: 			ctxRole:        nil,
 71: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin},
 72: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusUnauthorized,
 73: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 74: 		},
 75: 		{
 76: 			name:           "multi-role allow list: QP is in [admin, qp] → passes",
 77: 			ctxRole:        rolePtr(domain.RoleQP),
 78: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin, domain.RoleQP},
 79: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusOK,
 80: 			wantNextCalled: true,
 81: 		},
 82: 		{
 83: 			name:           "multi-role allow list: pharmacist not in [admin, qp] → 403",
 84: 			ctxRole:        rolePtr(domain.RolePharmacist),
 85: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin, domain.RoleQP},
 86: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusForbidden,
 87: 			wantNextCalled: false,
 88: 		},
 89: 		{
 90: 			name:           "warehouse_manager allowed when in list",
 91: 			ctxRole:        rolePtr(domain.RoleWarehouseManager),
 92: 			allowedRoles:   []domain.UserRole{domain.RoleAdmin, domain.RoleWarehouseManager},
 93: 			wantStatus:     http.StatusOK,
 94: 			wantNextCalled: true,
 95: 		},
 96: 	}
 97: 
 98: 	for _, tc := range tests {
 99: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
100: 			next := &passThrough{}
101: 			handler := middleware.RequireRole(tc.allowedRoles...)(next)
102: 
103: 			req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/endpoint", nil)
104: 			if tc.ctxRole != nil {
105: 				req = ctxWithRole(req, *tc.ctxRole)
106: 			}
107: 			rr := httptest.NewRecorder()
108: 			handler.ServeHTTP(rr, req)
109: 
110: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantStatus, rr.Code)
111: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantNextCalled, next.called)
112: 		})
113: 	}
114: }
115: 
116: // rolePtr is a test helper that returns a pointer to a UserRole value.
117: func rolePtr(r domain.UserRole) *domain.UserRole {
118: 	return &r
119: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/middleware/rbac_middleware.go
````go
 1: package middleware
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"net/http"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: // RequireRole checks if the caller has any of the allowed roles.
10: // Must be chained exactly after AuthRequired middleware.
11: func RequireRole(allowedRoles ...domain.UserRole) func(http.Handler) http.Handler {
12: 	return func(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
13: 		return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
14: 			roleVal := r.Context().Value(CtxRole)
15: 			if roleVal == nil {
16: 				http.Error(w, "unauthorized context", http.StatusUnauthorized)
17: 				return
18: 			}
19: 
20: 			userRole, ok := roleVal.(domain.UserRole)
21: 			if !ok {
22: 				http.Error(w, "invalid role in context", http.StatusInternalServerError)
23: 				return
24: 			}
25: 
26: 			hasAccess := false
27: 			for _, allowed := range allowedRoles {
28: 				if userRole == allowed {
29: 					hasAccess = true
30: 					break
31: 				}
32: 			}
33: 
34: 			if !hasAccess {
35: 				http.Error(w, "insufficient permissions", http.StatusForbidden)
36: 				return
37: 			}
38: 
39: 			next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
40: 		})
41: 	}
42: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/batch_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"strconv"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // listBatches godoc
 15: // @Summary      List product batches (Inventory)
 16: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of batches across all or specific zones
 17: // @Tags         Batches
 18: // @Produce      json
 19: // @Param        product_id  query     string  false  "Filter by product UUID"
 20: // @Param        zone_id     query     string  false  "Filter by zone UUID"
 21: // @Param        status      query     string  false  "Filter by status"
 22: // @Param        limit       query     int     false  "Page size"
 23: // @Param        offset      query     int     false  "Offset"
 24: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.BatchListResponse
 25: // @Router       /api/v1/batches [get]
 26: func (h *Handler) listBatches(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 27: 	filter := domain.BatchFilter{
 28: 		Limit:  10,
 29: 		Offset: 0,
 30: 	}
 31: 
 32: 	q := r.URL.Query()
 33: 	filter.ProductID = q.Get("product_id")
 34: 	filter.ZoneID = q.Get("zone_id")
 35: 	filter.Status = domain.BatchStatus(q.Get("status"))
 36: 
 37: 	if val, err := strconv.Atoi(q.Get("limit")); err == nil {
 38: 		filter.Limit = val
 39: 	}
 40: 	if val, err := strconv.Atoi(q.Get("offset")); err == nil {
 41: 		filter.Offset = val
 42: 	}
 43: 
 44: 	batches, total, err := h.service.Batch.ListBatches(r.Context(), filter)
 45: 	if err != nil {
 46: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch batches")
 47: 		return
 48: 	}
 49: 
 50: 	resp := dto.BatchListResponse{
 51: 		Total:   total,
 52: 		Batches: make([]dto.BatchResponse, len(batches)),
 53: 	}
 54: 	for i, b := range batches {
 55: 		resp.Batches[i] = dto.ToBatchResponse(b)
 56: 	}
 57: 
 58: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 59: }
 60: 
 61: // getBatch godoc
 62: // @Summary      Get batch by ID
 63: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a specific batch including quantity and expiry
 64: // @Tags         Batches
 65: // @Produce      json
 66: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Batch UUID"
 67: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.BatchResponse
 68: // @Router       /api/v1/batches/{id} [get]
 69: func (h *Handler) getBatch(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 70: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 71: 	b, err := h.service.Batch.GetBatch(r.Context(), id)
 72: 	if err != nil {
 73: 		if err == domain.ErrBatchNotFound {
 74: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Batch not found")
 75: 			return
 76: 		}
 77: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch batch")
 78: 		return
 79: 	}
 80: 
 81: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToBatchResponse(*b))
 82: }
 83: 
 84: // updateBatchStatus godoc
 85: // @Summary      Update batch status
 86: // @Description  Manually changes batch status (e.g. Quarantine -> Available)
 87: // @Tags         Batches
 88: // @Accept       json
 89: // @Produce      json
 90: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Batch UUID"
 91: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateBatchStatusRequest true "New status"
 92: // @Success      204  "No Content"
 93: // @Router       /api/v1/batches/{id}/status [patch]
 94: func (h *Handler) updateBatchStatus(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 95: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 96: 	var req dto.UpdateBatchStatusRequest
 97: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 98: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 99: 		return
100: 	}
101: 
102: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
103: 
104: 	if err := h.service.Batch.UpdateStatus(r.Context(), role, id, req.Status); err != nil {
105: 		if err == domain.ErrBatchNotFound {
106: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Batch not found")
107: 			return
108: 		}
109: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
110: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to update batch status")
111: 			return
112: 		}
113: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update batch status")
114: 		return
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
118: }
119: 
120: // transferBatch godoc
121: // @Summary      Transfer batch to another zone
122: // @Description  Moves stock series from one warehouse zone to another
123: // @Tags         Batches
124: // @Accept       json
125: // @Produce      json
126: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Batch UUID"
127: // @Param        request body dto.TransferBatchRequest true "Target zone info"
128: // @Success      204  "No Content"
129: // @Router       /api/v1/batches/{id}/transfer [post]
130: func (h *Handler) transferBatch(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
131: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
132: 	var req dto.TransferBatchRequest
133: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
134: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
135: 		return
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
139: 
140: 	if err := h.service.Batch.TransferBatch(r.Context(), role, id, req.TargetZoneID); err != nil {
141: 		if err == domain.ErrBatchNotFound {
142: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Batch not found")
143: 			return
144: 		}
145: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to transfer batch")
146: 		return
147: 	}
148: 
149: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
150: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/claim_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"strconv"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // listClaims godoc
 15: // @Summary      List claims and defects
 16: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of claims
 17: // @Tags         Claims
 18: // @Produce      json
 19: // @Param        limit   query     int  false  "Page size"
 20: // @Param        offset  query     int  false  "Offset"
 21: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ClaimListResponse
 22: // @Router       /api/v1/claims [get]
 23: func (h *Handler) listClaims(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 24: 	limit := 10
 25: 	offset := 0
 26: 
 27: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
 28: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
 29: 			limit = val
 30: 		}
 31: 	}
 32: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
 33: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
 34: 			offset = val
 35: 		}
 36: 	}
 37: 
 38: 	claims, total, err := h.service.Claim.ListClaims(r.Context(), limit, offset)
 39: 	if err != nil {
 40: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch claims")
 41: 		return
 42: 	}
 43: 
 44: 	resp := dto.ClaimListResponse{
 45: 		Total:  total,
 46: 		Claims: make([]dto.ClaimResponse, len(claims)),
 47: 	}
 48: 	for i, c := range claims {
 49: 		resp.Claims[i] = dto.ToClaimResponse(c)
 50: 	}
 51: 
 52: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 53: }
 54: 
 55: // getClaim godoc
 56: // @Summary      Get claim by ID
 57: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single claim
 58: // @Tags         Claims
 59: // @Produce      json
 60: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Claim UUID"
 61: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ClaimResponse
 62: // @Router       /api/v1/claims/{id} [get]
 63: func (h *Handler) getClaim(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 64: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 65: 	c, err := h.service.Claim.GetClaim(r.Context(), id)
 66: 	if err != nil {
 67: 		if err == domain.ErrClaimNotFound {
 68: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Claim not found")
 69: 			return
 70: 		}
 71: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch claim")
 72: 		return
 73: 	}
 74: 
 75: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToClaimResponse(*c))
 76: }
 77: 
 78: // createClaim godoc
 79: // @Summary      Create claim or defect
 80: // @Description  Registers a new quality control issue or delivery defect
 81: // @Tags         Claims
 82: // @Accept       json
 83: // @Produce      json
 84: // @Param        request body dto.CreateClaimRequest true "Claim data"
 85: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.ClaimResponse
 86: // @Router       /api/v1/claims [post]
 87: func (h *Handler) createClaim(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 88: 	var req dto.CreateClaimRequest
 89: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 90: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 91: 		return
 92: 	}
 93: 
 94: 	userID, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
 95: 	
 96: 	c := req.ToDomain()
 97: 	c.CreatedBy = userID
 98: 
 99: 	created, err := h.service.Claim.CreateClaim(r.Context(), &c)
100: 	if err != nil {
101: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to create claim")
102: 		return
103: 	}
104: 
105: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToClaimResponse(*created))
106: }
107: 
108: // updateClaimStatus godoc
109: // @Summary      Update claim status
110: // @Description  Changes the resolution status of a claim (e.g. New -> Resolved)
111: // @Tags         Claims
112: // @Accept       json
113: // @Produce      json
114: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Claim UUID"
115: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateClaimStatusRequest true "New status"
116: // @Success      204  "No Content"
117: // @Router       /api/v1/claims/{id}/status [patch]
118: func (h *Handler) updateClaimStatus(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
119: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
120: 	var req dto.UpdateClaimStatusRequest
121: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
122: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
123: 		return
124: 	}
125: 
126: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
127: 
128: 	if err := h.service.Claim.UpdateStatus(r.Context(), role, id, req.Status); err != nil {
129: 		if err == domain.ErrClaimNotFound {
130: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Claim not found")
131: 			return
132: 		}
133: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
134: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to resolve claims")
135: 			return
136: 		}
137: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update claim status")
138: 		return
139: 	}
140: 
141: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
142: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/envlog_handler.go
````go
 1: package handler
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"encoding/json"
 5: 	"net/http"
 6: 	"strconv"
 7: 
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
11: )
12: 
13: // listEnvLogs godoc
14: // @Summary      List environment logs
15: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of temperature/humidity logs
16: // @Tags         Environment
17: // @Produce      json
18: // @Param        zone_id  query     string  false  "Filter by zone UUID"
19: // @Param        limit    query     int     false  "Page size"
20: // @Param        offset   query     int     false  "Offset"
21: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.EnvLogListResponse
22: // @Router       /api/v1/env/logs [get]
23: func (h *Handler) listEnvLogs(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
24: 	zoneID := r.URL.Query().Get("zone_id")
25: 	limit := 10
26: 	offset := 0
27: 
28: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
29: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
30: 			limit = val
31: 		}
32: 	}
33: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
34: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
35: 			offset = val
36: 		}
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	logs, total, err := h.service.EnvironmentLog.ListLogs(r.Context(), zoneID, limit, offset)
40: 	if err != nil {
41: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch environment logs")
42: 		return
43: 	}
44: 
45: 	resp := dto.EnvLogListResponse{
46: 		Total: total,
47: 		Logs:  make([]dto.EnvLogResponse, len(logs)),
48: 	}
49: 	for i, l := range logs {
50: 		resp.Logs[i] = dto.ToEnvLogResponse(l)
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
54: }
55: 
56: // recordEnvLogs godoc
57: // @Summary      Batch record environment logs
58: // @Description  Records temperature and humidity for one or more zones
59: // @Tags         Environment
60: // @Accept       json
61: // @Produce      json
62: // @Param        request body []dto.RecordEnvLogRequest true "List of logs"
63: // @Success      204  "No Content"
64: // @Router       /api/v1/env/logs [post]
65: func (h *Handler) recordEnvLogs(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
66: 	var req []dto.RecordEnvLogRequest
67: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
68: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
69: 		return
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	userID, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
73: 	
74: 	domainLogs := make([]domain.EnvironmentLog, len(req))
75: 	for i, r := range req {
76: 		domainLogs[i] = r.ToDomain()
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	if err := h.service.EnvironmentLog.RecordLogs(r.Context(), userID, domainLogs); err != nil {
80: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to record environment logs")
81: 		return
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
85: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/inbound_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"strconv"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // listInbounds godoc
 15: // @Summary      List inbound receivings
 16: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of inbound records
 17: // @Tags         Inbound
 18: // @Produce      json
 19: // @Param        limit   query     int  false  "Page size"
 20: // @Param        offset  query     int  false  "Offset"
 21: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.InboundListResponse
 22: // @Router       /api/v1/inbound [get]
 23: func (h *Handler) listInbounds(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 24: 	limit := 10
 25: 	offset := 0
 26: 
 27: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
 28: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
 29: 			limit = val
 30: 		}
 31: 	}
 32: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
 33: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
 34: 			offset = val
 35: 		}
 36: 	}
 37: 
 38: 	inbounds, total, err := h.service.Inbound.ListInbounds(r.Context(), limit, offset)
 39: 	if err != nil {
 40: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch inbounds")
 41: 		return
 42: 	}
 43: 
 44: 	resp := dto.InboundListResponse{
 45: 		Total:    total,
 46: 		Inbounds: make([]dto.InboundResponse, len(inbounds)),
 47: 	}
 48: 	for i, in := range inbounds {
 49: 		resp.Inbounds[i] = dto.ToInboundResponse(in)
 50: 	}
 51: 
 52: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 53: }
 54: 
 55: // getInbound godoc
 56: // @Summary      Get inbound receiving by ID
 57: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single inbound record including items
 58: // @Tags         Inbound
 59: // @Produce      json
 60: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Inbound UUID"
 61: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.InboundResponse
 62: // @Router       /api/v1/inbound/{id} [get]
 63: func (h *Handler) getInbound(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 64: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 65: 	in, err := h.service.Inbound.GetInbound(r.Context(), id)
 66: 	if err != nil {
 67: 		if err == domain.ErrInboundNotFound {
 68: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Inbound record not found")
 69: 			return
 70: 		}
 71: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch inbound record")
 72: 		return
 73: 	}
 74: 
 75: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToInboundResponse(*in))
 76: }
 77: 
 78: // createInbound godoc
 79: // @Summary      Create inbound receiving
 80: // @Description  Creates a new inbound record (Draft status)
 81: // @Tags         Inbound
 82: // @Accept       json
 83: // @Produce      json
 84: // @Param        request body dto.CreateInboundRequest true "Inbound data"
 85: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.InboundResponse
 86: // @Router       /api/v1/inbound [post]
 87: func (h *Handler) createInbound(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 88: 	var req dto.CreateInboundRequest
 89: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 90: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 91: 		return
 92: 	}
 93: 
 94: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
 95: 	userID, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
 96: 	
 97: 	in := req.ToDomain()
 98: 	in.ReceivedBy = userID
 99: 
100: 	created, err := h.service.Inbound.CreateInbound(r.Context(), role, &in)
101: 	if err != nil {
102: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
103: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to create inbound records")
104: 			return
105: 		}
106: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to create inbound record")
107: 		return
108: 	}
109: 
110: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToInboundResponse(*created))
111: }
112: 
113: // updateInboundStatus godoc
114: // @Summary      Update inbound status
115: // @Description  Changes the status of an inbound record (e.g. Received -> Completed)
116: // @Tags         Inbound
117: // @Accept       json
118: // @Produce      json
119: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Inbound UUID"
120: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateInboundStatusRequest true "New status"
121: // @Success      204  "No Content"
122: // @Router       /api/v1/inbound/{id}/status [patch]
123: func (h *Handler) updateInboundStatus(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
124: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
125: 	var req dto.UpdateInboundStatusRequest
126: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
127: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
128: 		return
129: 	}
130: 
131: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
132: 
133: 	if err := h.service.Inbound.UpdateStatus(r.Context(), role, id, req.Status); err != nil {
134: 		if err == domain.ErrInboundNotFound {
135: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Inbound record not found")
136: 			return
137: 		}
138: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
139: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to update status")
140: 			return
141: 		}
142: 		if err == domain.ErrConflict {
143: 			writeError(w, http.StatusConflict, "Cannot update status of completed record")
144: 			return
145: 		}
146: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update inbound status")
147: 		return
148: 	}
149: 
150: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
151: }
152: 
153: // deleteInbound godoc
154: // @Summary      Delete inbound receiving
155: // @Description  Permanently deletes an inbound record (Draft status only, Admin only)
156: // @Tags         Inbound
157: // @Produce      json
158: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Inbound UUID"
159: // @Success      204  "No Content"
160: // @Router       /api/v1/inbound/{id} [delete]
161: func (h *Handler) deleteInbound(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
162: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
163: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
164: 
165: 	if err := h.service.Inbound.DeleteInbound(r.Context(), role, id); err != nil {
166: 		if err == domain.ErrInboundNotFound {
167: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Inbound record not found")
168: 			return
169: 		}
170: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
171: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to delete inbound records")
172: 			return
173: 		}
174: 		if err == domain.ErrConflict {
175: 			writeError(w, http.StatusConflict, "Cannot delete completed record")
176: 			return
177: 		}
178: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to delete inbound record")
179: 		return
180: 	}
181: 
182: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
183: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/inventory_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"strconv"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // listInventorySessions godoc
 15: // @Summary      List inventory sessions
 16: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of inventory audit sessions
 17: // @Tags         Inventory
 18: // @Produce      json
 19: // @Param        limit   query     int  false  "Page size"
 20: // @Param        offset  query     int  false  "Offset"
 21: // @Success      200  {array}  dto.InventorySessionResponse
 22: // @Router       /api/v1/inventory [get]
 23: func (h *Handler) listInventorySessions(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 24: 	limit := 10
 25: 	offset := 0
 26: 
 27: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
 28: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
 29: 			limit = val
 30: 		}
 31: 	}
 32: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
 33: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
 34: 			offset = val
 35: 		}
 36: 	}
 37: 
 38: 	sessions, _, err := h.service.Inventory.ListSessions(r.Context(), limit, offset)
 39: 	if err != nil {
 40: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch inventory sessions")
 41: 		return
 42: 	}
 43: 
 44: 	resp := make([]dto.InventorySessionResponse, len(sessions))
 45: 	for i, s := range sessions {
 46: 		resp[i] = dto.ToInventorySessionResponse(s)
 47: 	}
 48: 
 49: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 50: }
 51: 
 52: // getInventorySession godoc
 53: // @Summary      Get inventory session by ID
 54: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single audit session including results
 55: // @Tags         Inventory
 56: // @Produce      json
 57: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Session UUID"
 58: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.InventorySessionResponse
 59: // @Router       /api/v1/inventory/{id} [get]
 60: func (h *Handler) getInventorySession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 61: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 62: 	s, err := h.service.Inventory.GetSession(r.Context(), id)
 63: 	if err != nil {
 64: 		if err == domain.ErrInventorySessionNotFound {
 65: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Inventory session not found")
 66: 			return
 67: 		}
 68: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch session")
 69: 		return
 70: 	}
 71: 
 72: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToInventorySessionResponse(*s))
 73: }
 74: 
 75: // startInventorySession godoc
 76: // @Summary      Start inventory session
 77: // @Description  Initiates a new audit session for a specific zone
 78: // @Tags         Inventory
 79: // @Accept       json
 80: // @Produce      json
 81: // @Param        request body dto.StartInventoryRequest true "Zone info"
 82: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.InventorySessionResponse
 83: // @Router       /api/v1/inventory [post]
 84: func (h *Handler) startInventorySession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 85: 	var req dto.StartInventoryRequest
 86: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 87: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 88: 		return
 89: 	}
 90: 
 91: 	userID, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
 92: 	
 93: 	created, err := h.service.Inventory.StartSession(r.Context(), userID, req.ZoneID)
 94: 	if err != nil {
 95: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to start session")
 96: 		return
 97: 	}
 98: 
 99: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToInventorySessionResponse(*created))
100: }
101: 
102: // submitInventoryCount godoc
103: // @Summary      Submit inventory counts
104: // @Description  Records physical quantities for products within an active session
105: // @Tags         Inventory
106: // @Accept       json
107: // @Produce      json
108: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Session UUID"
109: // @Param        request body dto.SubmitCountRequest true "Counts data"
110: // @Success      204  "No Content"
111: // @Router       /api/v1/inventory/{id}/count [post]
112: func (h *Handler) submitInventoryCount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
113: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
114: 	var req dto.SubmitCountRequest
115: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
116: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
117: 		return
118: 	}
119: 
120: 	domainItems := make([]domain.InventoryItem, len(req.Items))
121: 	for i, item := range req.Items {
122: 		domainItems[i] = item.ToDomain()
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	if err := h.service.Inventory.SubmitCount(r.Context(), id, domainItems); err != nil {
126: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to submit counts")
127: 		return
128: 	}
129: 
130: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
131: }
132: 
133: // finishInventorySession godoc
134: // @Summary      Finish inventory session
135: // @Description  Closes an active session, marking it as completed
136: // @Tags         Inventory
137: // @Produce      json
138: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Session UUID"
````
