````go
139: // @Success      204  "No Content"
140: // @Router       /api/v1/inventory/{id}/finish [post]
141: func (h *Handler) finishInventorySession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
142: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
143: 	if err := h.service.Inventory.FinishSession(r.Context(), id); err != nil {
144: 		if err == domain.ErrInventorySessionNotFound {
145: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Inventory session not found")
146: 			return
147: 		}
148: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to finish session")
149: 		return
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
153: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/order_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"fmt"
  6: 	"net/http"
  7: 	"strconv"
  8: 	"time"
  9: 
 10: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 12: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 13: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 14: )
 15: 
 16: // listOrders godoc
 17: // @Summary      List shipping orders
 18: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of orders, sorted by priority and date
 19: // @Tags         Orders
 20: // @Produce      json
 21: // @Param        limit   query     int  false  "Page size"
 22: // @Param        offset  query     int  false  "Offset"
 23: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.OrderListResponse
 24: // @Router       /api/v1/orders [get]
 25: func (h *Handler) listOrders(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 26: 	limit := 10
 27: 	offset := 0
 28: 
 29: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
 30: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
 31: 			limit = val
 32: 		}
 33: 	}
 34: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
 35: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
 36: 			offset = val
 37: 		}
 38: 	}
 39: 
 40: 	orders, total, err := h.service.Order.ListOrders(r.Context(), limit, offset)
 41: 	if err != nil {
 42: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch orders")
 43: 		return
 44: 	}
 45: 
 46: 	resp := dto.OrderListResponse{
 47: 		Total:  total,
 48: 		Orders: make([]dto.OrderResponse, len(orders)),
 49: 	}
 50: 	for i, o := range orders {
 51: 		resp.Orders[i] = dto.ToOrderResponse(o)
 52: 	}
 53: 
 54: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 55: }
 56: 
 57: // getOrder godoc
 58: // @Summary      Get order by ID
 59: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single order including items
 60: // @Tags         Orders
 61: // @Produce      json
 62: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Order UUID"
 63: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.OrderResponse
 64: // @Router       /api/v1/orders/{id} [get]
 65: func (h *Handler) getOrder(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 66: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 67: 	o, err := h.service.Order.GetOrder(r.Context(), id)
 68: 	if err != nil {
 69: 		if err == domain.ErrOrderNotFound {
 70: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Order not found")
 71: 			return
 72: 		}
 73: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch order")
 74: 		return
 75: 	}
 76: 
 77: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToOrderResponse(*o))
 78: }
 79: 
 80: // createOrder godoc
 81: // @Summary      Create shipping order
 82: // @Description  Registers a new order for subsequent assembly and shipment
 83: // @Tags         Orders
 84: // @Accept       json
 85: // @Produce      json
 86: // @Param        request body dto.CreateOrderRequest true "Order data"
 87: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.OrderResponse
 88: // @Router       /api/v1/orders [post]
 89: func (h *Handler) createOrder(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 90: 	var req dto.CreateOrderRequest
 91: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 92: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 93: 		return
 94: 	}
 95: 
 96: 	userID, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
 97: 	
 98: 	o := req.ToDomain()
 99: 	o.CreatedBy = userID
100: 	o.OrderNumber = fmt.Sprintf("ORD-%d", time.Now().Unix()) // Simple generator
101: 
102: 	created, err := h.service.Order.CreateOrder(r.Context(), &o)
103: 	if err != nil {
104: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to create order")
105: 		return
106: 	}
107: 
108: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToOrderResponse(*created))
109: }
110: 
111: // updateOrderStatus godoc
112: // @Summary      Update order status
113: // @Description  Changes the status of an order (e.g. Assembling -> Assembled)
114: // @Tags         Orders
115: // @Accept       json
116: // @Produce      json
117: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Order UUID"
118: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateOrderStatusRequest true "New status"
119: // @Success      204  "No Content"
120: // @Router       /api/v1/orders/{id}/status [patch]
121: func (h *Handler) updateOrderStatus(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
122: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
123: 	var req dto.UpdateOrderStatusRequest
124: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
125: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
126: 		return
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
130: 
131: 	if err := h.service.Order.UpdateStatus(r.Context(), role, id, req.Status); err != nil {
132: 		if err == domain.ErrOrderNotFound {
133: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Order not found")
134: 			return
135: 		}
136: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
137: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to update status")
138: 			return
139: 		}
140: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update order status")
141: 		return
142: 	}
143: 
144: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
145: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/product_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"strconv"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // listProducts godoc
 15: // @Summary      List products
 16: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of products with optional filtering
 17: // @Tags         Products
 18: // @Produce      json
 19: // @Param        q          query     string  false  "Search by name, generic name or SKU"
 20: // @Param        is_jnvlp   query     bool    false  "Filter by JNVLP status"
 21: // @Param        atc_code   query     string  false  "Filter by ATC code"
 22: // @Param        limit      query     int     false  "Page size"
 23: // @Param        offset     query     int     false  "Offset"
 24: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ProductListResponse
 25: // @Router       /api/v1/products [get]
 26: func (h *Handler) listProducts(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 27: 	filter := domain.ProductFilter{
 28: 		Query:    r.URL.Query().Get("q"),
 29: 		ATCCode:  r.URL.Query().Get("atc_code"),
 30: 		Limit:    10,
 31: 		Offset:   0,
 32: 	}
 33: 
 34: 	if jnvlpStr := r.URL.Query().Get("is_jnvlp"); jnvlpStr != "" {
 35: 		val, _ := strconv.ParseBool(jnvlpStr)
 36: 		filter.IsJNVLP = &val
 37: 	}
 38: 
 39: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
 40: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
 41: 			filter.Limit = val
 42: 		}
 43: 	}
 44: 
 45: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
 46: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
 47: 			filter.Offset = val
 48: 		}
 49: 	}
 50: 
 51: 	products, total, err := h.service.Product.ListProducts(r.Context(), filter)
 52: 	if err != nil {
 53: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch products")
 54: 		return
 55: 	}
 56: 
 57: 	resp := dto.ProductListResponse{
 58: 		Total:    total,
 59: 		Products: make([]dto.ProductResponse, len(products)),
 60: 	}
 61: 	for i, p := range products {
 62: 		resp.Products[i] = dto.ToProductResponse(p)
 63: 	}
 64: 
 65: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 66: }
 67: 
 68: // getProduct godoc
 69: // @Summary      Get product by ID
 70: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single product
 71: // @Tags         Products
 72: // @Produce      json
 73: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Product UUID"
 74: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ProductResponse
 75: // @Router       /api/v1/products/{id} [get]
 76: func (h *Handler) getProduct(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 77: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 78: 	p, err := h.service.Product.GetProduct(r.Context(), id)
 79: 	if err != nil {
 80: 		if err == domain.ErrProductNotFound {
 81: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Product not found")
 82: 			return
 83: 		}
 84: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch product")
 85: 		return
 86: 	}
 87: 
 88: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToProductResponse(*p))
 89: }
 90: 
 91: // createProduct godoc
 92: // @Summary      Create product
 93: // @Description  Creates a new product (Admin or Warehouse Manager only)
 94: // @Tags         Products
 95: // @Accept       json
 96: // @Produce      json
 97: // @Param        request body dto.CreateProductRequest true "Product data"
 98: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.ProductResponse
 99: // @Router       /api/v1/products [post]
100: func (h *Handler) createProduct(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
101: 	var req dto.CreateProductRequest
102: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
103: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
104: 		return
105: 	}
106: 
107: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
108: 	p := req.ToDomain()
109: 
110: 	created, err := h.service.Product.CreateProduct(r.Context(), role, &p)
111: 	if err != nil {
112: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
113: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to create products")
114: 			return
115: 		}
116: 		if err == domain.ErrConflict {
117: 			writeError(w, http.StatusConflict, "Product with this SKU already exists")
118: 			return
119: 		}
120: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to create product")
121: 		return
122: 	}
123: 
124: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToProductResponse(*created))
125: }
126: 
127: // patchProduct godoc
128: // @Summary      Partial update product
129: // @Description  Updates specific fields of an existing product (Admin or Warehouse Manager only)
130: // @Tags         Products
131: // @Accept       json
132: // @Produce      json
133: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Product UUID"
134: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateProductRequest true "Partial update data"
135: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ProductResponse
136: // @Router       /api/v1/products/{id} [patch]
137: func (h *Handler) patchProduct(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
138: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
139: 	var req dto.UpdateProductRequest
140: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
141: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
142: 		return
143: 	}
144: 
145: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
146: 	
147: 	p, err := h.service.Product.GetProduct(r.Context(), id)
148: 	if err != nil {
149: 		if err == domain.ErrProductNotFound {
150: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Product not found")
151: 			return
152: 		}
153: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch product")
154: 		return
155: 	}
156: 
157: 	req.ApplyTo(p)
158: 
159: 	updated, err := h.service.Product.UpdateProduct(r.Context(), role, p)
160: 	if err != nil {
161: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
162: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to update products")
163: 			return
164: 		}
165: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update product")
166: 		return
167: 	}
168: 
169: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToProductResponse(*updated))
170: }
171: 
172: // deleteProduct godoc
173: // @Summary      Delete (soft) product
174: // @Description  Marks a product as deleted (Admin only)
175: // @Tags         Products
176: // @Produce      json
177: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Product UUID"
178: // @Success      204  "No Content"
179: // @Router       /api/v1/products/{id} [delete]
180: func (h *Handler) deleteProduct(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
181: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
182: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
183: 
184: 	if err := h.service.Product.DeleteProduct(r.Context(), role, id); err != nil {
185: 		if err == domain.ErrProductNotFound {
186: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Product not found")
187: 			return
188: 		}
189: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
190: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to delete products")
191: 			return
192: 		}
193: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to delete product")
194: 		return
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
198: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/recalled_batch_handler.go
````go
 1: package handler
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"net/http"
 5: 	"strconv"
 6: 
 7: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 9: )
10: 
11: // listRecalled godoc
12: // @Summary      List recalled batches
13: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of blocked pharmaceutical series from the central register
14: // @Tags         Recalled
15: // @Produce      json
16: // @Param        limit   query     int  false  "Page size"
17: // @Param        offset  query     int  false  "Offset"
18: // @Success      200  {array}  dto.RecalledBatchResponse
19: // @Router       /api/v1/recalled [get]
20: func (h *Handler) listRecalled(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
21: 	limit := 10
22: 	offset := 0
23: 
24: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
25: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
26: 			limit = val
27: 		}
28: 	}
29: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
30: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
31: 			offset = val
32: 		}
33: 	}
34: 
35: 	batches, _, err := h.service.RecalledBatch.ListRecalled(r.Context(), limit, offset)
36: 	if err != nil {
37: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch recalled batches")
38: 		return
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	resp := make([]dto.RecalledBatchResponse, len(batches))
42: 	for i, b := range batches {
43: 		resp[i] = dto.ToRecalledBatchResponse(b)
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
47: }
48: 
49: // checkBatch godoc
50: // @Summary      Check series for recall
51: // @Description  Verifies if a specific serial number is blocked for pharmaceutical circulation
52: // @Tags         Recalled
53: // @Produce      json
54: // @Param        serial   path      string  true  "Series Number"
55: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.RecalledCheckResponse
56: // @Router       /api/v1/recalled/check/{serial} [get]
57: func (h *Handler) checkBatch(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
58: 	serial := chi.URLParam(r, "serial")
59: 	isRecalled, details, err := h.service.RecalledBatch.CheckBatch(r.Context(), serial)
60: 	if err != nil {
61: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to check batch")
62: 		return
63: 	}
64: 
65: 	resp := dto.RecalledCheckResponse{
66: 		IsRecalled: isRecalled,
67: 	}
68: 	if details != nil {
69: 		d := dto.ToRecalledBatchResponse(*details)
70: 		resp.Details = &d
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
74: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/reference_handler.go
````go
 1: package handler
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"net/http"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: // listCountries godoc
10: // @Summary      List countries
11: // @Description  Returns a list of all countries in ISO alpha-3 format
12: // @Tags         References
13: // @Produce      json
14: // @Success      200  {array}   dto.CountryResponse
15: // @Router       /api/v1/ref/countries [get]
16: func (h *Handler) listCountries(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
17: 	countries, err := h.service.Reference.GetCountries(r.Context())
18: 	if err != nil {
19: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch countries")
20: 		return
21: 	}
22: 
23: 	resp := make([]dto.CountryResponse, len(countries))
24: 	for i, c := range countries {
25: 		resp[i] = dto.FromCountryDomain(c)
26: 	}
27: 
28: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
29: }
30: 
31: // searchATC godoc
32: // @Summary      Search ATC codes
33: // @Description  Search for ATC (Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical) codes by partial code or name
34: // @Tags         References
35: // @Produce      json
36: // @Param        q    query     string  false  "Search query"
37: // @Success      200  {array}   dto.ATCCodeResponse
38: // @Router       /api/v1/ref/atc [get]
39: func (h *Handler) searchATC(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
40: 	query := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
41: 	codes, err := h.service.Reference.SearchATC(r.Context(), query)
42: 	if err != nil {
43: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to search ATC codes")
44: 		return
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	resp := make([]dto.ATCCodeResponse, len(codes))
48: 	for i, c := range codes {
49: 		resp[i] = dto.FromATCCodeDomain(c)
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
53: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/settings_handler.go
````go
 1: package handler
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"encoding/json"
 5: 	"net/http"
 6: 
 7: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
11: )
12: 
13: // listSettings godoc
14: // @Summary      List system settings
15: // @Description  Returns all global system parameters
16: // @Tags         Settings
17: // @Produce      json
18: // @Success      200  {array}  dto.SystemSettingResponse
19: // @Router       /api/v1/settings [get]
20: func (h *Handler) listSettings(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
21: 	settings, err := h.service.Settings.ListSettings(r.Context())
22: 	if err != nil {
23: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch settings")
24: 		return
25: 	}
26: 
27: 	resp := make([]dto.SystemSettingResponse, len(settings))
28: 	for i, s := range settings {
29: 		resp[i] = dto.SystemSettingResponse{
30: 			Key:   s.Key,
31: 			Value: s.Value,
32: 		}
33: 	}
34: 
35: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
36: }
37: 
38: // updateSetting godoc
39: // @Summary      Update system setting
40: // @Description  Changes a specific global system parameter (Admin only)
41: // @Tags         Settings
42: // @Accept       json
43: // @Produce      json
44: // @Param        key     path      string  true  "Setting key"
45: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateSettingRequest true "New value"
46: // @Success      204  "No Content"
47: // @Router       /api/v1/settings/{key} [patch]
48: func (h *Handler) updateSetting(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
49: 	key := chi.URLParam(r, "key")
50: 	var req dto.UpdateSettingRequest
51: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
52: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
53: 		return
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
57: 
58: 	if err := h.service.Settings.UpdateSetting(r.Context(), role, key, req.Value); err != nil {
59: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
60: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "Only Admin can update settings")
61: 			return
62: 		}
63: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update setting")
64: 		return
65: 	}
66: 
67: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
68: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/supplier_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"strconv"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: // listSuppliers godoc
 15: // @Summary      List suppliers
 16: // @Description  Returns a paginated list of suppliers
 17: // @Tags         Suppliers
 18: // @Produce      json
 19: // @Param        limit      query     int     false  "Page size"
 20: // @Param        offset     query     int     false  "Offset"
 21: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.SupplierListResponse
 22: // @Router       /api/v1/suppliers [get]
 23: func (h *Handler) listSuppliers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 24: 	limit := 10
 25: 	offset := 0
 26: 
 27: 	if limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit"); limitStr != "" {
 28: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); err == nil {
 29: 			limit = val
 30: 		}
 31: 	}
 32: 	if offsetStr := r.URL.Query().Get("offset"); offsetStr != "" {
 33: 		if val, err := strconv.Atoi(offsetStr); err == nil {
 34: 			offset = val
 35: 		}
 36: 	}
 37: 
 38: 	suppliers, total, err := h.service.Supplier.ListSuppliers(r.Context(), limit, offset)
 39: 	if err != nil {
 40: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch suppliers")
 41: 		return
 42: 	}
 43: 
 44: 	resp := dto.SupplierListResponse{
 45: 		Total:    total,
 46: 		Suppliers: make([]dto.SupplierResponse, len(suppliers)),
 47: 	}
 48: 	for i, s := range suppliers {
 49: 		resp.Suppliers[i] = dto.ToSupplierResponse(s)
 50: 	}
 51: 
 52: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 53: }
 54: 
 55: // getSupplier godoc
 56: // @Summary      Get supplier by ID
 57: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single supplier
 58: // @Tags         Suppliers
 59: // @Produce      json
 60: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Supplier UUID"
 61: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.SupplierResponse
 62: // @Router       /api/v1/suppliers/{id} [get]
 63: func (h *Handler) getSupplier(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 64: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 65: 	s, err := h.service.Supplier.GetSupplier(r.Context(), id)
 66: 	if err != nil {
 67: 		if err == domain.ErrSupplierNotFound {
 68: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Supplier not found")
 69: 			return
 70: 		}
 71: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch supplier")
 72: 		return
 73: 	}
 74: 
 75: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToSupplierResponse(*s))
 76: }
 77: 
 78: // createSupplier godoc
 79: // @Summary      Create supplier
 80: // @Description  Creates a new supplier (Admin or Warehouse Manager only)
 81: // @Tags         Suppliers
 82: // @Accept       json
 83: // @Produce      json
 84: // @Param        request body dto.CreateSupplierRequest true "Supplier data"
 85: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.SupplierResponse
 86: // @Router       /api/v1/suppliers [post]
 87: func (h *Handler) createSupplier(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 88: 	var req dto.CreateSupplierRequest
 89: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 90: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 91: 		return
 92: 	}
 93: 
 94: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
 95: 	s := req.ToDomain()
 96: 
 97: 	created, err := h.service.Supplier.CreateSupplier(r.Context(), role, &s)
 98: 	if err != nil {
 99: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
100: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to create suppliers")
101: 			return
102: 		}
103: 		if err == domain.ErrConflict {
104: 			writeError(w, http.StatusConflict, "Supplier with this INN already exists")
105: 			return
106: 		}
107: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to create supplier")
108: 		return
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToSupplierResponse(*created))
112: }
113: 
114: // patchSupplier godoc
115: // @Summary      Partial update supplier
116: // @Description  Updates specific fields of an existing supplier (Admin or Warehouse Manager only)
117: // @Tags         Suppliers
118: // @Accept       json
119: // @Produce      json
120: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Supplier UUID"
121: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateSupplierRequest true "Partial update data"
122: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.SupplierResponse
123: // @Router       /api/v1/suppliers/{id} [patch]
124: func (h *Handler) patchSupplier(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
125: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
126: 	var req dto.UpdateSupplierRequest
127: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
128: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
129: 		return
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
133: 	
134: 	s, err := h.service.Supplier.GetSupplier(r.Context(), id)
135: 	if err != nil {
136: 		if err == domain.ErrSupplierNotFound {
137: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Supplier not found")
138: 			return
139: 		}
140: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch supplier")
141: 		return
142: 	}
143: 
144: 	req.ApplyTo(s)
145: 
146: 	updated, err := h.service.Supplier.UpdateSupplier(r.Context(), role, s)
147: 	if err != nil {
148: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
149: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to update suppliers")
150: 			return
151: 		}
152: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update supplier")
153: 		return
154: 	}
155: 
156: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToSupplierResponse(*updated))
157: }
158: 
159: // deleteSupplier godoc
160: // @Summary      Delete supplier
161: // @Description  Permanently deletes a supplier (Admin only)
162: // @Tags         Suppliers
163: // @Produce      json
164: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Supplier UUID"
165: // @Success      204  "No Content"
166: // @Router       /api/v1/suppliers/{id} [delete]
167: func (h *Handler) deleteSupplier(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
168: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
169: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
170: 
171: 	if err := h.service.Supplier.DeleteSupplier(r.Context(), role, id); err != nil {
172: 		if err == domain.ErrSupplierNotFound {
173: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Supplier not found")
174: 			return
175: 		}
176: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
177: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to delete suppliers")
178: 			return
179: 		}
180: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to delete supplier")
181: 		return
182: 	}
183: 
184: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
185: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/user_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"errors"
  6: 	"net/http"
  7: 	"strconv"
  8: 
  9: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 12: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 13: )
 14: 
 15: func (h *Handler) getMe(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 16: 	userID, ok := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
 17: 	if !ok {
 18: 		writeError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "unauthorized")
 19: 		return
 20: 	}
 21: 
 22: 	profile, err := h.userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(r.Context(), userID)
 23: 	if err != nil {
 24: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrUserNotFound) {
 25: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "user not found")
 26: 			return
 27: 		}
 28: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal server error")
 29: 		return
 30: 	}
 31: 
 32: 	resp := mapToUserProfileResponse(profile)
 33: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 34: }
 35: 
 36: func (h *Handler) listUsers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 37: 	q := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
 38: 	role := r.URL.Query().Get("role")
 39: 	pageStr := r.URL.Query().Get("page")
 40: 	limitStr := r.URL.Query().Get("limit")
 41: 
 42: 	page, _ := strconv.Atoi(pageStr)
 43: 	limit, _ := strconv.Atoi(limitStr)
 44: 
 45: 	filter := domain.UserListFilter{
 46: 		Query: q,
 47: 		Role:  domain.UserRole(role),
 48: 		Page:  page,
 49: 		Limit: limit,
 50: 	}
 51: 
 52: 	profiles, total, err := h.userRepo.List(r.Context(), filter)
 53: 	if err != nil {
 54: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal server error")
 55: 		return
 56: 	}
 57: 
 58: 	w.Header().Set("X-Total-Count", strconv.Itoa(total))
 59: 
 60: 	var resp []dto.UserProfileResponse
 61: 	for _, p := range profiles {
 62: 		resp = append(resp, mapToUserProfileResponse(p))
 63: 	}
 64: 	if resp == nil {
 65: 		resp = make([]dto.UserProfileResponse, 0)
 66: 	}
 67: 
 68: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 69: }
 70: 
 71: func (h *Handler) getUserByID(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 72: 	idStr := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 73: 	id, err := strconv.Atoi(idStr)
 74: 	if err != nil {
 75: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid user id")
 76: 		return
 77: 	}
 78: 
 79: 	profile, err := h.userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(r.Context(), id)
 80: 	if err != nil {
 81: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrUserNotFound) {
 82: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "user not found")
 83: 			return
 84: 		}
 85: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal server error")
 86: 		return
 87: 	}
 88: 
 89: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, mapToUserProfileResponse(profile))
 90: }
 91: 
 92: func (h *Handler) patchUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 93: 	idStr := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 94: 	id, err := strconv.Atoi(idStr)
 95: 	if err != nil {
 96: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid user id")
 97: 		return
 98: 	}
 99: 
100: 	var req dto.PatchUserRequest
101: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
102: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid request body")
103: 		return
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	// Make sure the user exists first
107: 	_, err = h.userRepo.FindByID(r.Context(), id)
108: 	if err != nil {
109: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrUserNotFound) {
110: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "user not found")
111: 			return
112: 		}
113: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal error")
114: 		return
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	if req.Role != nil {
118: 		if err := h.userRepo.UpdateRole(r.Context(), id, domain.UserRole(*req.Role)); err != nil {
119: 			writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "failed to update role")
120: 			return
121: 		}
122: 	}
123: 
124: 	if req.NsPvAccess != nil {
125: 		if err := h.userRepo.SetNsPvAccess(r.Context(), id, *req.NsPvAccess); err != nil {
126: 			writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "failed to update ns pv access")
127: 			return
128: 		}
129: 	}
130: 
131: 	if req.SpecialZoneAccess != nil {
132: 		input := domain.UpdateEmployeeProfileInput{
133: 			SpecialZoneAccess: req.SpecialZoneAccess,
134: 		}
135: 		if _, err := h.employeeProfileRepo.Update(r.Context(), id, input); err != nil {
136: 			writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "failed to update special zone access")
137: 			return
138: 		}
139: 	}
140: 
141: 	// Return updated profile
142: 	profile, err := h.userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(r.Context(), id)
143: 	if err != nil {
144: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal server error")
145: 		return
146: 	}
147: 
148: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, mapToUserProfileResponse(profile))
149: }
150: 
151: func mapToUserProfileResponse(p *domain.UserProfile) dto.UserProfileResponse {
152: 	return dto.UserProfileResponse{
153: 		ID:           p.ID,
154: 		Email:        p.Email,
155: 		Role:         string(p.Role),
156: 		NsPvAccess:   p.NsPvAccess,
157: 		UkepBound:    p.UkepBound,
158: 		IsBlocked:    p.IsBlocked,
159: 		EmployeeCode: p.EmployeeCode,
160: 		FullName:     p.FullName,
161: 		Position:     p.Position,
162: 		Department:   p.Department,
163: 	}
164: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/zone_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 
  7: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 11: )
 12: 
 13: // listZones godoc
 14: // @Summary      List warehouse zones
 15: // @Description  Returns all warehouse zones
 16: // @Tags         Zones
 17: // @Produce      json
 18: // @Success      200  {array}  dto.ZoneResponse
 19: // @Router       /api/v1/zones [get]
 20: func (h *Handler) listZones(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 21: 	zones, err := h.service.Zone.ListZones(r.Context())
 22: 	if err != nil {
 23: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch zones")
 24: 		return
 25: 	}
 26: 
 27: 	resp := make([]dto.ZoneResponse, len(zones))
 28: 	for i, z := range zones {
 29: 		resp[i] = dto.ToZoneResponse(z)
 30: 	}
 31: 
 32: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
 33: }
 34: 
 35: // getZone godoc
 36: // @Summary      Get warehouse zone by ID
 37: // @Description  Returns detailed info about a single zone
 38: // @Tags         Zones
 39: // @Produce      json
 40: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Zone UUID"
 41: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ZoneResponse
 42: // @Router       /api/v1/zones/{id} [get]
 43: func (h *Handler) getZone(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 44: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
 45: 	z, err := h.service.Zone.GetZone(r.Context(), id)
 46: 	if err != nil {
 47: 		if err == domain.ErrZoneNotFound {
 48: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Zone not found")
 49: 			return
 50: 		}
 51: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch zone")
 52: 		return
 53: 	}
 54: 
 55: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToZoneResponse(*z))
 56: }
 57: 
 58: // createZone godoc
 59: // @Summary      Create warehouse zone
 60: // @Description  Creates a new zone (Admin or Warehouse Manager only)
 61: // @Tags         Zones
 62: // @Accept       json
 63: // @Produce      json
 64: // @Param        request body dto.CreateZoneRequest true "Zone data"
 65: // @Success      201  {object}  dto.ZoneResponse
 66: // @Router       /api/v1/zones [post]
 67: func (h *Handler) createZone(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 68: 	var req dto.CreateZoneRequest
 69: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
 70: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
 71: 		return
 72: 	}
 73: 
 74: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
 75: 	z := req.ToDomain()
 76: 
 77: 	created, err := h.service.Zone.CreateZone(r.Context(), role, &z)
 78: 	if err != nil {
 79: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
 80: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to create zones")
 81: 			return
 82: 		}
 83: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to create zone")
 84: 		return
 85: 	}
 86: 
 87: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, dto.ToZoneResponse(*created))
 88: }
 89: 
 90: // patchZone godoc
 91: // @Summary      Partial update warehouse zone
 92: // @Description  Updates specific fields of an existing zone (Admin or Warehouse Manager only)
 93: // @Tags         Zones
 94: // @Accept       json
 95: // @Produce      json
 96: // @Param        id      path      string  true  "Zone UUID"
 97: // @Param        request body dto.UpdateZoneRequest true "Partial update data"
 98: // @Success      200  {object}  dto.ZoneResponse
 99: // @Router       /api/v1/zones/{id} [patch]
100: func (h *Handler) patchZone(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
101: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
102: 	var req dto.UpdateZoneRequest
103: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
104: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "Invalid request body")
105: 		return
106: 	}
107: 
108: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
109: 	
110: 	z, err := h.service.Zone.GetZone(r.Context(), id)
111: 	if err != nil {
112: 		if err == domain.ErrZoneNotFound {
113: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Zone not found")
114: 			return
115: 		}
116: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to fetch zone")
117: 		return
118: 	}
119: 
120: 	req.ApplyTo(z)
121: 
122: 	updated, err := h.service.Zone.UpdateZone(r.Context(), role, z)
123: 	if err != nil {
124: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
125: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to update zones")
126: 			return
127: 		}
128: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to update zone")
129: 		return
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, dto.ToZoneResponse(*updated))
133: }
134: 
135: // deleteZone godoc
136: // @Summary      Delete warehouse zone
137: // @Description  Permanently deletes a zone (Admin only)
138: // @Tags         Zones
139: // @Produce      json
140: // @Param        id   path      string  true  "Zone UUID"
141: // @Success      204  "No Content"
142: // @Router       /api/v1/zones/{id} [delete]
143: func (h *Handler) deleteZone(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
144: 	id := chi.URLParam(r, "id")
145: 	role, _ := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxRole).(domain.UserRole)
146: 
147: 	if err := h.service.Zone.DeleteZone(r.Context(), role, id); err != nil {
148: 		if err == domain.ErrZoneNotFound {
149: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "Zone not found")
150: 			return
151: 		}
152: 		if err == domain.ErrInsufficientPerms {
153: 			writeError(w, http.StatusForbidden, "No permission to delete zones")
154: 			return
155: 		}
156: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "Failed to delete zone")
157: 		return
158: 	}
159: 
160: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
161: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/dao/batch_dao.go
````go
 1: package dao
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type BatchDAO struct {
10: 	ID               string             `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
11: 	ProductID        string             `gorm:"column:product_id;index"`
12: 	ZoneID           *string            `gorm:"column:zone_id;index"`
13: 	SerialNumber     string             `gorm:"column:serial_number"`
14: 	ManufactureDate  time.Time          `gorm:"column:manufacture_date"`
15: 	ExpiryDate       time.Time          `gorm:"column:expiry_date"`
16: 	Quantity         int                `gorm:"column:quantity"`
17: 	Status           domain.BatchStatus `gorm:"column:status"`
18: 	UpdatedAt        time.Time          `gorm:"column:updated_at"`
19: }
20: 
21: func (BatchDAO) TableName() string {
22: 	return "batches"
23: }
24: 
25: func (b BatchDAO) ToDomain() domain.Batch {
26: 	return domain.Batch{
27: 		ID:               b.ID,
28: 		ProductID:        b.ProductID,
29: 		ZoneID:           b.ZoneID,
30: 		SerialNumber:     b.SerialNumber,
31: 		ManufactureDate:  b.ManufactureDate,
32: 		ExpiryDate:       b.ExpiryDate,
33: 		Quantity:         b.Quantity,
34: 		Status:           b.Status,
35: 		UpdatedAt:        b.UpdatedAt,
36: 	}
37: }
38: 
39: func FromBatchDomain(b domain.Batch) BatchDAO {
40: 	return BatchDAO{
41: 		ID:               b.ID,
42: 		ProductID:        b.ProductID,
43: 		ZoneID:           b.ZoneID,
44: 		SerialNumber:     b.SerialNumber,
45: 		ManufactureDate:  b.ManufactureDate,
46: 		ExpiryDate:       b.ExpiryDate,
47: 		Quantity:         b.Quantity,
48: 		Status:           b.Status,
49: 		UpdatedAt:        b.UpdatedAt,
50: 	}
51: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/dao/inbound_dao.go
````go
  1: package dao
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"time"
  5: 
  6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  7: )
  8: 
  9: type InboundReceivingDAO struct {
 10: 	ID            string               `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
 11: 	InvoiceNumber string               `gorm:"column:invoice_number"`
 12: 	InvoiceDate   time.Time            `gorm:"column:invoice_date"`
 13: 	SupplierID    string               `gorm:"column:supplier_id"`
 14: 	Status        domain.InboundStatus `gorm:"column:status"`
 15: 	TotalAmount   float64              `gorm:"column:total_amount"`
 16: 	VATAmount     float64              `gorm:"column:vat_amount"`
 17: 	Notes         string               `gorm:"column:notes"`
 18: 	ReceivedBy    int                  `gorm:"column:received_by"`
 19: 	CreatedAt     time.Time            `gorm:"column:created_at"`
 20: 	UpdatedAt     time.Time            `gorm:"column:updated_at"`
 21: 	Items         []InboundItemDAO     `gorm:"foreignKey:InboundID"`
 22: }
 23: 
 24: func (InboundReceivingDAO) TableName() string {
 25: 	return "inbound_receivings"
 26: }
 27: 
 28: func (i InboundReceivingDAO) ToDomain() domain.InboundReceiving {
 29: 	items := make([]domain.InboundItem, len(i.Items))
 30: 	for idx, item := range i.Items {
 31: 		items[idx] = item.ToDomain()
 32: 	}
 33: 
 34: 	return domain.InboundReceiving{
 35: 		ID:            i.ID,
 36: 		InvoiceNumber: i.InvoiceNumber,
 37: 		InvoiceDate:   i.InvoiceDate,
 38: 		SupplierID:    i.SupplierID,
 39: 		Status:        i.Status,
 40: 		TotalAmount:   i.TotalAmount,
 41: 		VATAmount:     i.VATAmount,
 42: 		Notes:         i.Notes,
 43: 		ReceivedBy:    i.ReceivedBy,
 44: 		Items:         items,
 45: 		CreatedAt:     i.CreatedAt,
 46: 		UpdatedAt:     i.UpdatedAt,
 47: 	}
 48: }
 49: 
 50: type InboundItemDAO struct {
 51: 	ID                string    `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
 52: 	InboundID         string    `gorm:"column:inbound_id;index"`
 53: 	ProductID         string    `gorm:"column:product_id"`
 54: 	BatchNumber       string    `gorm:"column:batch_number"`
 55: 	ExpirationDate    time.Time `gorm:"column:expiration_date"`
 56: 	Quantity          int       `gorm:"column:quantity"`
 57: 	PriceNetto        float64   `gorm:"column:price_netto"`
 58: 	VATRate           float64   `gorm:"column:vat_rate"`
 59: 	PriceBrutto       float64   `gorm:"column:price_brutto"`
 60: 	CertificateNumber string    `gorm:"column:cert_number"`
 61: 	ZoneID            string    `gorm:"column:zone_id"`
 62: 	CreatedAt         time.Time `gorm:"column:created_at"`
 63: 	UpdatedAt         time.Time `gorm:"column:updated_at"`
 64: }
 65: 
 66: func (InboundItemDAO) TableName() string {
 67: 	return "inbound_items"
 68: }
 69: 
 70: func (i InboundItemDAO) ToDomain() domain.InboundItem {
 71: 	return domain.InboundItem{
 72: 		ID:                i.ID,
 73: 		InboundID:         i.InboundID,
 74: 		ProductID:         i.ProductID,
 75: 		BatchNumber:       i.BatchNumber,
 76: 		ExpirationDate:    i.ExpirationDate,
 77: 		Quantity:          i.Quantity,
 78: 		PriceNetto:        i.PriceNetto,
 79: 		VATRate:           i.VATRate,
 80: 		PriceBrutto:       i.PriceBrutto,
 81: 		CertificateNumber: i.CertificateNumber,
 82: 		ZoneID:            i.ZoneID,
 83: 	}
 84: }
 85: 
 86: func FromInboundDomain(i domain.InboundReceiving) InboundReceivingDAO {
 87: 	items := make([]InboundItemDAO, len(i.Items))
 88: 	for idx, item := range i.Items {
 89: 		items[idx] = FromInboundItemDomain(item)
 90: 	}
 91: 
 92: 	return InboundReceivingDAO{
 93: 		ID:            i.ID,
 94: 		InvoiceNumber: i.InvoiceNumber,
 95: 		InvoiceDate:   i.InvoiceDate,
 96: 		SupplierID:    i.SupplierID,
 97: 		Status:        i.Status,
 98: 		TotalAmount:   i.TotalAmount,
 99: 		VATAmount:     i.VATAmount,
100: 		Notes:         i.Notes,
101: 		ReceivedBy:    i.ReceivedBy,
102: 		Items:         items,
103: 		CreatedAt:     i.CreatedAt,
104: 		UpdatedAt:     i.UpdatedAt,
105: 	}
106: }
107: 
108: func FromInboundItemDomain(i domain.InboundItem) InboundItemDAO {
109: 	return InboundItemDAO{
110: 		ID:                i.ID,
111: 		InboundID:         i.InboundID,
112: 		ProductID:         i.ProductID,
113: 		BatchNumber:       i.BatchNumber,
114: 		ExpirationDate:    i.ExpirationDate,
115: 		Quantity:          i.Quantity,
116: 		PriceNetto:        i.PriceNetto,
117: 		VATRate:           i.VATRate,
118: 		PriceBrutto:       i.PriceBrutto,
119: 		CertificateNumber: i.CertificateNumber,
120: 		ZoneID:            i.ZoneID,
121: 	}
122: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/dao/inventory_dao.go
````go
  1: package dao
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"time"
  5: 
  6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  7: )
  8: 
  9: type InventorySessionDAO struct {
 10: 	ID          string                 `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
 11: 	ZoneID      *string                `gorm:"column:zone_id;index"`
 12: 	Status      domain.InventoryStatus `gorm:"column:status"`
 13: 	StartedBy   int                    `gorm:"column:started_by"`
 14: 	StartedAt   time.Time              `gorm:"column:started_at"`
 15: 	CompletedAt *time.Time             `gorm:"column:completed_at"`
 16: 	Items       []InventoryItemDAO     `gorm:"foreignKey:SessionID"`
 17: }
 18: 
 19: func (InventorySessionDAO) TableName() string {
 20: 	return "inventory_sessions"
 21: }
 22: 
 23: func (s InventorySessionDAO) ToDomain() domain.InventorySession {
 24: 	items := make([]domain.InventoryItem, len(s.Items))
 25: 	for i, item := range s.Items {
 26: 		items[i] = item.ToDomain()
 27: 	}
 28: 
 29: 	var zoneID string
 30: 	if s.ZoneID != nil {
 31: 		zoneID = *s.ZoneID
 32: 	}
 33: 
 34: 	return domain.InventorySession{
 35: 		ID:          s.ID,
 36: 		ZoneID:      zoneID,
 37: 		Status:      s.Status,
 38: 		StartedBy:   s.StartedBy,
 39: 		StartedAt:   s.StartedAt,
 40: 		CompletedAt: s.CompletedAt,
 41: 		Items:       items,
 42: 	}
 43: }
 44: 
 45: type InventoryItemDAO struct {
 46: 	ID               string    `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
 47: 	SessionID        string    `gorm:"column:session_id;index"`
 48: 	ProductID        string    `gorm:"column:product_id"`
 49: 	BatchNumber      string    `gorm:"column:batch_number"`
 50: 	SystemQuantity   int       `gorm:"column:system_qty"`
 51: 	PhysicalQuantity int       `gorm:"column:physical_qty"`
 52: 	DiscrepancyReason string    `gorm:"column:reason"`
 53: 	CreatedAt        time.Time `gorm:"column:created_at"`
 54: }
 55: 
 56: func (InventoryItemDAO) TableName() string {
 57: 	return "inventory_items"
 58: }
 59: 
 60: func (i InventoryItemDAO) ToDomain() domain.InventoryItem {
 61: 	return domain.InventoryItem{
 62: 		ID:               i.ID,
 63: 		SessionID:        i.SessionID,
 64: 		ProductID:        i.ProductID,
 65: 		BatchNumber:      i.BatchNumber,
 66: 		SystemQuantity:   i.SystemQuantity,
 67: 		PhysicalQuantity: i.PhysicalQuantity,
 68: 		DiscrepancyReason: i.DiscrepancyReason,
 69: 	}
 70: }
 71: 
 72: func FromInventorySessionDomain(s domain.InventorySession) InventorySessionDAO {
 73: 	items := make([]InventoryItemDAO, len(s.Items))
 74: 	for i, item := range s.Items {
 75: 		items[i] = FromInventoryItemDomain(item)
 76: 	}
 77: 
 78: 	var zoneID *string
 79: 	if s.ZoneID != "" {
 80: 		zoneID = &s.ZoneID
 81: 	}
 82: 
 83: 	return InventorySessionDAO{
 84: 		ID:          s.ID,
 85: 		ZoneID:      zoneID,
 86: 		Status:      s.Status,
 87: 		StartedBy:   s.StartedBy,
 88: 		StartedAt:   s.StartedAt,
 89: 		CompletedAt: s.CompletedAt,
 90: 		Items:       items,
 91: 	}
 92: }
 93: 
 94: func FromInventoryItemDomain(i domain.InventoryItem) InventoryItemDAO {
 95: 	return InventoryItemDAO{
 96: 		ID:               i.ID,
 97: 		SessionID:        i.SessionID,
 98: 		ProductID:        i.ProductID,
 99: 		BatchNumber:      i.BatchNumber,
100: 		SystemQuantity:   i.SystemQuantity,
101: 		PhysicalQuantity: i.PhysicalQuantity,
102: 		DiscrepancyReason: i.DiscrepancyReason,
103: 	}
104: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/dao/order_dao.go
````go
 1: package dao
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type OrderDAO struct {
10: 	ID           string             `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
11: 	OrderNumber  string             `gorm:"column:order_number;uniqueIndex"`
12: 	CustomerName string             `gorm:"column:customer_name"`
13: 	Status       domain.OrderStatus `gorm:"column:status"`
14: 	Priority     int                `gorm:"column:priority"`
15: 	CreatedBy    int                `gorm:"column:created_by"`
16: 	CreatedAt    time.Time          `gorm:"column:created_at"`
17: 	UpdatedAt    time.Time          `gorm:"column:updated_at"`
18: 	Items        []OrderItemDAO     `gorm:"foreignKey:OrderID"`
19: }
20: 
21: func (OrderDAO) TableName() string {
22: 	return "orders"
23: }
24: 
25: func (o OrderDAO) ToDomain() domain.Order {
26: 	items := make([]domain.OrderItem, len(o.Items))
27: 	for i, item := range o.Items {
28: 		items[i] = item.ToDomain()
29: 	}
30: 
31: 	return domain.Order{
32: 		ID:           o.ID,
33: 		OrderNumber:  o.OrderNumber,
34: 		CustomerName: o.CustomerName,
35: 		Status:       o.Status,
36: 		Priority:     o.Priority,
37: 		CreatedBy:    o.CreatedBy,
38: 		Items:        items,
39: 		CreatedAt:    o.CreatedAt,
40: 		UpdatedAt:    o.UpdatedAt,
41: 	}
42: }
43: 
44: type OrderItemDAO struct {
45: 	ID        string    `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
46: 	OrderID   string    `gorm:"column:order_id;index"`
47: 	ProductID string    `gorm:"column:product_id"`
48: 	Quantity  int       `gorm:"column:quantity"`
49: 	PickedQty int       `gorm:"column:picked_qty"`
50: 	CreatedAt time.Time `gorm:"column:created_at"`
51: 	UpdatedAt time.Time `gorm:"column:updated_at"`
52: }
53: 
54: func (OrderItemDAO) TableName() string {
55: 	return "order_items"
56: }
57: 
58: func (i OrderItemDAO) ToDomain() domain.OrderItem {
59: 	return domain.OrderItem{
60: 		ID:        i.ID,
61: 		OrderID:   i.OrderID,
62: 		ProductID: i.ProductID,
63: 		Quantity:  i.Quantity,
64: 		PickedQty: i.PickedQty,
65: 	}
66: }
67: 
68: func FromOrderDomain(o domain.Order) OrderDAO {
69: 	items := make([]OrderItemDAO, len(o.Items))
70: 	for i, item := range o.Items {
71: 		items[i] = FromOrderItemDomain(item)
72: 	}
73: 
74: 	return OrderDAO{
75: 		ID:           o.ID,
76: 		OrderNumber:  o.OrderNumber,
77: 		CustomerName: o.CustomerName,
78: 		Status:       o.Status,
79: 		Priority:     o.Priority,
80: 		CreatedBy:    o.CreatedBy,
81: 		Items:        items,
82: 		CreatedAt:    o.CreatedAt,
83: 		UpdatedAt:    o.UpdatedAt,
84: 	}
85: }
86: 
87: func FromOrderItemDomain(i domain.OrderItem) OrderItemDAO {
88: 	return OrderItemDAO{
89: 		ID:        i.ID,
90: 		OrderID:   i.OrderID,
91: 		ProductID: i.ProductID,
92: 		Quantity:  i.Quantity,
93: 		PickedQty: i.PickedQty,
94: 	}
95: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/dao/product_dao.go
````go
 1: package dao
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
 8: )
 9: 
10: type ProductDAO struct {
11: 	ID                string         `gorm:"column:id;primaryKey"`
12: 	SKU               string         `gorm:"column:sku;uniqueIndex"`
13: 	Name              string         `gorm:"column:name"`
14: 	GenericName       string         `gorm:"column:generic_name"`
15: 	ATCCode           string         `gorm:"column:atc_code"`
16: 	DosageForm        string         `gorm:"column:dosage_form"`
17: 	Strength          string         `gorm:"column:strength"`
18: 	PackageSize       int            `gorm:"column:package_size"`
19: 	IsJNVLP           bool           `gorm:"column:is_jnvlp"`
20: 	ManufacturerID    *string        `gorm:"column:manufacturer_id"`
21: 	StorageConditions string         `gorm:"column:storage_conditions"`
22: 	PhotoURL          string         `gorm:"column:photo_url"`
23: 	CreatedAt         time.Time      `gorm:"column:created_at"`
24: 	UpdatedAt         time.Time      `gorm:"column:updated_at"`
25: 	DeletedAt         gorm.DeletedAt `gorm:"column:deleted_at;index"`
26: }
27: 
28: func (ProductDAO) TableName() string {
29: 	return "products"
30: }
31: 
32: func (p ProductDAO) ToDomain() domain.Product {
33: 	var deletedAt *time.Time
34: 	if p.DeletedAt.Valid {
35: 		deletedAt = &p.DeletedAt.Time
36: 	}
37: 
38: 	return domain.Product{
39: 		ID:                p.ID,
40: 		SKU:               p.SKU,
41: 		Name:              p.Name,
42: 		GenericName:       p.GenericName,
43: 		ATCCode:           p.ATCCode,
44: 		DosageForm:        p.DosageForm,
45: 		Strength:          p.Strength,
46: 		PackageSize:       p.PackageSize,
47: 		IsJNVLP:           p.IsJNVLP,
48: 		ManufacturerID:    p.ManufacturerID,
49: 		StorageConditions: p.StorageConditions,
50: 		PhotoURL:          p.PhotoURL,
51: 		CreatedAt:         p.CreatedAt,
52: 		UpdatedAt:         p.UpdatedAt,
53: 		DeletedAt:         deletedAt,
54: 	}
55: }
56: 
57: func FromProductDomain(p domain.Product) ProductDAO {
58: 	dao := ProductDAO{
59: 		ID:                p.ID,
60: 		SKU:               p.SKU,
61: 		Name:              p.Name,
62: 		GenericName:       p.GenericName,
63: 		ATCCode:           p.ATCCode,
64: 		DosageForm:        p.DosageForm,
65: 		Strength:          p.Strength,
66: 		PackageSize:       p.PackageSize,
67: 		IsJNVLP:           p.IsJNVLP,
68: 		ManufacturerID:    p.ManufacturerID,
69: 		StorageConditions: p.StorageConditions,
70: 		PhotoURL:          p.PhotoURL,
71: 		CreatedAt:         p.CreatedAt,
72: 		UpdatedAt:         p.UpdatedAt,
73: 	}
74: 	if p.DeletedAt != nil {
75: 		dao.DeletedAt = gorm.DeletedAt{Time: *p.DeletedAt, Valid: true}
76: 	}
77: 	return dao
78: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/dao/session_dao.go
````go
 1: package dao
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
 7: 	"gorm.io/datatypes"
 8: )
 9: 
10: // SessionDAO — DAO-слепок таблицы refresh_tokens для GORM.
11: type SessionDAO struct {
12: 	ID        uuid.UUID      `gorm:"type:uuid;primary_key;default:gen_random_uuid()"`
13: 	UserID    int            `gorm:"not null"`
14: 	TokenHash string         `gorm:"uniqueIndex;not null"`
15: 	ExpiresAt time.Time      `gorm:"not null"`
16: 	UserAgent string         `gorm:"type:text"`
17: 	IPAddress string         `gorm:"type:inet"`
18: 	Metadata  datatypes.JSON `gorm:"type:jsonb;default:'{}'"`
19: 	CreatedAt time.Time      `gorm:"autoCreateTime"`
20: 	RevokedAt *time.Time
21: }
22: 
23: func (SessionDAO) TableName() string { return "refresh_tokens" }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/batch.go
````go
 1: package repository
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository/dao"
 8: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
 9: )
10: 
11: type batchRepository struct {
12: 	db *gorm.DB
13: }
14: 
15: func NewBatchRepository(db *gorm.DB) domain.BatchRepository {
16: 	return &batchRepository{db: db}
17: }
18: 
19: func (r *batchRepository) List(ctx context.Context, filter domain.BatchFilter) ([]domain.Batch, int, error) {
20: 	var daos []dao.BatchDAO
21: 	var total int64
22: 
23: 	model := r.db.WithContext(ctx).Model(&dao.BatchDAO{})
24: 	
25: 	if filter.ProductID != "" {
26: 		model = model.Where("product_id = ?", filter.ProductID)
27: 	}
28: 	if filter.ZoneID != "" {
29: 		model = model.Where("zone_id = ?", filter.ZoneID)
30: 	}
31: 	if filter.Status != "" {
32: 		model = model.Where("status = ?", filter.Status)
33: 	}
34: 
35: 	if err := model.Count(&total).Error; err != nil {
36: 		return nil, 0, err
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	if filter.Limit > 0 {
40: 		model = model.Limit(filter.Limit)
41: 	}
42: 	if filter.Offset > 0 {
43: 		model = model.Offset(filter.Offset)
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	if err := model.Order("expiry_date ASC").Find(&daos).Error; err != nil {
47: 		return nil, 0, err
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	result := make([]domain.Batch, len(daos))
51: 	for i, d := range daos {
52: 		result[i] = d.ToDomain()
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	return result, int(total), nil
56: }
57: 
58: func (r *batchRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Batch, error) {
59: 	var d dao.BatchDAO
60: 	if err := r.db.WithContext(ctx).First(&d, "id = ?", id).Error; err != nil {
61: 		if err == gorm.ErrRecordNotFound {
62: 			return nil, nil
63: 		}
64: 		return nil, err
65: 	}
66: 	res := d.ToDomain()
67: 	return &res, nil
68: }
69: 
70: func (r *batchRepository) Update(ctx context.Context, b *domain.Batch) error {
71: 	d := dao.FromBatchDomain(*b)
72: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Save(&d).Error
73: }
74: 
75: func (r *batchRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
76: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Delete(&dao.BatchDAO{}, "id = ?", id).Error
77: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/claim.go
````go
 1: package repository
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
 7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository/dao"
 9: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
10: )
11: 
12: type claimRepository struct {
13: 	db *gorm.DB
14: }
15: 
16: func NewClaimRepository(db *gorm.DB) domain.ClaimRepository {
17: 	return &claimRepository{db: db}
18: }
19: 
20: func (r *claimRepository) List(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]domain.Claim, int, error) {
21: 	var daos []dao.ClaimDAO
22: 	var total int64
23: 
24: 	model := r.db.WithContext(ctx).Model(&dao.ClaimDAO{})
25: 	
26: 	if err := model.Count(&total).Error; err != nil {
27: 		return nil, 0, err
28: 	}
29: 
30: 	if limit > 0 {
31: 		model = model.Limit(limit)
32: 	}
33: 	if offset > 0 {
34: 		model = model.Offset(offset)
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	if err := model.Order("created_at DESC").Find(&daos).Error; err != nil {
38: 		return nil, 0, err
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	result := make([]domain.Claim, len(daos))
42: 	for i, d := range daos {
43: 		result[i] = d.ToDomain()
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	return result, int(total), nil
47: }
48: 
49: func (r *claimRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Claim, error) {
50: 	var d dao.ClaimDAO
51: 	if err := r.db.WithContext(ctx).First(&d, "id = ?", id).Error; err != nil {
52: 		if err == gorm.ErrRecordNotFound {
53: 			return nil, nil
54: 		}
55: 		return nil, err
56: 	}
57: 	res := d.ToDomain()
58: 	return &res, nil
59: }
60: 
61: func (r *claimRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, c *domain.Claim) error {
62: 	if c.ID == "" {
63: 		c.ID = uuid.NewString()
64: 	}
65: 	d := dao.FromClaimDomain(*c)
66: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Create(&d).Error
67: }
68: 
69: func (r *claimRepository) Update(ctx context.Context, c *domain.Claim) error {
70: 	d := dao.FromClaimDomain(*c)
71: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Save(&d).Error
72: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/envlog.go
````go
 1: package repository
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
 7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository/dao"
 9: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
10: )
11: 
12: type environmentLogRepository struct {
13: 	db *gorm.DB
14: }
15: 
16: func NewEnvironmentLogRepository(db *gorm.DB) domain.EnvironmentLogRepository {
17: 	return &environmentLogRepository{db: db}
18: }
19: 
20: func (r *environmentLogRepository) List(ctx context.Context, zoneID string, limit, offset int) ([]domain.EnvironmentLog, int, error) {
21: 	var daos []dao.EnvironmentLogDAO
22: 	var total int64
23: 
24: 	model := r.db.WithContext(ctx).Model(&dao.EnvironmentLogDAO{})
25: 	if zoneID != "" {
26: 		model = model.Where("zone_id = ?", zoneID)
27: 	}
28: 
29: 	if err := model.Count(&total).Error; err != nil {
30: 		return nil, 0, err
31: 	}
32: 
33: 	if limit > 0 {
34: 		model = model.Limit(limit)
35: 	}
36: 	if offset > 0 {
37: 		model = model.Offset(offset)
38: 	}
39: 
40: 	if err := model.Order("recorded_at DESC").Find(&daos).Error; err != nil {
41: 		return nil, 0, err
42: 	}
43: 
44: 	result := make([]domain.EnvironmentLog, len(daos))
45: 	for i, d := range daos {
46: 		result[i] = d.ToDomain()
47: 	}
48: 
49: 	return result, int(total), nil
50: }
51: 
52: func (r *environmentLogRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, log *domain.EnvironmentLog) error {
53: 	if log.ID == "" {
54: 		log.ID = uuid.NewString()
55: 	}
56: 	d := dao.FromEnvLogDomain(*log)
57: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Create(&d).Error
58: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/inbound.go
````go
  1: package repository
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 
  6: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
  7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository/dao"
  9: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
 10: )
 11: 
 12: type inboundRepository struct {
 13: 	db *gorm.DB
 14: }
 15: 
 16: func NewInboundRepository(db *gorm.DB) domain.InboundRepository {
 17: 	return &inboundRepository{db: db}
 18: }
 19: 
 20: func (r *inboundRepository) List(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]domain.InboundReceiving, int, error) {
 21: 	var daos []dao.InboundReceivingDAO
 22: 	var total int64
 23: 
 24: 	model := r.db.WithContext(ctx).Model(&dao.InboundReceivingDAO{})
 25: 	
 26: 	if err := model.Count(&total).Error; err != nil {
 27: 		return nil, 0, err
 28: 	}
 29: 
 30: 	if limit > 0 {
 31: 		model = model.Limit(limit)
 32: 	}
 33: 	if offset > 0 {
 34: 		model = model.Offset(offset)
 35: 	}
 36: 
 37: 	if err := model.Order("created_at DESC").Find(&daos).Error; err != nil {
 38: 		return nil, 0, err
 39: 	}
 40: 
 41: 	result := make([]domain.InboundReceiving, len(daos))
 42: 	for i, d := range daos {
 43: 		result[i] = d.ToDomain()
 44: 	}
 45: 
 46: 	return result, int(total), nil
 47: }
 48: 
 49: func (r *inboundRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.InboundReceiving, error) {
 50: 	var d dao.InboundReceivingDAO
 51: 	if err := r.db.WithContext(ctx).Preload("Items").First(&d, "id = ?", id).Error; err != nil {
 52: 		if err == gorm.ErrRecordNotFound {
 53: 			return nil, nil
 54: 		}
 55: 		return nil, err
 56: 	}
 57: 	res := d.ToDomain()
 58: 	return &res, nil
 59: }
 60: 
 61: func (r *inboundRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, i *domain.InboundReceiving) error {
 62: 	if i.ID == "" {
 63: 		i.ID = uuid.NewString()
 64: 	}
 65: 	for idx := range i.Items {
 66: 		if i.Items[idx].ID == "" {
 67: 			i.Items[idx].ID = uuid.NewString()
 68: 		}
 69: 		i.Items[idx].InboundID = i.ID
 70: 	}
 71: 	d := dao.FromInboundDomain(*i)
 72: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Create(&d).Error
 73: }
 74: 
 75: func (r *inboundRepository) Update(ctx context.Context, i *domain.InboundReceiving) error {
 76: 	d := dao.FromInboundDomain(*i)
 77: 	// We use transaction to ensure items are updated correctly
 78: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
 79: 		if err := tx.Save(&d).Error; err != nil {
 80: 			return err
 81: 		}
 82: 		// For items, we might need a more complex sync logic.
 83: 		// For now, we assume Save handles everything if Omit isn't used.
 84: 		return nil
 85: 	})
 86: }
 87: 
 88: func (r *inboundRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
 89: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
 90: 		if err := tx.Delete(&dao.InboundItemDAO{}, "inbound_id = ?", id).Error; err != nil {
 91: 			return err
 92: 		}
 93: 		return tx.Delete(&dao.InboundReceivingDAO{}, "id = ?", id).Error
 94: 	})
 95: }
 96: 
 97: func (r *inboundRepository) AddItems(ctx context.Context, inboundID string, items []domain.InboundItem) error {
 98: 	daos := make([]dao.InboundItemDAO, len(items))
 99: 	for i, item := range items {
100: 		if item.ID == "" {
101: 			item.ID = uuid.NewString()
102: 		}
103: 		item.InboundID = inboundID
104: 		daos[i] = dao.FromInboundItemDomain(item)
105: 	}
106: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Create(&daos).Error
107: }
108: 
109: func (r *inboundRepository) UpdateItem(ctx context.Context, item *domain.InboundItem) error {
110: 	d := dao.FromInboundItemDomain(*item)
111: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Save(&d).Error
112: }
113: 
114: func (r *inboundRepository) RemoveItem(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
115: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Delete(&dao.InboundItemDAO{}, "id = ?", id).Error
116: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/otp_valkey.go
````go
 1: package repository
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"errors"
 6: 	"strconv"
 7: 	"time"
 8: 
 9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
10: 	"github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"
11: )
12: 
13: type otpValkeyRepository struct {
14: 	client valkey.Client
15: }
16: 
17: // NewOTPValkeyRepository creates a new Valkey-based OTP repository.
18: func NewOTPValkeyRepository(client valkey.Client) domain.OTPRepository {
19: 	return &otpValkeyRepository{client: client}
20: }
21: 
22: // hashKey returns the valkey key for storing the OTP hash
23: func hashKey(userID int) string {
24: 	return "otp:" + strconv.Itoa(userID) + ":hash"
25: }
26: 
27: // attemptsKey returns the valkey key for storing the OTP attempts
28: func attemptsKey(userID int) string {
29: 	return "otp:" + strconv.Itoa(userID) + ":attempts"
30: }
31: 
32: func (r *otpValkeyRepository) Store(ctx context.Context, userID int, codeHash string) error {
33: 	hk := hashKey(userID)
34: 	ak := attemptsKey(userID)
35: 	ttl := time.Duration(domain.OTPTTLSeconds) * time.Second
36: 
37: 	// We can use a pipeline or multiple commands.
38: 	err := r.client.Do(ctx, r.client.B().Set().Key(hk).Value(codeHash).Ex(ttl).Build()).Error()
39: 	if err != nil {
40: 		return err
41: 	}
42: 
43: 	err = r.client.Do(ctx, r.client.B().Set().Key(ak).Value("0").Ex(ttl).Build()).Error()
44: 	return err
45: }
46: 
47: func (r *otpValkeyRepository) Get(ctx context.Context, userID int) (*domain.OTPCode, error) {
48: 	hk := hashKey(userID)
49: 	ak := attemptsKey(userID)
50: 
51: 	hashVal, err := r.client.Do(ctx, r.client.B().Get().Key(hk).Build()).ToString()
52: 	if err != nil {
53: 		if errors.Is(err, valkey.Nil) {
54: 			return nil, domain.ErrOTPNotFound
55: 		}
56: 		return nil, err
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	attemptsStr, err := r.client.Do(ctx, r.client.B().Get().Key(ak).Build()).ToString()
60: 	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, valkey.Nil) {
61: 		return nil, err
62: 	}
63: 
64: 	attempts, _ := strconv.Atoi(attemptsStr) // ignore error, default to 0
65: 
66: 	return &domain.OTPCode{
67: 		UserID:   userID,
68: 		CodeHash: hashVal,
69: 		Attempts: attempts,
70: 	}, nil
71: }
72: 
73: func (r *otpValkeyRepository) IncrAttempts(ctx context.Context, userID int) error {
74: 	ak := attemptsKey(userID)
75: 	// INCR doesn't fail if key doesn't exist, it creates it, but we only increment if we verified existance
76: 	return r.client.Do(ctx, r.client.B().Incr().Key(ak).Build()).Error()
77: }
78: 
79: func (r *otpValkeyRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, userID int) error {
80: 	hk := hashKey(userID)
81: 	ak := attemptsKey(userID)
82: 	return r.client.Do(ctx, r.client.B().Del().Key(hk).Key(ak).Build()).Error()
83: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/product.go
````go
  1: package repository
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 	"strings"
  6: 
  7: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
  8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository/dao"
 10: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
 11: )
 12: 
 13: type productRepository struct {
 14: 	db *gorm.DB
 15: }
 16: 
 17: func NewProductRepository(db *gorm.DB) domain.ProductRepository {
 18: 	return &productRepository{db: db}
 19: }
 20: 
 21: func (r *productRepository) List(ctx context.Context, filter domain.ProductFilter) ([]domain.Product, int, error) {
 22: 	var daos []dao.ProductDAO
 23: 	var total int64
 24: 
 25: 	tx := r.db.WithContext(ctx).Model(&dao.ProductDAO{})
 26: 
 27: 	if filter.Query != "" {
 28: 		q := "%" + strings.ToLower(filter.Query) + "%"
 29: 		tx = tx.Where("LOWER(name) LIKE ? OR LOWER(generic_name) LIKE ? OR LOWER(sku) LIKE ?", q, q, q)
 30: 	}
 31: 
 32: 	if filter.IsJNVLP != nil {
 33: 		tx = tx.Where("is_jnvlp = ?", *filter.IsJNVLP)
 34: 	}
 35: 
 36: 	if filter.ATCCode != "" {
 37: 		tx = tx.Where("atc_code = ?", filter.ATCCode)
 38: 	}
 39: 
 40: 	if err := tx.Count(&total).Error; err != nil {
 41: 		return nil, 0, err
 42: 	}
 43: 
 44: 	if filter.Limit > 0 {
 45: 		tx = tx.Limit(filter.Limit)
 46: 	}
 47: 	if filter.Offset > 0 {
 48: 		tx = tx.Offset(filter.Offset)
 49: 	}
 50: 
 51: 	if err := tx.Order("name ASC").Find(&daos).Error; err != nil {
 52: 		return nil, 0, err
 53: 	}
 54: 
 55: 	result := make([]domain.Product, len(daos))
 56: 	for i, d := range daos {
 57: 		result[i] = d.ToDomain()
 58: 	}
 59: 
 60: 	return result, int(total), nil
 61: }
 62: 
 63: func (r *productRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Product, error) {
 64: 	var d dao.ProductDAO
 65: 	if err := r.db.WithContext(ctx).First(&d, "id = ?", id).Error; err != nil {
 66: 		if err == gorm.ErrRecordNotFound {
 67: 			return nil, nil
 68: 		}
 69: 		return nil, err
 70: 	}
 71: 	res := d.ToDomain()
 72: 	return &res, nil
 73: }
 74: 
 75: func (r *productRepository) GetBySKU(ctx context.Context, sku string) (*domain.Product, error) {
 76: 	var d dao.ProductDAO
 77: 	if err := r.db.WithContext(ctx).First(&d, "sku = ?", sku).Error; err != nil {
 78: 		if err == gorm.ErrRecordNotFound {
 79: 			return nil, nil
 80: 		}
 81: 		return nil, err
 82: 	}
 83: 	res := d.ToDomain()
 84: 	return &res, nil
 85: }
 86: 
 87: func (r *productRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, p *domain.Product) error {
 88: 	if p.ID == "" {
 89: 		p.ID = uuid.NewString()
 90: 	}
 91: 	d := dao.FromProductDomain(*p)
 92: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Create(&d).Error
 93: }
 94: 
 95: func (r *productRepository) Update(ctx context.Context, p *domain.Product) error {
 96: 	d := dao.FromProductDomain(*p)
 97: 	// We use Save to update all fields including zero values if provided.
 98: 	// But usually, we only update specific fields. 
 99: 	// For simplicity, we use Save here.
100: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Save(&d).Error
101: }
102: 
103: func (r *productRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
104: 	return r.db.WithContext(ctx).Delete(&dao.ProductDAO{}, "id = ?", id).Error
105: }
````
