````go
  1: package service
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 	"testing"
  6: 
  7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/service/mocks"
  9: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
 10: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
 11: )
 12: 
 13: func TestOrderService_CreateOrder(t *testing.T) {
 14: 	// Scenario: Create an order
 15: 	//   Given:  A valid order object
 16: 	//   When:   CreateOrder is called
 17: 	//   Then:   Status is set to new, priority is defaulted to 1 if zero, and record is saved
 18: 
 19: 	mockRepo := new(mocks.MockOrderRepository)
 20: 	svc := NewOrderService(mockRepo)
 21: 	ctx := context.Background()
 22: 
 23: 	tests := []struct {
 24: 		name         string
 25: 		order        *domain.Order
 26: 		mockSetup    func(o *domain.Order)
 27: 		wantStatus   domain.OrderStatus
 28: 		wantPriority int
 29: 	}{
 30: 		{
 31: 			name: "create order with priority",
 32: 			order: &domain.Order{
 33: 				OrderNumber: "ORD-001",
 34: 				Priority:    2,
 35: 			},
 36: 			mockSetup: func(o *domain.Order) {
 37: 				mockRepo.On("Create", mock.Anything, mock.MatchedBy(func(order *domain.Order) bool {
 38: 					return order.Status == domain.OrderStatusNew && order.Priority == 2
 39: 				})).Return(nil).Once()
 40: 			},
 41: 			wantStatus:   domain.OrderStatusNew,
 42: 			wantPriority: 2,
 43: 		},
 44: 		{
 45: 			name: "create order with default priority",
 46: 			order: &domain.Order{
 47: 				OrderNumber: "ORD-002",
 48: 				Priority:    0,
 49: 			},
 50: 			mockSetup: func(o *domain.Order) {
 51: 				mockRepo.On("Create", mock.Anything, mock.MatchedBy(func(order *domain.Order) bool {
 52: 					return order.Status == domain.OrderStatusNew && order.Priority == 1
 53: 				})).Return(nil).Once()
 54: 			},
 55: 			wantStatus:   domain.OrderStatusNew,
 56: 			wantPriority: 1,
 57: 		},
 58: 	}
 59: 
 60: 	for _, tc := range tests {
 61: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
 62: 			tc.mockSetup(tc.order)
 63: 			res, err := svc.CreateOrder(ctx, tc.order)
 64: 			assert.NoError(t, err)
 65: 			assert.NotNil(t, res)
 66: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantStatus, res.Status)
 67: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantPriority, res.Priority)
 68: 			mockRepo.AssertExpectations(t)
 69: 		})
 70: 	}
 71: }
 72: 
 73: func TestOrderService_UpdateStatus(t *testing.T) {
 74: 	// Scenario: Update order status
 75: 	//   Given:  An existing order and a target status
 76: 	//   When:   UpdateStatus is called with role-based checks
 77: 	//   Then:   Status is updated if roles allow
 78: 
 79: 	mockRepo := new(mocks.MockOrderRepository)
 80: 	svc := NewOrderService(mockRepo)
 81: 	ctx := context.Background()
 82: 
 83: 	id := "ord-123"
 84: 
 85: 	tests := []struct {
 86: 		name      string
 87: 		role      domain.UserRole
 88: 		status    domain.OrderStatus
 89: 		mockSetup func()
 90: 		wantErr   error
 91: 	}{
 92: 		{
 93: 			name:   "storekeeper can start assembling",
 94: 			role:   domain.RoleStorekeeper,
 95: 			status: domain.OrderStatusAssembling,
 96: 			mockSetup: func() {
 97: 				mockRepo.On("GetByID", mock.Anything, id).Return(&domain.Order{ID: id, Status: domain.OrderStatusNew}, nil).Once()
 98: 				mockRepo.On("Update", mock.Anything, mock.MatchedBy(func(o *domain.Order) bool {
 99: 					return o.Status == domain.OrderStatusAssembling
100: 				})).Return(nil).Once()
101: 			},
102: 			wantErr: nil,
103: 		},
104: 		{
105: 			name:   "pharmacist cannot start assembling",
106: 			role:   domain.RolePharmacist,
107: 			status: domain.OrderStatusAssembling,
108: 			mockSetup: func() {
109: 				mockRepo.On("GetByID", mock.Anything, id).Return(&domain.Order{ID: id, Status: domain.OrderStatusNew}, nil).Once()
110: 			},
111: 			wantErr: domain.ErrInsufficientPerms,
112: 		},
113: 		{
114: 			name:   "manager can ship",
115: 			role:   domain.RoleWarehouseManager,
116: 			status: domain.OrderStatusShipped,
117: 			mockSetup: func() {
118: 				mockRepo.On("GetByID", mock.Anything, id).Return(&domain.Order{ID: id, Status: domain.OrderStatusAssembled}, nil).Once()
119: 				mockRepo.On("Update", mock.Anything, mock.MatchedBy(func(o *domain.Order) bool {
120: 					return o.Status == domain.OrderStatusShipped
121: 				})).Return(nil).Once()
122: 			},
123: 			wantErr: nil,
124: 		},
125: 		{
126: 			name:   "storekeeper cannot ship",
127: 			role:   domain.RoleStorekeeper,
128: 			status: domain.OrderStatusShipped,
129: 			mockSetup: func() {
130: 				mockRepo.On("GetByID", mock.Anything, id).Return(&domain.Order{ID: id, Status: domain.OrderStatusAssembled}, nil).Once()
131: 			},
132: 			wantErr: domain.ErrInsufficientPerms,
133: 		},
134: 	}
135: 
136: 	for _, tc := range tests {
137: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
138: 			tc.mockSetup()
139: 			err := svc.UpdateStatus(ctx, tc.role, id, tc.status)
140: 			assert.ErrorIs(t, err, tc.wantErr)
141: 			mockRepo.AssertExpectations(t)
142: 		})
143: 	}
144: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/order_service.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type orderService struct {
10: 	repo domain.OrderRepository
11: }
12: 
13: func NewOrderService(repo domain.OrderRepository) domain.OrderService {
14: 	return &orderService{repo: repo}
15: }
16: 
17: func (s *orderService) ListOrders(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]domain.Order, int, error) {
18: 	return s.repo.List(ctx, limit, offset)
19: }
20: 
21: func (s *orderService) GetOrder(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Order, error) {
22: 	order, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
23: 	if err != nil {
24: 		return nil, err
25: 	}
26: 	if order == nil {
27: 		return nil, domain.ErrOrderNotFound
28: 	}
29: 	return order, nil
30: }
31: 
32: func (s *orderService) CreateOrder(ctx context.Context, o *domain.Order) (*domain.Order, error) {
33: 	o.Status = domain.OrderStatusNew
34: 	if o.Priority == 0 {
35: 		o.Priority = 1
36: 	}
37: 	if err := s.repo.Create(ctx, o); err != nil {
38: 		return nil, err
39: 	}
40: 	return o, nil
41: }
42: 
43: func (s *orderService) UpdateStatus(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, id string, status domain.OrderStatus) error {
44: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
45: 	if err != nil {
46: 		return err
47: 	}
48: 	if existing == nil {
49: 		return domain.ErrOrderNotFound
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	// Status flow logic
53: 	// Only Storekeeper or Manager can move to Assembling/Assembled
54: 	// Only Manager or Admin can Ship
55: 	switch status {
56: 	case domain.OrderStatusAssembling, domain.OrderStatusAssembled:
57: 		if callerRole == domain.RolePharmacist {
58: 			return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
59: 		}
60: 	case domain.OrderStatusShipped:
61: 		if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
62: 			return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
63: 		}
64: 	}
65: 
66: 	existing.Status = status
67: 	return s.repo.Update(ctx, existing)
68: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/product_service_test.go
````go
  1: package service
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 	"testing"
  6: 
  7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
  8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/service/mocks"
  9: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
 10: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
 11: )
 12: 
 13: func TestProductService_CreateProduct(t *testing.T) {
 14: 	// Scenario: Create a product
 15: 	//   Given:  A valid product and caller role
 16: 	//   When:   CreateProduct is called
 17: 	//   Then:   Admin/Manager can create if SKU is unique; Others blocked
 18: 
 19: 	mockRepo := new(mocks.MockProductRepository)
 20: 	svc := NewProductService(mockRepo)
 21: 	ctx := context.Background()
 22: 
 23: 	p := &domain.Product{SKU: "SKU-123", Name: "Test Product"}
 24: 
 25: 	tests := []struct {
 26: 		name      string
 27: 		role      domain.UserRole
 28: 		mockSetup func()
 29: 		wantErr   error
 30: 	}{
 31: 		{
 32: 			name: "admin can create",
 33: 			role: domain.RoleAdmin,
 34: 			mockSetup: func() {
 35: 				mockRepo.On("GetBySKU", mock.Anything, p.SKU).Return(nil, nil).Once()
 36: 				mockRepo.On("Create", mock.Anything, p).Return(nil).Once()
 37: 			},
 38: 			wantErr: nil,
 39: 		},
 40: 		{
 41: 			name: "conflict if SKU exists",
 42: 			role: domain.RoleAdmin,
 43: 			mockSetup: func() {
 44: 				mockRepo.On("GetBySKU", mock.Anything, p.SKU).Return(&domain.Product{ID: "existing"}, nil).Once()
 45: 			},
 46: 			wantErr: domain.ErrConflict,
 47: 		},
 48: 		{
 49: 			name: "storekeeper cannot create",
 50: 			role: domain.RoleStorekeeper,
 51: 			mockSetup: func() {
 52: 				// Early exit
 53: 			},
 54: 			wantErr: domain.ErrInsufficientPerms,
 55: 		},
 56: 	}
 57: 
 58: 	for _, tc := range tests {
 59: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
 60: 			tc.mockSetup()
 61: 			res, err := svc.CreateProduct(ctx, tc.role, p)
 62: 			assert.ErrorIs(t, err, tc.wantErr)
 63: 			if tc.wantErr == nil {
 64: 				assert.NotNil(t, res)
 65: 			}
 66: 			mockRepo.AssertExpectations(t)
 67: 		})
 68: 	}
 69: }
 70: 
 71: func TestProductService_DeleteProduct(t *testing.T) {
 72: 	// Scenario: Delete a product
 73: 	//   Given:  An existing product and caller role
 74: 	//   When:   DeleteProduct is called
 75: 	//   Then:   Only Admin can delete
 76: 
 77: 	mockRepo := new(mocks.MockProductRepository)
 78: 	svc := NewProductService(mockRepo)
 79: 	ctx := context.Background()
 80: 
 81: 	id := "prod-123"
 82: 
 83: 	tests := []struct {
 84: 		name      string
 85: 		role      domain.UserRole
 86: 		mockSetup func()
 87: 		wantErr   error
 88: 	}{
 89: 		{
 90: 			name: "admin can delete",
 91: 			role: domain.RoleAdmin,
 92: 			mockSetup: func() {
 93: 				mockRepo.On("GetByID", mock.Anything, id).Return(&domain.Product{ID: id}, nil).Once()
 94: 				mockRepo.On("Delete", mock.Anything, id).Return(nil).Once()
 95: 			},
 96: 			wantErr: nil,
 97: 		},
 98: 		{
 99: 			name: "manager cannot delete",
100: 			role: domain.RoleWarehouseManager,
101: 			mockSetup: func() {
102: 				// Early exit
103: 			},
104: 			wantErr: domain.ErrInsufficientPerms,
105: 		},
106: 	}
107: 
108: 	for _, tc := range tests {
109: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
110: 			tc.mockSetup()
111: 			err := svc.DeleteProduct(ctx, tc.role, id)
112: 			assert.ErrorIs(t, err, tc.wantErr)
113: 			mockRepo.AssertExpectations(t)
114: 		})
115: 	}
116: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/product_service.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type productService struct {
10: 	repo domain.ProductRepository
11: }
12: 
13: func NewProductService(repo domain.ProductRepository) domain.ProductService {
14: 	return &productService{repo: repo}
15: }
16: 
17: func (s *productService) ListProducts(ctx context.Context, filter domain.ProductFilter) ([]domain.Product, int, error) {
18: 	return s.repo.List(ctx, filter)
19: }
20: 
21: func (s *productService) GetProduct(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Product, error) {
22: 	p, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
23: 	if err != nil {
24: 		return nil, err
25: 	}
26: 	if p == nil {
27: 		return nil, domain.ErrProductNotFound
28: 	}
29: 	return p, nil
30: }
31: 
32: func (s *productService) CreateProduct(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, p *domain.Product) (*domain.Product, error) {
33: 	// Only Admin or WarehouseManager can create products
34: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
35: 		return nil, domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
36: 	}
37: 
38: 	// Check SKU uniqueness
39: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetBySKU(ctx, p.SKU)
40: 	if err != nil {
41: 		return nil, err
42: 	}
43: 	if existing != nil {
44: 		return nil, domain.ErrConflict
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	if err := s.repo.Create(ctx, p); err != nil {
48: 		return nil, err
49: 	}
50: 	return p, nil
51: }
52: 
53: func (s *productService) UpdateProduct(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, p *domain.Product) (*domain.Product, error) {
54: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
55: 		return nil, domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
56: 	}
57: 
58: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, p.ID)
59: 	if err != nil {
60: 		return nil, err
61: 	}
62: 	if existing == nil {
63: 		return nil, domain.ErrProductNotFound
64: 	}
65: 
66: 	// Update logic: preserve non-updatable fields if any. 
67: 	// For now, allow updating everything except ID.
68: 	if err := s.repo.Update(ctx, p); err != nil {
69: 		return nil, err
70: 	}
71: 	return p, nil
72: }
73: 
74: func (s *productService) DeleteProduct(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, id string) error {
75: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin {
76: 		return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
80: 	if err != nil {
81: 		return err
82: 	}
83: 	if existing == nil {
84: 		return domain.ErrProductNotFound
85: 	}
86: 
87: 	return s.repo.Delete(ctx, id)
88: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/recalled_batch_service_test.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"testing"
 6: 
 7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/service/mocks"
 9: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
10: 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
11: )
12: 
13: func TestRecalledBatchService_CheckBatch(t *testing.T) {
14: 	mockRepo := new(mocks.MockRecalledBatchRepository)
15: 	svc := NewRecalledBatchService(mockRepo)
16: 	ctx := context.Background()
17: 	serial := "SN-999"
18: 
19: 	tests := []struct {
20: 		name       string
21: 		mockSetup  func()
22: 		wantFound  bool
23: 		wantRecall *domain.RecalledBatch
24: 	}{
25: 		{
26: 			name: "batch found in recall list",
27: 			mockSetup: func() {
28: 				mockRepo.On("GetBySerial", mock.Anything, serial).Return(&domain.RecalledBatch{SerialNumber: serial, RecallReason: "Dangerous"}, nil).Once()
29: 			},
30: 			wantFound:  true,
31: 			wantRecall: &domain.RecalledBatch{SerialNumber: serial, RecallReason: "Dangerous"},
32: 		},
33: 		{
34: 			name: "batch not found",
35: 			mockSetup: func() {
36: 				mockRepo.On("GetBySerial", mock.Anything, serial).Return(nil, nil).Once()
37: 			},
38: 			wantFound:  false,
39: 			wantRecall: nil,
40: 		},
41: 	}
42: 
43: 	for _, tc := range tests {
44: 		t.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {
45: 			tc.mockSetup()
46: 			found, recall, err := svc.CheckBatch(ctx, serial)
47: 			assert.NoError(t, err)
48: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantFound, found)
49: 			assert.Equal(t, tc.wantRecall, recall)
50: 			mockRepo.AssertExpectations(t)
51: 		})
52: 	}
53: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/recalled_batch_service.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type recalledBatchService struct {
10: 	repo domain.RecalledBatchRepository
11: }
12: 
13: func NewRecalledBatchService(repo domain.RecalledBatchRepository) domain.RecalledBatchService {
14: 	return &recalledBatchService{repo: repo}
15: }
16: 
17: func (s *recalledBatchService) ListRecalled(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]domain.RecalledBatch, int, error) {
18: 	return s.repo.List(ctx, limit, offset)
19: }
20: 
21: func (s *recalledBatchService) CheckBatch(ctx context.Context, serial string) (bool, *domain.RecalledBatch, error) {
22: 	batch, err := s.repo.GetBySerial(ctx, serial)
23: 	if err != nil {
24: 		return false, nil, err
25: 	}
26: 	if batch != nil {
27: 		return true, batch, nil
28: 	}
29: 	return false, nil, nil
30: }
31: 
32: func (s *recalledBatchService) SyncRecalled(ctx context.Context, items []domain.RecalledBatch) error {
33: 	for i := range items {
34: 		if err := s.repo.Create(ctx, &items[i]); err != nil {
35: 			return err
36: 		}
37: 	}
38: 	return nil
39: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/supplier_service.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type supplierService struct {
10: 	repo domain.SupplierRepository
11: }
12: 
13: func NewSupplierService(repo domain.SupplierRepository) domain.SupplierService {
14: 	return &supplierService{repo: repo}
15: }
16: 
17: func (s *supplierService) ListSuppliers(ctx context.Context, limit, offset int) ([]domain.Supplier, int, error) {
18: 	return s.repo.List(ctx, limit, offset)
19: }
20: 
21: func (s *supplierService) GetSupplier(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Supplier, error) {
22: 	sup, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
23: 	if err != nil {
24: 		return nil, err
25: 	}
26: 	if sup == nil {
27: 		return nil, domain.ErrSupplierNotFound
28: 	}
29: 	return sup, nil
30: }
31: 
32: func (s *supplierService) CreateSupplier(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, sup *domain.Supplier) (*domain.Supplier, error) {
33: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
34: 		return nil, domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	// Check INN uniqueness
38: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByINN(ctx, sup.INN)
39: 	if err != nil {
40: 		return nil, err
41: 	}
42: 	if existing != nil {
43: 		return nil, domain.ErrConflict
44: 	}
45: 
46: 	if err := s.repo.Create(ctx, sup); err != nil {
47: 		return nil, err
48: 	}
49: 	return sup, nil
50: }
51: 
52: func (s *supplierService) UpdateSupplier(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, sup *domain.Supplier) (*domain.Supplier, error) {
53: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
54: 		return nil, domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
55: 	}
56: 
57: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, sup.ID)
58: 	if err != nil {
59: 		return nil, err
60: 	}
61: 	if existing == nil {
62: 		return nil, domain.ErrSupplierNotFound
63: 	}
64: 
65: 	if err := s.repo.Update(ctx, sup); err != nil {
66: 		return nil, err
67: 	}
68: 	return sup, nil
69: }
70: 
71: func (s *supplierService) DeleteSupplier(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, id string) error {
72: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin {
73: 		return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
77: 	if err != nil {
78: 		return err
79: 	}
80: 	if existing == nil {
81: 		return domain.ErrSupplierNotFound
82: 	}
83: 
84: 	return s.repo.Delete(ctx, id)
85: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/zone_service.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: type zoneService struct {
10: 	repo domain.ZoneRepository
11: }
12: 
13: func NewZoneService(repo domain.ZoneRepository) domain.ZoneService {
14: 	return &zoneService{repo: repo}
15: }
16: 
17: func (s *zoneService) ListZones(ctx context.Context) ([]domain.Zone, error) {
18: 	return s.repo.List(ctx)
19: }
20: 
21: func (s *zoneService) GetZone(ctx context.Context, id string) (*domain.Zone, error) {
22: 	z, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
23: 	if err != nil {
24: 		return nil, err
25: 	}
26: 	if z == nil {
27: 		return nil, domain.ErrZoneNotFound
28: 	}
29: 	return z, nil
30: }
31: 
32: func (s *zoneService) CreateZone(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, z *domain.Zone) (*domain.Zone, error) {
33: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
34: 		return nil, domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
35: 	}
36: 
37: 	if err := s.repo.Create(ctx, z); err != nil {
38: 		return nil, err
39: 	}
40: 	return z, nil
41: }
42: 
43: func (s *zoneService) UpdateZone(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, z *domain.Zone) (*domain.Zone, error) {
44: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin && callerRole != domain.RoleWarehouseManager {
45: 		return nil, domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
46: 	}
47: 
48: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, z.ID)
49: 	if err != nil {
50: 		return nil, err
51: 	}
52: 	if existing == nil {
53: 		return nil, domain.ErrZoneNotFound
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	if err := s.repo.Update(ctx, z); err != nil {
57: 		return nil, err
58: 	}
59: 	return z, nil
60: }
61: 
62: func (s *zoneService) DeleteZone(ctx context.Context, callerRole domain.UserRole, id string) error {
63: 	if callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin {
64: 		return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
65: 	}
66: 
67: 	existing, err := s.repo.GetByID(ctx, id)
68: 	if err != nil {
69: 		return err
70: 	}
71: 	if existing == nil {
72: 		return domain.ErrZoneNotFound
73: 	}
74: 
75: 	return s.repo.Delete(ctx, id)
76: }
````

## File: backend/migrate/000006_create_batches.up.sql
````sql
 1: -- ============================================================
 2: -- 000006_create_batches.up.sql
 3: -- Batches (series) — replaces old stock_items + stock_operations.
 4: -- Tracks inventory by product series with quarantine workflow.
 5: -- ============================================================
 6: 
 7: CREATE TABLE batches (
 8:     id               UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
 9:     product_id       UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
10:     zone_id          UUID REFERENCES warehouse_zones(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
11:     serial_number    VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
12:     manufacture_date DATE NOT NULL,
13:     expiry_date      DATE NOT NULL,
14:     quantity         INT NOT NULL CHECK (quantity >= 0),
15:     status           batch_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'quarantine',
16:     updated_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
17:     UNIQUE (product_id, serial_number)
18: );
19: 
20: CREATE INDEX idx_batches_product_id  ON batches(product_id);
21: CREATE INDEX idx_batches_expiry_date ON batches(expiry_date);
22: CREATE INDEX idx_batches_status      ON batches(status);
````

## File: backend/migrate/000007_create_audit_logs.down.sql
````sql
1: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit_logs;
````

## File: backend/migrate/000007_create_audit_logs.up.sql
````sql
 1: -- ============================================================
 2: -- 000007_create_audit_logs.up.sql
 3: -- Audit log with immutable hash chain support.
 4: -- ============================================================
 5: 
 6: CREATE TABLE audit_logs (
 7:     id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
 8:     user_id     INT REFERENCES users(id),
 9:     action      VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
10:     entity      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
11:     entity_id   VARCHAR(100),
12:     old_values  JSONB,
13:     new_values  JSONB,
14:     ip_address  INET,
15:     -- Immutability chain (Phase 3, currently stored as NULL / mock):
16:     prev_hash   TEXT,    -- hash of previous log entry in chain
17:     log_hash    TEXT,    -- SHA-256(prev_hash + user_id + action + entity_id + new_values + created_at)
18:     created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
19: );
20: 
21: CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_entity  ON audit_logs(entity, entity_id);
22: CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_user_id ON audit_logs(user_id);
````

1: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS employee_profiles;

## File: backend/migrate/000008_create_employee_profiles.up.sql
````sql
 1: -- ============================================================
 2: -- 000008_create_employee_profiles.up.sql
 3: -- Employee profiles — extended with GDP training history,
 4: -- medical book scan, special zone access.
 5: -- Removes: telegram_handle, emergency_contact
 6: --   (those were pre-ERP fields not in the spec).
 7: -- ============================================================
 8: 
 9: CREATE TABLE employee_profiles (
10:     id                    SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
11:     user_id               INT UNIQUE NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
12:     employee_code         VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
13:     full_name             VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
14:     corporate_email       VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
15:     phone                 VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
16:     position              VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
17:     department            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
18:     birth_date            DATE NOT NULL,
19:     avatar_url            TEXT,
20:     hire_date             DATE NOT NULL,
21:     dismissal_date        DATE,
22:     -- New ERP fields:
23:     medical_book_scan_url TEXT,                           -- medical book scan URL
24:     special_zone_access   BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, -- access to special zones
25:     gdp_training_history  JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'    -- GDP training history
26:     -- JSONB element structure:
27:     -- { "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "course_name": "...", "result": "pass"|"fail", "certificate_url": "..." }
28: );
````

## File: backend/migrate/000009_create_refresh_tokens.up.sql
````sql
 1: -- ============================================================
 2: -- 000009_create_refresh_tokens.up.sql
 3: -- Session / refresh token storage (unchanged from spec).
 4: -- ============================================================
 5: 
 6: CREATE TABLE refresh_tokens (
 7:     id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
 8:     user_id     INT NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
 9:     token_hash  TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
10:     expires_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
11:     user_agent  TEXT,
12:     ip_address  INET,
13:     metadata    JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
14:     created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
15:     revoked_at  TIMESTAMPTZ
16: );
17: 
18: CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_tokens_user_id    ON refresh_tokens(user_id);
19: CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_tokens_expires_at ON refresh_tokens(expires_at);
````

## File: backend/tmp/api_test.sh
````bash
  1: #!/bin/bash
  2: 
  3: # Configuration
  4: API_URL="http://localhost:8080"
  5: TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoxLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJzZXNzaW9uX2lkIjoiZDk0MGYxNDEtNTc3MS00OWE0LTk2NzAtMGVjYzk3Zjk2ZGY3IiwiaXNzIjoiZGlwbG9tLWF1dGgiLCJleHAiOjE3NzYyNzA2NjAsIm5iZiI6MTc3NjE4NDI2MCwiaWF0IjoxNzc2MTg0MjYwfQ.2wz7lEHZxO6j1kJGdbkoE9gmiMzeLIWnXiXVW9HBtcg"
  6: HEADERS=(-H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json")
  7: 
  8: echo "=== 3.2 References ==="
  9: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/ref/countries | grep -q "code" && echo "✅ GET /ref/countries" || echo "❌ GET /ref/countries: "$(curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/ref/countries)
 10: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/ref/atc | grep -q 'code' && echo "✅ GET /ref/atc" || echo "❌ GET /ref/atc: "$(curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/ref/atc)
 11: 
 12: echo "=== 3.3 Products ==="
 13: PRODUCT_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"sku":"SKU1","name":"Prod1","generic_name":"MNN1","atc_code":"A01A","dosage_form":"Tablet","strength":"50mg","package_size":10,"is_jnvlp":false,"storage_conditions":"Normal","photo_url":""}' $API_URL/api/v1/products)
 14: PRODUCT_ID=$(echo $PRODUCT_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 15: if [ -n "$PRODUCT_ID" ]; then
 16:     echo "✅ POST /products"
 17: else
 18:     echo "❌ POST /products: $PRODUCT_RES"
 19: fi
 20: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/products | grep -q "total" && echo "✅ GET /products" || echo "❌ GET /products"
 21: 
 22: echo "=== 3.4 Suppliers ==="
 23: SUPPLIER_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"name":"Supp1","inn":"1234567890","kpp":"123456789","contact_name":"C1","phone":"123","email":"test@test.com","address":"A1"}' $API_URL/api/v1/suppliers)
 24: SUPPLIER_ID=$(echo $SUPPLIER_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 25: if [ -n "$SUPPLIER_ID" ]; then
 26:     echo "✅ POST /suppliers"
 27: else
 28:     echo "❌ POST /suppliers: $SUPPLIER_RES"
 29: fi
 30: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/suppliers | grep -q "total" && echo "✅ GET /suppliers" || echo "❌ GET /suppliers"
 31: 
 32: echo "=== 3.5 Zones ==="
 33: ZONE_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"name":"Zone1","type":"ambient","description":"General Zone","temp_min":15.0,"temp_max":25.0,"capacity":100}' $API_URL/api/v1/zones)
 34: ZONE_ID=$(echo $ZONE_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 35: if [ -n "$ZONE_ID" ]; then
 36:     echo "✅ POST /zones"
 37: else
 38:     echo "❌ POST /zones: $ZONE_RES"
 39: fi
 40: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/zones | grep -q "id" && echo "✅ GET /zones" || echo "❌ GET /zones"
 41: 
 42: echo "=== 3.6 Inbound ==="
 43: INBOUND_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"supplier_id":"'$SUPPLIER_ID'","invoice_number":"INV1","invoice_date":"2026-04-14T00:00:00Z","notes":"test","items":[{"product_id":"'$PRODUCT_ID'","batch_number":"B1","expiration_date":"2026-12-31T00:00:00Z","quantity":100,"price_netto":10,"vat_rate":20,"price_brutto":12,"cert_number":"C1","zone_id":"'$ZONE_ID'"}]}' $API_URL/api/v1/inbound)
 44: INBOUND_ID=$(echo $INBOUND_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 45: if [ -n "$INBOUND_ID" ]; then
 46:     echo "✅ POST /inbound"
 47: else
 48:     echo "❌ POST /inbound: $INBOUND_RES"
 49: fi
 50: PATCH_INB_RES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PATCH "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"status":"received"}' $API_URL/api/v1/inbound/$INBOUND_ID/status)
 51: if [ "$PATCH_INB_RES" == "204" ]; then echo "✅ PATCH /inbound/{id}/status"; else echo "❌ PATCH /inbound/{id}/status: $PATCH_INB_RES"; fi
 52: 
 53: echo "=== 3.7 EnvLog ==="
 54: ENV_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"zone_id":"'$ZONE_ID'","shift":"morning","temperature":22.5,"humidity":45,"notes":""}' $API_URL/api/v1/env/logs)
 55: if echo "$ENV_RES" | grep -q "id"; then
 56:     echo "✅ POST /env/logs"
 57: else
 58:     echo "❌ POST /env/logs: $ENV_RES"
 59: fi
 60: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/env/logs | grep -q "total" && echo "✅ GET /env/logs" || echo "❌ GET /env/logs"
 61: 
 62: echo "=== 3.8 Orders ==="
 63: ORDER_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"customer_name":"Customer1","priority":1,"items":[{"product_id":"'$PRODUCT_ID'","quantity":10}]}' $API_URL/api/v1/orders)
 64: ORDER_ID=$(echo $ORDER_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 65: if [ -n "$ORDER_ID" ]; then
 66:     echo "✅ POST /orders"
 67: else
 68:     echo "❌ POST /orders: $ORDER_RES"
 69: fi
 70: PATCH_ORD_1=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PATCH "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"status": "assembling"}' $API_URL/api/v1/orders/$ORDER_ID/status)
 71: if [ "$PATCH_ORD_1" == "204" ]; then echo "✅ PATCH /orders/{id}/status (assemble)"; else echo "❌ PATCH /orders/{id}/status (assemble)"; fi
 72: PATCH_ORD_2=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PATCH "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"status": "shipped"}' $API_URL/api/v1/orders/$ORDER_ID/status)
 73: if [ "$PATCH_ORD_2" == "204" ]; then echo "✅ PATCH /orders/{id}/status (ship)"; else echo "❌ PATCH /orders/{id}/status (ship)"; fi
 74: 
 75: echo "=== 3.9 Inventory ==="
 76: INV_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"zone_id":"'$ZONE_ID'"}' $API_URL/api/v1/inventory)
 77: INV_ID=$(echo $INV_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 78: if [ -n "$INV_ID" ]; then
 79:     echo "✅ POST /inventory"
 80: else
 81:     echo "❌ POST /inventory: $INV_RES"
 82: fi
 83: 
 84: echo "=== 3.10 Claims ==="
 85: BATCH_RES=$(curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/batches\?product_id=$PRODUCT_ID)
 86: BATCH_ID=$(echo $BATCH_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data['batches'][0]['id'] if 'batches' in data and data['batches'] else '')" 2>/dev/null)
 87: if [ -n "$BATCH_ID" ]; then
 88:     CLAIM_RES=$(curl -s -X POST "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"claim_type":"recall","batch_id":"'$BATCH_ID'","description":"Test Recall","is_external_registry":true}' $API_URL/api/v1/claims)
 89:     CLAIM_ID=$(echo $CLAIM_RES | python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get('id', ''))" 2>/dev/null)
 90:     if [ -n "$CLAIM_ID" ]; then
 91:         echo "✅ POST /claims"
 92:     else
 93:         echo "❌ POST /claims: $CLAIM_RES"
 94:     fi
 95: else
 96:     echo "❌ POST /claims: Batch not found"
 97: fi
 98: 
 99: echo "=== 3.11 Settings ==="
100: curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/settings | grep -q "key" && echo "✅ GET /settings" || echo "❌ GET /settings: "$(curl -s "${HEADERS[@]}" $API_URL/api/v1/settings)
101: curl -s -X PATCH "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"value":"75"}' $API_URL/api/v1/settings/mos_percent | grep -q "key" || echo "✅ PATCH /settings/mos_percent" 
102: # Patch returns 204 no content, so grep -q "key" will fail! We should check status code or just assume it works.
103: # Wait, let's fix it:
104: PATCH_RES=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X PATCH "${HEADERS[@]}" -d '{"value":"75"}' $API_URL/api/v1/settings/mos_percent)
105: if [ "$PATCH_RES" == "204" ]; then
106:     echo "✅ PATCH /settings/mos_percent"
107: else
108:     echo "❌ PATCH /settings/mos_percent: $PATCH_RES"
109: fi
110: 
111: echo "=== System Health ==="
112: curl -s $API_URL/health | grep -q "ok" && echo "✅ GET /health" || echo "❌ GET /health: "$(curl -s $API_URL/health)
113: 
114: echo "=== DONE ==="
````

## File: docs/api/admin-employees.md
````markdown
  1: # Admin — Профили сотрудников
  2: 
  3: ## GET `/api/v1/admin/employees`
  4: 
  5: > Список профилей сотрудников с базовой информацией.
  6: 
  7: **Auth:** `admin`  
  8: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_employee_handler.go` → `adminListEmployeeProfiles()`  
  9: 
 10: ---
 11: 
 12: ## Требования к БД
 13: 
 14: ### Таблица `users` + `employee_profiles`
 15: 
 16: ```sql
 17: SELECT u.id, u.login, u.email, u.role, u.status, u.is_blocked,
 18:        ep.employee_code, ep.full_name, ep.position, ep.department
 19: FROM users u
 20: LEFT JOIN employee_profiles ep ON ep.user_id = u.id
 21: ORDER BY u.id
 22: ```
 23: 
 24: ---
 25: 
 26: ## Функции в программе
 27: 
 28: ### Handler
 29: 
 30: ```go
 31: // Файл: internal/handler/admin_employee_handler.go
 32: func (h *Handler) adminListEmployeeProfiles(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
 33: ```
 34: 
 35: ### Service
 36: 
 37: ```go
 38: // Файл: internal/service/employee_profile_service.go
 39: // domain interface: domain.EmployeeProfileService
 40: func (s *employeeProfileService) ListAll(ctx) ([]*domain.UserProfile, error)
 41: ```
 42: 
 43: ### Repository
 44: 
 45: ```go
 46: // Файл: internal/repository/employee_profile.go
 47: // domain interface: domain.EmployeeProfileRepository
 48: employeeProfileRepo.List(ctx) ([]*EmployeeProfile, error)
 49: ```
 50: 
 51: ---
 52: 
 53: ## GET `/api/v1/admin/employees/{userID}`
 54: 
 55: > Детальный профиль конкретного сотрудника.
 56: 
 57: **Auth:** `admin`  
 58: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_employee_handler.go` → `adminGetEmployeeProfile()`  
 59: 
 60: ### Требования к БД
 61: 
 62: ```sql
 63: SELECT ep.*, u.login, u.email, u.role, u.status
 64: FROM employee_profiles ep
 65: JOIN users u ON u.id = ep.user_id
 66: WHERE ep.user_id = ?
 67: ```
 68: 
 69: ### Функции в программе
 70: 
 71: ```go
 72: // Handler: chi.URLParam(r, "userID") → int
 73: // Service/Repo: employeeProfileRepo.FindByUserID(ctx, userID)
 74: // Существует: userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(ctx, userID) — internal/repository/user.go:192
 75: ```
 76: 
 77: ---
 78: 
 79: ## PATCH `/api/v1/admin/employees/{userID}`
 80: 
 81: > Обновить поля профиля сотрудника (частичное обновление).
 82: 
 83: **Auth:** `admin`  
 84: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_employee_handler.go` → `adminPatchEmployeeProfile()`  
 85: 
 86: ### Требования к БД
 87: 
 88: ### Таблица `employee_profiles`
 89: 
 90: | Поле                    | Тип           | Описание                                     |
 91: |-------------------------|---------------|----------------------------------------------|
 92: | `user_id`               | INT (FK)       | Первичный ключ по внешнему ключу             |
 93: | `employee_code`         | VARCHAR        | Табельный номер                              |
 94: | `full_name`             | VARCHAR        | ФИО сотрудника                               |
 95: | `position`              | VARCHAR        | Должность                                    |
 96: | `department`            | VARCHAR        | Отдел                                        |
 97: | `avatar_url`            | TEXT nullable  | URL аватарки                                 |
 98: | `medical_book_scan_url` | TEXT nullable  | URL скана медкнижки                          |
 99: | `special_zone_access`   | BOOLEAN        | Доступ в зону НС/ПВ                          |
100: | `gdp_training_history`  | JSONB          | История обучений GDP (массив дат/документов) |
101: 
102: ```sql
103: UPDATE employee_profiles
104: SET full_name = COALESCE(?, full_name),
105:     position  = COALESCE(?, position),
106:     department = COALESCE(?, department),
107:     -- и т.д.
108: WHERE user_id = ?
109: ```
110: 
111: ### Функции в программе
112: 
113: ```go
114: // Handler: парсить dto.PatchEmployeeProfileRequest из тела
115: // Service/Repo: employeeProfileRepo.Update(ctx, userID, changes)
116: // Файл: internal/repository/employee_profile.go
117: ```
````

## File: docs/api/admin-users.md
````markdown
  1: # Admin — Верификация и Роли
  2: 
  3: ## PATCH `/api/v1/admin/users/{id}/verify`
  4: 
  5: > Верифицировать нового пользователя: перевести статус `unverified → active`.
  6: 
  7: **Auth:** `admin`  
  8: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_handler.go` → `adminVerifyUser()`  
  9: 
 10: ---
 11: 
 12: ## Требования к БД
 13: 
 14: ### Таблица `users`
 15: 
 16: ```sql
 17: UPDATE users SET status = 'active' WHERE id = ?
 18: ```
 19: 
 20: | Поле     | До верификации | После верификации |
 21: |----------|---------------|-------------------|
 22: | `status` | `unverified`  | `active`          |
 23: 
 24: **Ожидаемый результат:** `RowsAffected > 0`, иначе `ErrUserNotFound`.
 25: 
 26: ---
 27: 
 28: ## Функции в программе
 29: 
 30: ### Handler
 31: 
 32: ```go
 33: // Файл: internal/handler/admin_handler.go:15
 34: func (h *Handler) adminVerifyUser(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
 35: ```
 36: 
 37: 1. `chi.URLParam(r, "id")` → `strconv.Atoi` → userID
 38: 2. Извлечь `callerID`, `callerRole` из контекста middleware
 39: 3. `h.service.Auth.VerifyUser(ctx, callerID, callerRole, userID)`
 40: 4. `200 {"status": "active"}`
 41: 
 42: ### Service
 43: 
 44: ```go
 45: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:194
 46: func (s *authService) VerifyUser(ctx, adminID int, adminRole UserRole, targetUserID int) error
 47: ```
 48: 
 49: 1. `adminRole != RoleAdmin` → `ErrInsufficientPerms` (дополнительная проверка, middleware уже проверила)
 50: 2. `userRepo.UpdateStatus(ctx, targetUserID, StatusActive)`
 51: 
 52: ### Repository
 53: 
 54: ```go
 55: // Файл: internal/repository/user.go:148
 56: func (r *userRepository) UpdateStatus(ctx, userID int, status UserStatus) error
 57: // UPDATE users SET status = ? WHERE id = ?
 58: // RowsAffected == 0 → ErrUserNotFound
 59: ```
 60: 
 61: ---
 62: 
 63: ## PATCH `/api/v1/admin/users/{id}/role`
 64: 
 65: > Назначить роль пользователю.
 66: 
 67: **Auth:** `admin`  
 68: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_handler.go` → `adminAssignRole()`  
 69: 
 70: ---
 71: 
 72: ## Требования к БД
 73: 
 74: ### Таблица `users`
 75: 
 76: ```sql
 77: UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?
 78: -- role ∈ {'admin', 'employee', 'unverified'}
 79: -- В api-endpoints.md расширенный список: qp, warehouse_manager, storekeeper, pharmacist
 80: ```
 81: 
 82: > **Важно:** В текущем коде в `domain/user.go` определены только 3 роли. В `api-endpoints.md` описана более широкая ролевая модель — требуется синхронизация.
 83: 
 84: ---
 85: 
 86: ## Функции в программе
 87: 
 88: ### Handler
 89: 
 90: ```go
 91: // Файл: internal/handler/admin_handler.go:36
 92: func (h *Handler) adminAssignRole(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
 93: ```
 94: 
 95: 1. Парсить `userID` из URL
 96: 2. Декодировать `dto.AssignRoleRequest{Role string}` из тела
 97: 3. `h.service.Auth.AssignRole(ctx, callerID, callerRole, userID, domain.UserRole(req.Role))`
 98: 4. `200 {"role": "<новая роль>"}`
 99: 
100: ### Service
101: 
102: ```go
103: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:201
104: func (s *authService) AssignRole(ctx, adminID int, adminRole UserRole, targetUserID int, role UserRole) error
105: ```
106: 
107: 1. `adminRole != RoleAdmin` → `ErrInsufficientPerms`
108: 2. `userRepo.UpdateRole(ctx, targetUserID, role)`
109: 
110: ### Repository
111: 
112: ```go
113: // Файл: internal/repository/user.go:137
114: func (r *userRepository) UpdateRole(ctx, userID int, role UserRole) error
115: // UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?
116: ```
````

## File: docs/api/auth-google.md
````markdown
 1: # GET `/auth/google` и POST `/auth/google`
 2: 
 3: > Google OAuth: клиент получает Google ID Token (через Google Sign-In SDK) и передаёт его на бэкенд. Бэкенд валидирует токен и выдаёт пару токенов или сообщает о необходимости верификации.
 4: 
 5: **Auth:** Нет  
 6: **Route file:** `internal/handler/oauth_handler.go` → `googleLogin()`  
 7: **Route mapping:** `POST /auth/google`
 8: 
 9: > **Примечание:** В `api-endpoints.md` описаны `GET /auth/google` (редирект) и `GET /auth/google/callback` (OAuth code flow). В реальном коде реализован **ID Token flow** — клиент сам получает ID-токен от Google и посылает его на `POST /auth/google`.
10: 
11: ---
12: 
13: ## Требования к БД
14: 
15: ### Таблица `users`
16: 
17: **Сценарий A: пользователь уже зарегистрирован через Google**
18: - `SELECT * FROM users WHERE google_id = ?`
19: 
20: **Сценарий B: есть аккаунт с таким email, но ещё не привязан к Google**
21: - `SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?`
22: - `UPDATE users SET google_id = ? WHERE id = ?` (привязка)
23: 
24: **Сценарий C: новый пользователь**
25: - `INSERT INTO users (login, email, google_id, role='unverified', status='unverified')`
26: - Токены НЕ выдаются → возвращается `ErrUserUnverified`
27: 
28: ### Таблица `refresh_tokens`
29: 
30: - При успешном входе (статус `active`) → `INSERT` новой сессии (как в `/auth/login`)
31: 
32: ---
33: 
34: ## Функции в программе
35: 
36: ### Handler
37: 
38: ```go
39: // Файл: internal/handler/oauth_handler.go
40: func (h *Handler) googleLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
41: ```
42: 
43: **Шаги:**
44: 1. Декодировать тело `{ "id_token": "eyJ..." }`
45: 2. Взять User-Agent и IP
46: 3. `h.service.Auth.LoginWithGoogle(ctx, idToken, userAgent, ip)`
47: 4. `ErrUserUnverified` → `403 {"error": "account_pending_verification"}`
48: 5. Успех → cookie + `200 {"access_token": "...", "user": UserDTO}`
49: 
50: ### Service
51: 
52: ```go
53: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:92
54: func (s *authService) LoginWithGoogle(ctx, idToken, userAgent, ip string) (*TokenPair, error)
55: ```
56: 
57: **Шаги:**
58: 1. `idtoken.Validate(ctx, idToken, s.googleClientID)` — Google SDK валидирует токен
59: 2. Извлечь `googleID = payload.Subject`, `email = payload.Claims["email"]`
60: 3. `userRepo.FindByGoogleID(ctx, googleID)` → найден → `issueTokens`
61: 4. `userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email)` → найден → `userRepo.LinkGoogle(...)` → `issueTokens`
62: 5. Не найден → создать нового user со статусом `unverified` → `ErrUserUnverified`
63: 
64: ### Repository
65: 
66: ```go
67: userRepo.FindByGoogleID(ctx, googleID) (*User, error)
68: userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email) (*User, error)
69: userRepo.LinkGoogle(ctx, userID, googleID) error  // UPDATE SET google_id = ?
70: userRepo.Create(ctx, u) (*User, error)
71: sessionRepo.Create(ctx, rt) (*RefreshToken, error)
72: ```
````

## File: docs/api/auth-login.md
````markdown
 1: # POST `/auth/login`
 2: 
 3: > Вход по логину и паролю. Возвращает access token в теле и refresh token в `httpOnly` cookie.
 4: 
 5: **Auth:** Нет  
 6: **Route file:** `internal/handler/auth_handler.go` → `login()`  
 7: 
 8: ---
 9: 
10: ## Требования к БД
11: 
12: ### Таблица `users`
13: 
14: - `SELECT * FROM users WHERE login = ?` — найти пользователя
15: - Проверить `status = 'active'`, иначе `403 Forbidden` (`ErrUserUnverified` / `ErrUserBlocked`)
16: - Bcrypt-сравнение `password_hash`
17: 
18: ### Таблица `refresh_tokens`
19: 
20: - `INSERT INTO refresh_tokens (id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, user_agent, ip_address, metadata)`
21: - `id` = `gen_random_uuid()` (PostgreSQL)
22: - `token_hash` = SHA-256 от raw refresh token (не сам токен!)
23: - `expires_at` = NOW() + 15 дней
24: - `revoked_at` = NULL
25: 
26: ---
27: 
28: ## Функции в программе
29: 
30: ### Handler
31: 
32: ```go
33: // Файл: internal/handler/auth_handler.go:49
34: func (h *Handler) login(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
35: ```
36: 
37: **Шаги:**
38: 1. Декодировать `dto.LoginRequest{Login, Password}`
39: 2. Извлечь `User-Agent` и IP из запроса (для session metadata)
40: 3. `h.service.Auth.LoginWithPassword(ctx, login, password, userAgent, ip)`
41: 4. Установить `httpOnly` cookie: `refresh_token=<raw>; Path=/auth; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict; MaxAge=15d`
42: 5. Вернуть `200 dto.TokenResponse{AccessToken, ExpiresIn: 900}`
43: 
44: ### Service
45: 
46: ```go
47: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:79
48: func (s *authService) LoginWithPassword(ctx, login, password, userAgent, ip string) (*TokenPair, error)
49: ```
50: 
51: **Шаги:**
52: 1. `userRepo.FindByLogin(ctx, login)` → любая ошибка → `ErrInvalidCreds` (защита от enumeration)
53: 2. `bcrypt.CompareHashAndPassword(hash, password)` → ошибка → `ErrInvalidCreds`
54: 3. `authService.issueTokens(ctx, user, userAgent, ip)` — приватная функция
55: 
56: ### Приватная функция `issueTokens`
57: 
58: ```go
59: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:209
60: func (s *authService) issueTokens(ctx, u *User, userAgent, ip string) (*TokenPair, error)
61: ```
62: 
63: 1. Проверка `u.Status == StatusActive && !u.IsBlocked`
64: 2. `tokenSvc.GenerateRefreshToken()` → (rawToken, tokenHash, err)
65: 3. `sessionRepo.Create(ctx, &RefreshToken{UserID, TokenHash, ExpiresAt, UserAgent, IP})`
66: 4. `tokenSvc.GenerateAccessToken(u, session.ID)` → JWT HS256
67: 
68: ### Repository
69: 
70: ```go
71: userRepo.FindByLogin(ctx, login)         // WHERE login = ?
72: sessionRepo.Create(ctx, refreshToken)   // INSERT INTO refresh_tokens
73: ```
````

## File: docs/api/auth-logout.md
````markdown
 1: # POST `/auth/logout`
 2: 
 3: > Выйти из системы: отозвать сессию на сервере и очистить `httpOnly` cookie с refresh token.
 4: 
 5: **Auth:** Bearer (опционально — если заголовок есть, сессия отзывается; если нет — только очищается cookie)  
 6: **Route file:** `internal/handler/auth_handler.go` → `logout()`  
 7: 
 8: ---
 9: 
10: ## Требования к БД
11: 
12: ### Таблица `refresh_tokens`
13: 
14: **При наличии валидного Bearer токена:**
15: ```sql
16: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?
17: -- WHERE id = session_id из JWT claims
18: ```
19: 
20: **Если Bearer токен невалиден/отсутствует:** запрос в БД не выполняется — просто очищается cookie.
21: 
22: **Проверка владельца сессии** (`RevokeSession`):
23: ```sql
24: SELECT * FROM refresh_tokens WHERE id = ?
25: -- если session.UserID != callerID AND callerRole != 'admin' → ErrInsufficientPerms
26: ```
27: 
28: ---
29: 
30: ## Функции в программе
31: 
32: ### Handler
33: 
34: ```go
35: // Файл: internal/handler/auth_handler.go:136
36: func (h *Handler) logout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
37: ```
38: 
39: **Шаги:**
40: 1. Если `Authorization` заголовок отсутствует → только `clearRefreshCookie(w)` → `204`
41: 2. Парсинг `Bearer <token>` из заголовка
42: 3. `tokenSvc.ParseAccessToken(token)` → если ошибка → `clearRefreshCookie` → `204` (logout всё равно выполнен)
43: 4. `service.Auth.RevokeSession(ctx, claims.SessionID, claims.UserID, claims.Role)`
44: 5. При ошибке revoke: логировать `WARN`, но продолжить (не возвращать ошибку клиенту)
45: 6. `clearRefreshCookie(w)` → `204 No Content`
46: 
47: ### Вспомогательная функция `clearRefreshCookie`
48: 
49: ```go
50: // Файл: internal/handler/auth_handler.go:173
51: func (h *Handler) clearRefreshCookie(w http.ResponseWriter)
52: // Set-Cookie: refresh_token=; Path=/auth; HttpOnly; MaxAge=-1
53: ```
54: 
55: ### Service
56: 
57: ```go
58: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:183
59: func (s *authService) RevokeSession(ctx, sessionID uuid.UUID, callerID int, callerRole UserRole) error
60: ```
61: 
62: **Шаги:**
63: 1. `sessionRepo.FindByID(ctx, sessionID)` — найти сессию
64: 2. Проверить: `sess.UserID == callerID || callerRole == RoleAdmin`
65: 3. Иначе → `ErrInsufficientPerms`
66: 4. `sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, sessionID)` → `SET revoked_at = NOW()`
67: 
68: ### Repository
69: 
70: ```go
71: sessionRepo.FindByID(ctx, id) (*RefreshToken, error)
72: sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, id) error   // UPDATE SET revoked_at = NOW()
73: ```
````

## File: docs/api/auth-refresh.md
````markdown
 1: # POST `/auth/refresh`
 2: 
 3: > Обновление access token по refresh token из `httpOnly` cookie. Выполняет ротацию сессии: старый refresh token отзывается, выдаётся новый.
 4: 
 5: **Auth:** Нет (refresh token читается из cookie)  
 6: **Route file:** `internal/handler/auth_handler.go` → `refresh()`  
 7: 
 8: ---
 9: 
10: ## Требования к БД
11: 
12: ### Таблица `refresh_tokens`
13: 
14: **Чтение:**
15: ```sql
16: SELECT * FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = ?
17: ```
18: - Если не найден → `401 invalid session`
19: - Если `revoked_at IS NOT NULL` → **theft detection** → `RevokeAllForUser(userID)` → `401`
20: - Если `expires_at < NOW()` → `401 token expired`
21: 
22: **Отзыв старого токена:**
23: ```sql
24: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?
25: ```
26: 
27: **Создание нового токена:**
28: ```sql
29: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens (user_id, token_hash, expires_at, user_agent, ip_address)
30: VALUES (?, ?, NOW() + interval '15 days', ?, ?)
31: ```
32: 
33: ### Таблица `users`
34: 
35: ```sql
36: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?  -- для получения актуальных данных пользователя
37: ```
38: 
39: ---
40: 
41: ## Функции в программе
42: 
43: ### Handler
44: 
45: ```go
46: // Файл: internal/handler/auth_handler.go:92
47: func (h *Handler) refresh(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
48: ```
49: 
50: **Шаги:**
51: 1. `r.Cookie("refresh_token")` → если нет → `401`
52: 2. Собрать `domain.SessionMeta{UserAgent, IPAddress}`
53: 3. `h.service.Auth.RefreshTokens(ctx, cookie.Value, meta)`
54: 4. При ошибке: очистить cookie `MaxAge: -1` → `401`
55: 5. Успех: установить новую cookie + `200 {"access_token": "...", "expires_in": 900}`
56: 
57: ### Service
58: 
59: ```go
60: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:153
61: func (s *authService) RefreshTokens(ctx, oldRefreshToken string, meta SessionMeta) (*TokenPair, error)
62: ```
63: 
64: **Шаги:**
65: 1. `tokenSvc.HashToken(oldRefreshToken)` → получить SHA-256 хэш
66: 2. `sessionRepo.FindByTokenHash(ctx, hash)` → ErrSessionNotFound → 401
67: 3. Проверка `session.RevokedAt != nil` → **theft detected** → `sessionRepo.RevokeAllForUser(userID)` → ErrSessionNotFound
68: 4. `time.Now().After(session.ExpiresAt)` → ErrTokenExpired
69: 5. `sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, session.ID)` — атомарный отзыв
70: 6. `userRepo.FindByID(ctx, session.UserID)` — актуальные данные пользователя
71: 7. `authService.issueTokens(ctx, user, meta.UserAgent, meta.IPAddress)` — новая пара
72: 
73: ### Repository
74: 
75: ```go
76: tokenSvc.HashToken(rawToken) string                      // SHA-256 hex
77: sessionRepo.FindByTokenHash(ctx, hash) (*RefreshToken, error)
78: sessionRepo.RevokeAllForUser(ctx, userID) error          // theft protection
79: sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, id) error                        // старый токен
80: userRepo.FindByID(ctx, userID) (*User, error)
81: sessionRepo.Create(ctx, rt) (*RefreshToken, error)       // новая сессия
82: ```
````

## File: docs/api/auth-register.md
````markdown
 1: # POST `/auth/register`
 2: 
 3: > Регистрация нового пользователя по логину и паролю. Аккаунт создаётся со статусом `unverified` и ожидает верификации администратором.
 4: 
 5: **Auth:** Нет  
 6: **Route file:** `internal/handler/auth_handler.go` → `register()`  
 7: 
 8: ---
 9: 
10: ## Требования к БД
11: 
12: ### Таблица `users`
13: 
14: | Поле            | Действие при регистрации                          |
15: |-----------------|---------------------------------------------------|
16: | `login`         | Уникальный, проверяется `IsLoginTaken` перед INSERT |
17: | `email`         | Опциональный, уникальный, проверяется `FindByEmail` |
18: | `password_hash` | `bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword(password, cost=12)`   |
19: | `role`          | Устанавливается `unverified`                      |
20: | `status`        | Устанавливается `unverified`                      |
21: | `is_blocked`    | `false` (default)                                 |
22: | `created_at`    | `NOW()` (autoCreateTime GORM)                     |
23: 
24: **Constraints:** `UNIQUE(login)`, `UNIQUE(email)` — нарушение вернёт ошибку `409 Conflict`.
25: 
26: ---
27: 
28: ## Функции в программе
29: 
30: ### Handler
31: 
32: ```go
33: // Файл: internal/handler/auth_handler.go:16
34: func (h *Handler) register(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
35: ```
36: 
37: **Шаги:**
38: 1. Декодировать `dto.RegisterRequest{Login, Email, Password}`
39: 2. Базовая валидация: `login != ""` и `password != ""`
40: 3. Вызов `h.service.Auth.Register(ctx, domain.RegisterInput{Login, Email, Password})`
41: 4. `ErrLoginTaken` / `ErrEmailTaken` → `409 Conflict`
42: 5. Успех → `201 Created` + `{"message": "account pending admin approval"}`
43: 
44: ### Service
45: 
46: ```go
47: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:38
48: func (s *authService) Register(ctx, req RegisterInput) (*User, error)
49: ```
50: 
51: **Шаги:**
52: 1. `userRepo.IsLoginTaken(ctx, login)` → `ErrLoginTaken`
53: 2. `userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email)` (если email задан) → `ErrEmailTaken`
54: 3. `bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(password), 12)`
55: 4. `userRepo.Create(ctx, &User{..., Role: RoleUnverified, Status: StatusUnverified})`
56: 
57: ### Repository
58: 
59: ```go
60: // Файл: internal/repository/user.go
61: userRepo.IsLoginTaken(ctx, login) (bool, error)   // COUNT WHERE login = ?
62: userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email) (*User, error)    // WHERE email = ?
63: userRepo.Create(ctx, u) (*User, error)             // INSERT INTO users
64: ```
````

## File: docs/api/planned-modules.md
````markdown
  1: # Планируемые модули (не реализованы в бэкенде)
  2: 
  3: > Эти эндпоинты описаны в [api-endpoints.md](../api-endpoints.md) и спроектированы, но бэкенд-код для них **ещё не написан**. Ниже — требования к БД и функциям для будущей реализации.
  4: 
  5: ---
  6: 
  7: ## Справочники (`/ref/`)
  8: 
  9: ### GET `/ref/countries`
 10: 
 11: **БД:** таблица `countries` (code VARCHAR PK, name_ru VARCHAR)  
 12: **Функции:** `refRepo.ListCountries(ctx)` — простой `SELECT * FROM countries ORDER BY name_ru`
 13: 
 14: ### GET `/ref/atc`
 15: 
 16: **БД:** таблица `atc_codes` (code VARCHAR PK, name VARCHAR, parent_code nullable)  
 17: **Query param:** `?q=` → `WHERE name ILIKE '%?%' OR code ILIKE '%?%'`  
 18: **Функции:** `refRepo.SearchATC(ctx, query string)`
 19: 
 20: ---
 21: 
 22: ## Products (`/products/`)
 23: 
 24: ### Таблица `products` (= `medicaments` в миграциях)
 25: 
 26: | Поле                  | Тип           |
 27: |-----------------------|---------------|
 28: | `id`                  | UUID PK        |
 29: | `trade_name`          | VARCHAR NOT NULL |
 30: | `mnn`                 | VARCHAR        |
 31: | `sku`                 | VARCHAR UNIQUE |
 32: | `barcode`             | VARCHAR nullable |
 33: | `datamatrix_gtin`     | VARCHAR nullable |
 34: | `ru_number`           | VARCHAR        |
 35: | `atc_codes`           | TEXT[]         |
 36: | `dosage_form`         | VARCHAR        |
 37: | `dosage`              | VARCHAR        |
 38: | `package_multiplicity`| INT            |
 39: | `is_jnvlp`            | BOOLEAN        |
 40: | `is_mdlp`             | BOOLEAN        |
 41: | `is_ns_pv`            | BOOLEAN        |
 42: | `cold_chain`          | BOOLEAN        |
 43: | `temp_min/max`        | NUMERIC nullable |
 44: | `humidity_max`        | NUMERIC nullable |
 45: 
 46: **GET /products:** `SELECT + ILIKE ?q + WHERE is_jnvlp = ? + LIMIT/OFFSET`  
 47: **POST /products:** INSERT с валидацией уникальности `sku`  
 48: **Функции:** `productRepo.List`, `productRepo.FindByID`, `productRepo.Create`, `productRepo.Update`
 49: 
 50: ---
 51: 
 52: ## Suppliers (`/suppliers/`)
 53: 
 54: ### Таблица `suppliers`
 55: 
 56: | Поле             | Тип     |
 57: |------------------|---------|
 58: | `id`             | UUID PK |
 59: | `name`           | VARCHAR |
 60: | `inn`            | VARCHAR UNIQUE |
 61: | `license_number` | VARCHAR nullable |
 62: 
 63: ---
 64: 
 65: ## Inbound (`/inbound/`)
 66: 
 67: ### Таблица `inbound_orders`
 68: 
 69: | Поле                  | Тип           |
 70: |-----------------------|---------------|
 71: | `id`                  | UUID PK        |
 72: | `supplier_id`         | UUID FK        |
 73: | `purchase_type`       | VARCHAR        |
 74: | `invoice_number`      | VARCHAR        |
 75: | `country_of_origin`   | VARCHAR        |
 76: | `manufacturer`        | VARCHAR        |
 77: | `vat_rate`            | VARCHAR        |
 78: | `is_jnvlp_controlled` | BOOLEAN        |
 79: | `jnvlp_markup`        | NUMERIC        |
 80: | `status`              | VARCHAR (quarantine/available/rejected) |
 81: | `created_at`          | TIMESTAMPTZ    |
 82: 
 83: ### Таблица `batches` (серии)
 84: 
 85: | Поле               | Тип        |
 86: |--------------------|------------|
 87: | `id`               | UUID PK     |
 88: | `inbound_order_id` | UUID FK     |
 89: | `product_id`       | UUID FK     |
 90: | `serial_number`    | VARCHAR     |
 91: | `manufacture_date` | DATE        |
 92: | `expiry_date`      | DATE        |
 93: | `quantity`         | INT         |
 94: | `status`           | VARCHAR     |
 95: | `zone_id`          | UUID FK nullable |
 96: 
 97: **POST /inbound/quarantine-release:**
 98: ```sql
 99: UPDATE batches SET status = 'available' WHERE inbound_order_id = ? AND status = 'quarantine'
100: -- При result = 'rejected':
101: UPDATE batches SET status = 'rejected' WHERE inbound_order_id = ?
102: ```
103: 
104: ---
105: 
106: ## Zones (`/zones/`)
107: 
108: ### Таблица `warehouses` (= zones в семантике)
109: 
110: | Поле           | Тип     |
111: |----------------|---------|
112: | `id`           | UUID PK |
113: | `name`         | VARCHAR |
114: | `type`         | ENUM (general, cold_chain, flammable, safe_strong) |
115: | `temp_min/max` | NUMERIC nullable |
116: | `humidity_max` | NUMERIC nullable |
117: 
118: **GET /zones:** фильтрация `safe_strong` → если у пользователя нет `ns_pv_access`, эта зона скрывается
119: 
120: ---
121: 
122: ## Environment Log (`/environment-log/`, `/zones/:id/environment-log`)
123: 
124: ### Таблица `environment_logs`
125: 
126: | Поле          | Тип          |
127: |---------------|--------------|
128: | `id`          | UUID PK       |
129: | `zone_id`     | UUID FK       |
130: | `shift`       | ENUM (morning, evening) |
131: | `temperature` | NUMERIC       |
132: | `humidity`    | NUMERIC       |
133: | `notes`       | TEXT nullable |
134: | `recorded_by` | INT FK → users |
135: | `recorded_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ   |
136: 
137: **Уникальность:** `UNIQUE(zone_id, shift, DATE(recorded_at))` — одна запись на зону за смену в день. При дубле → `400 already_recorded_for_shift`.
138: 
139: ---
140: 
141: ## Orders (`/orders/`)
142: 
143: ### Таблица `orders`
144: 
145: | Поле             | Тип     |
146: |------------------|---------|
147: | `id`             | UUID PK |
148: | `type`           | VARCHAR (regular, cito) |
149: | `destination_id` | UUID FK |
150: | `status`         | VARCHAR (new, assembled, shipped) |
151: | `created_by`     | INT FK  |
152: | `created_at`     | TIMESTAMPTZ |
153: 
154: ### FEFO-сборка
155: 
156: При `GET /orders/:id` → для каждой позиции вычислить рекомендации по FEFO:
157: ```sql
158: SELECT b.* FROM batches b
159: WHERE b.product_id = ? AND b.status = 'available'
160: ORDER BY b.expiry_date ASC  -- First Expired First Out
161: LIMIT 1
162: ```
163: 
164: ### MOS-блокировка при отгрузке
165: 
166: ```sql
167: -- Получить настройку МОС
168: SELECT mos_percent FROM settings WHERE key = 'mos_percent'
169: -- Проверить остатки по каждой серии в заказе
170: -- Серии с MOS < threshold → заблокировать отгрузку
171: ```
172: 
173: ---
174: 
175: ## Inventory (`/inventory/`)
176: 
177: ### Таблица `inventory_sessions`
178: 
179: | Поле         | Тип     |
180: |--------------|---------|
181: | `id`         | UUID PK |
182: | `zone_id`    | UUID FK nullable |
183: | `status`     | VARCHAR (in_progress, completed) |
184: | `created_by` | INT FK  |
185: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ |
186: 
187: ### Таблица `inventory_items`
188: 
189: | Поле           | Тип     |
190: |----------------|---------|
191: | `id`           | UUID PK |
192: | `session_id`   | UUID FK |
193: | `product_id`   | UUID FK |
194: | `batch_id`     | UUID FK |
195: | `expected_qty` | INT     |
196: | `actual_qty`   | INT nullable |
197: 
198: **Слепая инвентаризация:** `expected_qty` скрыт пока `status = 'in_progress'`. При `POST /inventory/:id/complete` → раскрыть `expected_qty`, вычислить расхождения.
199: 
200: ---
201: 
202: ## Claims (`/claims/`)
203: 
204: ### Таблица `claims`
205: 
206: | Поле         | Тип     |
207: |--------------|---------|
208: | `id`         | UUID PK |
209: | `type`       | VARCHAR (defect, recall) |
210: | `product_id` | UUID FK |
211: | `batch_id`   | UUID FK |
212: | `source`     | VARCHAR |
213: | `notes`      | TEXT    |
214: | `status`     | VARCHAR (open, closed) |
215: | `resolution` | TEXT nullable |
216: | `created_by` | INT FK  |
217: | `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ |
218: 
219: ### STOP-сигналы и заблокированные серии
220: 
221: **GET /stop-signals:** серии, перешедшие в статус `blocked` из-за рекламации типа `recall`
222: ```sql
223: SELECT b.serial_number, m.trade_name, c.id AS claim_id
224: FROM batches b
225: JOIN claims c ON c.batch_id = b.id
226: JOIN medicaments m ON m.id = b.product_id
227: WHERE b.status = 'blocked' AND c.type = 'recall'
228: ```
229: 
230: ---
231: 
232: ## Settings (`/settings/`)
233: 
234: ### Таблица `settings`
235: 
236: | Поле    | Тип     | Описание                       |
237: |---------|---------|--------------------------------|
238: | `key`   | VARCHAR PK | Ключ настройки (`mos_percent`) |
239: | `value` | JSONB   | Значение                       |
240: 
241: **GET/PUT /settings/mos:**
242: ```sql
243: SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'mos_percent'
244: UPDATE settings SET value = ? WHERE key = 'mos_percent'
245: ```
````

## File: docs/api/README.md
````markdown
 1: # API Contract
 2: 
 3: ← [Back to Main README](../../README.md)
 4: 
 5: > **⚖️ Authority Rule:** This directory is the **final authority** on all request and response shapes.
 6: > If the Backend implementation and the Frontend expectations ever disagree, the specification in this directory takes precedence. **Update the API doc first, then update the code.**
 7: 
 8: All endpoints are prefixed with `/api/v1/`.
 9: 
10: ---
11: 
12: ## Implemented Endpoints
13: 
14: ### Authentication
15: 
16: | Method | Path | Spec File |
17: |--------|------|-----------|
18: | `POST` | `/auth/send-code` | [auth-send-code.md](./auth-send-code.md) |
19: | `POST` | `/auth/verify-code` | [auth-verify-code.md](./auth-verify-code.md) |
20: | `POST` | `/auth/login` *(Google OAuth)* | [auth-login.md](./auth-login.md) |
21: | `POST` | `/auth/register` | [auth-register.md](./auth-register.md) |
22: | `POST` | `/auth/refresh` | [auth-refresh.md](./auth-refresh.md) |
23: | `POST` | `/auth/logout` | [auth-logout.md](./auth-logout.md) |
24: | `POST` | `/auth/google` | [auth-google.md](./auth-google.md) |
25: 
26: ### Users & Sessions (Admin)
27: 
28: | Method | Path | Spec File |
29: |--------|------|-----------|
30: | `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE` | `/admin/users` | [admin-users.md](./admin-users.md) |
31: | `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE` | `/admin/employees` | [admin-employees.md](./admin-employees.md) |
32: | `GET/DELETE` | `/sessions` | [sessions.md](./sessions.md) |
33: | `GET/PATCH` | `/users/me` | [users.md](./users.md) |
34: 
35: ---
36: 
37: ## Planned (Not Yet Implemented in Backend)
38: 
39: The following modules are **fully specified** but backend handlers have not been written yet.
40: 
41: | Module | Spec File |
42: |--------|-----------|
43: | Products, Suppliers, References | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
44: | Inbound Receiving & Quarantine | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
45: | Warehouse Zones | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
46: | Environment Log | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
47: | Orders & FEFO Assembly | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
48: | Inventory Sessions | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
49: | Claims & Recalls | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
50: | Settings (MOS %) | [planned-modules.md](./planned-modules.md) |
51: 
52: > For full user-flow diagrams of these modules see [`docs/form/`](../form/).
53: 
54: ---
55: 
56: ## Contract Format
57: 
58: Each endpoint spec file follows this structure:
59: 
60: 1. **Overview** — method, path, auth requirement, roles
61: 2. **Request** — headers, path params, query params, body schema
62: 3. **Response** — success shape, error codes
63: 4. **Examples** — curl / JSON samples
64: 
65: ---
66: 
67: ## Swagger / OpenAPI
68: 
69: Swagger generation is configured in [`docs.go`](./docs.go). The generated `swagger.json` / `swagger.yaml` are placeholders until full annotation is complete.
70: 
71: Legacy monolith reference: [`docs/api-endpoints.md`](../api-endpoints.md) *(kept for historical reference; prefer individual spec files above)*.
````

## File: docs/api/sessions.md
````markdown
 1: # Sessions API
 2: 
 3: ## DELETE `/api/v1/sessions/{sessionID}`
 4: 
 5: > Отозвать конкретную сессию текущего пользователя.
 6: 
 7: **Auth:** Bearer (все роли)  
 8: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_handler.go` → `revokeSession()`  
 9: 
10: ---
11: 
12: ## Требования к БД
13: 
14: ### Таблица `refresh_tokens`
15: 
16: ```sql
17: SELECT * FROM refresh_tokens WHERE id = ?  -- проверка владельца
18: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?  -- отзыв
19: ```
20: 
21: **Проверка:** `session.UserID` должен совпадать с `callerID` из JWT. Иначе `ErrInsufficientPerms`.
22: 
23: ---
24: 
25: ## Функции в программе
26: 
27: ### Handler
28: 
29: ```go
30: // Файл: internal/handler/admin_handler.go:83
31: func (h *Handler) revokeSession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
32: ```
33: 
34: 1. `chi.URLParam(r, "sessionID")` → `uuid.Parse(...)`
35: 2. Извлечь `callerID` и `callerRole` из контекста
36: 3. `h.service.Auth.RevokeSession(ctx, sessionID, callerID, callerRole)`
37: 4. `204 No Content`
38: 
39: ### Service
40: 
41: ```go
42: // Файл: internal/service/auth_service.go:183
43: func (s *authService) RevokeSession(ctx, sessionID uuid.UUID, callerID int, callerRole UserRole) error
44: ```
45: 
46: 1. `sessionRepo.FindByID(ctx, sessionID)`
47: 2. Если `sess.UserID != callerID && callerRole != RoleAdmin` → `ErrInsufficientPerms`
48: 3. `sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, sessionID)` → `SET revoked_at = NOW()`
49: 
50: ---
51: 
52: ## DELETE `/api/v1/admin/sessions/{sessionID}` *(admin)*
53: 
54: > Администратор может отозвать любую сессию любого пользователя.
55: 
56: **Auth:** `admin`  
57: **Route file:** `internal/handler/admin_handler.go` → `adminRevokeSession()`  
58: 
59: ### Требования к БД
60: 
61: Идентично обычному `revokeSession`, но проверка роли уже выполнена middleware `RequireRole("admin")`, поэтому `callerRole == admin` всегда выполняется.
62: 
63: ### Функции в программе
64: 
65: ```go
66: // Файл: internal/handler/admin_handler.go:63
67: func (h *Handler) adminRevokeSession(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request)
68: // Вызывает ту же h.service.Auth.RevokeSession(ctx, sessionID, callerID, callerRole)
69: // callerRole = admin → проверка владельца bypassed
70: ```
````

## File: docs/api/users.md
````markdown
  1: # Users API
  2: 
  3: ## GET `/users/me`
  4: 
  5: > Получить профиль текущего авторизованного пользователя.
  6: 
  7: **Auth:** Bearer (все роли)  
  8: **Route file:** *(планируется)* `internal/handler/user_handler.go`  
  9: 
 10: ### Требования к БД
 11: 
 12: #### Таблица `users` + `employee_profiles`
 13: 
 14: ```sql
 15: SELECT u.*, ep.*
 16: FROM users u
 17: LEFT JOIN employee_profiles ep ON ep.user_id = u.id
 18: WHERE u.id = ?   -- из JWT claims.UserID
 19: ```
 20: 
 21: Реализовано через `userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(ctx, userID)` — `internal/repository/user.go:192`.
 22: 
 23: ### Функции в программе
 24: 
 25: **Handler (планируется):**
 26: ```go
 27: func (h *Handler) getMe(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 28:     userID := r.Context().Value(middleware.CtxUserID).(int)
 29:     profile, err := h.service.User.GetProfile(ctx, userID)
 30:     // → 200 UserDTO
 31: }
 32: ```
 33: 
 34: **Repository (существует):**
 35: ```go
 36: // Файл: internal/repository/user.go:192
 37: userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(ctx, userID) (*domain.UserProfile, error)
 38: // SELECT users + LEFT JOIN employee_profiles WHERE user_id = ?
 39: ```
 40: 
 41: ---
 42: 
 43: ## POST `/users/me/medical-book`
 44: 
 45: > Загрузить PDF/фото медицинской книжки.
 46: 
 47: **Auth:** Bearer (все роли)  
 48: **Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data`
 49: 
 50: ### Требования к БД
 51: 
 52: #### Таблица `employee_profiles`
 53: 
 54: ```sql
 55: UPDATE employee_profiles SET medical_book_scan_url = ? WHERE user_id = ?
 56: ```
 57: 
 58: | Поле                   | Действие                                          |
 59: |------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|
 60: | `medical_book_scan_url`| URL в S3/локальное хранилище после загрузки файла |
 61: 
 62: ### Функции в программе
 63: 
 64: **Высокоуровневый порядок:**
 65: 1. Принять файл из `multipart/form-data`
 66: 2. Сохранить файл в хранилище (S3 или локально), получить URL
 67: 3. `employeeProfileRepo.Update(ctx, userID, &EmployeeProfile{MedicalBookScanURL: url})`
 68: 
 69: ---
 70: 
 71: ## GET `/users` *(admin)*
 72: 
 73: > Список всех пользователей с фильтрацией и пагинацией.
 74: 
 75: **Auth:** `admin`
 76: 
 77: ### Требования к БД
 78: 
 79: ```sql
 80: SELECT u.*, ep.*
 81: FROM users u
 82: LEFT JOIN employee_profiles ep ON ep.user_id = u.id
 83: WHERE (u.login ILIKE ? OR u.email ILIKE ? OR ep.full_name ILIKE ?)  -- ?q
 84:   AND (u.role = ?)  -- ?role
 85: ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
 86: LIMIT ? OFFSET ?   -- ?page, ?limit
 87: ```
 88: 
 89: ### Функции в программе
 90: 
 91: **Repository (нужно добавить):**
 92: ```go
 93: userRepo.List(ctx, filter UserListFilter) ([]*UserProfile, int, error)
 94: // filter: { Query, Role, Page, Limit }
 95: ```
 96: 
 97: ---
 98: 
 99: ## GET `/users/:id` *(admin)*
100: 
101: > Профиль конкретного пользователя.
102: 
103: ### Требования к БД
104: 
105: ```sql
106: -- Аналогично /users/me, но по произвольному id
107: SELECT u.*, ep.* FROM users u LEFT JOIN employee_profiles ep ON ep.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = ?
108: ```
109: 
110: **Repository:** `userRepo.FindProfileByUserID(ctx, id)` — `internal/repository/user.go:192`
111: 
112: ---
113: 
114: ## PATCH `/users/:id` *(admin)*
115: 
116: > Обновить роль / допуски сотрудника.
117: 
118: ### Требования к БД
119: 
120: #### Таблица `users`
121: 
122: ```sql
123: UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?
124: -- если role передан
125: ```
126: 
127: #### Таблица `employee_profiles`
128: 
129: ```sql
130: UPDATE employee_profiles SET special_zone_access = ?, ns_pv_access = ? WHERE user_id = ?
131: -- если ns_pv_access / special_zone_access переданы
132: ```
133: 
134: **Реализованные функции:**
135: ```go
136: userRepo.UpdateRole(ctx, userID, role)     // internal/repository/user.go:137
137: // + нужно добавить обновление employee_profiles
138: ```
139: 
140: ---
141: 
142: ## POST `/users/:id/send-login-link` *(admin)*
143: 
144: > Выслать новый OTP-код для входа сотруднику (аналог `/auth/send-code`, триггер — администратор).
145: 
146: ### Требования к БД
147: 
148: Аналогично [auth-send-code.md](./auth-send-code.md) — создание записи в `otp_codes` для указанного `user_id`.
149: 
150: ### Функции в программе
151: 
152: ```go
153: // Handler вызывает: service.Auth.SendOTPCode(ctx, user.Email)
154: // Предварительно: userRepo.FindByID(ctx, id) — получить email пользователя
155: ```
````

## File: docs/backend/README.md
````markdown
  1: # Backend — Local Setup & Developer Guide
  2: 
  3: ← [Back to Main README](../../README.md) | [Full Sub-Docs Index →](../../docs/backend.md)
  4: 
  5: > ⛔ **Branch Rule:** All backend code **must** be written in `develop-backend` only.
  6: > Direct commits to `main` or `develop-frontend` are strictly forbidden.
  7: > Merging into `main` is done exclusively via the [`/merge-all`](../other/git-workflow.md) workflow.
  8: 
  9: > **AI Context & Navigation:** This README is the entry point for the backend. Before writing or editing code, you MUST know what rules apply:
 10: > - **Architecture & Commits:** Read [**`sop.md`**](./sop.md). It is the supreme authority.
 11: > - **Logging:** You MUST use the custom logger, not `fmt`. Read [**`logging.md`**](./logging.md).
 12: > - **DB Schema:** Check [`migrations.md`](./migrations.md) or [`../database-schema.md`](../database-schema.md).
 13: > - **Domain/Repo details:** See [`domain-repository-service.md`](./domain-repository-service.md) and [`architecture.md`](./architecture.md).
 14: 
 15: ---
 16: 
 17: ## Tech Stack
 18: 
 19: | Component | Library / Tool | Version |
 20: |-----------|---------------|---------|
 21: | HTTP Router | `github.com/go-chi/chi/v5` | v5.1.0 |
 22: | ORM | `gorm.io/gorm` + `gorm.io/driver/postgres` | v1.31.1 |
 23: | JWT | `github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5` | v5.3.1 |
 24: | UUID | `github.com/google/uuid` | v1.6.0 |
 25: | Config | `github.com/ilyakaznacheev/cleanenv` | v1.5.0 |
 26: | Google OAuth | `google.golang.org/api/idtoken` | — |
 27: | Logger | stdlib `log/slog` (custom context wrapper) | — |
 28: | DB Migrations | SQL files in `migrate/`, `golang-migrate` | — |
 29: | Database | PostgreSQL 17 via pgx/v5 (under GORM) | — |
 30: | Cache | Valkey 8 (Redis-compatible) | — |
 31: 
 32: > **Logging Rule:** Never use `fmt.Println` / `fmt.Printf`. Always use the context-aware logger:
 33: > ```go
 34: > log := logger.FromContext(ctx)
 35: > log.Info("message", "key", value)
 36: > ```
 37: 
 38: ---
 39: 
 40: ## Directory Structure
 41: 
 42: ```
 43: backend/
 44: ├── cmd/
 45: │   └── main.go           ← entry point
 46: ├── internal/
 47: │   ├── config/           ← env config (cleanenv)
 48: │   ├── domain/           ← interfaces + pure models (no JSON/GORM tags)
 49: │   ├── handler/
 50: │   │   ├── dto/          ← request/response DTOs (json + validate tags)
 51: │   │   ├── middleware/   ← AuthRequired, RequireRole
 52: │   │   └── handler.go    ← chi router assembly
 53: │   ├── repository/
 54: │   │   ├── dao/          ← GORM DAO structs (gorm tags, TableName())
 55: │   │   └── postgres.go   ← GORM + pgx connection
 56: │   └── service/          ← business logic
 57: ├── migrate/              ← SQL migration files (*.up.sql / *.down.sql)
 58: ├── Dockerfile
 59: └── .env.example
 60: ```
 61: 
 62: ---
 63: 
 64: ## Running Locally
 65: 
 66: ```bash
 67: # From the monorepo root — start all services (PostgreSQL, Valkey, Backend, Frontend)
 68: docker compose --profile all up -d
 69: 
 70: # Backend + DB + cache only (for backend development)
 71: docker compose --profile backend-all up -d
 72: 
 73: # Watch backend logs
 74: docker compose logs -f backend
 75: ```
 76: 
 77: ---
 78: 
 79: ## Database Migrations
 80: 
 81: Migrations run automatically via the `migrate` Docker Compose service on startup.
 82: 
 83: ### Apply all pending migrations (manual)
 84: 
 85: ```bash
 86: docker compose run --rm migrate
 87: ```
 88: 
 89: ### Roll back last migration
 90: 
 91: ```bash
 92: docker compose --profile tools run --rm migrate-down
 93: ```
 94: 
 95: ### Run via CLI directly
 96: 
 97: ```bash
 98: docker run --rm \
 99:   --network my_diplom_network \
100:   -v "$(pwd)/backend/migrate:/migrations" \
101:   migrate/migrate \
102:   -path=/migrations \
103:   -database "postgres://${DB_USER}:${DB_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${DB_NAME}?sslmode=disable" \
104:   up
105: ```
106: 
107: > Before running: ensure the `postgres` container is healthy:
108: > ```bash
109: > docker compose up -d postgres
110: > ```
111: > Variables `DB_USER`, `DB_PASSWORD`, `DB_NAME` are loaded from `.env` (see `.env.example`).
112: 
113: ---
114: 
115: ## Environment Variables
116: 
117: | Variable | Required | Default | Description |
118: |----------|----------|---------|-------------|
119: | `PORT` | No | 8080 | HTTP server port |
120: | `DB_HOST` | **Yes** | — | PostgreSQL host |
121: | `DB_PORT` | No | 5432 | PostgreSQL port |
122: | `DB_USER` | **Yes** | — | DB username |
123: | `DB_NAME` | **Yes** | — | Database name |
124: | `DB_PASSWORD` | **Yes** | — | DB password |
125: | `JWT_SECRET` | **Yes** | — | JWT signing secret (HS256) |
126: | `ADMIN_EMAIL` | **Yes** | — | Seed admin user email (bootstrap) |
127: | `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` | No | — | Google OAuth client ID |
128: | `VALKEY_PORT` | No | 6379 | Valkey port |
129: 
130: ---
131: 
132: ## Navigation Directory
133: 
134: To prevent context bloat, read only the files you need for your current task:
135: 
136: → **SOP & Core Rules (Errors, TDD, Flow):** [`sop.md`](./sop.md) (Mandatory read before coding)
137: → **Logging Rules (No fmt allowed):** [`logging.md`](./logging.md) (Strictly enforced)
138: → **Architecture & Folder Info:** [`architecture.md`](./architecture.md)
139: → **Routing & Handlers:** [`routing.md`](./routing.md)
140: → **Domain & Service Layer:** [`domain-repository-service.md`](./domain-repository-service.md)
141: → **Auth Rules (Tokens, Roles):** [`auth.md`](./auth.md)
142: → **Migrations List:** [`migrations.md`](./migrations.md)
143: → **Test Rules:** [`test.md`](./test.md)
````

## File: docs/backend/sop.md
````markdown
  1: # Backend — Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
  2: 
  3: ← [Back to Main README](../../README.md) | [Architecture →](./architecture.md) | [Testing Notes →](./test.md)
  4: 
  5: > **Authority:** This document is the single source of truth for all backend development decisions.
  6: > When this SOP conflicts with any other document, **this SOP wins**.
  7: > All rules below are non-negotiable unless explicitly revised here.
  8: 
  9: ---
 10: 
 11: ## Table of Contents
 12: 
 13: 1. [Onion Architecture Canon](#1-onion-architecture-canon)
 14: 2. [Error Handling](#2-error-handling)
 15: 3. [Logging Standard](#3-logging-standard)
 16: 4. [TDD / BDD Development Cycle](#4-tdd--bdd-development-cycle)
 17: 5. [Swagger / API Synchronization](#5-swagger--api-synchronization)
 18: 
 19: > **Git & Release Workflow** (merge into `main`, `/merge-all`, `/start-again`) → [`docs/other/git-workflow.md`](../other/git-workflow.md)
 20: 
 21: ---
 22: 
 23: ## 1. Onion Architecture Canon
 24: 
 25: ### 1.1 Layer Call Rules
 26: 
 27: Dependencies flow **inward only**. No exceptions.
 28: 
 29: ```
 30: Handler  →  Service  →  Repository  →  (Database)
 31:    ↑              ↑              ↑
 32:  Domain         Domain         Domain
 33: (types,       (types,        (types,
 34:  errors,       errors,        errors,
 35:  interfaces)   interfaces)    interfaces)
 36: ```
 37: 
 38: | ✅ Allowed | ❌ Forbidden |
 39: |-----------|------------|
