 97:   Temperature to:   [Input] °C
 98:   Max humidity:     [Input] %
 99: 
100: Dimensions:
101:   Weight: [Input] g
102:   W × H × D: [Input] × [Input] × [Input] mm
103: 
104: Photo:
105:   [Upload primary photo] ← drag-and-drop
106: ```
107: 
108: ---
109: 
110: ## Admin Block
111: 
112: - "Edit" button — `admin` only
113: - "Create product" button — `admin` only
114: - Products with `is_ns_pv = true` are visible to **all users**, but the "Stock" tab is visible only to `admin` and `ns_pv_access: true`
115: - For `is_ns_pv = true` products, the edit form shows an additional "Schedule II/III requirements" section — `admin` only
116: 
117: ---
118: 
119: ## Spec Reference
120: 
121: → [Forms Index — Section 5.1 Product Card](./index.md#51-product-card--08-product-cardmd)
122: → Logic, Zod schema, API contracts, flag rendering: [`forms-logic.md §9`](../forms-logic.md#9-product-card)
````

## File: docs/frontend/forms/09-inventory.md
````markdown
  1: # Form 5.2: Inventory
  2: 
  3: ← [Back to Forms Index](./index.md) | [← Product Card](./08-product-card.md)
  4: 
  5: > **UI Spec only.** For Zod schema, API contracts, blind inventory mechanism, and netting act logic → [`forms-logic.md §10`](../forms-logic.md#10-inventory)
  6: 
  7: ## Requirements Checklist
  8: 
  9: - [ ] Table `inventory_sessions`: `id`, `status: enum(draft, in_progress, completed, cancelled)`, `started_by`, `started_at`, `completed_at`, `zone_id` (null = entire warehouse)
 10: - [ ] Table `inventory_items`: `id`, `session_id`, `product_id`, `batch_id`, `expected_qty` (from system), `actual_qty` (entered by employee), `discrepancy` (calc: actual - expected)
 11: - [ ] Table `inventory_samples`: `id`, `session_id`, `product_id`, `batch_id`, `qty` — lab control samples tracking
 12: - [ ] Table `price_groups`: `id`, `name`, `price_range_from`, `price_range_to` — price groups for recount act
 13: - [ ] Backend: `POST /api/v1/inventory` — (admin/qp/warehouse_manager) start inventory session
 14: - [ ] Backend: `GET /api/v1/inventory/:id` — session details
 15: - [ ] Backend: `PUT /api/v1/inventory/:id/items/:item_id` — enter actual quantity
 16: - [ ] Backend: `POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/complete` — (admin/qp) complete session, record discrepancies
 17: - [ ] Backend: `POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/writeoff-act` — (admin) surplus/deficit netting act
 18: - [ ] **Blind inventory:** employees do not see `expected_qty` until the session is completed
 19: - [ ] shadcn/ui: `npx shadcn@latest add progress alert-dialog`
 20: 
 21: ---
 22: 
 23: ## UI
 24: 
 25: ### Page Layout
 26: 
 27: - `/inventory` — list of inventory sessions
 28: - `/inventory/:id` — active inventory page (product search + quantity entry)
 29: - `/inventory/:id/results` — results (only after completion)
 30: 
 31: ### shadcn/ui Components
 32: 
 33: | Component | Purpose |
 34: |-----------|---------|
 35: | `<Table>` | Session list, item entry list |
 36: | `<Badge>` | Session status |
 37: | `<Progress>` | Item entry progress |
 38: | `<Input>` | Actual quantity entry |
 39: | `<Combobox>` | Product search by INN/SKU/DataMatrix |
 40: | `<Alert>` | Large discrepancy warning |
 41: | `<AlertDialog>` | Inventory completion confirmation |
 42: | `<Dialog>` | Recount act form (admin) |
 43: | `<Card>` | Discrepancy summary card |
 44: | `<Tabs>` | Surpluses / Shortfalls / OK — in results |
 45: 
 46: ### UI Structure — Entry (Blind Inventory)
 47: 
 48: ```
 49: ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 50: │  Inventory #5 | Full warehouse                        │
 51: │  Progress: ████████░░ 120 of 145 items               │
 52: │  ────────────────────────────────────────────────    │
 53: │  Find product: [Combobox: INN / SKU / DataMatrix]    │
 54: │                                                       │
 55: │  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐     │
 56: │  │ Amoxicillin 500mg | Batch A2025B             │     │
 57: │  │ Actual qty: [____] pcs    [Save]             │     │
 58: │  └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘     │
 59: │  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────   │
 60: │  ⚠ 12 items not yet checked                          │
 61: │                                                       │
 62: │  [Complete inventory]                                 │
 63: └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
 64: ```
 65: 
 66: > **Important:** `expected_qty` is **hidden** until the session is completed.  
 67: > Only after `POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/complete` does it become visible.
 68: 
 69: ### UI Structure — Results (after completion)
 70: 
 71: ```
 72: ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 73: │  Inventory #5 Results                                 │
 74: │  [Surpluses (+7)] [Shortfalls (-12)] [OK (126)]      │
 75: ├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
 76: │  "Shortfalls" tab:                                    │
 77: │  │ INN │ Batch │ Expected │ Actual │ Diff │          │
 78: │  │ Amo │A2025B │    20    │   17   │  -3  │          │
 79: │  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────   │
 80: │  🔐 [Surplus/Deficit Netting Act] ← admin only       │
 81: └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
 82: ```
 83: 
 84: ---
 85: 
 86: ## Admin Block
 87: 
 88: | Action | Who |
 89: |--------|-----|
 90: | Start inventory session | `admin`, `qp`, `warehouse_manager` |
 91: | Enter actual quantities | all users with warehouse access |
 92: | Complete inventory | `admin`, `qp` |
 93: | Surplus/deficit netting act | **`admin` only** |
 94: | Cancel inventory | **`admin` only** |
 95: 
 96: In results (`/inventory/:id/results`), the "Netting Act" block is hidden from everyone except `admin`.
 97: 
 98: ---
 99: 
100: ## Spec Reference
101: 
102: → [Forms Index — Section 5.2 Inventory](./index.md#52-inventory--09-inventorymd)
103: → Logic, Zod schema, blind inventory, API contracts: [`forms-logic.md §10`](../forms-logic.md#10-inventory)
````

## File: docs/frontend/forms/index.md
````markdown
  1: # Frontend Forms — Index
  2: 
  3: ← [Back to Main README](../../../README.md) | [Frontend Overview →](../README.md) | [Conventions →](../conventions.md)
  4: 
  5: This directory contains implementation specs for every ERP screen: required backend endpoints, Valkey keys, shadcn/ui components, Zod schemas, and API request/response shapes.
  6: 
  7: ---
  8: 
  9: ## Form List
 10: 
 11: | # | Form | Phase | Description |
 12: |---|------|-------|-------------|
 13: | 01 | [Auth — Login](./01-auth-login.md) | 1 | Email OTP login, Google OAuth |
 14: | 01b | [Auth — Email OTP Verify](./01b-email-otp-verify.md) | 1 | 6-digit code confirmation |
 15: | 02 | [Employee Profile](./02-employee-profile.md) | 1 | Profile, GDP training, access flags |
 16: | 03 | [Inbound Receiving](./03-inbound-receiving.md) | 1 | Goods receipt, quarantine, Inbound form |
 17: | 04 | [Warehouse Zoning](./04-warehouse-zoning.md) | 1 | Zone management and storage rules |
 18: | 05 | [Environment Log](./05-environment-log.md) | 3 | Temperature/humidity shift logging |
 19: | 06 | [Assembly & Shipment (FEFO)](./06-assembly-shipment-fefo.md) | 2 | FEFO picking, MOS control, TTN |
 20: | 07 | [Claims & Defects](./07-claims-defects.md) | 3 | Returns, recalls, Roszdravnadzor STOP signals |
 21: | 08 | [Product Card](./08-product-card.md) | 1 | Master data for medicaments |
 22: | 09 | [Inventory](./09-inventory.md) | 2 | Blind stocktaking |
 23: 
 24: ---
 25: 
 26: ## Related Documentation
 27: 
 28: | Document | Description |
 29: |----------|-------------|
 30: | [API Contract Index](../../api/README.md) | Full endpoint contract |
 31: | [Database Schema](../../Diplom/migrate.md) | Full SQL schema |
 32: | [Valkey Cache](../../valkey-cache.md) | Valkey data: OTP, cache, rate limiting |
 33: | [Frontend Conventions](../conventions.md) | Tech stack and coding standards |
 34: 
 35: ---
 36: 
 37: ## 1. Common UI Elements
 38: 
 39: ### 1.1 Header
 40: - **Elements:** Logo, Navigation, Profile (UKEP status), Notification center.
 41: - **Global search:** Search by INN, SKU, Batch number, **DataMatrix (KIZ)**, Barcode, Registration certificate #.
 42: 
 43: ### 1.2 Footer
 44: - **Legal data:** License number, expiry, name of the Authorized Person on shift.
 45: - **Technical data:** Server status, DB version, GIS sync indicator (Chestny Znak / MDLP).
 46: 
 47: ---
 48: 
 49: ## 2. Access & Security
 50: 
 51: ### 2.1 Auth — Login → [01-auth-login.md](./01-auth-login.md)
 52: - **Login:** Email OTP / Google OAuth + mandatory **UKEP** binding for responsible persons.
 53: - **Roles:** Admin, QP (Authorized Person), Warehouse Manager, Storekeeper, Pharmacist.
 54: - **Access flags (admin):** Separate flag for **NS/PV** (Narcotic and Psychotropic substances) access.
 55: 
 56: ### 2.1b Auth — Email OTP Verify → [01b-email-otp-verify.md](./01b-email-otp-verify.md)
 57: - **Flow:** User enters 6-digit code from email. Code stored in Valkey (TTL 10 min, max 3 attempts).
 58: 
 59: ### 2.2 Employee Profile → [02-employee-profile.md](./02-employee-profile.md)
 60: - **Data:** Medical book scan, GDP training history, special zone access status.
 61: 
 62: ---
 63: 
 64: ## 3. Warehouse: Receiving & Quarantine
 65: 
 66: ### 3.1 Inbound Receiving → [03-inbound-receiving.md](./03-inbound-receiving.md)
 67: - **Main fields:** Supplier, Purchase type, Invoice #, Country, Manufacturer, **Registration certificate #**.
 68: - **Batch data:** Batch #, Manufacture date, **Expiry date**.
 69: - **Finance:** VAT rate, JNVLP markup control.
 70: - **Quarantine status:** Received goods are system-blocked from all movements.
 71: - **Release (admin/QP):** Acceptance protocol. Goods move to "available" only after QP signs off.
 72: 
 73: ### 3.2 Warehouse Zoning → [04-warehouse-zoning.md](./04-warehouse-zoning.md)
 74: - **Zones:** General, Cold chain (refrigerators), Flammable/alcohol, Safe zone (NS/PV, PKU).
 75: 
 76: ### 3.3 Environment Log → [05-environment-log.md](./05-environment-log.md)
 77: - **Log:** Daily entry form (2x/day): temperature and humidity per zone.
 78: 
 79: ---
 80: 
 81: ## 4. Logistics & Distribution
 82: 
 83: ### 4.1 Assembly & Shipment (FEFO) → [06-assembly-shipment-fefo.md](./06-assembly-shipment-fefo.md)
 84: - **FEFO logic:** System proposes batches with the **shortest remaining shelf life** (First Expired, First Out).
 85: - **MOS control:** Shipment blocked if remaining shelf life < 60% (configurable).
 86: - **Documentation:** Auto-generated quality certificate registry per TTN.
 87: - **Cito!:** Urgent orders jump the assembly queue.
 88: 
 89: ### 4.2 Claims & Defects → [07-claims-defects.md](./07-claims-defects.md)
 90: - **Roszdravnadzor integration:** Auto-import of recalled batches. Matching batch → immediate STOP signal.
 91: - **Returns:** Returns from pharmacies and to supplier, with photo evidence.
 92: 
 93: ---
 94: 
 95: ## 5. Master Data
 96: 
 97: ### 5.1 Product Card → [08-product-card.md](./08-product-card.md)
 98: - **Master data:** Photo, INN, **ATC classification**, Package multiplicity, dimensions/weight.
 99: - **Flags:** JNVLP, MDLP (labeling), NS/PV (PKU), Cold chain.
100: - **Storage:** Temperature range and **max humidity**.
101: 
102: ### 5.2 Inventory → [09-inventory.md](./09-inventory.md)
103: - **Mechanism:** Blind inventory (expected qty hidden until session closed).
104: - **Recount act (admin):** Netting surpluses and shortfalls within one price group.
105: - **Samples:** Tracking opened packages (control samples for the lab).
106: 
107: ---
108: 
109: ## 6. Analytics & Audit
110: 
111: ### 6.1 Reporting
112: - **Expiry risk report:** 3/6/12-month financial risk analysis.
113: - **Turnover analysis:** ABC/XYZ analysis.
114: 
115: ### 6.2 Audit (admin)
116: - **Versioning:** Full history of all quality certificates.
117: - **Immutable Logs:** SHA-256 chain hashing for every package action.
118: 
119: ---
120: 
121: ## Roadmap (Priority 2026)
122: 
123: ### Phase 1 — "Survive" (Month 1-2)
124: - Auth, Users (Roles/Access flags).
125: - Product card (INN, registration #, NS/PV flags).
126: - Inbound → quarantine + expiry date.
127: - **Goal:** Start accounting without violating basic regulations.
128: 
129: ### Phase 2 — "Regulatory Shield" (Month 3-4)
130: - **FEFO algorithm:** Replace standard FIFO.
131: - **DataMatrix labeling:** Integration with Chestny Znak.
132: - **JNVLP pricing control.**
133: - **Goal:** Protection from fines and batch expiry mix-ups.
134: 
135: ### Phase 3 — "Safety & Quality" (Month 5-6)
136: - **UKEP (e-signature):** Acceptance and release protocols.
137: - **Environment logs:** Temperature and humidity.
138: - **Defect blocking:** Sync with recalled batch registries.
139: - **Goal:** Full compliance with GDP/GSP standards.
140: 
141: ### Phase 4 — "Optimization" (Month 7+)
142: - **Address storage:** Racks/Cells.
143: - **Analytics:** ABC/XYZ and loss forecasting.
144: - **Logistics:** MOS (remaining shelf life) and dimension control.
145: - **Goal:** Maximize profit and reduce logistics costs.
````

## File: docs/frontend/conventions.md
````markdown
  1: # Frontend — Stack & Conventions (Full Reference)
  2: 
  3: ← [Back to Main README](../../README.md) | [Frontend Overview →](./README.md) | [Forms →](./forms/)
  4: 
  5: ---
  6: 
  7: ## Framework
  8: 
  9: **Next.js 16 — App Router**
 10: 
 11: - Application directory: `frontend/src/app/`
 12: - Uses App Router (not Pages Router)
 13: - Route groups for layout isolation:
 14:   - `(app)/` — main interface (Header + Footer)
 15:   - `(auth)/` — login pages (simplified layout)
 16:   - `(admin)/` — admin section
 17: - Server Components by default; `"use client"` only where state/interactivity is needed
 18: - Language: **TypeScript** (strict mode)
 19: - React version: **19**
 20: 
 21: ---
 22: 
 23: ## Styling
 24: 
 25: ### Tailwind CSS v4
 26: 
 27: Uses **Tailwind CSS v4** with `@import "tailwindcss"` (not the legacy `@tailwind base` syntax).
 28: 
 29: Theme configuration is overridden via `@theme inline` in `globals.css`.
 30: 
 31: ### Color Rule — CRITICAL
 32: 
 33: **Only use semantic variables from `globals.css`. No raw Tailwind color utilities.**
 34: 
 35: | ❌ Forbidden | ✅ Correct |
 36: |-------------|-----------|
 37: | `bg-gray-800` | `bg-primary` |
 38: | `text-white` | `text-primary-foreground` |
 39: | `bg-green-500` | `bg-secondary` |
 40: | `text-red-500` | `text-destructive` |
 41: | `bg-gray-100` | `bg-muted` |
 42: | `border-gray-200` | `border-border` |
 43: | `text-gray-500` | `text-muted-foreground` |
 44: 
 45: ### Theme Variables (`globals.css`)
 46: 
 47: ```
 48: --background          Main page background
 49: --foreground          Main text color
 50: --card                Card background
 51: --card-foreground     Text on cards
 52: --primary             Buttons, active elements (#181619)
 53: --primary-foreground  Text on primary (#ffffff)
 54: --secondary           Accent / brand color (#006b58)
 55: --secondary-foreground Text on secondary (#ffffff)
 56: --muted               Muted background (#f3f3f3)
 57: --muted-foreground    Muted text (#7a767a)
 58: --accent              Hover background (#e2e2e2)
 59: --accent-foreground   Text on accent (#49454a)
 60: --destructive         Errors, delete actions (#ba1a1a)
 61: --destructive-foreground Text on destructive (#ffffff)
 62: --border              Border color (#e2e2e2)
 63: --input               Input border color (#e2e2e2)
 64: --ring                Focus ring color (#006b58)
 65: --blue                Informational (#0077ff)
 66: --blue-foreground     Text on blue (#ffffff)
 67: ```
 68: 
 69: Corner radius via `--radius` (0.625rem); use `rounded-sm`, `rounded-md`, `rounded-lg`, `rounded-xl` — they are bound to `--radius` via `@theme`.
 70: 
 71: ### `cn()` — required for conditional classes
 72: 
 73: ```ts
 74: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 75: // Internally: clsx + tailwind-merge
 76: cn("base-class", condition && "conditional-class", className)
 77: ```
 78: 
 79: ---
 80: 
 81: ## UI Components — shadcn/ui
 82: 
 83: Components live in `src/components/ui/`. Import via `@/components/ui/...`.
 84: 
 85: ### Installed Components
 86: 
 87: | File | Components |
 88: |------|-----------|
 89: | `avatar.tsx` | `Avatar`, `AvatarImage`, `AvatarFallback` |
 90: | `badge.tsx` | `Badge` |
 91: | `button.tsx` | `Button` |
 92: | `button-group.tsx` | `ButtonGroup` (custom) |
 93: | `calendar.tsx` | `Calendar` |
 94: | `card.tsx` | `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardContent`, `CardFooter` |
 95: | `checkbox.tsx` | `Checkbox` |
 96: | `command.tsx` | `Command`, `CommandInput`, `CommandList`, `CommandItem`, `CommandGroup`, `CommandEmpty` |
 97: | `date-picker.tsx` | `DatePicker` (wrapper over Calendar + Popover) |
 98: | `dialog.tsx` | `Dialog`, `DialogContent`, `DialogHeader`, `DialogTitle`, `DialogFooter` |
 99: | `dropdown-menu.tsx` | `DropdownMenu`, `DropdownMenuTrigger`, `DropdownMenuContent`, `DropdownMenuItem` |
100: | `input.tsx` | `Input` |
101: | `input-group.tsx` | `InputGroup` (custom) |
102: | `label.tsx` | `Label` |
103: | `multi-select.tsx` | `MultiSelect` (custom, via Command + Popover + Badge) |
104: | `pagination.tsx` | `Pagination` |
105: | `popover.tsx` | `Popover`, `PopoverTrigger`, `PopoverContent` |
106: | `select.tsx` | `Select`, `SelectContent`, `SelectItem`, `SelectTrigger`, `SelectValue` |
107: | `separator.tsx` | `Separator` |
108: | `table.tsx` | `Table`, `TableHeader`, `TableBody`, `TableRow`, `TableHead`, `TableCell` |
109: | `tabs.tsx` | `Tabs`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`, `TabsContent` |
110: | `textarea.tsx` | `Textarea` |
111: | `toggle.tsx` | `Toggle` |
112: | `toggle-group.tsx` | `ToggleGroup`, `ToggleGroupItem` |
113: 
114: ### Installing New Components
115: 
116: ```bash
117: npx shadcn@latest add <component-name>
118: ```
119: 
120: > Components are placed in `src/components/ui/` and automatically use variables from `globals.css`.
121: 
122: ---
123: 
124: ## Icons
125: 
126: **lucide-react** — the only icon library used.
127: 
128: ```tsx
129: import { Bell, Search, Package } from "lucide-react"
130: <Bell className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
131: ```
132: 
133: Sizes: `h-4 w-4` (small), `h-5 w-5` (standard), `h-6 w-6` (large).
134: 
135: ---
136: 
137: ## Typography
138: 
139: **Inter** (Google Fonts) — connected via `next/font/google` in `layout.tsx`, applied via the `--font-sans` CSS variable.
140: 
141: ```tsx
142: // layout.tsx
143: const inter = Inter({ subsets: ['latin'], variable: '--font-sans' })
144: <html className={cn("font-sans", inter.variable)}>
145: ```
146: 
147: No other fonts allowed.
148: 
149: ---
150: 
151: ## HTTP Requests
152: 
153: Use the native **`fetch`** API (Next.js extends it with caching).
154: 
155: **Server Component (RSC):**
156: ```ts
157: export default async function Page() {
158:   const data = await fetch("/api/v1/products", {
159:     headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
160:     next: { revalidate: 60 }, // ISR optional
161:   }).then(r => r.json())
162: }
163: ```
164: 
165: **Client Component (`"use client"`):**
166: ```ts
167: const res = await fetch("/api/v1/auth/send-code", {
168:   method: "POST",
169:   headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
170:   body: JSON.stringify({ email }),
171: })
172: if (!res.ok) {
173:   const err = await res.json()
174:   throw new Error(err.error)
175: }
176: const data = await res.json()
177: ```
178: 
179: - No axios, no react-query — native `fetch` only
180: - Tokens: `httpOnly` cookies (set by server) or `Authorization: Bearer` header
181: - Errors: always check `res.ok`, parse `{ error: string }` from JSON
182: 
183: ---
184: 
185: ## Form Validation
186: 
187: **Zod v4** + shadcn/ui Form components.
188: 
189: ```ts
190: import { z } from "zod"
191: 
192: const schema = z.object({
193:   email: z.string().email("Invalid email"),
194: })
195: type FormData = z.infer<typeof schema>
196: ```
197: 
198: Form built with shadcn/ui Form components:
199: ```tsx
200: <Form {...form}>
201:   <FormField
202:     control={form.control}
203:     name="email"
204:     render={({ field }) => (
205:       <FormItem>
206:         <FormLabel>Email</FormLabel>
207:         <FormControl><Input {...field} /></FormControl>
208:         <FormMessage />  {/* auto-shows validation error */}
209:       </FormItem>
210:     )}
211:   />
212: </Form>
213: ```
214: 
215: > `react-hook-form` and `@hookform/resolvers` are required for the `Form` component: `npx shadcn@latest add form`
216: 
217: ---
218: 
219: ## URL State Management
220: 
221: **nuqs** — URL search param state management (`useQueryState`, `useQueryStates`).
222: 
223: ```ts
224: import { parseAsString, parseAsArrayOf, parseAsInteger } from "nuqs"
225: import { useQueryStates } from "nuqs"
226: 
227: const [params, setParams] = useQueryStates({
228:   q: parseAsString.withDefault(""),
229:   page: parseAsInteger.withDefault(1),
230: })
231: ```
232: 
233: `NuqsAdapter` is wrapped around `<body>` in the root `layout.tsx`.
234: Use for: search, filters, pagination — anything that must persist in the URL.
235: 
236: ---
237: 
238: ## Working with Dates
239: 
240: **date-fns v4** for formatting and calculations.
241: 
242: ```ts
243: import { format, differenceInDays } from "date-fns"
244: import { ru } from "date-fns/locale"
245: 
246: format(new Date(expiryDate), "dd.MM.yyyy", { locale: ru })
247: differenceInDays(new Date(expiryDate), new Date())
248: ```
249: 
250: **react-day-picker v9** is used internally by the `DatePicker` component (already in the project).
251: 
252: ---
253: 
254: ## Key Conventions Summary
255: 
256: 1. **`"use client"`** — only when `useState`, `useEffect`, or event handlers are needed
257: 2. **Colors** — only from `globals.css` (semantic variables, see table above)
258: 3. **Imports** — use `@/` alias (`@/` = `src/`)
259: 4. **Components** — named export (`export function Foo`), not default
260: 5. **Types** — declare explicitly, no `any`
261: 6. **Icons** — `lucide-react` only
262: 7. **Dates** — `date-fns` only for formatting and calculations
````

## File: docs/frontend/forms-logic.md
````markdown
  1: # Forms — Business Logic Reference
  2: 
  3: ← [Back to Frontend Overview](./README.md) | [Form UI Specs →](./forms/) | [Conventions →](./conventions.md)
  4: 
  5: > **Authority:** This is the single source of truth for all form **logic**: Zod schemas, API contracts, error handling, and post-submit behavior.
  6: > UI design, component selection, and layout are documented in the individual [form files](./forms/).
  7: > **API Contracts Note:** If you need exact API endpoints or schemas and they seem outdated here, always refer to the generated [`docs/api/swagger.json`](../../docs/api/swagger.json) as the ultimate source of truth for the API layer.
  8: 
  9: ---
 10: 
 11: ## Table of Contents
 12: 
 13: 1. [Auth — Login](#1-auth--login)
 14: 2. [Auth — Email OTP Verify](#2-auth--email-otp-verify)
 15: 3. [Employee Profile](#3-employee-profile)
 16: 4. [Inbound Receiving](#4-inbound-receiving)
 17: 5. [Warehouse Zoning](#5-warehouse-zoning)
 18: 6. [Environment Log](#6-environment-log)
 19: 7. [Assembly & Shipment (FEFO)](#7-assembly--shipment-fefo)
 20: 8. [Claims & Defects](#8-claims--defects)
 21: 9. [Product Card](#9-product-card)
 22: 10. [Inventory](#10-inventory)
 23: 
 24: ---
 25: 
 26: ## Hook Location Convention
 27: 
 28: Every form's logic lives in a dedicated hook:
 29: 
 30: ```
 31: frontend/src/hooks/
 32: ├── use-auth-login.ts          → form 01
 33: ├── use-auth-login.test.ts
 34: ├── use-otp-verify.ts          → form 01b
 35: ├── use-otp-verify.test.ts
 36: ├── use-employee-profile.ts    → form 02
 37: ├── use-inbound-receiving.ts   → form 03
 38: ├── use-warehouse-zones.ts     → form 04
 39: ├── use-environment-log.ts     → form 05
 40: ├── use-order-assembly.ts      → form 06
 41: ├── use-claims.ts              → form 07
 42: ├── use-product-card.ts        → form 08
 43: └── use-inventory.ts           → form 09
 44: ```
 45: 
 46: > Hook test file lives in the **same directory** as the hook (`use-xxx.test.ts`).
 47: > Component test file lives in the **same directory** as the component (`my-form.test.tsx`).
 48: 
 49: ---
 50: 
 51: ## 1. Auth — Login
 52: 
 53: UI spec: [forms/01-auth-login.md](./forms/01-auth-login.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-auth-login.ts`
 54: 
 55: ### Required Fields
 56: 
 57: - `email` — required, valid email format
 58: 
 59: ### Zod Schema
 60: 
 61: ```ts
 62: const emailSchema = z.object({
 63:   email: z.string().email("Invalid email address"),
 64: })
 65: ```
 66: 
 67: ### API Endpoints
 68: 
 69: **Request OTP code:**
 70: ```
 71: POST /api/v1/auth/send-code
 72: Body:    { email: string }
 73: 200:     { message: "Code sent", expires_in: 600 }
 74: 404:     { error: "User with that email not found" }
 75: 429:     { error: "Too many requests. Try again later" }
 76: ```
 77: 
 78: **Google OAuth:**
 79: ```
 80: GET /api/v1/auth/google              → redirect to Google
 81: GET /api/v1/auth/google/callback     → { access_token } + Set-Cookie: refresh_token
 82: ```
 83: 
 84: ### User DTO
 85: 
 86: ```ts
 87: type UserDTO = {
 88:   id: string
 89:   email: string
 90:   full_name: string
 91:   role: "admin" | "qp" | "warehouse_manager" | "storekeeper" | "pharmacist"
 92:   ns_pv_access: boolean
 93:   ukep_bound: boolean
 94: }
 95: ```
 96: 
 97: ### Redirects After Successful Login
 98: 
 99: | Role | Redirect |
100: |------|----------|
101: | `admin` | `/admin/users` |
102: | `qp` | `/receiving` |
103: | `warehouse_manager` | `/warehouse` |
104: | `storekeeper`, `pharmacist` | `/search` |
105: 
106: ### Error Handling
107: 
108: | HTTP | Display |
109: |------|---------|
110: | `404` | `<Alert>` "User with that email was not found" |
111: | `429` | `<Alert>` "Too many requests. Try again later" |
112: 
113: ---
114: 
115: ## 2. Auth — Email OTP Verify
116: 
117: UI spec: [forms/01b-email-otp-verify.md](./forms/01b-email-otp-verify.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-otp-verify.ts`
118: 
119: ### Required Fields
120: 
121: - `code` — exactly 6 digits
122: - `email` — passed from previous step via URL query param `?email=...`
123: 
124: ### Zod Schema
125: 
126: ```ts
127: const otpSchema = z.object({
128:   code: z.string().length(6, "Code must be 6 digits").regex(/^\d{6}$/, "Digits only"),
129: })
130: ```
131: 
132: ### API Endpoints
133: 
134: **Verify code:**
135: ```
136: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-code
137: Body:    { email: string, code: string }
138: 200:     { access_token: string, expires_in: number }
139:          + Set-Cookie: refresh_token=...; HttpOnly; Secure; Path=/auth
140: 400:     { error: "Invalid code", attempts_left: number }
141: 410:     { error: "Code expired" }
142: 429:     { error: "Max attempts reached" }
143: ```
144: 
145: **Resend code:**
146: ```
147: POST /api/v1/auth/send-code
148: Body: { email: string }
149: ```
150: 
151: ### Countdown Timer Logic
152: 
153: ```ts
154: // Timer starts on component mount. expires_at comes from the send-code response.
155: const [secondsLeft, setSecondsLeft] = useState(
156:   Math.max(0, Math.floor((expiresAt - Date.now()) / 1000))
157: )
158: 
159: useEffect(() => {
160:   const interval = setInterval(() => {
161:     setSecondsLeft(s => Math.max(0, s - 1))
162:   }, 1000)
163:   return () => clearInterval(interval)
164: }, [])
165: ```
166: 
167: "Resend" button is disabled while `secondsLeft > 0`.
168: When `secondsLeft === 0` → show "Code expired" and activate the button.
169: 
170: ### Auto-Submit
171: 
172: When all 6 digits are entered, the form submits automatically:
173: 
174: ```ts
175: <InputOTP maxLength={6} onComplete={() => form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)()} >
176: ```
177: 
178: ### Email State Between Steps
179: 
180: ```ts
181: // In Login form after successful send-code:
182: router.push(`/auth/verify?email=${encodeURIComponent(email)}`)
183: ```
184: 
185: ### Error Handling
186: 
187: | HTTP | Display |
188: |------|---------|
189: | `400` with `attempts_left` | `<Alert>` "Wrong code. Attempts remaining: N" |
190: | `410` | `<Alert>` "Code expired. Request a new one" + activate Resend |
191: | `429` | `<Alert>` "Max attempts reached. Request a new code" + activate Resend |
192: | `200` | Store access token → redirect by role (see §1) |
193: 
194: ---
195: 
196: ## 3. Employee Profile
197: 
198: UI spec: [forms/02-employee-profile.md](./forms/02-employee-profile.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-employee-profile.ts`
199: 
200: ### Required Fields
201: 
202: - All fields are read-only for the user themselves
203: - Admin can edit: `role`, `ns_pv_access`, `special_zone_access`
204: 
205: ### API Endpoints
206: 
207: ```
208: GET /api/v1/users/me
209: Response: {
210:   id, full_name, email, role, ukep_bound, ns_pv_access,
211:   profile: {
212:     medical_book_scan_url: string | null,
213:     special_zone_access: boolean,
214:     gdp_training_history: Array<{
215:       date: string,        // ISO 8601
216:       course_name: string,
217:       result: "pass" | "fail",
218:       certificate_url: string | null
219:     }>
220:   }
221: }
222: 
223: PUT /api/v1/users/me          → update own profile (non-role fields)
224: POST /api/v1/users/me/medical-book → multipart upload
225: GET /api/v1/users/:id         → (admin) view any employee
226: ```
227: 
228: ### Medical Book Upload
229: 
230: ```ts
231: const onUpload = async (file: File) => {
232:   const formData = new FormData()
233:   formData.append("file", file)
234:   await fetch("/api/v1/users/me/medical-book", { method: "POST", body: formData })
235: }
236: ```
237: 
238: ### Role Label Mapping
239: 
240: ```ts
241: const roleLabels: Record<string, string> = {
242:   admin: "Administrator",
243:   qp: "Qualified Person (QP)",
244:   warehouse_manager: "Warehouse Manager",
245:   storekeeper: "Storekeeper",
246:   pharmacist: "Pharmacist",
247: }
248: ```
249: 
250: ### Conditional Rendering
251: 
252: - `medical_book_scan_url === null` → show "Upload scan" button
253: - `medical_book_scan_url !== null` → show "View" (opens in new tab) + "Update"
254: - `gdp_training_history` → rendered as table
255: 
256: ### Admin API
257: 
258: ```
259: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/:id   { ns_pv_access: boolean }
260: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/:id   { role: RoleEnum }
261: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/:id   { special_zone_access: boolean }
262: POST  /api/v1/admin/users/:id/send-login-link
263: ```
264: 
265: ---
266: 
267: ## 4. Inbound Receiving
268: 
269: UI spec: [forms/03-inbound-receiving.md](./forms/03-inbound-receiving.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-inbound-receiving.ts`
270: 
271: ### Required Fields
272: 
273: - `supplier_id`, `purchase_type`, `invoice_number`, `country_of_origin`, `manufacturer`
274: - `vat_rate`
275: - At least one position with: `product_id`, `serial_number`, `manufacture_date`, `expiry_date`, `quantity`
276: 
277: ### Zod Schema
278: 
279: ```ts
280: const inboundSchema = z.object({
281:   supplier_id: z.string().min(1),
282:   purchase_type: z.enum(["direct", "tender", "state"]),
283:   invoice_number: z.string().min(1),
284:   country_of_origin: z.string().min(1),
285:   manufacturer: z.string().min(1),
286:   vat_rate: z.enum(["0", "10", "20"]),
287:   is_jnvlp_controlled: z.boolean(),
288:   jnvlp_markup: z.number().min(0).max(100).optional(),
289:   positions: z.array(z.object({
290:     product_id: z.string().min(1),
291:     serial_number: z.string().min(1),
292:     manufacture_date: z.date(),
293:     expiry_date: z.date(),
294:     quantity: z.number().int().min(1),
295:   })).min(1, "Add at least one item"),
296: })
297:   .refine((d) => d.positions.every(p => p.expiry_date > p.manufacture_date), {
298:     message: "Expiry date must be after manufacture date",
299:     path: ["positions"],
300:   })
301: ```
302: 
303: ### API Endpoints
304: 
305: ```
306: GET /api/v1/suppliers?q={query}
307: Response: Array<{ id, name, inn }>
308: 
309: GET /api/v1/ref/countries
310: Response: Array<{ code: string, name_en: string }>
311: 
312: GET /api/v1/products/search?q={mnn_or_sku}
313: Response: Array<{
314:   id, mnn, sku, ru_number,
315:   is_jnvlp, is_mdlp, is_ns_pv, cold_chain,
316:   temp_min, temp_max
317: }>
318: 
319: POST /api/v1/inbound
320: Body: InboundSchema
321: Response 201: { id: string, status: "quarantine" }
322: 
323: POST /api/v1/inbound/:id/quarantine-release     (admin / QP only)
324: Body: { qp_user_id, inspection_date, result: "approved"|"rejected", notes }
325: ```
326: 
327: ### Post-Selection Logic (product chosen from Combobox)
328: 
329: 1. `is_jnvlp = true` → auto-enable `is_jnvlp_controlled` + show markup field
330: 2. `is_ns_pv = true` → show warning Alert "NS/PV product. Ensure required permits are in place"
331: 3. `cold_chain = true` → show Cold Chain badge on line item
332: 
333: ### Status After Save
334: 
335: After `POST /api/v1/inbound`, all batches get `status: "quarantine"` — blocked from all movements.
336: 
337: ### Quarantine Release (admin / QP)
338: 
339: ```
340: POST /api/v1/inbound/:id/quarantine-release
341: Body: { qp_user_id, inspection_date, result: "approved"|"rejected", notes }
342: → "approved": batches.status → "available"
343: → "rejected": batches.status → "rejected" + show "Create return to supplier" button
344: ```
345: 
346: ---
347: 
348: ## 5. Warehouse Zoning
349: 
350: UI spec: [forms/04-warehouse-zoning.md](./forms/04-warehouse-zoning.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-warehouse-zones.ts`
351: 
352: ### Zod Schema (zone creation, admin only)
353: 
354: ```ts
355: const zoneSchema = z.object({
356:   name: z.string().min(2),
357:   type: z.enum(["general", "cold_chain", "flammable", "safe_strong"]),
358:   description: z.string().optional(),
359:   temp_min: z.number().nullable(),
360:   temp_max: z.number().nullable(),
361:   humidity_max: z.number().min(0).max(100).nullable(),
362: })
363: ```
364: 
365: ### API Endpoints
366: 
367: ```
368: GET /api/v1/zones
369: Response: Array<{
370:   id, name,
371:   type: "general" | "cold_chain" | "flammable" | "safe_strong",
372:   description, temp_min, temp_max, humidity_max,
373:   stock_count: number
374: }>
375: 
376: GET /api/v1/zones/:id/stock
377: Response: { zone: ZoneDTO, items: Array<{ product_id, mnn, serial_number, expiry_date, quantity, status }> }
378: 
379: POST /api/v1/zones       (admin)
380: PUT  /api/v1/zones/:id   (admin)
381: ```
382: 
383: ### Access Control Logic
384: 
385: - `safe_strong` zone: if `user.ns_pv_access === false` → show placeholder instead of stock data
386: - Zone creation and editing — `admin` only
387: 
388: ### Conditional Rendering
389: 
390: - `temp_min === null && temp_max === null` → display "No temperature restriction"
391: - `humidity_max === null` → display "No humidity restriction"
392: 
393: ---
394: 
395: ## 6. Environment Log
396: 
397: UI spec: [forms/05-environment-log.md](./forms/05-environment-log.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-environment-log.ts`
398: 
399: ### Required Fields
400: 
401: - `shift` — morning or evening
402: - `temperature`, `humidity` — must be within zone limits
403: - `zone_id` — from context (selected zone)
404: 
405: ### Zod Schema (dynamic — receives zone config)
406: 
407: ```ts
408: const envLogSchema = (zone: ZoneDTO) => z.object({
409:   shift: z.enum(["morning", "evening"]),
410:   temperature: z.number()
411:     .min(-50).max(100)
412:     .refine(
413:       (v) => zone.temp_min == null || v >= zone.temp_min,
414:       `Below minimum (${zone.temp_min}°C)`
415:     )
416:     .refine(
417:       (v) => zone.temp_max == null || v <= zone.temp_max,
418:       `Above maximum (${zone.temp_max}°C)`
419:     ),
420:   humidity: z.number().min(0).max(100)
421:     .refine(
422:       (v) => zone.humidity_max == null || v <= zone.humidity_max,
423:       `Humidity above limit (${zone.humidity_max}%)`
424:     ),
425:   notes: z.string().optional(),
426: })
427: ```
428: 
429: ### API Endpoints
430: 
431: ```
432: GET /api/v1/environment-log/today
433: Response: Array<{
434:   zone_id, zone_name, zone_type,
435:   temp_min, temp_max, humidity_max,
436:   morning_log: EnvLogDTO | null,
437:   evening_log: EnvLogDTO | null
438: }>
439: 
440: POST /api/v1/zones/:id/environment-log
441: Body: { shift, temperature, humidity, notes? }
442: 
443: GET /api/v1/zones/:id/environment-log?from=YYYY-MM-DD&to=YYYY-MM-DD&page=1&limit=50
444: 
445: GET /api/v1/environment-log/export?from=...&to=...  (admin / QP only → Excel)
446: ```
447: 
448: ### Pending Entry Logic
449: 
450: - If `morning_log === null` and `Date.now() < 14:00 local` → Badge "Pending"
451: - If a value exceeds `temp_min/temp_max` or `humidity_max` → show `<Alert variant="destructive">` inline in form
452: - After save → `<Toast>` "Data saved. Recorded by: [Name]"
453: 
454: ### Admin / QP
455: 
456: - Can **edit** an already-saved entry ("Correct" button) → `PUT /api/v1/zones/:id/environment-log/:log_id`
457: - Admin sees **all zones** including `safe_strong`
458: 
459: ---
460: 
461: ## 7. Assembly & Shipment (FEFO)
462: 
463: UI spec: [forms/06-assembly-shipment-fefo.md](./forms/06-assembly-shipment-fefo.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-order-assembly.ts`
464: 
465: ### API Endpoints
466: 
467: ```
468: POST /api/v1/orders
469: GET  /api/v1/orders?status=new&type=cito&page=1&limit=20
470: GET  /api/v1/orders/:id
471: Response: {
472:   id, type: "regular"|"cito",
473:   status: "new"|"assembling"|"ready"|"shipped",
474:   destination: { id, name, address },
475:   items: Array<{
476:     id, product_id, mnn, sku, requested_qty,
477:     fefo_recommendations: Array<{
478:       batch_id, serial_number,
479:       manufacture_date, expiry_date,
480:       available_qty,
481:       remaining_life_percent: number,
482:       is_mos_blocked: boolean
483:     }>
484:   }>
485: }
486: 
487: POST /api/v1/orders/:id/confirm-assembly
488: POST /api/v1/orders/:id/ship            (admin / qp / warehouse_manager)
489: GET  /api/v1/orders/:id/quality-registry
490: GET  /api/v1/settings/mos               → { mos_percent: number }
491: PUT  /api/v1/settings/mos               (admin) { mos_percent: number }
492: ```
493: 
494: ### MOS Calculation (client-side)
495: 
496: ```ts
497: const calculateMos = (expiryDate: Date, manufactureDate: Date, mosPercent: number): boolean => {
498:   const totalLife = expiryDate.getTime() - manufactureDate.getTime()
499:   const remaining = expiryDate.getTime() - Date.now()
500:   const remainingPercent = (remaining / totalLife) * 100
501:   return remainingPercent >= mosPercent  // true = NOT blocked
502: }
503: ```
504: 
505: ### Business Rules
506: 
507: - Data sorted by `expiry_date ASC` server-side (FEFO). Client only displays.
508: - `is_mos_blocked = true` → confirm button disabled for that batch
509: - `type: "cito"` orders appear at the top of the list (sorted server-side)
510: - Shipment allowed only for: `admin`, `qp`, `warehouse_manager`
511: - `storekeeper` and `pharmacist` can only confirm assembly (line items)
512: 
513: ### Post-Ship
514: 
515: ```
516: POST /api/v1/orders/:id/ship
517: → Server generates TTN PDF
518: → GET /api/v1/orders/:id/quality-registry → quality certificate PDF
519: → UI shows download links for both PDFs
520: ```
521: 
522: ---
523: 
524: ## 8. Claims & Defects
525: 
526: UI spec: [forms/07-claims-defects.md](./forms/07-claims-defects.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-claims.ts`
527: 
528: ### Required Fields
529: 
530: - `type`, `product_id`, `batch_id`
531: 
532: ### Zod Schema
533: 
534: ```ts
535: const claimSchema = z.object({
536:   type: z.enum(["recall", "return_from_pharmacy", "return_to_supplier", "defect"]),
537:   product_id: z.string().min(1, "Select a product"),
538:   batch_id: z.string().min(1, "Select a batch"),
539:   source: z.string().optional(),
540:   notes: z.string().optional(),
541:   photos: z.array(z.instanceof(File)).optional(),
542: })
543: ```
544: 
545: ### API Endpoints
546: 
547: ```
548: GET /api/v1/claims?status=open&page=1&limit=20
549: Response: Array<{
550:   id, type, status, created_at,
551:   product: { id, mnn, sku },
552:   batch: { id, serial_number, expiry_date },
553:   source: string | null,
554:   photos_count: number,
555:   created_by: { full_name }
556: }>
557: 
558: POST /api/v1/claims
559: POST /api/v1/claims/:id/photos     → multipart (photos: File[])
560: POST /api/v1/claims/:id/close      (admin / QP)
561: GET  /api/v1/stop-signals          → { active: boolean, signals: Array<StopSignalDTO> }
562: GET  /api/v1/recalled-batches/sync (admin) → manual Roszdravnadzor sync
563: PATCH /api/v1/batches/:id/unblock  (admin) → { reason: string }
564: ```
565: 
566: ### Status Config
567: 
568: ```ts
569: const statusConfig = {
570:   open:    { label: "Open",    variant: "warning" },
571:   blocked: { label: "BLOCKED", variant: "destructive" },
572:   closed:  { label: "Closed",  variant: "secondary" },
573: }
574: ```
575: 
576: ### STOP Signal (Automatic Block)
577: 
578: Background worker syncs `recalled_batches` → matching batch: `status → "blocked"`.
579: Client polls `GET /api/v1/stop-signals`. When `active: true` → global Alert rendered outside main layout.
580: 
581: ### Photo Upload
582: 
583: ```ts
584: const uploadPhotos = async (claimId: string, files: File[]) => {
585:   const formData = new FormData()
586:   files.forEach(f => formData.append("photos", f))
587:   await fetch(`/api/v1/claims/${claimId}/photos`, { method: "POST", body: formData })
588: }
589: ```
590: 
591: ### Unblock Rule
592: 
593: "Unblock" button visible to `admin` only, and only for batches where source is **not Roszdravnadzor**.
594: Unblock requires mandatory `reason` field.
595: 
596: ---
597: 
598: ## 9. Product Card
599: 
600: UI spec: [forms/08-product-card.md](./forms/08-product-card.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-product-card.ts`
601: 
602: ### Required Fields
603: 
604: - `trade_name`, `mnn`, `ru_number` (registration #), `atc_codes` (at least one), `dosage_form`, `dosage`, `package_multiplicity`
605: - If `cold_chain = true` → `temp_min` and `temp_max` are required
606: 
607: ### Zod Schema
608: 
609: ```ts
610: const productSchema = z.object({
611:   trade_name: z.string().min(2),
612:   mnn: z.string().min(2),
613:   sku: z.string().optional(),
614:   barcode: z.string().optional(),
615:   datamatrix_gtin: z.string().optional(),
616:   ru_number: z.string().min(1, "Registration # is required"),
617:   atc_codes: z.array(z.string()).min(1, "At least one ATC code required"),
618:   dosage_form: z.string().min(1),
619:   dosage: z.string().min(1),
620:   package_multiplicity: z.number().int().min(1),
621:   is_jnvlp: z.boolean().default(false),
622:   is_mdlp: z.boolean().default(false),
623:   is_ns_pv: z.boolean().default(false),
624:   cold_chain: z.boolean().default(false),
625:   temp_min: z.number().nullable(),
626:   temp_max: z.number().nullable(),
627:   humidity_max: z.number().min(0).max(100).nullable(),
628:   weight_g: z.number().min(0).optional(),
629:   width_cm: z.number().min(0).optional(),
630:   height_cm: z.number().min(0).optional(),
631:   depth_cm: z.number().min(0).optional(),
632: })
633: .refine(
634:   (d) => !d.cold_chain || (d.temp_min !== null && d.temp_max !== null),
635:   { message: "Cold chain products must have a temperature range specified" }
636: )
637: ```
638: 
639: ### API Endpoints
640: 
641: ```
642: GET /api/v1/products?q={query}&is_jnvlp=true&page=1&limit=20
643: GET /api/v1/products/:id
644: Response: {
645:   id, trade_name, mnn, sku, barcode, datamatrix_gtin,
646:   ru_number, atc_codes: string[],
647:   dosage_form, dosage, package_multiplicity,
648:   is_jnvlp, is_mdlp, is_ns_pv, cold_chain,
649:   temp_min, temp_max, humidity_max,
650:   weight_g, width_cm, height_cm, depth_cm,
651:   photos: Array<{ id, url, is_primary }>,
652:   batches: Array<{ id, serial_number, manufacture_date, expiry_date, quantity, zone_name, status }>
653: }
654: 
655: GET  /api/v1/ref/atc        → ATC code reference
656: POST /api/v1/products        (admin)
657: PUT  /api/v1/products/:id    (admin)
658: DELETE /api/v1/products/:id  (admin → soft delete via deleted_at)
659: POST /api/v1/products/:id/photos  → multipart
660: ```
661: 
662: ### Flag Rendering Logic
663: 
664: ```ts
665: const flags = [
666:   { key: "is_jnvlp", label: "JNVLP",      variant: "outline" },
667:   { key: "is_mdlp",  label: "MDLP",       variant: "secondary" },
668:   { key: "is_ns_pv", label: "NS/PV",      variant: "destructive" },
669:   { key: "cold_chain", label: "❄️ Cold Chain", variant: "blue" },
670: ]
671: // Only render flags where product[flag.key] === true
672: ```
673: 
674: ### Search Supports
675: 
676: INN, trade name, SKU, barcode, registration #, DataMatrix (GTIN).
677: 
678: ### Access Control
679: 
680: - `is_ns_pv = true` products: "Stock" tab visible only to `admin` and users with `ns_pv_access: true`
681: - Create, Edit, Delete — `admin` only
682: 
683: ---
684: 
685: ## 10. Inventory
686: 
687: UI spec: [forms/09-inventory.md](./forms/09-inventory.md) | Hook: `hooks/use-inventory.ts`
688: 
689: ### Zod Schema (item entry)
690: 
691: ```ts
692: const inventoryItemSchema = z.object({
693:   actual_qty: z.number().int().min(0, "Cannot be negative"),
694: })
695: ```
696: 
697: ### API Endpoints
698: 
699: ```
700: POST /api/v1/inventory                               (admin / qp / warehouse_manager)
701: GET  /api/v1/inventory/:id
702: 
703: GET /api/v1/inventory/:id/items   (status = in_progress)
704: Response: Array<{
705:   id, product_id, mnn, sku,
706:   batch: { serial_number, expiry_date },
707:   actual_qty: number | null
708:   // expected_qty NOT returned while in_progress
709: }>
710: 
711: GET /api/v1/inventory/:id/items   (status = completed)
712: Response: Array<{
713:   ...same + expected_qty: number, discrepancy: number
714: }>
715: 
716: PUT  /api/v1/inventory/:id/items/:item_id   { actual_qty: number }
717: POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/complete         (admin / qp)
718: POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/writeoff-act     (admin)
719:      Body: { surplus_item_ids: string[], deficit_item_ids: string[], price_group_id: string }
720: POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/samples
721:      Body: { product_id, batch_id, qty }
722: ```
723: 
724: ### Blind Inventory Rule
725: 
726: `expected_qty` is **not returned** by the server while session `status !== "completed"`.
727: Client must **not** attempt to show or cache it during the active session.
728: 
729: ### Item Save
730: 
731: ```ts
732: const onSaveItem = async (sessionId: string, itemId: string, actualQty: number) => {
733:   await fetch(`/api/v1/inventory/${sessionId}/items/${itemId}`, {
734:     method: "PUT",
735:     body: JSON.stringify({ actual_qty: actualQty }),
736:   })
737: }
738: ```
739: 
740: ### Access Control
741: 
742: | Action | Who |
743: |--------|-----|
744: | Start session | `admin`, `qp`, `warehouse_manager` |
745: | Enter actual quantities | all users with warehouse access |
746: | Complete session | `admin`, `qp` |
747: | Netting act | `admin` only |
748: | Cancel session | `admin` only |
749: 
750: ### Surplus/Deficit Netting Act
751: 
752: Offsets surpluses and shortfalls **within a single price group** only.
753: 
754: ```
755: POST /api/v1/inventory/:id/writeoff-act
756: Body: { surplus_item_ids: string[], deficit_item_ids: string[], price_group_id: string }
757: ```
````

## File: docs/frontend/hooks.md
````markdown
 1: # hooks/ — Business Logic Directory
 2: 
 3: ← [Back to Frontend Overview](./README.md) | [Forms Logic →](./forms-logic.md)
 4: 
 5: This directory (`frontend/src/hooks/`) is the **only** place for frontend business logic.
 6: 
 7: ## Rule: No Logic in Components
 8: 
 9: All of the following **must** live in a hook in this directory — never inline in a page or component:
10: 
11: - Form state management (`react-hook-form` + `useForm`)
12: - Zod schema instantiation and validation
13: - API calls (`fetch`)
14: - Derived state or computed values
15: - Side effects tied to business actions
16: 
17: ## Colocation Rule (Go-style)
18: 
19: Test files live **next to** their source:
20: 
21: ```
22: hooks/
23: ├── use-auth-login.ts
24: ├── use-auth-login.test.ts    ← same folder, not __tests__/
25: ├── use-otp-verify.ts
26: └── use-otp-verify.test.ts
27: ```
28: 
29: ## TDD Rule
30: 
31: **Write the test before writing the hook.**
32: 
33: ```
34: Step 1: Write use-xxx.test.ts with scenario (Given/When/Then in comments)
35: Step 2: Present test for review
36: Step 3: Implement use-xxx.ts
37: Step 4: Confirm tests pass
38: ```
39: 
40: A hook is not considered complete until its tests pass.
41: 
42: ## Naming Convention
43: 
44: ```
45: use-{feature-name}.ts
46: use-{feature-name}.test.ts
47: ```
48: 
49: Examples:
50: - `use-auth-login.ts` — login form logic
51: - `use-otp-verify.ts` — OTP verification logic
52: - `use-inbound-receiving.ts` — inbound goods form logic
53: 
54: ## Component Rule
55: 
56: Components in `components/` must be "dumb":
57: - Accept props or call hooks
58: - Handle JSX only
59: - Zero `fetch` calls — all API calls go through hooks
60: - Zero Zod schemas — all validation goes through hooks
61: 
62: ## Logic Specs
63: 
64: For the full list of required fields, Zod schemas, and API contracts per feature,
65: see [`forms-logic.md`](./forms-logic.md).
````

## File: docs/other/git-workflow.md
````markdown
 1: # Git Workflow & Release Process
 2: 
 3: ← [Back to Other Docs](../../README.md) | See also: [`/merge-all` workflow](../../.agents/workflows/merge-all.md) | [`/start-again` workflow](../../.agents/workflows/start-again.md)
 4: 
 5: > **This is the authoritative guide for merging into `main` and managing releases.**
 6: > Procedures below are executed by the AI agent via slash-commands — not manually by developers.
 7: 
 8: ---
 9: 
10: ## Branch Structure
11: 
12: ```
13: main                 ← stable releases only; no direct commits
14: ├── develop-backend  ← all backend feature work goes here
15: └── develop-frontend ← all frontend feature work goes here
16: ```
17: 
18: - **Direct commits to `main` are forbidden.**
19: - All changes reach `main` exclusively via the `/merge-all` workflow.
20: - Code for the backend **only** goes into `develop-backend`.
21: - Code for the frontend **only** goes into `develop-frontend`.
22: 
23: ---
24: 
25: ## Merge-All Workflow (`/merge-all`)
26: 
27: Triggered when a stable release is ready. Full procedure:
28: 
29: 1. **Sync remotes**
30:    ```bash
31:    git checkout develop-backend && git pull origin develop-backend
32:    git checkout develop-frontend && git pull origin develop-frontend
33:    git checkout main && git pull origin main
34:    ```
35: 
36: 2. **Sequential merge**
37:    ```bash
38:    git merge develop-backend
39:    git merge develop-frontend
40:    ```
41:    > If any merge conflict occurs → **STOP**. Resolve manually before continuing.
42: 
43: 3. **Post-merge validation**
44:    ```bash
45:    # From backend/
46:    swag init -g cmd/main.go -o ../docs/api/ --parseDependency
47:    go test ./...
48:    ```
49: 
50: 4. **On success** → proceed to reporting / start-again
51:    **On failure** → create hotfix branch:
52:    ```bash
53:    git checkout -b hotfix/release-repair
54:    # fix all failures
55:    go test ./...
56:    git checkout main
57:    git merge hotfix/release-repair
58:    git branch -d hotfix/release-repair
59:    ```
60: 
61: ---
62: 
63: ## Start-Again Workflow (`/start-again`)
64: 
65: Triggered **only after** `main` is confirmed stable (all tests green, swagger synced).
66: 
67: **Version Tag Format:** `v[Status].[Release].[Hotfix]`
68: 
69: | Digit | Increment when |
70: |-------|---------------|
71: | Status | Major structural or architectural change |
72: | Release | Standard merge from develop branches |
73: | Hotfix | Direct fix applied to `main` |
74: 
75: ```bash
76: # Step 1: Tag
77: git describe --tags --abbrev=0          # check last tag
78: git tag -a vX.X.X -m "Finalized Release vX.X.X"
79: 
80: # Step 2: Reset develop branches to main
81: git checkout develop-backend && git reset --hard main
82: git checkout develop-frontend && git reset --hard main
83: 
84: # Step 3: Push everything
85: git push origin main --tags
86: git push origin develop-backend --force
87: git push origin develop-frontend --force
88: ```
89: 
90: > ⚠️ `--force` permanently rewrites the history of both develop branches. Only run after confirming `main` is stable.
````

134:                 </TableCell>

138:                     <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{user.department || "—"}</span>
139:                   </div>

152:

155:     return (

157:         Заблокирован
158:       </Badge>

161:

164:     employee: { label: "Сотрудник", className: "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90" },

166:   };
167:

169:

172:       {config.label}
173:     </Badge>
174:   );
175: }
176: 
177: function UserActionsDropdown({ user }: { user: UserRow }) {
178:   return (

180:       <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>

182:           <EllipsisVertical className="h-4 w-4" />
183:           <span className="sr-only">Открыть меню</span>
184:         </Button>
185:       </DropdownMenuTrigger>
186:       <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-[180px] animate-in fade-in-0 zoom-in-95 duration-200">
187:         <DropdownMenuLabel>Действия</DropdownMenuLabel>
188:         <DropdownMenuSeparator />
189:         
190:         {user.status === 'unverified' && (
191:           <DropdownMenuItem className="cursor-pointer gap-2 focus:bg-secondary focus:text-secondary-foreground">
192:             <UserCheck className="h-4 w-4" />
193:             <span>Подтвердить</span>
194:           </DropdownMenuItem>
195:         )}
196: 
197:         {(user.role === 'employee' || user.role === 'admin') && !user.is_blocked && (
198:           <>
199:             <DropdownMenuItem asChild>
200:               <Link href={`/profile/${user.id}/admin/settings`} className="cursor-pointer gap-2 flex items-center">
201:                 <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
202:                 <span>Изменить</span>
203:               </Link>
204:             </DropdownMenuItem>
205:           </>
206:         )}
207: 
208:         {user.is_blocked && (
209:           <DropdownMenuItem className="cursor-pointer gap-2 focus:bg-blue focus:text-blue-foreground">
210:             <UserCheck className="h-4 w-4" />
211:             <span>Разблокировать</span>
212:           </DropdownMenuItem>
213:         )}
214: 
215:         {!user.is_blocked && user.status !== 'unverified' && (
216:           <DropdownMenuItem className="cursor-pointer gap-2 text-destructive focus:bg-destructive focus:text-destructive-foreground">
217:             <UserX className="h-4 w-4" />
218:             <span>Заблокировать</span>
219:           </DropdownMenuItem>
220:         )}
221: 
222:         <DropdownMenuSeparator />
223:         <DropdownMenuItem className="cursor-pointer gap-2 text-destructive focus:bg-destructive focus:text-destructive-foreground">
224:           <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
225:           <span>Удалить</span>
226:         </DropdownMenuItem>
227:       </DropdownMenuContent>
228:     </DropdownMenu>
229:   );
230: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/search/components/expiry-status.tsx
````typescript
 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import { differenceInDays, formatDistanceStrict, isBefore, addDays } from "date-fns"
 4: import { ru } from "date-fns/locale"
 5: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
 6: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 7: 
 8: interface ExpiryStatusProps {
 9:   productionDate: Date
10:   expiryDate: Date
11:   className?: string
12: }
13: 
14: export function ExpiryStatus({ productionDate, expiryDate, className }: ExpiryStatusProps) {
15:   const today = new Date()
16:   const daysLeft = differenceInDays(expiryDate, today)
17:   const isExpired = isBefore(expiryDate, today)
18: 
19:   let statusColor = "text-secondary"
20:   let label = "Истек: Нет"
21: 
22:   if (isExpired) {
23:     statusColor = "text-destructive"
24:     label = "Истек: Да"
25:   } else if (daysLeft <= 30) {
26:     statusColor = "text-destructive"
27:     label = "Истек: Критично"
28:   } else if (daysLeft <= 90) {
29:     statusColor = "text-orange-600"
30:     label = "Истек: Скоро"
31:   }
32: 
33:   const formatDate = (date: Date) => date.toLocaleDateString("ru-RU", { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' })
34: 
35:   return (
36:     <div className={cn("flex flex-col gap-0.5", className)}>
37:       <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
38:         Изг: <span className="text-primary">{formatDate(productionDate)}</span>
39:       </p>
40:       <p className="text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
41:         Срок: <span className="text-primary">{formatDate(expiryDate)}</span>
42:       </p>
43:       <p className={cn("text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-tight", statusColor)}>
44:         {label}
45:       </p>
46:     </div>
47:   )
48: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/search/components/filter-section.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client"
  2: import * as React from "react"
  3: import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
  4: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
  5: import { MultiSelect } from "@/components/ui/multi-select"
  6: import { DatePicker } from "@/components/ui/date-picker"
  7: import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/toggle-group"
  8: import { CATEGORIES, WAREHOUSES, TAGS } from "../constants"
  9: 
 10: // Импортируем типы из нашего конфига параметров
 11: import { searchParamsParsers } from "../search-params"
 12: 
 13: interface FilterSectionProps {
 14:   // Используем Inference для типов, чтобы не переписывать их вручную
 15:   params: any
 16:   setParams: (state: any) => void
 17:   resetFilters: () => void
 18: }
 19: 
 20: export function FilterSection({
 21:                                 params,
 22:                                 setParams,
 23:                                 resetFilters
 24:                               }: FilterSectionProps) {
 25: 
 26:   // Функция для удобного обновления одного поля
 27:   const updateField = (field: string, value: any) => {
 28:     // Если значение пустое, передаем null, чтобы nuqs удалил ключ из URL
 29:     const finalValue = (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0) || value === "" ? null : value
 30:     setParams({ [field]: finalValue })
 31:   }
 32: 
 33:   return (
 34:     <div className="border border-border bg-muted/30">
 35:       <div className="p-8">
 36:         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-y-8 gap-x-6">
 37: 
 38:           {/* Название */}
 39:           <div>
 40:             <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-2">Название</label>
 41:             <Input
 42:               className="w-full bg-background border-muted-foreground/20 focus-visible:ring-secondary"
 43:               placeholder="Введите название препарата..."
 44:               value={params.q ?? ""} // Защита от null
 45:               onChange={(e) => updateField("q", e.target.value)}
 46:             />
 47:           </div>
 48: 
 49:           {/* Категория */}
 50:           <div>
 51:             <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-2">Категория</label>
 52:             <MultiSelect
 53:               options={CATEGORIES}
 54:               selected={params.categories ?? []} // ГЛАВНАЯ ЗАЩИТА ОТ ОШИБКИ .length
 55:               onChange={(vals) => updateField("categories", vals)}
 56:               placeholder="Все категории"
 57:             />
 58:           </div>
 59: 
 60:           {/* Склад */}
 61:           <div>
 62:             <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-2">Склад</label>
 63:             <MultiSelect
 64:               options={WAREHOUSES}
 65:               selected={params.warehouses ?? []} // ЗАЩИТА
 66:               onChange={(vals) => updateField("warehouses", vals)}
 67:               placeholder="Все склады"
 68:             />
 69:           </div>
 70: 
 71:           {/* Теги */}
 72:           <div>
 73:             <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-2">Теги</label>
 74:             <MultiSelect
 75:               options={TAGS}
 76:               selected={params.tags ?? []} // ЗАЩИТА
 77:               onChange={(vals) => updateField("tags", vals)}
 78:               placeholder="Выберите теги"
 79:               badgeClassName="bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500/20 border-blue-200"
 80:             />
 81:           </div>
 82: 
 83:           {/* Дата привоза */}
 84:           <div>
 85:             <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-2">Дата привоза</label>
 86:             <DatePicker
 87:               date={params.aDate ?? undefined}
 88:               setDate={(date) => updateField("aDate", date)}
 89:               placeholder="Выберите дату"
 90:             />
 91:           </div>
 92: 
 93:           {/* Осталось дней */}
 94:           <div>
 95:             <label className="block text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground mb-2">Осталось дней</label>
 96:             <Input
 97:               type="number"
 98:               className="w-full bg-background border-muted-foreground/20 focus-visible:ring-secondary"
 99:               placeholder="Количество дней..."
100:               value={params.days ?? ""}
101:               onChange={(e) => updateField("days", e.target.value)}
102:             />
103:           </div>
104:         </div>
105: 
106:         <div className="mt-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
107:           <div className="flex items-center gap-4 grow">
108:             <ToggleGroup
109:               type="single"
110:               value={params.sortBy}
111:               onValueChange={(val) => val && updateField("sortBy", val)}
112:               variant="outline"
113:               className="justify-start h-8 bg-background border border-muted-foreground/20 p-0.5 w-fit"
114:             >
115:               <ToggleGroupItem value="name" className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-tight px-4 h-7 data-[state=on]:bg-secondary data-[state=on]:text-secondary-foreground border-transparent">Имя</ToggleGroupItem>
116:               <ToggleGroupItem value="category" className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-tight px-4 h-7 data-[state=on]:bg-secondary data-[state=on]:text-secondary-foreground border-transparent">Категория</ToggleGroupItem>
117:               <ToggleGroupItem value="warehouse" className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-tight px-4 h-7 data-[state=on]:bg-secondary data-[state=on]:text-secondary-foreground border-transparent">Склад</ToggleGroupItem>
118:               <ToggleGroupItem value="quantity" className="text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-tight px-4 h-7 data-[state=on]:bg-secondary data-[state=on]:text-secondary-foreground border-transparent">Кол-во</ToggleGroupItem>
119:             </ToggleGroup>
120:           </div>
121: 
122:           <div className="flex justify-end gap-4 min-w-fit">
123:             <Button variant="ghost" className="text-muted-foreground" onClick={resetFilters}>
124:               Сбросить всё
125:             </Button>
126:             {/* Кнопка "Применить" теперь по сути декоративная, 
127:                 так как nuqs обновляет всё на лету. Но оставим её для UX. */}
128:             <Button
129:               className="bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 px-8"
130:               onClick={() => {/* Можно добавить принудительный рефетч данных */}}
131:             >
132:               Применить фильтры
133:             </Button>
134:           </div>
135:         </div>
136:       </div>
137:     </div>
138:   )
139: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/search/components/results-table.tsx
````typescript
  1: import { ChevronUp, ChevronDown, ChevronsUpDown } from "lucide-react"
  2: import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@/components/ui/table"
  3: import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
  4: import { Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationNext, PaginationPrevious } from "@/components/ui/pagination"
  5: import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from "@/components/ui/toggle-group"
  6: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
  7: import { Medicament, SortOrder } from "../types"
  8: import { TAGS } from "../constants"
  9: import { ExpiryStatus } from "./expiry-status"
 10: 
 11: interface ResultsTableProps {
 12:   data: Medicament[]
 13:   sortBy: keyof Medicament | ""
 14:   sortOrder: SortOrder
 15:   onSort: (field: keyof Medicament) => void
 16:   pageSize: string
 17:   onPageSizeChange: (v: string) => void
 18: }
 19: 
 20: export function ResultsTable({
 21:   data,
 22:   sortBy,
 23:   sortOrder,
 24:   onSort,
 25:   pageSize,
 26:   onPageSizeChange
 27: }: ResultsTableProps) {
 28:   const renderSortIcon = (field: keyof Medicament) => {
 29:     if (sortBy !== field || sortOrder === "none") return <ChevronsUpDown className="ml-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
 30:     if (sortOrder === "asc") return <ChevronUp className="ml-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-primary" />
 31:     return <ChevronDown className="ml-2 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 text-primary" />
 32:   }
 33: 
 34:   return (
 35:     <div className="overflow-hidden border border-border">
 36:       <div className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between border-b border-border px-6 py-4">
 37:         <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 38:           <span className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-tight">Список препаратов</span>
 39:           <ToggleGroup type="single" value={pageSize} onValueChange={(v) => v && onPageSizeChange(v)} className="bg-muted p-0.5 h-8">
 40:             {["5", "10", "15", "20"].map(v => (
 41:               <ToggleGroupItem key={v} value={v} className="px-4 text-xs h-7 data-[state=on]:bg-background data-[state=on]:shadow-sm">{v}</ToggleGroupItem>
 42:             ))}
 43:           </ToggleGroup>
 44:         </div>
 45:         <span className="text-xs font-bold uppercase text-muted-foreground">Обновлено 5 мин. назад</span>
 46:       </div>
 47: 
 48:       <div className="p-0">
 49:         <Table>
 50:           <TableHeader className="bg-muted/30">
 51:             <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent">
 52:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto cursor-pointer select-none" onClick={() => onSort("name")}>
 53:                 <div className="flex items-center">Название {renderSortIcon("name")}</div>
 54:               </TableHead>
 55:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto cursor-pointer select-none" onClick={() => onSort("category")}>
 56:                 <div className="flex items-center">Категория {renderSortIcon("category")}</div>
 57:               </TableHead>
 58:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto">Теги</TableHead>
 59:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto cursor-pointer select-none" onClick={() => onSort("warehouse")}>
 60:                 <div className="flex items-center">Склад {renderSortIcon("warehouse")}</div>
 61:               </TableHead>
 62:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto cursor-pointer select-none" onClick={() => onSort("quantity")}>
 63:                 <div className="flex items-center">Количество {renderSortIcon("quantity")}</div>
 64:               </TableHead>
 65:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto cursor-pointer select-none" onClick={() => onSort("arrivalDate")}>
 66:                 <div className="flex items-center">Дата привоза {renderSortIcon("arrivalDate")}</div>
 67:               </TableHead>
 68:               <TableHead className="px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground h-auto cursor-pointer select-none" onClick={() => onSort("expiryDate")}>
 69:                 <div className="flex items-center">Срок годности {renderSortIcon("expiryDate")}</div>
 70:               </TableHead>
 71:             </TableRow>
 72:           </TableHeader>
 73:           <TableBody>
 74:             {data.map((item) => (
 75:               <TableRow key={item.id} className="group">
 76:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
 77:                   <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 78:                     <div className={cn("w-1.5 h-8 shrink-0", item.tags.includes("critical") ? "bg-destructive" : item.tags.includes("warning") ? "bg-orange-400" : "bg-secondary")}></div>
 79:                     <div>
 80:                       <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary">{item.name}</p>
 81:                       <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Batch: {item.batch}</p>
 82:                     </div>
 83:                   </div>
 84:                 </TableCell>
 85:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
 86:                   <Badge variant="outline" className="bg-secondary/10 text-secondary border-transparent font-bold tracking-tight">{item.category}</Badge>
 87:                 </TableCell>
 88:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
 89:                   <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
 90:                     {item.tags.map(tagValue => {
 91:                       const tag = TAGS.find(t => t.value === tagValue)
 92:                       return <Badge key={tagValue} variant="secondary" className="bg-blue/10 text-blue hover:bg-blue/20 border-transparent text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider">{tag?.label || tagValue}</Badge>
 93:                     })}
 94:                   </div>
 95:                 </TableCell>
 96:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
 97:                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">{item.warehouse}</p>
 98:                   <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{item.sector}</p>
 99:                 </TableCell>
100:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
101:                   <p className="text-sm font-bold">{item.quantity} <span className="font-normal text-muted-foreground">уп.</span></p>
102:                 </TableCell>
103:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
104:                   <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">{item.arrivalDate.toLocaleDateString("ru-RU")}</p>
105:                 </TableCell>
106:                 <TableCell className="px-6 py-5">
107:                   <ExpiryStatus productionDate={item.productionDate} expiryDate={item.expiryDate} />
108:                 </TableCell>
109:               </TableRow>
110:             ))}
111:           </TableBody>
112:         </Table>
113:       </div>
114:       
115:       <div className="py-4 border-t border-border flex items-center justify-between px-6">
116:         <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Показано 1-{data.length} из 1,284 результатов</p>
117:         <Pagination className="w-auto mx-0">
118:           <PaginationContent>
119:             <PaginationItem><PaginationPrevious href="#" onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()} /></PaginationItem>
120:             <PaginationItem><PaginationLink href="#" isActive onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()}>1</PaginationLink></PaginationItem>
121:             <PaginationItem><PaginationLink href="#" onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()}>2</PaginationLink></PaginationItem>
122:             <PaginationItem><PaginationLink href="#" onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()}>3</PaginationLink></PaginationItem>
123:             <PaginationItem><PaginationNext href="#" onClick={(e) => e.preventDefault()} /></PaginationItem>
124:           </PaginationContent>
125:         </Pagination>
126:       </div>
127:     </div>
128:   )
129: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/(app)/search/search-interface.tsx
````typescript
  1: "use client"
  2: 
  3: import { useMemo, useCallback } from "react"
  4: import { useQueryStates } from 'nuqs'
  5: import { searchParamsParsers } from "./search-params"
  6: import { SearchHeader } from "./components/search-header"
  7: import { FilterSection } from "./components/filter-section"
  8: import { ResultsTable } from "./components/results-table"
  9: import { Medicament, SortOrder } from "./types"
 10: import { MOCK_DATA } from "./data"
 11: 
 12: export function SearchInterface() {
 13:   // 1. Синхронизация с URL через nuqs
 14:   const [params, setParams] = useQueryStates(searchParamsParsers, {
 15:     shallow: true, // Обновляет URL без перезагрузки страницы (SPA style)
 16:     history: 'replace' // Не забивает историю браузера каждым символом поиска
 17:   })
 18: 
 19:   // 2. Логика обработки данных (Фильтрация + Сортировка)
 20:   const processedData = useMemo(() => {
 21:     let result = [...MOCK_DATA]
 22: 
 23:     // --- ФИЛЬТРАЦИЯ ---
 24:     if (params.q) {
 25:       const query = params.q.toLowerCase()
 26:       result = result.filter(item => item.name.toLowerCase().includes(query))
 27:     }
 28: 
 29:     if (params.categories.length > 0) {
 30:       result = result.filter(item => params.categories.includes(item.category))
 31:     }
 32: 
 33:     if (params.warehouses.length > 0) {
 34:       result = result.filter(item => params.warehouses.includes(item.warehouse))
 35:     }
 36: 
 37:     // Фильтр по дате прихода (если есть)
 38:     if (params.aDate) {
 39:       result = result.filter(item =>
 40:         new Date(item.arrivalDate).toDateString() === params.aDate!.toDateString()
 41:       )
 42:     }
 43: 
 44:     // --- СОРТИРОВКА ---
 45:     if (params.sortOrder !== "none") {
 46:       result.sort((a, b) => {
 47:         const aValue = a[params.sortBy as keyof Medicament]
 48:         const bValue = b[params.sortBy as keyof Medicament]
 49: 
 50:         const modifier = params.sortOrder === "asc" ? 1 : -1
 51: 
 52:         if (aValue instanceof Date && bValue instanceof Date) {
 53:           return (aValue.getTime() - bValue.getTime()) * modifier
 54:         }
 55:         return (aValue > bValue ? 1 : -1) * modifier
 56:       })
 57:     }
 58: 
 59:     // --- ПАГИНАЦИЯ (лимит) ---
 60:     return result.slice(0, params.limit)
 61:   }, [params])
 62: 
 63:   // 3. Обработчики действий
 64:   const handleSort = useCallback((field: keyof Medicament) => {
 65:     setParams(prev => {
 66:       const isCurrentField = prev.sortBy === field
 67:       const nextOrder: SortOrder =
 68:         isCurrentField && prev.sortOrder === "asc" ? "desc" :
 69:           isCurrentField && prev.sortOrder === "desc" ? "none" : "asc"
 70: 
 71:       return {
 72:         sortBy: nextOrder === "none" ? "arrivalDate" : field,
 73:         sortOrder: nextOrder
 74:       }
 75:     })
 76:   }, [setParams])
 77: 
 78:   const resetFilters = useCallback(() => {
 79:     setParams(null) // nuqs сбросит всё в default значения из конфига
 80:   }, [setParams])
 81: 
 82:   return (
 83:     <div className="flex flex-col gap-8 w-full animate-in fade-in duration-500">
 84:       <SearchHeader />
 85: 
 86:       {/* Передаем params целиком, чтобы не плодить пропсы */}
 87:       <FilterSection
 88:         params={params}
 89:         setParams={setParams}
 90:         resetFilters={resetFilters}
 91:       />
 92: 
 93:       <div>
 94:         <ResultsTable
 95:           data={processedData}
 96:           sortBy={params.sortBy as keyof Medicament}
 97:           sortOrder={params.sortOrder as SortOrder}
 98:           onSort={handleSort}
 99:           pageSize={params.limit.toString()}
100:           onPageSizeChange={(val) => setParams({ limit: parseInt(val) })}
101:         />
102:       </div>
103:     </div>
104:   )
105: }
````

 1: "use client"
 2: 
 3: import * as React from "react"
 4: import { format } from "date-fns"
 5: import { Calendar as CalendarIcon } from "lucide-react"
 6: 
 7: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 8: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
 9: import { Calendar } from "@/components/ui/calendar"
10: import {
11:   Popover,
12:   PopoverContent,
13:   PopoverTrigger,
14: } from "@/components/ui/popover"
15:

17:   date?: Date
18:   setDate: (date?: Date) => void
19:   placeholder?: string
20: }
21:
