## File: backend/internal/service/auth_service.go
````go
  1: package service
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 	"crypto/hmac"
  6: 	"crypto/rand"
  7: 	"crypto/sha256"
  8: 	"crypto/subtle"
  9: 	"encoding/hex"
 10: 	"errors"
 11: 	"math/big"
 12: 	"strconv"
 13: 	"time"
 14: 
 15: 	"github.com/google/uuid"
 16: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 17: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/mailer"
 18: 	"google.golang.org/api/idtoken"
 19: )
 20: 
 21: type authService struct {
 22: 	userRepo        domain.UserRepository
 23: 	sessionRepo     domain.SessionRepository
 24: 	otpRepo         domain.OTPRepository
 25: 	tokenSvc        domain.TokenService
 26: 	mailer          mailer.Mailer
 27: 	refreshTokenTTL time.Duration
 28: 	googleClientID  string
 29: 	otpHMACSecret   string
 30: }
 31: 
 32: func NewAuthService(
 33: 	userRepo domain.UserRepository,
 34: 	sessionRepo domain.SessionRepository,
 35: 	otpRepo domain.OTPRepository,
 36: 	tokenSvc domain.TokenService,
 37: 	refreshTTL time.Duration,
 38: 	googleClientID string,
 39: 	mailer mailer.Mailer,
 40: 	otpHMACSecret string,
 41: ) domain.AuthService {
 42: 	return &authService{
 43: 		userRepo:        userRepo,
 44: 		sessionRepo:     sessionRepo,
 45: 		otpRepo:         otpRepo,
 46: 		tokenSvc:        tokenSvc,
 47: 		mailer:          mailer,
 48: 		refreshTokenTTL: refreshTTL,
 49: 		googleClientID:  googleClientID,
 50: 		otpHMACSecret:   otpHMACSecret,
 51: 	}
 52: }
 53: 
 54: func (s *authService) LoginWithGoogle(ctx context.Context, idToken, userAgent, ip string) (*domain.TokenPair, error) {
 55: 	payload, err := idtoken.Validate(ctx, idToken, s.googleClientID)
 56: 	if err != nil {
 57: 		return nil, domain.ErrInvalidToken
 58: 	}
 59: 
 60: 	googleID := payload.Subject
 61: 	email, _ := payload.Claims["email"].(string)
 62: 
 63: 	// 1. Try finding by Google ID
 64: 	u, err := s.userRepo.FindByGoogleID(ctx, googleID)
 65: 	if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, domain.ErrUserNotFound) {
 66: 		return nil, err
 67: 	}
 68: 
 69: 	if u != nil {
 70: 		return s.issueTokens(ctx, u, userAgent, ip)
 71: 	}
 72: 
 73: 	// 2. Try finding by Email and link Google ID
 74: 	if email != "" {
 75: 		u, err = s.userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email)
 76: 		if err != nil && !errors.Is(err, domain.ErrUserNotFound) {
 77: 			return nil, err
 78: 		}
 79: 
 80: 		if u != nil {
 81: 			if err := s.userRepo.LinkGoogle(ctx, u.ID, googleID); err != nil {
 82: 				return nil, err
 83: 			}
 84: 			u.GoogleID = &googleID
 85: 			return s.issueTokens(ctx, u, userAgent, ip)
 86: 		}
 87: 	}
 88: 
 89: 	// 3. New user — auto-register with default role pharmacist
 90: 	newUser := &domain.User{
 91: 		Email:    email,
 92: 		GoogleID: &googleID,
 93: 		Role:     domain.RolePharmacist,
 94: 	}
 95: 
 96: 	created, err := s.userRepo.Create(ctx, newUser)
 97: 	if err != nil {
 98: 		return nil, err
 99: 	}
100: 
101: 	return s.issueTokens(ctx, created, userAgent, ip)
102: }
103: 
104: func (s *authService) LoginWithTelegram(ctx context.Context, data domain.TelegramAuthData, userAgent, ip string) (*domain.TokenPair, error) {
105: 	// TODO: verify Telegram hash with bot token
106: 	panic("LoginWithTelegram not implemented: need Telegram hash validator")
107: }
108: 
109: func (s *authService) RefreshTokens(ctx context.Context, oldRefreshToken string, meta domain.SessionMeta) (*domain.TokenPair, error) {
110: 	hash := s.tokenSvc.HashToken(oldRefreshToken)
111: 	session, err := s.sessionRepo.FindByTokenHash(ctx, hash)
112: 	if err != nil {
113: 		return nil, domain.ErrInvalidCreds
114: 	}
115: 
116: 	// Token theft detection: reused revoked token → revoke all sessions
117: 	if session.RevokedAt != nil {
118: 		_ = s.sessionRepo.RevokeAllForUser(ctx, session.UserID)
119: 		return nil, domain.ErrSessionNotFound
120: 	}
121: 
122: 	if time.Now().After(session.ExpiresAt) {
123: 		return nil, domain.ErrTokenExpired
124: 	}
125: 
126: 	// Revoke old session
127: 	if err := s.sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, session.ID); err != nil {
128: 		return nil, err
129: 	}
130: 
131: 	user, err := s.userRepo.FindByID(ctx, session.UserID)
132: 	if err != nil {
133: 		return nil, err
134: 	}
135: 
136: 	return s.issueTokens(ctx, user, meta.UserAgent, meta.IPAddress)
137: }
138: 
139: func (s *authService) RevokeSession(ctx context.Context, sessionID uuid.UUID, callerID int, callerRole domain.UserRole) error {
140: 	sess, err := s.sessionRepo.FindByID(ctx, sessionID)
141: 	if err != nil {
142: 		return err
143: 	}
144: 	if sess.UserID != callerID && callerRole != domain.RoleAdmin {
145: 		return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
146: 	}
147: 	return s.sessionRepo.Revoke(ctx, sessionID)
148: }
149: 
150: func (s *authService) AssignRole(ctx context.Context, adminID int, adminRole domain.UserRole, targetUserID int, role domain.UserRole) error {
151: 	if adminRole != domain.RoleAdmin {
152: 		return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
153: 	}
154: 	return s.userRepo.UpdateRole(ctx, targetUserID, role)
155: }
156: 
157: func (s *authService) SetBlocked(ctx context.Context, adminID int, adminRole domain.UserRole, targetUserID int, blocked bool) error {
158: 	if adminRole != domain.RoleAdmin {
159: 		return domain.ErrInsufficientPerms
160: 	}
161: 	return s.userRepo.SetBlocked(ctx, targetUserID, blocked)
162: }
163: 
164: func generateOTPCode() string {
165: 	max := big.NewInt(1000000)
166: 	n, err := rand.Int(rand.Reader, max)
167: 	if err != nil {
168: 		// Fallback if crypto/rand fails
169: 		return "000000"
170: 	}
171: 	code := strconv.FormatInt(n.Int64(), 10)
172: 	for len(code) < 6 {
173: 		code = "0" + code
174: 	}
175: 	return code
176: }
177: 
178: func hmacSHA256(data, secret string) string {
179: 	h := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))
180: 	h.Write([]byte(data))
181: 	return hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil))
182: }
183: 
184: func (s *authService) RegisterByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) error {
185: 	taken, err := s.userRepo.IsEmailTaken(ctx, email)
186: 	if err != nil {
187: 		return err
188: 	}
189: 	if taken {
190: 		return domain.ErrEmailTaken
191: 	}
192: 
193: 	newUser := &domain.User{
194: 		Email: email,
195: 		Role:  domain.RolePharmacist, // lowest-privilege role
196: 	}
197: 	created, err := s.userRepo.Create(ctx, newUser)
198: 	if err != nil {
199: 		return err
200: 	}
201: 
202: 	// Reuse OTP generation logic
203: 	code := generateOTPCode()
204: 	hash := hmacSHA256(code, s.otpHMACSecret)
205: 	if err := s.otpRepo.Store(ctx, created.ID, hash); err != nil {
206: 		return err
207: 	}
208: 
209: 	return s.mailer.SendOTP(ctx, email, code)
210: }
211: 
212: func (s *authService) SendOTPCode(ctx context.Context, email string) error {
213: 	user, err := s.userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email)
214: 	if err != nil {
215: 		return err // ErrUserNotFound → mapped to 404
216: 	}
217: 
218: 	// Rate-limit check
219: 	otpData, err := s.otpRepo.Get(ctx, user.ID)
220: 	if err == nil && otpData.Attempts >= domain.OTPMaxAttempts {
221: 		return domain.ErrOTPMaxAttempts
222: 	}
223: 
224: 	code := generateOTPCode()
225: 	hash := hmacSHA256(code, s.otpHMACSecret)
226: 
227: 	if err := s.otpRepo.Store(ctx, user.ID, hash); err != nil {
228: 		return err
229: 	}
230: 
231: 	return s.mailer.SendOTP(ctx, email, code)
232: }
233: 
234: func (s *authService) VerifyOTPCode(ctx context.Context, email, code string, meta domain.SessionMeta) (*domain.TokenPair, error) {
235: 	user, err := s.userRepo.FindByEmail(ctx, email)
236: 	if err != nil {
237: 		return nil, err // ErrUserNotFound
238: 	}
239: 	if user.IsBlocked {
240: 		return nil, domain.ErrUserBlocked
241: 	}
242: 
243: 	otpData, err := s.otpRepo.Get(ctx, user.ID)
244: 	if err != nil {
245: 		return nil, domain.ErrOTPNotFound
246: 	}
247: 
248: 	if otpData.Attempts >= domain.OTPMaxAttempts {
249: 		return nil, domain.ErrOTPMaxAttempts
250: 	}
251: 
252: 	expectedHash := hmacSHA256(code, s.otpHMACSecret)
253: 	if subtle.ConstantTimeCompare([]byte(expectedHash), []byte(otpData.CodeHash)) == 0 {
254: 		_ = s.otpRepo.IncrAttempts(ctx, user.ID)
255: 		return nil, domain.ErrOTPInvalid
256: 	}
257: 
258: 	_ = s.otpRepo.Delete(ctx, user.ID)
259: 	return s.issueTokens(ctx, user, meta.UserAgent, meta.IPAddress)
260: }
261: 
262: // issueTokens is a private helper: validates user state, creates refresh session, returns token pair.
263: func (s *authService) issueTokens(ctx context.Context, u *domain.User, userAgent, ip string) (*domain.TokenPair, error) {
264: 	if u.IsBlocked {
265: 		return nil, domain.ErrUserBlocked
266: 	}
267: 
268: 	rawRT, hashRT, err := s.tokenSvc.GenerateRefreshToken()
269: 	if err != nil {
270: 		return nil, err
271: 	}
272: 
273: 	rt := &domain.RefreshToken{
274: 		UserID:    u.ID,
275: 		TokenHash: hashRT,
276: 		ExpiresAt: time.Now().Add(s.refreshTokenTTL),
277: 		UserAgent: userAgent,
278: 		IPAddress: ip,
279: 		Metadata:  make(map[string]any),
280: 	}
281: 
282: 	createdRT, err := s.sessionRepo.Create(ctx, rt)
283: 	if err != nil {
284: 		return nil, err
285: 	}
286: 
287: 	accessToken, err := s.tokenSvc.GenerateAccessToken(u, createdRT.ID)
288: 	if err != nil {
289: 		return nil, err
290: 	}
291: 
292: 	return &domain.TokenPair{
293: 		AccessToken:  accessToken,
294: 		ExpiresIn:    900, // 15 min in seconds
295: 		RefreshToken: rawRT,
296: 	}, nil
297: }
````

## File: frontend/src/app/globals.css
````css
  1: @import "tailwindcss";
  2: @import "tw-animate-css";
  3: @import "shadcn/tailwind.css";
  4: 
  5: @custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));
  6: @plugin "tailwindcss-animate"; /* Правильный импорт анимаций для v4 */
  7: 
  8: /* 1. ТЕМА: Связываем переменные shadcn с движком Tailwind
  9: */
 10: @theme inline {
 11:   --spacing: 0.25rem;
 12: 
 13:   --font-sans: var(--font-sans);
 14: 
 15:   --color-background: var(--background);
 16:   --color-foreground: var(--foreground);
 17:   --color-primary: var(--primary);
 18:   --color-primary-foreground: var(--primary-foreground);
 19:   --color-secondary: var(--secondary);
 20:   --color-secondary-foreground: var(--secondary-foreground);
 21:   --color-muted: var(--muted);
 22:   --color-muted-foreground: var(--muted-foreground);
 23:   --color-accent: var(--accent);
 24:   --color-accent-foreground: var(--accent-foreground);
 25:   --color-destructive: var(--destructive);
 26:   --color-destructive-foreground: var(--destructive-foreground);
 27:   --color-warning: var(--warning);
 28:   --color-warning-foreground: var(--warning-foreground);
 29:   --color-warning-subtle: var(--warning-subtle);
 30:   --color-success: var(--success);
 31:   --color-success-foreground: var(--success-foreground);
 32:   --color-success-subtle: var(--success-subtle);
 33:   --color-blue: var(--blue);
 34:   --color-blue-foreground: var(--blue-foreground);
 35:   --color-blue-subtle: var(--blue-subtle);
 36:   --color-border: var(--border);
 37:   --color-input: var(--input);
 38:   --color-ring: var(--ring);
 39:   --color-card: var(--card);
 40:   --color-card-foreground: var(--card-foreground);
 41:   --color-popover: var(--popover);
 42:   --color-popover-foreground: var(--popover-foreground);
 43: 
 44:   --radius-sm: calc(var(--radius) * 0.6);
 45:   --radius-md: calc(var(--radius) * 0.8);
 46:   --radius-lg: var(--radius);
 47:   --radius-xl: calc(var(--radius) * 1.4);
 48:   --font-heading: var(--font-sans);
 49:   --color-sidebar-ring: var(--sidebar-ring);
 50:   --color-sidebar-border: var(--sidebar-border);
 51:   --color-sidebar-accent-foreground: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground);
 52:   --color-sidebar-accent: var(--sidebar-accent);
 53:   --color-sidebar-primary-foreground: var(--sidebar-primary-foreground);
 54:   --color-sidebar-primary: var(--sidebar-primary);
 55:   --color-sidebar-foreground: var(--sidebar-foreground);
 56:   --color-sidebar: var(--sidebar);
 57:   --color-chart-5: var(--chart-5);
 58:   --color-chart-4: var(--chart-4);
 59:   --color-chart-3: var(--chart-3);
 60:   --color-chart-2: var(--chart-2);
 61:   --color-chart-1: var(--chart-1);
 62:   --radius-2xl: calc(var(--radius) * 1.8);
 63:   --radius-3xl: calc(var(--radius) * 2.2);
 64:   --radius-4xl: calc(var(--radius) * 2.6);
 65: }
 66: 
 67: /* 2. ПЕРЕМЕННЫЕ: Дизайн-система MedicamentHouse
 68:    Палитра: Teal primary (#oklch 0.50 0.14 180) + Cyan secondary (#oklch 0.60 0.16 220)
 69:    Радиус: 0 (острые края по запросу)
 70: */
 71: @layer base {
 72:   :root {
 73:     /* 1. Surfaces & Text */
 74:     --background: oklch(0.98 0.01 220); /* Soft medical background */
 75:     --foreground: oklch(0.15 0.02 240);
 76:     --card: oklch(1 0 0);
 77:     --card-foreground: oklch(0.15 0.02 240);
 78:     --popover: oklch(1 0 0);
 79:     --popover-foreground: oklch(0.15 0.02 240);
 80: 
 81:     /* 2. Core Palette (Teal & Cyan) */
 82:     /* Primary: Deep Professional Teal */
 83:     --primary: oklch(0.50 0.14 180); 
 84:     --primary-foreground: oklch(0.98 0.01 180);
 85: 
 86:     /* Secondary: Clean Clinical Cyan */
 87:     --secondary: oklch(0.60 0.16 220);
 88:     --secondary-foreground: oklch(0.98 0.01 220);
 89: 
 90:     /* Blue: Cyan alias for functional states */
 91:     --blue: oklch(0.60 0.16 220);
 92:     --blue-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
 93:     --blue-subtle: oklch(0.95 0.04 220);
 94: 
 95:     /* 3. Functional States */
 96:     --muted: oklch(0.94 0.02 220);
 97:     --muted-foreground: oklch(0.40 0.05 220);
 98:     --accent: oklch(0.60 0.16 220 / 0.1); /* Subtle Cyan accent */
 99:     --accent-foreground: oklch(0.50 0.14 180);
100:     --destructive: oklch(0.55 0.23 25);
101:     --destructive-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
102:     
103:     --warning: oklch(0.75 0.15 65);
104:     --warning-foreground: oklch(0.25 0.05 65);
105:     --warning-subtle: oklch(0.95 0.05 65);
106: 
107:     --success: oklch(0.62 0.17 145);
108:     --success-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
109:     --success-subtle: oklch(0.95 0.05 145);
110: 
111:     /* 4. Borders & UI Controls */
112:     --border: oklch(0.90 0.02 220);
113:     --input: oklch(0.90 0.02 220);
114:     --ring: oklch(0.50 0.14 180);
115:     --radius: 0; /* Sharp corners as requested */
116: 
117:     /* 5. Sidebar (MedicamentHouse Clean style) */
118:     --sidebar: oklch(1 0 0);
119:     --sidebar-foreground: oklch(0.15 0.02 240);
120:     --sidebar-primary: oklch(0.50 0.14 180);
121:     --sidebar-primary-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
122:     --sidebar-accent: oklch(0.60 0.16 220 / 0.1);
123:     --sidebar-accent-foreground: oklch(0.50 0.14 180);
124:     --sidebar-border: oklch(0.90 0.02 220);
125:     --sidebar-ring: oklch(0.50 0.14 180);
126: 
127:     /* 6. Charts */
128:     --chart-1: oklch(0.50 0.14 180); /* Teal */
129:     --chart-2: oklch(0.60 0.16 220); /* Cyan */
130:     --chart-3: oklch(0.62 0.17 145); /* Green */
131:     --chart-4: oklch(0.75 0.15 65);  /* Amber */
132:     --chart-5: oklch(0.55 0.23 25);  /* Red */
133:   }
134: 
135:   .dark {
136:     --background: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
137:     --foreground: oklch(0.95 0.01 240);
138:     --card: oklch(0.14 0.02 240);
139:     --card-foreground: oklch(0.95 0.01 240);
140:     --popover: oklch(0.14 0.02 240);
141:     --popover-foreground: oklch(0.95 0.01 240);
142: 
143:     --primary:            oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
144:     --primary-foreground: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
145: 
146:     --secondary:            oklch(0.70 0.16 220);
147:     --secondary-foreground: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
148: 
149:     --blue:            oklch(0.70 0.16 220);
150:     --blue-foreground: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
151:     --blue-subtle:     oklch(0.20 0.05 220);
152: 
153:     --muted:            oklch(0.20 0.03 240);
154:     --muted-foreground: oklch(0.70 0.03 240);
155:     --accent:            oklch(0.70 0.16 220 / 0.15);
156:     --accent-foreground: oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
157: 
158:     --destructive:            oklch(0.65 0.22 25);
159:     --destructive-foreground: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
160: 
161:     --warning:            oklch(0.80 0.14 65);
162:     --warning-foreground: oklch(0.15 0.04 65);
163:     --warning-subtle:     oklch(0.18 0.04 65);
164: 
165:     --success:            oklch(0.70 0.15 145);
166:     --success-foreground: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
167:     --success-subtle:     oklch(0.18 0.04 145);
168: 
169:     --border: oklch(0.25 0.03 240);
170:     --input:  oklch(0.25 0.03 240);
171:     --ring:   oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
172: 
173:     --sidebar:                    oklch(0.14 0.02 240);
174:     --sidebar-foreground:         oklch(0.95 0.01 240);
175:     --sidebar-primary:            oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
176:     --sidebar-primary-foreground: oklch(0.12 0.02 240);
177:     --sidebar-accent:             oklch(0.70 0.16 220 / 0.15);
178:     --sidebar-accent-foreground:  oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
179:     --sidebar-border:             oklch(0.25 0.03 240);
180:     --sidebar-ring:               oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
181: 
182:     --chart-1: oklch(0.65 0.14 180);
183:     --chart-2: oklch(0.70 0.16 220);
184:     --chart-3: oklch(0.70 0.15 145);
185:     --chart-4: oklch(0.80 0.14 65);
186:     --chart-5: oklch(0.65 0.22 25);
187:   }
188: 
189:   * {
190:     @apply border-border outline-ring/50;
191:   }
192: 
193:   body {
194:     @apply bg-background text-foreground;
195:     font-family: var(--font-sans);
196:     font-feature-settings: "rlig" 1, "calt" 1;
197:   }
198: 
199:   html {
200:     @apply font-sans;
201:   }
202: }
````

## File: docker-compose.yml
````yaml
  1: services:
  2:   backend:
  3:     image: ghcr.io/ArtemChadaev/pharma-backend:${APP_TAG:-latest}
  4:     profiles: ["backend-all", "all"]
  5:     env_file:
  6:       - .env
  7:     ports:
  8:       - "127.0.0.1:${PORT}:${PORT}"
  9:     depends_on:
 10:       postgres:
 11:         condition: service_healthy
 12:       valkey:
 13:         condition: service_healthy
 14:     networks:
 15:       - app_network
 16:     restart: unless-stopped
 17: 
 18:   frontend:
 19:     image: ghcr.io/ArtemChadaev/pharma-frontend:${APP_TAG:-latest}
 20:     profiles: ["all"] 
 21:     env_file:
 22:       - .env
 23:     ports:
 24:       - "127.0.0.1:${FRONTEND_PORT}:3000"
 25:     environment:
 26:       - NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL}
 27:     depends_on:
 28:       - backend
 29:     networks:
 30:       - app_network
 31:     restart: unless-stopped
 32: 
 33:   postgres:
 34:     image: postgres:17-alpine
 35:     profiles: ["backend-all", "all"]
 36:     environment:
 37:       - POSTGRES_USER=${DB_USER}
 38:       - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${DB_PASSWORD}
 39:       - POSTGRES_DB=${DB_NAME}
 40:       - PGDATA=/var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata
 41:     ports:
 42:       - "127.0.0.1:${DB_PORT}:5432"
 43:     volumes:
 44:       - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
 45:     healthcheck:
 46:       test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${DB_USER} -d ${DB_NAME}"]
 47:       interval: 5s
 48:       timeout: 5s
 49:       retries: 5
 50:     networks:
 51:       - app_network
 52:     restart: unless-stopped
 53: 
 54:   migrate:
 55:     image: ghcr.io/ArtemChadaev/pharma-migrate:${APP_TAG:-latest}
 56:     profiles: ["backend-all", "all"]
 57:     command:
 58:       - -path=/migrations/
 59:       - -database
 60:       - postgres://${DB_USER}:${DB_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${DB_NAME}?sslmode=disable
 61:       - up
 62:     depends_on:
 63:       postgres:
 64:         condition: service_healthy
 65:     networks:
 66:       - app_network
 67: 
 68:   migrate-down:
 69:     image: ghcr.io/ArtemChadaev/pharma-migrate:${APP_TAG:-latest}
 70:     profiles: [ "tools" ] 
 71:     command:
 72:       - -path=/migrations/
 73:       - -database
 74:       - postgres://${DB_USER}:${DB_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/${DB_NAME}?sslmode=disable
 75:       - down 1
 76:     depends_on:
 77:       postgres:
 78:         condition: service_healthy
 79:     networks:
 80:       - app_network
 81: 
 82:   valkey:
 83:     image: valkey/valkey:8-alpine
 84:     profiles: ["backend-all", "all"]
 85:     ports:
 86:       - "127.0.0.1:${VALKEY_PORT}:6379"
 87:     volumes:
 88:       - valkey_data:/data
 89:     healthcheck:
 90:       test: ["CMD", "valkey-cli", "ping"]
 91:       interval: 5s
 92:       timeout: 3s
 93:       retries: 5
 94:     networks:
 95:       - app_network
 96:     restart: unless-stopped
 97: 
 98: volumes:
 99:   postgres_data:
100:   valkey_data:
101: 
102: networks:
103:   app_network:
104:     driver: bridge
105:     name: my_diplom_network
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/user.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"time"
 6: )
 7: 
 8: // UserRole — roles defined in the ERP spec.
 9: type UserRole string
10: 
11: const (
12: 	RoleAdmin            UserRole = "admin"
13: 	RoleQP               UserRole = "qp"               // Authorised Person / QP
14: 	RoleWarehouseManager UserRole = "warehouse_manager"
15: 	RoleStorekeeper      UserRole = "storekeeper"
16: 	RolePharmacist       UserRole = "pharmacist"
17: )
18: 
19: // User — clean domain model for a system user.
20: // No gorm/json/validate tags — only business fields.
21: type User struct {
22: 	ID          int
23: 	Email       string    // primary identity (unique, not null)
24: 	GoogleID    *string   // nullable — set when linked via Google OAuth
25: 	TelegramID  *int64    // nullable — set when linked via Telegram
26: 	Role        UserRole
27: 	NsPvAccess  bool      // access to narcotic/psychotropic substances (НС/ПВ)
28: 	UkepBound   bool      // qualified electronic signature linked
29: 	IsBlocked   bool
30: 	CreatedAt   time.Time
31: 	UpdatedAt   time.Time
32: }
33: 
34: // UserProfile — flattened view joining users + employee_profiles.
35: type UserProfile struct {
36: 	User
37: 	EmployeeCode string
38: 	FullName     string
39: 	Position     string
40: 	Department   string
41: }
42: 
43: // UserListFilter — filter for searching and listing users.
44: type UserListFilter struct {
45: 	Query string
46: 	Role  UserRole
47: 	Page  int
48: 	Limit int
49: }
50: 
51: // UserRepository — storage interface for users.
52: type UserRepository interface {
53: 	// Identity resolution
54: 	FindByID(ctx context.Context, id int) (*User, error)
55: 	FindByEmail(ctx context.Context, email string) (*User, error)
56: 	FindByGoogleID(ctx context.Context, googleID string) (*User, error)
57: 	FindByTelegramID(ctx context.Context, telegramID int64) (*User, error)
58: 	IsEmailTaken(ctx context.Context, email string) (bool, error)
59: 
60: 	// Mutation
61: 	Create(ctx context.Context, u *User) (*User, error)
62: 	UpdateRole(ctx context.Context, userID int, role UserRole) error
63: 	LinkGoogle(ctx context.Context, userID int, googleID string) error
64: 	LinkTelegram(ctx context.Context, userID int, telegramID int64) error
65: 	SetNsPvAccess(ctx context.Context, userID int, access bool) error
66: 	SetBlocked(ctx context.Context, userID int, blocked bool) error
67: 
68: 	// Profile
69: 	FindProfileByUserID(ctx context.Context, userID int) (*UserProfile, error)
70: 	List(ctx context.Context, filter UserListFilter) ([]*UserProfile, int, error)
71: }
````

## File: backend/internal/repository/repository.go
````go
 1: package repository
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 5: 	"github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"
 6: 	"gorm.io/gorm"
 7: )
 8: 
 9: // Repository — агрегатор всех репозиториев приложения
10: type Repository struct {
11: 	User            domain.UserRepository
12: 	Session         domain.SessionRepository
13: 	EmployeeProfile domain.EmployeeProfileRepository
14: 	OTP             domain.OTPRepository
15: 	Reference       domain.ReferenceRepository
16: 	Product         domain.ProductRepository
17: 	Supplier        domain.SupplierRepository
18: 	Zone            domain.ZoneRepository
19: 	Inbound         domain.InboundRepository
20: 	EnvironmentLog  domain.EnvironmentLogRepository
21: 	Order           domain.OrderRepository
22: 	Inventory       domain.InventoryRepository
23: 	Claim           domain.ClaimRepository
24: 	Settings        domain.SystemSettingsRepository
25: 	Batch           domain.BatchRepository
26: 	RecalledBatch   domain.RecalledBatchRepository
27: }
28: 
29: // NewRepository создаёт новый слой репозиториев, используя GORM и Valkey
30: func NewRepository(db *gorm.DB, valkeyClient valkey.Client) *Repository {
31: 	return &Repository{
32: 		User:            NewUserRepository(db),
33: 		Session:         NewSessionRepository(db),
34: 		EmployeeProfile: NewEmployeeProfileRepository(db),
35: 		OTP:             NewOTPValkeyRepository(valkeyClient),
36: 		Reference:       NewReferenceRepository(db),
37: 		Product:         NewProductRepository(db),
38: 		Supplier:        NewSupplierRepository(db),
39: 		Zone:            NewZoneRepository(db),
40: 		Inbound:         NewInboundRepository(db),
41: 		EnvironmentLog:  NewEnvironmentLogRepository(db),
42: 		Order:           NewOrderRepository(db),
43: 		Inventory:       NewInventoryRepository(db),
44: 		Claim:           NewClaimRepository(db),
45: 		Settings:        NewSystemSettingsRepository(db),
46: 		Batch:           NewBatchRepository(db),
47: 		RecalledBatch:   NewRecalledBatchRepository(db),
48: 	}
49: }
````

## File: backend/internal/service/service.go
````go
 1: package service
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"time"
 5: 
 6: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 7: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/mailer"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository"
 9: )
10: 
11: // Service — агрегатор всех сервисов приложения
12: type Service struct {
13: 	Auth            domain.AuthService
14: 	Token           domain.TokenService
15: 	EmployeeProfile domain.EmployeeProfileService
16: 	Reference       domain.ReferenceService
17: 	Product         domain.ProductService
18: 	Supplier        domain.SupplierService
19: 	Zone            domain.ZoneService
20: 	Inbound         domain.InboundService
21: 	EnvironmentLog  domain.EnvironmentLogService
22: 	Order           domain.OrderService
23: 	Inventory       domain.InventoryService
24: 	Claim           domain.ClaimService
25: 	Settings        domain.SystemSettingsService
26: 	Batch           domain.BatchService
27: 	RecalledBatch   domain.RecalledBatchService
28: }
29: 
30: func NewService(
31: 	repos *repository.Repository,
32: 	jwtSecret string,
33: 	googleClientID string,
34: 	otpHMACSecret string,
35: 	m mailer.Mailer,
36: ) *Service {
37: 	// Standard TTL configuration: Access Token 15m, Refresh Token 15d
38: 	tokenSvc := NewTokenService(jwtSecret, 15*time.Minute, 15*24*time.Hour)
39: 
40: 	return &Service{
41: 		Auth:            NewAuthService(repos.User, repos.Session, repos.OTP, tokenSvc, 15*24*time.Hour, googleClientID, m, otpHMACSecret),
42: 		Token:           tokenSvc,
43: 		EmployeeProfile: NewEmployeeProfileService(repos.EmployeeProfile),
44: 		Reference:       NewReferenceService(repos.Reference),
45: 		Product:         NewProductService(repos.Product),
46: 		Supplier:        NewSupplierService(repos.Supplier),
47: 		Zone:            NewZoneService(repos.Zone),
48: 		Inbound:         NewInboundService(repos.Inbound),
49: 		EnvironmentLog:  NewEnvironmentLogService(repos.EnvironmentLog),
50: 		Order:           NewOrderService(repos.Order),
51: 		Inventory:       NewInventoryService(repos.Inventory),
52: 		Claim:           NewClaimService(repos.Claim),
53: 		Settings:        NewSystemSettingsService(repos.Settings),
54: 		Batch:           NewBatchService(repos.Batch),
55: 		RecalledBatch:   NewRecalledBatchService(repos.RecalledBatch),
56: 	}
57: }
````

## File: backend/internal/domain/errors.go
````go
 1: package domain
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"errors"
 6: 	"log/slog"
 7: 
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/logger"
 9: )
10: 
11: var (
12: 	ErrUserNotFound            = errors.New("user not found")
13: 	ErrEmailTaken              = errors.New("email already taken")
14: 	ErrInvalidCreds            = errors.New("invalid credentials")
15: 	ErrUserBlocked             = errors.New("account is blocked")
16: 	ErrTokenExpired            = errors.New("token expired")
17: 	ErrInvalidToken            = errors.New("invalid token")
18: 	ErrSessionNotFound         = errors.New("session not found or terminated")
19: 	ErrInvalidTelegram         = errors.New("invalid telegram auth data")
20: 	ErrInsufficientPerms       = errors.New("insufficient permissions for this operation")
21: 	ErrEmployeeProfileNotFound = errors.New("employee profile not found")
22: 
23: 	ErrOTPNotFound    = errors.New("no active OTP code found")
24: 	ErrOTPMaxAttempts = errors.New("max OTP attempts reached")
25: 	ErrOTPInvalid     = errors.New("invalid OTP code")
26: 
27: 	ErrConflict        = errors.New("conflict: resource already exists")
28: 	ErrProductNotFound  = errors.New("product not found")
29: 	ErrSupplierNotFound = errors.New("supplier not found")
30: 	ErrZoneNotFound     = errors.New("zone not found")
31: 	ErrInboundNotFound  = errors.New("inbound receiving not found")
32: 	ErrOrderNotFound            = errors.New("order not found")
33: 	ErrInventorySessionNotFound = errors.New("inventory session not found")
34: 	ErrClaimNotFound            = errors.New("claim not found")
35: 	ErrBatchNotFound            = errors.New("batch not found")
36: )
37: 
38: // AppError is a structured application error that carries
39: // a human-readable message plus arbitrary key-value context.
40: // It wraps an underlying cause so errors.Is / errors.As keep working.
41: type AppError struct {
42: 	// Code is a machine-readable error code, e.g. "user_not_found".
43: 	Code string
44: 	// Message is the human-readable message (may be shown to callers).
45: 	Message string
46: 	// Attrs are structured slog attributes attached to this error.
47: 	Attrs []slog.Attr
48: 	// cause is the wrapped error.
49: 	cause error
50: }
51: 
52: // NewAppError creates a new AppError.
53: func NewAppError(code, message string, cause error, attrs ...slog.Attr) *AppError {
54: 	return &AppError{
55: 		Code:    code,
56: 		Message: message,
57: 		Attrs:   attrs,
58: 		cause:   cause,
59: 	}
60: }
61: 
62: func (e *AppError) Error() string { return e.Message }
63: 
64: // Unwrap makes errors.Is / errors.As see through AppError to the underlying cause.
65: func (e *AppError) Unwrap() error { return e.cause }
66: 
67: // LogError logs the AppError via the context-aware logger.
68: func (e *AppError) LogError(ctx context.Context) {
69: 	args := make([]any, 0, len(e.Attrs)+2)
70: 	args = append(args, slog.String("error_code", e.Code))
71: 	for _, a := range e.Attrs {
72: 		args = append(args, a)
73: 	}
74: 	logger.FromContext(ctx).Error(e.Message, args...)
75: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/auth_handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"errors"
  6: 	"net/http"
  7: 	"time"
  8: 
  9: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 10: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/dto"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/logger"
 12: )
 13: 
 14: //TODO: почему нету описания путей тут всех, а только часть
 15: // NOTE: register and login endpoints removed — authentication is OAuth-only.
 16: // Use POST /auth/google for Google OAuth login.
 17: 
 18: func (h *Handler) refresh(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 19: 	cookie, err := r.Cookie("refresh_token")
 20: 	if err != nil {
 21: 		http.Error(w, "refresh token missing", http.StatusUnauthorized)
 22: 		return
 23: 	}
 24: 
 25: 	meta := domain.SessionMeta{
 26: 		UserAgent: r.UserAgent(),
 27: 		IPAddress: r.RemoteAddr,
 28: 	}
 29: 
 30: 	pair, err := h.service.Auth.RefreshTokens(r.Context(), cookie.Value, meta)
 31: 	if err != nil {
 32: 		// token expired, revoked, or invalid
 33: 		http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{
 34: 			Name:   "refresh_token",
 35: 			Value:  "",
 36: 			Path:   "/",
 37: 			MaxAge: -1, // delete cookie
 38: 		})
 39: 		http.Error(w, "invalid session, please login again", http.StatusUnauthorized)
 40: 		return
 41: 	}
 42: 
 43: 	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{
 44: 		Name:     "refresh_token",
 45: 		Value:    pair.RefreshToken,
 46: 		Path:     "/auth",
 47: 		MaxAge:   15 * 24 * 3600,
 48: 		HttpOnly: true,
 49: 		Secure:   h.cfg.Env == "production",
 50: 		SameSite: http.SameSiteStrictMode,
 51: 	})
 52: 
 53: 	resp := dto.TokenResponse{
 54: 		AccessToken: pair.AccessToken,
 55: 		ExpiresIn:   pair.ExpiresIn,
 56: 	}
 57: 
 58: 	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
 59: 	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(resp)
 60: }
 61: 
 62: func (h *Handler) logout(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 63: 	cookie, err := r.Cookie("refresh_token")
 64: 	if err != nil {
 65: 		h.clearRefreshCookie(w)
 66: 		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
 67: 		return
 68: 	}
 69: 
 70: 	// Hash token and find session
 71: 	hash := h.tokenSvc.HashToken(cookie.Value)
 72: 	_ = hash // session revocation happens via token hash lookup in service
 73: 
 74: 	authHeader := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
 75: 	if authHeader != "" {
 76: 		const prefix = "Bearer "
 77: 		if len(authHeader) > len(prefix) {
 78: 			token := authHeader[len(prefix):]
 79: 			claims, parseErr := h.tokenSvc.ParseAccessToken(token)
 80: 			if parseErr == nil {
 81: 				revokeErr := h.service.Auth.RevokeSession(r.Context(), claims.SessionID, claims.UserID, claims.Role)
 82: 				if revokeErr != nil {
 83: 					logger.FromContext(r.Context()).Warn("failed to revoke session during logout",
 84: 						"sessionID", claims.SessionID.String(),
 85: 						"error", revokeErr.Error(),
 86: 					)
 87: 				}
 88: 			}
 89: 		}
 90: 	}
 91: 
 92: 	h.clearRefreshCookie(w)
 93: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNoContent)
 94: }
 95: 
 96: func (h *Handler) clearRefreshCookie(w http.ResponseWriter) {
 97: 	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{
 98: 		Name:     "refresh_token",
 99: 		Value:    "",
100: 		Path:     "/auth",
101: 		Expires:  time.Unix(0, 0),
102: 		MaxAge:   -1,
103: 		HttpOnly: true,
104: 	})
105: }
106: 
107: func (h *Handler) sendCode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
108: 	var req dto.SendCodeRequest
109: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
110: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid request body")
111: 		return
112: 	}
113: 
114: 	if req.Email == "" {
115: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "email is required")
116: 		return
117: 	}
118: 
119: 	if err := h.service.Auth.SendOTPCode(r.Context(), req.Email); err != nil {
120: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrUserNotFound) {
121: 			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "user with this email not found")
122: 			return
123: 		}
124: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrOTPMaxAttempts) {
125: 			writeError(w, http.StatusTooManyRequests, "too many requests, try again later")
126: 			return
127: 		}
128: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "failed to send code")
129: 		return
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	resp := dto.SendCodeResponse{
133: 		Message:   "OTP code sent successfully",
134: 		ExpiresIn: 600, // 10 minutes
135: 	}
136: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
137: }
138: 
139: func (h *Handler) verifyCode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
140: 	var req dto.VerifyCodeRequest
141: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
142: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid request body")
143: 		return
144: 	}
145: 
146: 	if req.Email == "" || req.Code == "" {
147: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "email and code are required")
148: 		return
149: 	}
150: 
151: 	meta := domain.SessionMeta{
152: 		UserAgent: r.UserAgent(),
153: 		IPAddress: r.RemoteAddr,
154: 	}
155: 
156: 	pair, err := h.service.Auth.VerifyOTPCode(r.Context(), req.Email, req.Code, meta)
157: 	if err != nil {
158: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrOTPNotFound) || errors.Is(err, domain.ErrOTPInvalid) || errors.Is(err, domain.ErrOTPMaxAttempts) { // using ErrOTPNotFound as "invalid or expired"
159: 			writeError(w, http.StatusUnauthorized, "invalid or expired code")
160: 			return
161: 		}
162: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "failed to verify code")
163: 		return
164: 	}
165: 
166: 	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{
167: 		Name:     "refresh_token",
168: 		Value:    pair.RefreshToken,
169: 		Path:     "/auth",
170: 		MaxAge:   15 * 24 * 3600,
171: 		HttpOnly: true,
172: 		Secure:   h.cfg.Env == "production",
173: 		SameSite: http.SameSiteStrictMode,
174: 	})
175: 
176: 	resp := dto.TokenResponse{
177: 		AccessToken: pair.AccessToken,
178: 		ExpiresIn:   pair.ExpiresIn,
179: 	}
180: 
181: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, resp)
182: }
183: 
184: // @Summary     Регистрация нового пользователя по email
185: // @Description Создаёт нового пользователя с минимальной ролью (pharmacist).
186: //
187: //	Аккаунт остаётся неактивным до тех пор, пока администратор
188: //	не назначит пользователю рабочую роль. Сразу после создания
189: //	на указанный email отправляется одноразовый OTP-код (действует
190: //	10 минут), который нужно подтвердить через POST /auth/verify-code.
191: //
192: // @Tags        auth
193: // @Accept      json
194: // @Produce     json
195: // @Param       body  body      dto.RegisterRequest   true  "Email для регистрации"
196: // @Success     201   {object}  dto.RegisterResponse
197: // @Failure     400   {object}  dto.ErrorResponse     "email is required"
198: // @Failure     409   {object}  dto.ErrorResponse     "email already registered"
199: // @Failure     500   {object}  dto.ErrorResponse     "failed to register"
200: // @Router      /auth/register [post]
201: func (h *Handler) register(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
202: 	var req dto.RegisterRequest
203: 	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
204: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid request body")
205: 		return
206: 	}
207: 
208: 	if req.Email == "" {
209: 		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "email is required")
210: 		return
211: 	}
212: 
213: 	if err := h.service.Auth.RegisterByEmail(r.Context(), req.Email); err != nil {
214: 		if errors.Is(err, domain.ErrEmailTaken) {
215: 			writeError(w, http.StatusConflict, "email already registered")
216: 			return
217: 		}
218: 		logger.FromContext(r.Context()).Error("failed to register user", "email", req.Email, "error", err)
219: 		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "failed to register")
220: 		return
221: 	}
222: 
223: 	resp := dto.RegisterResponse{
224: 		Message:   "registered",
225: 		ExpiresIn: 600, // 10 minutes
226: 	}
227: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, resp)
228: }
229: 
230: // @Summary     Проверка доступа к логам (Caddy forward_auth)
231: // @Description Используется Caddy как точка forward_auth перед проксированием на Dozzle.
232: //
233: //	Caddy перенаправляет сюда оригинальный запрос с заголовком Authorization.
234: //	AuthRequired проверяет JWT, RequireRole проверяет роль admin.
235: //	Если оба middleware прошли — возвращает 200 OK и Caddy пускает к логам.
236: //
237: // @Tags        auth
238: // @Produce     json
239: // @Security    BearerAuth
240: // @Success     200  {object}  map[string]string  "ok"
241: // @Failure     401  "missing or invalid token"
242: // @Failure     403  "insufficient permissions (not admin)"
243: // @Router      /admin/auth/check-logs-auth [get]
244: func (h *Handler) checkLogsAuth(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
245: 	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
246: }
````

## File: backend/cmd/main.go
````go
  1: package main
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"context"
  5: 	"errors"
  6: 	"net"
  7: 	"net/http"
  8: 	"os"
  9: 	"os/signal"
 10: 	"syscall"
 11: 
 12: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/bootstrap"
 13: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/config"
 14: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 15: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler"
 16: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/logger"
 17: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/mailer"
 18: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/repository"
 19: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/service"
 20: 	"github.com/valkey-io/valkey-go"
 21: )
 22: 
 23: func main() {
 24: 	// 1. Инициализация логгера
 25: 	logger.Setup(os.Getenv("APP_ENV"))
 26: 
 27: 	// 2. Graceful shutdown контекст
 28: 	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
 29: 	defer stop()
 30: 
 31: 	log := logger.FromContext(ctx)
 32: 
 33: 	// 2. Загрузка конфигурации из .env
 34: 	cfg, err := config.Load()
 35: 	if err != nil {
 36: 		log.Error("failed to load config", "error", err)
 37: 		os.Exit(1)
 38: 	}
 39: 
 40: 	log.Info("config loaded", "port", cfg.Port)
 41: 
 42: 	// 3. Подключение к БД
 43: 	db, err := repository.NewPostgresDB(repository.PostgresConfig{
 44: 		Host:     cfg.DBHost,
 45: 		Port:     cfg.DBPort,
 46: 		Username: cfg.DBUser,
 47: 		Database: cfg.DBName,
 48: 		Password: cfg.DBPassword,
 49: 		SSLMode:  "disable",
 50: 	})
 51: 	if err != nil {
 52: 		log.Error("failed to connect to database", "error", err)
 53: 		os.Exit(1)
 54: 	}
 55: 	sqlDB, err := db.DB()
 56: 	if err != nil {
 57: 		log.Error("failed to get sql.DB from gorm explorer", "error", err)
 58: 		os.Exit(1)
 59: 	}
 60: 	defer sqlDB.Close()
 61: 
 62: 	log.Info("database connection established")
 63: 
 64: 	// 4. Подключение к Valkey (Redis)
 65: 	valkeyClient, err := valkey.NewClient(valkey.ClientOption{
 66: 		InitAddress: []string{net.JoinHostPort(cfg.ValkeyHost, cfg.ValkeyPort)},
 67: 		Password:    cfg.ValkeyPassword,
 68: 	})
 69: 	if err != nil {
 70: 		log.Error("failed to connect to valkey", "error", err)
 71: 		os.Exit(1)
 72: 	}
 73: 	defer valkeyClient.Close()
 74: 	log.Info("valkey connection established")
 75: 
 76: 	// 5. Инициализация Mailer
 77: 	m := mailer.New(mailer.Config{
 78: 		SMTPServer: cfg.MAILER_SMTP_SERVER,
 79: 		SMTPPort:   cfg.MAILER_SMTP_PORT,
 80: 		Username:   cfg.MAILER_USERNAME,
 81: 		Password:   cfg.MAILER_PASSWORD,
 82: 	})
 83: 
 84: 	// 6. Инициализация слоёв: Repository → Service → Handler
 85: 	repos := repository.NewRepository(db, valkeyClient)
 86: 
 87: 	services := service.NewService(repos, cfg.JWTSecret, cfg.GoogleClientID, cfg.OTPHMACSecret, m)
 88: 	handlers := handler.NewHandler(services, services.Token, cfg, repos.User, repos.EmployeeProfile)
 89: 
 90: 	router := handlers.Router()
 91: 
 92: 	// 7. Запуск HTTP-сервера
 93: 	srv := new(domain.Server)
 94: 	go func() {
 95: 		log.Info("server started", "addr", ":"+cfg.Port)
 96: 		if err := srv.Run(cfg.Port, router); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
 97: 			log.Error("server error", "error", err)
 98: 			os.Exit(1)
 99: 		}
100: 	}()
101: 
102: 	// Admin Seeding
103: 	if err := bootstrap.SeedAdmin(ctx, cfg, repos.User); err != nil {
104: 		log.Error("admin bootstrap failed", "error", err)
105: 		os.Exit(1)
106: 	}
107: 
108: 	// 8. Ожидание сигнала завершения
109: 	<-ctx.Done()
110: 	log.Info("shutting down server...")
111: 
112: 	if err := srv.Shutdown(context.Background()); err != nil {
113: 		log.Error("shutdown error", "error", err)
114: 	}
115: }
````

## File: backend/internal/config/config.go
````go
 1: package config
 2: 
 3: import (
 4: 	"context"
 5: 	"errors"
 6: 	
 7: 	"github.com/ilyakaznacheev/cleanenv"
 8: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/pkg/logger"
 9: )
10: 
11: type Config struct {
12: 	Env  string `env:"ENV" env-default:"development"`
13: 	// env-default задает значение, если переменной нет ни в .env, ни в системе
14: 	Port string `env:"PORT" env-default:"8080"`
15: 
16: 	// Настройки Postgres
17: 	// env-required:"true" — приложение упадет с ошибкой, если переменная не задана
18: 	DBHost     string `env:"DB_HOST" env-required:"true"`
19: 	DBPort     string `env:"DB_PORT" env-default:"5432"`
20: 	DBUser     string `env:"DB_USER" env-required:"true"`
21: 	DBName     string `env:"DB_NAME" env-required:"true"`
22: 	DBPassword string `env:"DB_PASSWORD" env-required:"true"`
23: 
24: 	JWTSecret      string `env:"JWT_SECRET" env-required:"true"`
25: 	AdminEmail     string `env:"ADMIN_EMAIL" env-required:"true"`
26: 	GoogleClientID string `env:"GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID"` //Не уверен что надо TODO: если не надо то удалить
27: 
28: 	// Valkey
29: 	ValkeyHost     string `env:"VALKEY_HOST" env-default:"valkey"`
30: 	ValkeyPort     string `env:"VALKEY_PORT" env-default:"6379"`
31: 	ValkeyPassword string `env:"VALKEY_PASSWORD"`
32: 
33: 	// Gmail SMTP
34: 	MAILER_SMTP_SERVER string `env:"SMTP_SERVER" env-default:"smtp.gmail.com"`
35: 	MAILER_SMTP_PORT   string `env:"SMTP_PORT" env-default:"587"`
36: 	MAILER_USERNAME   string `env:"SMTP_USER" env-required:"true"`
37: 	MAILER_PASSWORD   string `env:"SMTP_PASS" env-required:"true"`
38: 
39: 	OTPHMACSecret string `env:"OTP_HMAC_SECRET" env-required:"true"`
40: 	UploadDir     string `env:"UPLOAD_DIR" env-default:"./uploads"`
41: }
42: 
43: func Load() (*Config, error) {
44: 	var cfg Config
45: 
46: 	if err := cleanenv.ReadConfig(".env", &cfg); err != nil {
47: 		logger.FromContext(context.Background()).Warn(".env file not found, loading from environment variables")
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	err := cleanenv.ReadEnv(&cfg)
51: 	if err != nil {
52: 		return nil, errors.New("config error: " + err.Error())
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	return &cfg, nil
56: }
````

## File: backend/internal/handler/handler.go
````go
  1: package handler
  2: 
  3: import (
  4: 	"encoding/json"
  5: 	"net/http"
  6: 	"time"
  7: 
  8: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"
  9: 	"github.com/go-chi/chi/v5/middleware"
 10: 	"github.com/go-chi/cors"
 11: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/config"
 12: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/domain"
 13: 	h_middleware "github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/handler/middleware"
 14: 	"github.com/ima/diplom-backend/internal/service"
 15: )
 16: 
 17: type Handler struct {
 18: 	service             service.Service
 19: 	tokenSvc            domain.TokenService
 20: 	cfg                 *config.Config
 21: 	userRepo            domain.UserRepository
 22: 	employeeProfileRepo domain.EmployeeProfileRepository
 23: }
 24: 
 25: func NewHandler(service *service.Service, tokenSvc domain.TokenService, cfg *config.Config, userRepo domain.UserRepository, employeeProfileRepo domain.EmployeeProfileRepository) *Handler {
 26: 	return &Handler{
 27: 		service:             *service,
 28: 		tokenSvc:            tokenSvc,
 29: 		cfg:                 cfg,
 30: 		userRepo:            userRepo,
 31: 		employeeProfileRepo: employeeProfileRepo,
 32: 	}
 33: }
 34: 
 35: func (h *Handler) Router() chi.Router {
 36: 	r := chi.NewRouter()
 37: 
 38: 	r.Use(cors.Handler(cors.Options{
 39: 		AllowedOrigins:   []string{"http://localhost:3000"},
 40: 		AllowedMethods:   []string{"GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"},
 41: 		AllowedHeaders:   []string{"Accept", "Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-CSRF-Token"},
 42: 		ExposedHeaders:   []string{"Link"},
 43: 		AllowCredentials: true,
 44: 		MaxAge:           300,
 45: 	}))
 46: 
 47: 	r.Use(middleware.RequestID)
 48: 	r.Use(middleware.CleanPath)       // Убирает двойные слэши //
 49: 	r.Use(middleware.RedirectSlashes) // Направляет /path/ на /path
 50: 	r.Use(middleware.Recoverer)
 51: 	r.Use(middleware.Timeout(60 * time.Second))
 52: 	r.Use(middleware.Heartbeat("/ping"))
 53: 	r.Use(h_middleware.InjectIPAddress) // Записывает IP клиента в контекст (используется аудит-логом)
 54: 	r.Use(h_middleware.RequestLogger)
 55: 
 56: 	// Healthcheck
 57: 	r.Get("/health", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
 58: 		writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, map[string]string{"status": "ok"})
 59: 	})
 60: 
 61: 	// Public Auth Routes (OAuth only + OTP)
 62: 	r.Route("/auth", func(r chi.Router) {
 63: 		r.Post("/google", h.googleLogin)
 64: 		r.Post("/register", h.register)
 65: 		r.Post("/refresh", h.refresh)
 66: 		r.Post("/logout", h.logout)
 67: 		r.Post("/send-code", h.sendCode)
 68: 		r.Post("/verify-code", h.verifyCode)
 69: 	})
 70: 
 71: 	// Protected API Routes
 72: 	r.Route("/api/v1", func(r chi.Router) {
 73: 		r.Use(h_middleware.AuthRequired(h.tokenSvc))
 74: 
 75: 		// User profile (own)
 76: 		r.Get("/users/me", h.getMe)
 77: 
 78: 		// Session management (own)
 79: 		r.Delete("/sessions/{sessionID}", h.revokeSession)
 80: 
 81: 		// Admin routes
 82: 		r.Route("/admin", func(r chi.Router) {
 83: 			r.Use(h_middleware.RequireRole(domain.RoleAdmin))
 84: 
 85: 			// Caddy forward_auth gate: validates JWT + admin role before proxying to Dozzle
 86: 			r.Get("/auth/check-logs-auth", h.checkLogsAuth)
 87: 
 88: 			r.Patch("/users/{id}/role", h.adminAssignRole)
 89: 			r.Patch("/users/{id}/blocked", h.adminSetBlocked)
 90: 			r.Delete("/sessions/{sessionID}", h.adminRevokeSession)
 91: 
 92: 			// Admin Users list/edit
 93: 			r.Get("/users", h.listUsers)
 94: 			r.Get("/users/{id}", h.getUserByID)
 95: 			r.Patch("/users/{id}", h.patchUser)
 96: 
 97: 			// Admin Employee Profile routes
 98: 			r.Route("/employees", func(r chi.Router) {
 99: 				r.Get("/", h.adminListEmployeeProfiles)
100: 				r.Get("/{userID}", h.adminGetEmployeeProfile)
101: 				r.Patch("/{userID}", h.adminPatchEmployeeProfile)
102: 			})
103: 		})
104: 
105: 		// Reference data
106: 		r.Route("/ref", func(r chi.Router) {
107: 			r.Get("/countries", h.listCountries)
108: 			r.Get("/atc", h.searchATC)
109: 		})
110: 
111: 		// Product management
112: 		r.Route("/products", func(r chi.Router) {
113: 			r.Get("/", h.listProducts)
114: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getProduct)
115: 			r.Post("/", h.createProduct)
116: 			r.Patch("/{id}", h.patchProduct)
117: 			r.Delete("/{id}", h.deleteProduct)
118: 		})
119: 
120: 		// Supplier management
121: 		r.Route("/suppliers", func(r chi.Router) {
122: 			r.Get("/", h.listSuppliers)
123: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getSupplier)
124: 			r.Post("/", h.createSupplier)
125: 			r.Patch("/{id}", h.patchSupplier)
126: 			r.Delete("/{id}", h.deleteSupplier)
127: 		})
128: 
129: 		// Warehouse zoning
130: 		r.Route("/zones", func(r chi.Router) {
131: 			r.Get("/", h.listZones)
132: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getZone)
133: 			r.Post("/", h.createZone)
134: 			r.Patch("/{id}", h.patchZone)
135: 			r.Delete("/{id}", h.deleteZone)
136: 		})
137: 
138: 		// Inbound receiving
139: 		r.Route("/inbound", func(r chi.Router) {
140: 			r.Get("/", h.listInbounds)
141: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getInbound)
142: 			r.Post("/", h.createInbound)
143: 			r.Patch("/{id}/status", h.updateInboundStatus)
144: 			r.Delete("/{id}", h.deleteInbound)
145: 		})
146: 
147: 		// Environment logs
148: 		r.Route("/env", func(r chi.Router) {
149: 			r.Get("/logs", h.listEnvLogs)
150: 			r.Post("/logs", h.recordEnvLogs)
151: 		})
152: 
153: 		// Orders
154: 		r.Route("/orders", func(r chi.Router) {
155: 			r.Get("/", h.listOrders)
156: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getOrder)
157: 			r.Post("/", h.createOrder)
158: 			r.Patch("/{id}/status", h.updateOrderStatus)
159: 		})
160: 
161: 		// Inventory
162: 		r.Route("/inventory", func(r chi.Router) {
163: 			r.Get("/", h.listInventorySessions)
164: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getInventorySession)
165: 			r.Post("/", h.startInventorySession)
166: 			r.Post("/{id}/count", h.submitInventoryCount)
167: 			r.Post("/{id}/finish", h.finishInventorySession)
168: 		})
169: 
170: 		// Claims
171: 		r.Route("/claims", func(r chi.Router) {
172: 			r.Get("/", h.listClaims)
173: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getClaim)
174: 			r.Post("/", h.createClaim)
175: 			r.Patch("/{id}/status", h.updateClaimStatus)
176: 		})
177: 
178: 		// System Settings
179: 		r.Route("/settings", func(r chi.Router) {
180: 			r.Get("/", h.listSettings)
181: 			r.Patch("/{key}", h.updateSetting)
182: 		})
183: 
184: 		// Batches (Standing stock)
185: 		r.Route("/batches", func(r chi.Router) {
186: 			r.Get("/", h.listBatches)
187: 			r.Get("/{id}", h.getBatch)
188: 			r.Patch("/{id}/status", h.updateBatchStatus)
189: 			r.Post("/{id}/transfer", h.transferBatch)
190: 		})
191: 
192: 		// Recalled (Blocked series)
193: 		r.Route("/recalled", func(r chi.Router) {
194: 			r.Get("/", h.listRecalled)
195: 			r.Get("/check/{serial}", h.checkBatch)
196: 		})
197: 	})
198: 
199: 	return r
200: }
201: func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, data interface{}) {
202: 	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
203: 	w.WriteHeader(status)
204: 	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(data)
205: }
206: 
207: func writeError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, message string) {
208: 	writeJSON(w, status, map[string]string{"error": message})
209: }
````
